            'focus_label' => 'Comparison Focus Test',
            'can_batch_now' => false,
        );
    }
    return $map[$method];
}

function mleAdvisoryMethodRoleLabel($method) {
    $info = mleAdvisoryMethodRoleInfo($method);
    return (string)($info['role'] ?? 'Comparison Signal');
}

function mleAdvisoryMethodTrackLabel($method) {
    $info = mleAdvisoryMethodRoleInfo($method);
    return (string)($info['track'] ?? 'Comparison Track');
}

function mleAdvisoryMethodBadgeKey($method) {
    $info = mleAdvisoryMethodRoleInfo($method);
    return preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_-]/i', '', (string)($info['badge'] ?? 'comparison'));
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildMethodAwareAdvice($method, $hasPending, $pendingRuns, $hasSettingsAdvice, $hasSkaiBatch, $stageLabel, $settingsSummary) {
    $method = mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($method);
    $info = mleAdvisoryMethodRoleInfo($method);
    $methodLabel = mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($method);
    $stageLabel = trim((string)$stageLabel) !== '' ? trim((string)$stageLabel) : 'Learning Stage';
    $settingsSummary = trim((string)$settingsSummary);
    if (!empty($hasPending)) {
        return array(
            'title' => $methodLabel . ' work is in progress',
            'body' => (int)$pendingRuns . ' pending run' . ((int)$pendingRuns === 1 ? ' is' : 's are') . ' waiting for the next official draw result. Do not create another focus test for this lottery until these are scored.',
            'cta' => 'Review pending runs after the draw',
            'state' => 'in-progress',
        );
    }
    if ($method === 'skai' && !empty($hasSkaiBatch)) {
        return array(
            'title' => 'SKAI Precision Focus is ready',
            'body' => 'SKAI is the active learning track and a controlled 9-run Precision Focus batch is ready. Run it in SKAI, then come back after the draw to score the results.',
            'cta' => 'Create or open SKAI Precision Focus Batch',
            'state' => 'ready',
        );
    }
    if (!empty($hasSettingsAdvice)) {
        return array(
            'title' => $info['focus_label'] . ' is forming',
            'body' => $methodLabel . ' is the leading evidence direction. Keep the repeated baseline stable and test one setting at a time. ' . ($settingsSummary !== '' ? 'Current settings clue: ' . $settingsSummary . '.' : 'The repeatable settings profile is still forming.'),
            'cta' => (string)$info['next_if_ready'],
            'state' => $method === 'frequency' || $method === 'heatmap' ? 'baseline' : 'ready',
        );
    }
    return array(
        'title' => $info['track'] . ' is building evidence',
        'body' => $methodLabel . ' is currently the leading direction, but the evidence is still in the ' . $stageLabel . ' stage. ' . (string)$info['next_if_building'],
        'cta' => 'Keep building scored evidence',
        'state' => 'building',
    );
}


function mleAdvisoryFormatSettingLabel($key) {
    $map = array(
        'ai_blend_pct'          => 'Blend Setting',
        'blend_pct'             => 'Blend Setting',
        'ai_percent'            => 'Blend Setting',
        'epochs'                => 'Training Cycles',
        'window_size'           => 'History Window',
        'draws_analyzed'        => 'Past Draws Checked',
        'learning_rate'         => 'Learning Speed',
        'dropout'               => 'Overthinking Protection',
        'hidden_layers'         => 'Pattern Depth',
        'recency_decay'         => 'Recent Draw Focus',
        'sampling_temperature'  => 'Variety Level',
        'diversity_penalty'     => 'Spread Control',
        'gap_scale'             => 'Gap Timing',
        'best_window'           => 'Best History Search',
        'auto_tune'             => 'Auto Adjust',
        'top_n_numbers'         => 'Number Pool Size',
        'top_n_combos'          => 'Combo Pool Size',
        'chain_length'          => 'Sampling Depth',
        'burn_in'               => 'Warm-Up Runs',
        'laplace_k'             => 'Smoothing Level',
        'frequency_weight'      => 'Frequency Weight',
        'skip_weight'           => 'Skip Timing Weight',
        'history_weight'        => 'History Weight',
    );
    $key = strtolower(trim((string)$key));
    return isset($map[$key]) ? $map[$key] : ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $key));
}


function mleAdvisoryBuildBestRecipeDesc(array $settings, $method = '') {
    $method = mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($method);
    $parts = array();

    $add = function($label, $value) use (&$parts) {
        if ($value === null) { return; }
        $value = trim((string)$value);
        if ($value === '') { return; }
        if (count($parts) >= 5) { return; }
        $parts[] = $label . ': ' . $value;
    };

    $mode = '';
    foreach (array('skai_run_mode','training_style','profile','risk_profile','run_mode') as $k) {
        if (isset($settings[$k]) && trim((string)$settings[$k]) !== '') {
            $mode = mylottoexpertBuildSimpleModeLabel($settings[$k]);
            break;
        }
    }
    if ($mode !== '') { $add('Mode', $mode); }

    $blendVal = null;
    foreach (array('skai_blend_ai_pct','blend_ai_pct','ai_pct','blend_percent','blend_pct','ai_blend_pct') as $k) {
        if (isset($settings[$k]) && $settings[$k] !== '' && $settings[$k] !== null) {
            $blendVal = mylottoexpertClampBlendPercent($settings[$k]);
            break;
        }
    }
    if ($blendVal !== null) {
        $add('Blend Setting', mylottoexpertFormatPercentForLabel($blendVal) . '%');
    }

    if ($method === 'skai' || $method === 'skai_prediction' || $method === '') {
        foreach (array(
            'skai_window_size' => 'History Window',
            'draws_used' => 'Past Draws Checked',
            'best_window' => 'Best History Search',
            'auto_tune' => 'Auto Adjust',
            'sampling_temperature' => 'Variety Level',
            'diversity_penalty' => 'Spread Control'
        ) as $k => $label) {
            if (isset($settings[$k]) && trim((string)$settings[$k]) !== '') {
                $v = $settings[$k];
                if ($k === 'best_window' || $k === 'auto_tune') {
                    $v = ((string)$v === '1' || strtolower((string)$v) === 'yes' || strtolower((string)$v) === 'on' || strtolower((string)$v) === 'true') ? 'On' : 'Off';
                }
                $add($label, $v);
            }
        }
    } elseif ($method === 'ai' || $method === 'ai_prediction') {
        foreach (array('epochs'=>'Training Cycles','recency_decay'=>'Recent Draw Focus','dropout_rate'=>'Overthinking Protection','hidden_layers'=>'Pattern Depth') as $k=>$label) {
            if (isset($settings[$k]) && trim((string)$settings[$k]) !== '') { $add($label, $settings[$k]); }
        }
    } elseif ($method === 'skip' || $method === 'skip_hit') {
        foreach (array('draws_analyzed'=>'Past Draws Checked','skip_weight'=>'Skip Timing Weight','hist_weight'=>'History Weight','freq_weight'=>'Frequency Weight') as $k=>$label) {
            if (isset($settings[$k]) && trim((string)$settings[$k]) !== '') { $add($label, $settings[$k]); }
        }
    } elseif ($method === 'mcmc' || $method === 'mcmc_prediction') {
        foreach (array('chain_len'=>'Sampling Depth','walks'=>'Walks','burn_in'=>'Warm-Up Runs','laplace_k'=>'Smoothing Level','decay'=>'Recent Draw Focus') as $k=>$label) {
            if (isset($settings[$k]) && trim((string)$settings[$k]) !== '') { $add($label, $settings[$k]); }
        }
    }

    if (empty($parts)) {
        foreach ($settings as $k => $v) {
            if (count($parts) >= 4) { break; }
            if (is_array($v) || is_object($v)) { continue; }
            $v = trim((string)$v);
            if ($v === '') { continue; }
            $lk = strtolower((string)$k);
            if (in_array($lk, array('id','user_id','lottery_id','source','created_at','updated_at'), true)) { continue; }
            $add(mleAdvisoryFormatSettingLabel($lk), $v);
        }
    }

    return empty($parts) ? 'Settings profile still building' : implode(', ', $parts);
}

function mleAdvisoryEnsureSchemaColumns($db) {
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $perfTable = $prefix . 'skai_learning_performance';
    try {
        $q = "SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($perfTable);
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $perfCols = $db->loadColumn();
        $perfCols = is_array($perfCols) ? $perfCols : array();
        if (!in_array('advice_status', $perfCols, true)) {
            $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$perfTable}` ADD COLUMN `advice_status` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'use_in_advice' AFTER `run_uuid`");
            $db->execute();
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { /* non-fatal */ }

    $settingsTable = $prefix . 'user_saved_settings';
    $advCols = array(
        'advisory_reason'      => "ALTER TABLE `{$settingsTable}` ADD COLUMN `advisory_reason` TEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL",
        'advisory_old_value'   => "ALTER TABLE `{$settingsTable}` ADD COLUMN `advisory_old_value` VARCHAR(255) NULL DEFAULT NULL",
        'advisory_new_value'   => "ALTER TABLE `{$settingsTable}` ADD COLUMN `advisory_new_value` VARCHAR(255) NULL DEFAULT NULL",
        'advisory_setting_key' => "ALTER TABLE `{$settingsTable}` ADD COLUMN `advisory_setting_key` VARCHAR(100) NULL DEFAULT NULL",
        'advisory_proof_level' => "ALTER TABLE `{$settingsTable}` ADD COLUMN `advisory_proof_level` VARCHAR(50) NULL DEFAULT NULL",
        'advisory_method'      => "ALTER TABLE `{$settingsTable}` ADD COLUMN `advisory_method` VARCHAR(50) NULL DEFAULT NULL",
    );
    try {
        $q2 = "SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($settingsTable);
        $db->setQuery($q2);
        $settingCols = $db->loadColumn();
        $settingCols = is_array($settingCols) ? $settingCols : array();
        foreach ($advCols as $colName => $sql) {
            if (!in_array($colName, $settingCols, true)) {
                try { $db->setQuery($sql); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e2) { /* non-fatal */ }
            }
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { /* non-fatal */ }
}



function mleAdvisoryRenderBallListHtml(array $numbers, array $matches = array(), $isActual = false, $isExtra = false) {
    $matchMap = array();
    foreach ($matches as $m) { $matchMap[(int)$m] = 1; }
    if (empty($numbers)) { return '<span class="mle-visual-upcoming">Not saved</span>'; }
    $html = '<span class="mle-ball-list' . ($isExtra ? ' mle-ball-list--extra' : '') . '">';
    foreach ($numbers as $n) {
        $n = (int)$n;
        if ($n <= 0) { continue; }
        $cls = 'mle-ball';
        if ($isActual) { $cls .= ' mle-ball--actual'; }
        if ($isExtra) { $cls .= ' mle-ball--extra'; }
        if (isset($matchMap[$n])) { $cls .= ' mle-ball--match'; }
        $html .= '<span class="' . $cls . '">' . htmlspecialchars((string)$n, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</span>';
    }
    $html .= '</span>';
    return $html;
}

function mleAdvisoryRenderBallSetHtml(array $mainNumbers, array $extraNumbers, array $mainMatches = array(), array $extraMatches = array(), $isActual = false) {
    $hasMain = !empty($mainNumbers);
    $hasExtra = !empty($extraNumbers);
    if (!$hasMain && !$hasExtra) {
        return '<span class="mle-visual-upcoming">' . ($isActual ? 'Upcoming' : 'Not saved') . '</span>';
    }
    $html = '<div class="mle-ball-set">';
    if ($hasMain) {
        $html .= '<div class="mle-ball-set__main">' . mleAdvisoryRenderBallListHtml($mainNumbers, $mainMatches, $isActual, false) . '</div>';
    }
    if ($hasExtra) {
        $html .= '<div class="mle-ball-set__extra"><span class="mle-extra-label">Extra</span>' . mleAdvisoryRenderBallListHtml($extraNumbers, $extraMatches, $isActual, true) . '</div>';
    }
    $html .= '</div>';
    return $html;
}


// [[MLE_DAILY_DISPLAY_UNIFIED]] Render daily/Pick-game values as digit positions everywhere.
// Regular lotteries still use the normal ball renderer. Daily games must never show
// a full combo such as 7628 as one giant ball; each digit remains visible and scorable.
function mleAdvisoryDigitArrayFromComboString($combo) {
    $combo = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$combo);
    if ($combo === '') { return array(); }
    return array_map('intval', str_split($combo));
}

function mleAdvisoryInferComboStringsFromNumbers(array $numbers, $pickSize = 0) {
    $out = array();
    foreach ($numbers as $n) {
        if (is_array($n) || is_object($n)) { continue; }
        $raw = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$n);
        if ($raw === '') { continue; }
        if (strlen($raw) > 1) {
            $out[] = $raw;
        }
        if (count($out) >= 5) { break; }
    }
    if (empty($out) && !empty($numbers) && count($numbers) <= 5) {
        $digits = array();
        foreach ($numbers as $n) {
            $nn = (int)$n;
            if ($nn >= 0 && $nn <= 9) { $digits[] = (string)$nn; }
        }
        if (!empty($digits)) { $out[] = implode('', $digits); }
    }
    return array_values(array_unique($out));
}

function mleAdvisoryRenderDailyDigitPillsHtml(array $digits, array $compareDigits = array(), $isActual = false, $isExtra = false) {
    if (empty($digits)) { return '<span class="mle-visual-upcoming">' . ($isActual ? 'Upcoming' : 'Not saved') . '</span>'; }
    $remaining = array_values(array_map('intval', $compareDigits));
    $html = '<span class="mle-ball-list mle-daily-digit-pills' . ($isExtra ? ' mle-ball-list--extra' : '') . '">';
    foreach ($digits as $d) {
        $d = (int)$d;
        if ($d < 0) { continue; }
        $matched = false;
        if (!$isActual && !empty($remaining)) {
            $idx = array_search($d, $remaining, true);
            if ($idx !== false) { $matched = true; unset($remaining[$idx]); $remaining = array_values($remaining); }
        }
        $cls = 'mle-ball mle-ball--digit';
        if ($isActual) { $cls .= ' mle-ball--actual'; }
        if ($isExtra) { $cls .= ' mle-ball--extra'; }
        if ($matched) { $cls .= ' mle-ball--match'; }
        $html .= '<span class="' . $cls . '">' . htmlspecialchars((string)$d, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</span>';
    }
    $html .= '</span>';
    return $html;
}

function mleAdvisoryRenderDailyComboSetHtml(array $comboStrings, array $actualDigits = array(), array $extraNumbers = array(), array $actualExtra = array(), $isActual = false, $pickSize = 0) {
    $actualDigits = array_values(array_map('intval', $actualDigits));
    $html = '<div class="mle-ball-set mle-daily-visual-set">';
    if ($isActual) {
        $html .= '<div class="mle-daily-visual-actual">' . mleAdvisoryRenderDailyDigitPillsHtml($actualDigits, array(), true, false) . '</div>';
    } else {
        if (empty($comboStrings)) { return '<span class="mle-visual-upcoming">Not saved</span>'; }
        $html .= '<div class="mle-daily-combo-row mle-daily-visual-combos">';
        foreach (array_slice($comboStrings, 0, 5) as $idx => $combo) {
            $combo = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$combo);
            if ($combo === '') { continue; }
            $digits = mleAdvisoryDigitArrayFromComboString($combo);
            $html .= '<span class="mle-daily-combo-chip mle-daily-combo-chip--split">';
            $html .= '<span class="mle-daily-combo-chip__rank">#' . (int)($idx + 1) . '</span>';
            $html .= '<span class="mle-daily-combo-chip__digits">' . mleAdvisoryRenderDailyDigitPillsHtml($digits, $actualDigits, false, false) . '</span>';
            $html .= '</span>';
        }
        $html .= '</div>';
    }
    if (!empty($extraNumbers) || (!empty($actualExtra) && $isActual)) {
        $bonusDigits = $isActual ? array_values(array_map('intval', $actualExtra)) : array_values(array_map('intval', $extraNumbers));
        $html .= '<div class="mle-ball-set__extra mle-daily-visual-bonus"><span class="mle-extra-label">Extra</span>' . mleAdvisoryRenderDailyDigitPillsHtml($bonusDigits, $actualExtra, $isActual, true) . '</div>';
    }
    $html .= '</div>';
    return $html;
}

function mleAdvisoryRenderVisualRunNumbersHtml(array $run, $isActual = false) {
    $isDaily = !empty($run['is_daily']);
    if ($isDaily) {
        if ($isActual) {
            return mleAdvisoryRenderDailyComboSetHtml(
                array(),
                (array)($run['actual'] ?? array()),
                array(),
                (array)($run['actual_extra'] ?? array()),
                true,
                (int)($run['daily_pick_size'] ?? 0)
            );
        }
        $comboStrings = (array)($run['pred_combo_strings'] ?? array());
        if (empty($comboStrings)) {
            $comboStrings = mleAdvisoryInferComboStringsFromNumbers((array)($run['predicted'] ?? array()), (int)($run['daily_pick_size'] ?? 0));
        }
        return mleAdvisoryRenderDailyComboSetHtml(
            $comboStrings,
            (array)($run['actual'] ?? array()),
            (array)($run['predicted_extra'] ?? array()),
            (array)($run['actual_extra'] ?? array()),
            false,
            (int)($run['daily_pick_size'] ?? 0)
        );
    }
    return mleAdvisoryRenderBallSetHtml(
        (array)($run[$isActual ? 'actual' : 'predicted'] ?? array()),
        (array)($run[$isActual ? 'actual_extra' : 'predicted_extra'] ?? array()),
        (array)($run['matches'] ?? array()),
        (array)($run['extra_matches'] ?? array()),
        $isActual
    );
}

function mleAdvisorySplitActualNumbersForRun(array $actualAll, array $savedRow, array $predMain, array $predExtra) {
    $actualAll = array_values(array_filter(array_map('intval', $actualAll), function($n) { return $n > 0; }));
    $pickSize = 0;
    foreach (array('target_pick_size','daily_pick_size','pick_size') as $k) {
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && (int)$savedRow[$k] > 0) { $pickSize = (int)$savedRow[$k]; break; }
    }
    if ($pickSize <= 0) { $pickSize = count($predMain); }
    $extraExpected = 0;
    foreach (array('target_extra_count','extra_count','num_extra_balls_drawn') as $k) {
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && (int)$savedRow[$k] > 0 && (int)$savedRow[$k] <= 2) { $extraExpected = (int)$savedRow[$k]; break; }
    }
    // Do not infer actual drawn extra count from saved candidate count when it is larger
    // than a real extra-ball draw count. EuroMillions can store 5 predicted star candidates,
    // but only 2 Lucky Stars are drawn.
    if ($extraExpected <= 0 && count($predExtra) > 0 && count($predExtra) <= 2) { $extraExpected = count($predExtra); }
    if ($pickSize <= 0 || count($actualAll) <= $pickSize || $extraExpected <= 0) {
        return array('main' => $actualAll, 'extra' => array());
    }
    return array(
        'main' => array_slice($actualAll, 0, $pickSize),
        'extra' => array_slice($actualAll, $pickSize, $extraExpected)
    );
}


function mleAdvisoryActualPartsFromJson($raw) {
    $result = array('main' => array(), 'extra' => array());
    if (!is_string($raw) || trim($raw) === '') { return $result; }
    $decoded = json_decode($raw, true);
    if (!is_array($decoded)) { return $result; }

    $mainKeys = array('main','main_numbers','draw_main','actual_main','numbers','regular_main_numbers');
    $extraKeys = array('extra','extras','extra_numbers','extra_ball_numbers','draw_extra','actual_extra','bonus','bonus_numbers','lucky_stars','stars','lucky_star','lucky_star_1','lucky_star_2','star_1','star_2','powerball','power_ball','mega_ball','extra_ball','extra_ball_1','extra_ball_2');

    foreach ($mainKeys as $key) {
        if (isset($decoded[$key])) {
            $vals = is_array($decoded[$key]) ? $decoded[$key] : explode(',', (string)$decoded[$key]);
            foreach ($vals as $v) { $n = (int)$v; if ($n > 0 && !in_array($n, $result['main'], true)) { $result['main'][] = $n; } }
        }
    }
    foreach ($extraKeys as $key) {
        if (isset($decoded[$key])) {
            $vals = is_array($decoded[$key]) ? $decoded[$key] : explode(',', (string)$decoded[$key]);
            foreach ($vals as $v) { $n = (int)$v; if ($n > 0 && !in_array($n, $result['extra'], true)) { $result['extra'][] = $n; } }
        }
    }

    // Some payloads are nested by labels such as actual => {main:[], extra:[]}.
    foreach (array('actual','draw','result','official') as $parentKey) {
        if (isset($decoded[$parentKey]) && is_array($decoded[$parentKey])) {
            $nested = $decoded[$parentKey];
            foreach ($mainKeys as $key) {
                if (isset($nested[$key])) {
                    $vals = is_array($nested[$key]) ? $nested[$key] : explode(',', (string)$nested[$key]);
                    foreach ($vals as $v) { $n = (int)$v; if ($n > 0 && !in_array($n, $result['main'], true)) { $result['main'][] = $n; } }
                }
            }
            foreach ($extraKeys as $key) {
                if (isset($nested[$key])) {
                    $vals = is_array($nested[$key]) ? $nested[$key] : explode(',', (string)$nested[$key]);
                    foreach ($vals as $v) { $n = (int)$v; if ($n > 0 && !in_array($n, $result['extra'], true)) { $result['extra'][] = $n; } }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    return $result;
}

function mleAdvisoryExpectedExtraCountForVisual(array $savedRow, array $predExtra) {
    $expected = 0;
    foreach (array('target_extra_count','extra_count','num_extra_balls_drawn') as $k) {
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && (int)$savedRow[$k] > 0) { $expected = (int)$savedRow[$k]; break; }
    }
    if ($expected <= 0 && !empty($predExtra)) { $expected = count($predExtra); }
    $gameId = trim((string)($savedRow['target_game_id'] ?? $savedRow['game_id'] ?? ''));
    if ($expected <= 0 && $gameId !== '' && function_exists('getDrawFields')) {
        try {
            $fields = getDrawFields($gameId);
            if (isset($fields['num_extra_expected']) && (int)$fields['num_extra_expected'] > 0) {
                $expected = (int)$fields['num_extra_expected'];
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
    }
    return max(0, (int)$expected);
}


function mleAdvisoryResolveGameIdForVisual($db, array $perfRow, array $savedRow) {
    foreach (array('target_game_id','game_id') as $k) {
        if (isset($perfRow[$k]) && trim((string)$perfRow[$k]) !== '') { return trim((string)$perfRow[$k]); }
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && trim((string)$savedRow[$k]) !== '') { return trim((string)$savedRow[$k]); }
    }
    $lotteryId = 0;
    foreach (array('target_lottery_id','lottery_id') as $k) {
        if (isset($perfRow[$k]) && (int)$perfRow[$k] > 0) { $lotteryId = (int)$perfRow[$k]; break; }
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && (int)$savedRow[$k] > 0) { $lotteryId = (int)$savedRow[$k]; break; }
    }
    if ($lotteryId > 0) {
        try {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select($db->quoteName('game_id'))
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId)
                ->setLimit(1);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $gid = trim((string)$db->loadResult());
            if ($gid !== '') { return $gid; }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
    }
    return '';
}

function mleAdvisoryExpectedExtraCountFromContext($gameId, array $savedRow, array $predExtra) {
    $expected = mleAdvisoryExpectedExtraCountForVisual($savedRow, $predExtra);
    if ($expected > 0) { return $expected; }
    $nameBits = strtolower(trim((string)$gameId . ' ' . (string)($savedRow['lottery_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($savedRow['game_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($savedRow['name'] ?? '')));
    if (strpos($nameBits, 'euromillions') !== false || strpos($nameBits, 'euro millions') !== false) { return 2; }
    if (strpos($nameBits, 'powerball') !== false) { return 1; }
    if (strpos($nameBits, 'mega millions') !== false || strpos($nameBits, 'megamillions') !== false) { return 1; }
    return 0;
}

function mleAdvisoryParseDrawResultsExtraTail($drawResults, $expectedExtra) {
    $out = array();
    $drawResults = trim((string)$drawResults);
    if ($drawResults === '' || (int)$expectedExtra <= 0) { return $out; }
    if (strpos($drawResults, '+') !== false) {
        $parts = explode('+', $drawResults);
        array_shift($parts);
        foreach ($parts as $piece) {
            $piece = trim((string)$piece);
            if ($piece === '') { continue; }
            foreach (preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', $piece) as $numText) {
                if ($numText === '') { continue; }
                $n = (int)$numText;
                if ($n > 0 && !in_array($n, $out, true)) { $out[] = $n; }
                if (count($out) >= (int)$expectedExtra) { return $out; }
            }
        }
    }
    return array_slice($out, 0, (int)$expectedExtra);
}


function mleAdvisoryOfficialOrdinalColumns()
{
    return array(
        'first','second','third','fourth','fifth','sixth','seventh','eighth','nineth','tenth',
        'eleventh','twelveth','thirtheenth','fourteenth','fifteenth','sixteenth','seventeenth','eighteenth','nineteenth','twentieth',
        'twenty_first','twenty_second','twenty_third','twenty_fourth','twenty_fifth'
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryExtractOfficialOrdinalDrawNumbers(array $drawRow)
{
    $out = array();
    foreach (mleAdvisoryOfficialOrdinalColumns() as $col) {
        if (!array_key_exists($col, $drawRow) || $drawRow[$col] === '' || $drawRow[$col] === null) {
            continue;
        }
        $vals = is_array($drawRow[$col]) ? $drawRow[$col] : preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', (string)$drawRow[$col]);
        foreach ($vals as $v) {
            if ($v === '' || $v === null) { continue; }
            $n = (int)$v;
            if ($n > 0) { $out[] = $n; }
        }
    }
    return $out;
}

function mleAdvisoryExtractOfficialOrdinalExtraBalls(array $drawRow, $expectedExtra)
{
    $expectedExtra = (int)$expectedExtra;
    if ($expectedExtra <= 0) { return array(); }
    $ordered = mleAdvisoryExtractOfficialOrdinalDrawNumbers($drawRow);
    if (count($ordered) <= $expectedExtra) { return array(); }
    return array_slice($ordered, -$expectedExtra);
}

function mleAdvisoryExtractActualExtraFromDrawRowFallback($gameId, array $drawRow, $expectedExtra) {
    $expectedExtra = (int)$expectedExtra;
    if ($expectedExtra <= 0 || empty($drawRow)) { return array(); }

    if (isset($drawRow['draw_results'])) {
        $fromResults = mleAdvisoryParseDrawResultsExtraTail($drawRow['draw_results'], $expectedExtra);
        if (!empty($fromResults)) { return $fromResults; }
    }

    // Official draw table columns are ordinal names, including intentionally misspelled legacy columns.
    // For EuroMillions the extra balls are sixth and seventh. For Powerball/Mega Millions the extra is sixth.
    $fromOfficialOrdinalColumns = mleAdvisoryExtractOfficialOrdinalExtraBalls($drawRow, $expectedExtra);
    if (!empty($fromOfficialOrdinalColumns)) { return $fromOfficialOrdinalColumns; }

    $aliases = array(
        'extra_ball','extra_ball_1','extra_ball_2','extra_ball_3','extra1','extra2','extra3','extra_1','extra_2','extra_3',
        'bonus','bonus_ball','bonus_ball_1','bonus_ball_2','bonus1','bonus2','bonus_1','bonus_2','bonus_number','bonus_num',
        'powerball','power_ball','power_ball_number','pb',
        'mega_ball','megaball','mega',
        'lucky_star','lucky_stars','lucky_star_1','lucky_star_2','lucky_star1','lucky_star2','star','stars','star_1','star_2','star1','star2',
        'euro_star_1','euro_star_2','eurostar1','eurostar2',
        'number_6','number_7','number6','number7','num_6','num_7','num6','num7','ball_6','ball_7','ball6','ball7',
        'draw_number_6','draw_number_7','drawn_number_6','drawn_number_7','winning_number_6','winning_number_7','result_6','result_7'
    );
    $out = array();
    foreach ($aliases as $alias) {
        if (!array_key_exists($alias, $drawRow) || $drawRow[$alias] === '' || $drawRow[$alias] === null) { continue; }
        $vals = is_array($drawRow[$alias]) ? $drawRow[$alias] : preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', (string)$drawRow[$alias]);
        foreach ($vals as $v) {
            if ($v === '' || $v === null) { continue; }
            $n = (int)$v;
            if ($n > 0 && !in_array($n, $out, true)) { $out[] = $n; }
            if (count($out) >= $expectedExtra) { return $out; }
        }
    }

    foreach ($drawRow as $key => $value) {
        $keyLower = strtolower((string)$key);
        if (strpos($keyLower, 'extra') === false && strpos($keyLower, 'bonus') === false && strpos($keyLower, 'star') === false && strpos($keyLower, 'power') === false && strpos($keyLower, 'mega') === false) {
            continue;
        }
        if ($value === '' || $value === null) { continue; }
        $vals = is_array($value) ? $value : preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', (string)$value);
        foreach ($vals as $v) {
            if ($v === '' || $v === null) { continue; }
            $n = (int)$v;
            if ($n > 0 && !in_array($n, $out, true)) { $out[] = $n; }
            if (count($out) >= $expectedExtra) { return $out; }
        }
    }

    return array_slice($out, 0, $expectedExtra);
}


function mleAdvisoryExtractActualExtraByTailColumns(array $drawRow, array $main, $expectedExtra) {
    $expectedExtra = (int)$expectedExtra;
    if ($expectedExtra <= 0 || empty($drawRow)) { return array(); }

    $fromOfficialOrdinalColumns = mleAdvisoryExtractOfficialOrdinalExtraBalls($drawRow, $expectedExtra);
    if (!empty($fromOfficialOrdinalColumns)) { return $fromOfficialOrdinalColumns; }

    $candidates = array();
    foreach ($drawRow as $key => $value) {
        $keyLower = strtolower((string)$key);
        if ($value === '' || $value === null) { continue; }
        if (strpos($keyLower, 'date') !== false || strpos($keyLower, 'time') !== false || strpos($keyLower, 'jackpot') !== false || strpos($keyLower, 'game') !== false || strpos($keyLower, 'id') !== false) { continue; }
        if (!preg_match('/(ball|number|num|result|draw|star|bonus|power|mega)/', $keyLower)) { continue; }
        if (is_array($value)) { continue; }
        $parts = preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', (string)$value);
        foreach ($parts as $part) {
            if ($part === '') { continue; }
            $n = (int)$part;
            if ($n <= 0 || $n > 99) { continue; }
            $sort = 1000;
            if (preg_match('/(\d+)$/', $keyLower, $m)) { $sort = (int)$m[1]; }
            $candidates[] = array('key' => $keyLower, 'sort' => $sort, 'num' => $n);
        }
    }
    if (empty($candidates)) { return array(); }
    usort($candidates, function($a, $b) {
        if ($a['sort'] == $b['sort']) { return strcmp($a['key'], $b['key']); }
        return ($a['sort'] < $b['sort']) ? -1 : 1;
    });

    $values = array();
    foreach ($candidates as $c) { $values[] = (int)$c['num']; }
    $mainCount = count(array_values(array_filter(array_map('intval', $main), function($n) { return $n > 0; })));
    if ($mainCount > 0 && count($values) >= ($mainCount + $expectedExtra)) {
        return array_slice($values, $mainCount, $expectedExtra);
    }

    // Last resort: use the final expectedExtra candidate values. This is useful for tables
    // with number_1 ... number_7 columns where the final columns are the bonus balls.
    if (count($values) >= $expectedExtra) {
        return array_slice($values, -$expectedExtra);
    }
    return array();
}


function mleAdvisoryNormalizeNameText($value) {
    $value = strtolower(trim((string)$value));
    $value = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/', ' ', $value);
    return trim(preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $value));
}

function mleAdvisoryLookupLotteryContextForVisual($db, array $perfRow, array $savedRow) {
    $ctx = array('lottery_id' => 0, 'game_id' => '', 'name' => '', 'game_name' => '', 'country' => '', 'state' => '');
    foreach (array('target_lottery_id','lottery_id') as $k) {
        if (isset($perfRow[$k]) && (int)$perfRow[$k] > 0) { $ctx['lottery_id'] = (int)$perfRow[$k]; break; }
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && (int)$savedRow[$k] > 0) { $ctx['lottery_id'] = (int)$savedRow[$k]; break; }
    }
    foreach (array('target_game_id','game_id') as $k) {
        if (isset($perfRow[$k]) && trim((string)$perfRow[$k]) !== '') { $ctx['game_id'] = trim((string)$perfRow[$k]); break; }
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && trim((string)$savedRow[$k]) !== '') { $ctx['game_id'] = trim((string)$savedRow[$k]); break; }
    }
    foreach (array('lottery_name','name') as $k) {
        if (isset($perfRow[$k]) && trim((string)$perfRow[$k]) !== '') { $ctx['name'] = trim((string)$perfRow[$k]); break; }
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && trim((string)$savedRow[$k]) !== '') { $ctx['name'] = trim((string)$savedRow[$k]); break; }
    }
    foreach (array('game_name') as $k) {
        if (isset($perfRow[$k]) && trim((string)$perfRow[$k]) !== '') { $ctx['game_name'] = trim((string)$perfRow[$k]); break; }
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && trim((string)$savedRow[$k]) !== '') { $ctx['game_name'] = trim((string)$savedRow[$k]); break; }
    }
    if ($ctx['lottery_id'] > 0) {
        try {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select('*')
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$ctx['lottery_id'])
                ->setLimit(1);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $row = $db->loadAssoc();
            if (is_array($row) && !empty($row)) {
                if ($ctx['game_id'] === '' && !empty($row['game_id'])) { $ctx['game_id'] = trim((string)$row['game_id']); }
                if ($ctx['name'] === '' && !empty($row['name'])) { $ctx['name'] = trim((string)$row['name']); }
                if ($ctx['game_name'] === '' && !empty($row['game_name'])) { $ctx['game_name'] = trim((string)$row['game_name']); }
                if ($ctx['country'] === '' && !empty($row['country'])) { $ctx['country'] = trim((string)$row['country']); }
                if ($ctx['state'] === '' && !empty($row['state'])) { $ctx['state'] = trim((string)$row['state']); }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
    }
    return $ctx;
}

function mleAdvisoryInferExpectedExtraCountForActual($db, $gameId, array $perfRow, array $savedRow, array $predExtra, array $drawRow = array()) {
    // Use the same source-of-truth order as the original draw-results comparison:
    // 1) the lottery/game identity, 2) draw_results bonus tail, 3) configured draw fields.
    // Do NOT infer drawn extra-ball count from the number of saved/predicted extra candidates.
    // For EuroMillions a saved run may contain several Lucky Star candidates, but the official
    // draw has exactly 2 Lucky Stars.
    $ctx = mleAdvisoryLookupLotteryContextForVisual($db, $perfRow, $savedRow);
    $bits = mleAdvisoryNormalizeNameText((string)$gameId . ' ' . (string)$ctx['game_id'] . ' ' . (string)$ctx['name'] . ' ' . (string)$ctx['game_name'] . ' ' . (string)($perfRow['lottery_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($savedRow['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
    if (strpos($bits, 'euro millions') !== false || strpos($bits, 'euromillions') !== false) { return 2; }
    if (strpos($bits, 'powerball') !== false || strpos($bits, 'mega millions') !== false || strpos($bits, 'megamillions') !== false) { return 1; }

    if (isset($drawRow['draw_results'])) {
        $tail = mleAdvisoryParseDrawResultsExtraTail($drawRow['draw_results'], 5);
        if (!empty($tail)) { return count($tail); }
    }

    $specGameId = trim((string)$gameId);
    if ($specGameId === '') { $specGameId = (string)$ctx['game_id']; }
    if ($specGameId !== '' && function_exists('getDrawFields')) {
        try {
            $fields = getDrawFields($specGameId);
            if (isset($fields['num_extra_expected']) && (int)$fields['num_extra_expected'] > 0) {
                return (int)$fields['num_extra_expected'];
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
    }

    // Only trust stored extra-count metadata when it looks like a draw-result extra count.
    // Do not accept large candidate-pool counts such as 5 for EuroMillions stars.
    foreach (array('target_extra_count','extra_count','num_extra_balls_drawn') as $k) {
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && (int)$savedRow[$k] > 0 && (int)$savedRow[$k] <= 2) { return (int)$savedRow[$k]; }
        if (isset($perfRow[$k]) && (int)$perfRow[$k] > 0 && (int)$perfRow[$k] <= 2) { return (int)$perfRow[$k]; }
    }

    return 0;
}

function mleAdvisoryInferActualPickSizeForVisual($db, $gameId, array $perfRow, array $savedRow, array $predMain, array $drawRow, $expectedExtra) {
    foreach (array('target_pick_size','daily_pick_size','pick_size') as $k) {
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && (int)$savedRow[$k] > 0) { return (int)$savedRow[$k]; }
        if (isset($perfRow[$k]) && (int)$perfRow[$k] > 0) { return (int)$perfRow[$k]; }
    }
    $ctx = mleAdvisoryLookupLotteryContextForVisual($db, $perfRow, $savedRow);
    $bits = mleAdvisoryNormalizeNameText((string)$gameId . ' ' . (string)$ctx['game_id'] . ' ' . (string)$ctx['name'] . ' ' . (string)$ctx['game_name']);
    if (strpos($bits, 'euro millions') !== false || strpos($bits, 'euromillions') !== false || strpos($bits, 'powerball') !== false || strpos($bits, 'mega millions') !== false || strpos($bits, 'megamillions') !== false) { return 5; }
    $all = mleAdvisoryExtractOfficialOrdinalDrawNumbers($drawRow);
    if (!empty($all) && (int)$expectedExtra > 0 && count($all) > (int)$expectedExtra) { return count($all) - (int)$expectedExtra; }
    if (!empty($predMain) && count($predMain) <= 10) { return count($predMain); }
    return 0;
}

function mleAdvisoryExtractActualPartsFromOfficialRow($db, $gameId, array $perfRow, array $savedRow, array $predMain, array $predExtra, array $drawRow) {
    $gameId = trim((string)$gameId);
    $expectedExtra = mleAdvisoryInferExpectedExtraCountForActual($db, $gameId, $perfRow, $savedRow, $predExtra, $drawRow);

    // First and preferred path: use the original MyLottoExpert official draw resolver.
    // This is the same logic used by the original Draw Results Comparison and respects
    // the configured draw_results format and lottery_skip_config mappings.
    if ($gameId !== '' && function_exists('mylottoexpertExtractDrawNumbersFromRow')) {
        try {
            $parts = mylottoexpertExtractDrawNumbersFromRow($gameId, $drawRow);
            $main = isset($parts['main']) && is_array($parts['main']) ? array_values(array_map('intval', $parts['main'])) : array();
            $extra = isset($parts['extra']) && is_array($parts['extra']) ? array_values(array_map('intval', $parts['extra'])) : array();
            if (!empty($main)) {
                if ($expectedExtra > 0 && empty($extra) && isset($drawRow['draw_results'])) {
                    $tail = mleAdvisoryParseDrawResultsExtraTail($drawRow['draw_results'], $expectedExtra);
                    if (!empty($tail)) { $extra = $tail; }
                }
                if ($expectedExtra > 0) { $extra = array_slice($extra, 0, $expectedExtra); }
                return array('main' => $main, 'extra' => $extra);
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
    }

    // Second path: parse the published draw_results value directly. This prevents the
    // ordinal result columns from being mistaken for extra balls. For example:
    // 3-9-42-46-47+7+12 -> main 3,9,42,46,47 and extras 7,12.
    if (isset($drawRow['draw_results']) && trim((string)$drawRow['draw_results']) !== '') {
        $dr = trim((string)$drawRow['draw_results']);
        if (preg_match('/^\d+(?:-\d+){2,}(?:\+\d+(?:\+\d+)*)?$/', $dr)) {
            $parts = explode('+', $dr);
            $mainText = array_shift($parts);
            $main = array();
            foreach (explode('-', $mainText) as $piece) {
                $n = (int)$piece;
                if ($n > 0) { $main[] = $n; }
            }
            $extra = array();
            if ($expectedExtra > 0) {
                foreach ($parts as $piece) {
                    $n = (int)$piece;
                    if ($n > 0) { $extra[] = $n; }
                    if (count($extra) >= $expectedExtra) { break; }
                }
            }
            if (!empty($main)) { return array('main' => $main, 'extra' => $extra); }
        }
    }

    // Last fallback only: use ordinal columns with an inferred pick size and expected extra count.
    // This is intentionally last because the original code treats draw_results/config as authoritative.
    $pickSize = mleAdvisoryInferActualPickSizeForVisual($db, $gameId, $perfRow, $savedRow, $predMain, $drawRow, $expectedExtra);
    $all = mleAdvisoryExtractOfficialOrdinalDrawNumbers($drawRow);
    $main = array();
    $extra = array();
    if (!empty($all)) {
        if ($pickSize <= 0 && $expectedExtra > 0 && count($all) > $expectedExtra) { $pickSize = count($all) - $expectedExtra; }
        if ($pickSize > 0) { $main = array_slice($all, 0, $pickSize); }
        if ($expectedExtra > 0 && $pickSize > 0 && count($all) >= ($pickSize + $expectedExtra)) {
            $extra = array_slice($all, $pickSize, $expectedExtra);
        }
    }
    return array('main' => array_values($main), 'extra' => array_values($extra));
}

function mleAdvisoryLoadOfficialDrawRowForVisual($db, $gameId, $drawDate, array $perfRow, array $savedRow) {
    static $cache = array();
    $drawDate = trim((string)$drawDate);
    if ($drawDate === '') { return null; }
    $ts = strtotime($drawDate);
    if ($ts === false) { return null; }
    $dateOnly = date('Y-m-d', $ts);
    $ctx = mleAdvisoryLookupLotteryContextForVisual($db, $perfRow, $savedRow);
    if (trim((string)$gameId) === '') { $gameId = (string)$ctx['game_id']; }
    $cacheKey = strtolower(trim((string)$gameId)) . '|' . (int)$ctx['lottery_id'] . '|' . $dateOnly;
    if (array_key_exists($cacheKey, $cache)) { return $cache[$cacheKey]; }

    $drawSession = trim((string)($perfRow['target_draw_session'] ?? $savedRow['target_draw_session'] ?? $savedRow['draw_session'] ?? ''));
    $drawAt = trim((string)($perfRow['target_draw_at'] ?? $savedRow['target_draw_at'] ?? $savedRow['next_draw_at'] ?? ''));
    if (trim((string)$gameId) !== '' && function_exists('getDrawByDate')) {
        try {
            $row = getDrawByDate((string)$gameId, $dateOnly, $db, $drawSession, $drawAt);
            if (is_array($row) && !empty($row)) { $cache[$cacheKey] = $row; return $row; }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
    }

    $tables = array();
    if (trim((string)$gameId) !== '' && function_exists('mylottoexpertLoadLotterySpec')) {
        try {
            $spec = mylottoexpertLoadLotterySpec((string)$gameId);
            $tbl = trim((string)($spec['dbCol'] ?? ''));
            if ($tbl !== '') { $tables[] = $db->replacePrefix($tbl); }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
    }
    try {
        $q = "SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('draw_date','draw_results','first','sixth','seventh','game_id') GROUP BY TABLE_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT COLUMN_NAME) >= 5";
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $found = $db->loadColumn();
        if (is_array($found)) { foreach ($found as $t) { if ($t !== '' && !in_array($t, $tables, true)) { $tables[] = $t; } } }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { }

    foreach ($tables as $table) {
        try {
            $cols = $db->getTableColumns($table, false);
            $colNames = array();
            if (is_array($cols)) { foreach ($cols as $ck => $cv) { $colNames[] = strtolower(is_string($ck) ? $ck : ((is_object($cv) && isset($cv->Field)) ? (string)$cv->Field : '')); } }
            if (!in_array('draw_date', $colNames, true)) { continue; }
            $query = $db->getQuery(true)->select('*')->from($db->quoteName($table))->where('DATE(' . $db->quoteName('draw_date') . ') = ' . $db->quote($dateOnly));
            if (trim((string)$gameId) !== '' && in_array('game_id', $colNames, true)) { $query->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$gameId)); }
            $query->order($db->quoteName('draw_date') . ' DESC')->setLimit(1);
            $db->setQuery($query);
            $row = $db->loadAssoc();
            if (is_array($row) && !empty($row)) { $cache[$cacheKey] = $row; return $row; }

            $nameNeedle = mleAdvisoryNormalizeNameText((string)$ctx['name'] . ' ' . (string)$ctx['game_name']);
            if ($nameNeedle !== '' && in_array('game_name', $colNames, true)) {
                $query2 = $db->getQuery(true)->select('*')->from($db->quoteName($table))->where('DATE(' . $db->quoteName('draw_date') . ') = ' . $db->quote($dateOnly));
                $db->setQuery($query2);
                $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
                if (is_array($rows)) {
                    foreach ($rows as $r) {
                        $rName = mleAdvisoryNormalizeNameText((string)($r['game_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($r['stateprov_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($r['country'] ?? ''));
                        if ($rName !== '' && ($nameNeedle === $rName || strpos($nameNeedle, $rName) !== false || strpos($rName, $nameNeedle) !== false || (strpos($nameNeedle, 'euromillions') !== false && strpos($rName, 'euromillions') !== false))) {
                            $cache[$cacheKey] = $r; return $r;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
    }
    $cache[$cacheKey] = null;
    return null;
}

function mleAdvisoryExpectedExtraCountFromFullContext($gameId, array $perfRow, array $savedRow, array $predExtra) {
    $merged = $savedRow;
    foreach ($perfRow as $k => $v) {
        if (!isset($merged[$k]) || $merged[$k] === '' || $merged[$k] === null) { $merged[$k] = $v; }
    }
    $expected = mleAdvisoryExpectedExtraCountFromContext($gameId, $merged, $predExtra);
    if ($expected > 0) { return $expected; }
    $bits = strtolower(trim((string)$gameId . ' ' . (string)($perfRow['lottery_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($savedRow['lottery_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($perfRow['game_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($savedRow['game_name'] ?? '')));
    if (strpos($bits, 'euromillions') !== false || strpos($bits, 'euro millions') !== false) { return 2; }
    if (strpos($bits, 'powerball') !== false) { return 1; }
    if (strpos($bits, 'mega millions') !== false || strpos($bits, 'megamillions') !== false) { return 1; }
    return 0;
}

function mleAdvisoryResolveActualDrawPartsForVisual(array $perfRow, array $savedRow, array $predMain, array $predExtra) {
    $rawActualJson = (string)($perfRow['actual_numbers_json'] ?? '');
    $jsonParts = mleAdvisoryActualPartsFromJson($rawActualJson);
    $flatActual = mleAdvisoryNumbersFromJson($rawActualJson);
    $splitParts = mleAdvisorySplitActualNumbersForRun($flatActual, $savedRow, $predMain, $predExtra);

    $main = !empty($jsonParts['main']) ? $jsonParts['main'] : (array)$splitParts['main'];
    $extra = !empty($jsonParts['extra']) ? $jsonParts['extra'] : (array)$splitParts['extra'];

    $dbForVisual = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
    $gameId = mleAdvisoryResolveGameIdForVisual($dbForVisual, $perfRow, $savedRow);
    $drawDate = trim((string)($perfRow['draw_date'] ?? $perfRow['target_draw_date'] ?? $savedRow['target_draw_date'] ?? $savedRow['next_draw_date'] ?? ''));
    $drawSession = trim((string)($perfRow['target_draw_session'] ?? $savedRow['target_draw_session'] ?? $savedRow['draw_session'] ?? ''));
    $drawAt = trim((string)($perfRow['target_draw_at'] ?? $savedRow['target_draw_at'] ?? $savedRow['next_draw_at'] ?? ''));

    // Always prefer the official draw row from the database as the source of truth for
    // actual draw numbers. This ensures EuroMillions always shows the 2 Lucky Stars,
    // Powerball always shows the correct Powerball, and Mega Millions the Mega Ball.
    // The performance table often stores only main numbers or incorrectly splits extra balls.
    if ($drawDate !== '') {
        try {
            $db = $dbForVisual;
            $drawRow = mleAdvisoryLoadOfficialDrawRowForVisual($db, $gameId, $drawDate, $perfRow, $savedRow);
            if (is_array($drawRow) && !empty($drawRow)) {
                $officialParts = mleAdvisoryExtractActualPartsFromOfficialRow($db, $gameId, $perfRow, $savedRow, $predMain, $predExtra, $drawRow);
                if (!empty($officialParts['main'])) { $main = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$officialParts['main'])); }
                // Only overwrite extras when the official draw actually found them.
                // Using !empty prevents clearing valid extras already parsed from JSON when
                // the official draw row query returns an empty extra array.
                if (!empty($officialParts['extra'])) { $extra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$officialParts['extra'])); }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
    }

    // Last fallback: if the flat actual list contains more values than the main pick size,
    // split the tail as extras. This catches payloads like [1,2,3,4,5,9,11].
    $expectedExtra = mleAdvisoryInferExpectedExtraCountForActual($dbForVisual, $gameId, $perfRow, $savedRow, $predExtra, array());
    if (empty($extra) && $expectedExtra > 0 && !empty($flatActual)) {
        $pickSize = 0;
        foreach (array('target_pick_size','daily_pick_size','pick_size') as $k) {
            if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && (int)$savedRow[$k] > 0) { $pickSize = (int)$savedRow[$k]; break; }
        }
        if ($pickSize <= 0 && !empty($predMain)) { $pickSize = count($predMain); }
        if ($pickSize > 0 && count($flatActual) > $pickSize) {
            $main = array_slice($flatActual, 0, $pickSize);
            $extra = array_slice($flatActual, $pickSize, $expectedExtra);
        }
    }

    return array('main' => array_values($main), 'extra' => array_values($extra));
}

function mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, $tableName) {
    try {
        $raw = $db->getTableColumns($tableName, false);
        return is_array($raw) ? array_keys($raw) : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return array();
    }
}

function mleAdvisoryIsInactiveStatus($value) {
    $v = strtolower(trim((string)$value));
    return in_array($v, array('deleted','retired','archived','learning_only','orphaned'), true);
}

function mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($source) {
    $s = strtolower(trim((string)$source));
    if ($s === '') { return 'unknown'; }

    // Important: check SKAI before generic AI/neural tests. The word "skai"
    // contains "ai", so substring-based logic can otherwise mislabel SKAI as
    // Neural AI. This keeps SKAI evidence on the SKAI Precision Track.
    if ($s === 'skai_prediction' || $s === 'skai_blend' || $s === 'skai' || strpos($s, 'skai') !== false) { return 'skai'; }
    if ($s === 'mcmc_prediction' || $s === 'mcmc' || strpos($s, 'mcmc') !== false) { return 'mcmc'; }
    if ($s === 'skip_hit' || $s === 'skip' || $s === 'skiphit' || strpos($s, 'skip_hit') !== false || strpos($s, 'skiphit') !== false) { return 'skip_hit'; }
    if ($s === 'heatmap' || strpos($s, 'heatmap') !== false) { return 'heatmap'; }
    if ($s === 'frequency' || strpos($s, 'frequency') !== false || strpos($s, 'freq') !== false) { return 'frequency'; }
    if ($s === 'ai_prediction' || $s === 'ai' || $s === 'neural' || strpos($s, 'neural') !== false) { return 'ai'; }
    if ($s === 'strategy_set') { return 'strategy_set'; }
    return $s;
}


/**
 * [[MLE_V40_METHOD_FIX]] Resolve the true learning method from a saved row.
 * Some SKAI saves still arrive with the legacy source value "ai_prediction"
 * because the SKAI page historically saved through the AI prediction form.
 * If the row contains SKAI-specific settings or labels, treat it as SKAI.
 */
function mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey($row) {
    $source = '';
    if (is_array($row)) {
        $source = strtolower(trim((string)($row['source'] ?? '')));
    } elseif (is_object($row)) {
        $source = strtolower(trim((string)($row->source ?? '')));
    } else {
        return mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey('');
    }

    $settings = function_exists('mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings')
        ? mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($row)
        : array();

    $hayParts = array($source);
    foreach (array(
        'label','saved_label','template_name','settings_template_name','origin_source',
        'skai_run_mode','pure_mode','skai_mode_method','profile','strategy','risk_profile',
        'source_page','engine','engine_name','model','model_name'
    ) as $k) {
        if (is_array($row) && isset($row[$k]) && $row[$k] !== '') { $hayParts[] = (string)$row[$k]; }
        if (is_array($settings) && isset($settings[$k]) && $settings[$k] !== '') { $hayParts[] = (string)$settings[$k]; }
    }
    $hay = strtolower(implode(' ', $hayParts));

    // Hard SKAI identifiers always win before generic AI/neural.
    if (strpos($hay, 'skai') !== false || strpos($hay, 'mle_precision') !== false || strpos($hay, 'precision focus') !== false || strpos($hay, 'precision lock') !== false) {
        return 'skai';
    }

    // SKAI-specific saved settings. These are stronger evidence than the legacy source value.
    $skaiKeys = array(
        'skai_window_size','skai_top_n_numbers','skai_top_n_combos','skai_blend_ai_pct','skai_blend_skip_pct',
        'blend_ai_pct','blend_skip_pct','sampling_temperature','diversity_penalty','gap_scale',
        'tail_recovery_enabled','calibration_enabled','pairwise_enabled','gibbs_enabled'
    );
    if (is_array($settings)) {
        foreach ($skaiKeys as $k) {
            if (array_key_exists($k, $settings) && $settings[$k] !== '' && $settings[$k] !== null) {
                return 'skai';
            }
        }
    }

    return mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($source);
}


function mleAdvisoryResolveLotteryNames($db, array $lotteryIds) {
    $ids = array();
    foreach ($lotteryIds as $id) {
        $id = (int)$id;
        if ($id > 0) { $ids[$id] = $id; }
    }
    if (empty($ids)) { return array(); }

    $names = array();
    $lotteryCols = mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, '#__lotteries');
    $hasLotteryId = in_array('lottery_id', $lotteryCols, true);
    $hasId = in_array('id', $lotteryCols, true);
    if (!$hasLotteryId && !$hasId) { return array(); }

    $nameCol = '';
    foreach (array('name','lottery_name','game_name','title') as $candidate) {
        if (in_array($candidate, $lotteryCols, true)) { $nameCol = $candidate; break; }
    }
    if ($nameCol === '') { return array(); }

    $select = array();
    if ($hasLotteryId) { $select[] = $db->quoteName('lottery_id'); }
    if ($hasId) { $select[] = $db->quoteName('id'); }
    $select[] = $db->quoteName($nameCol, 'mle_lottery_name');
    foreach (array('state_name','country_name','game_id') as $optionalCol) {
        if (in_array($optionalCol, $lotteryCols, true)) { $select[] = $db->quoteName($optionalCol); }
    }

    $whereParts = array();
    if ($hasLotteryId) { $whereParts[] = $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', array_values($ids)) . ')'; }
    if ($hasId) { $whereParts[] = $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', array_values($ids)) . ')'; }

    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($select)
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries'))
            ->where('(' . implode(' OR ', $whereParts) . ')');
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        if (is_array($rows)) {
            foreach ($rows as $row) {
                $lid = 0;
                if ($hasLotteryId && isset($row['lottery_id']) && (int)$row['lottery_id'] > 0) {
                    $lid = (int)$row['lottery_id'];
                } elseif ($hasId && isset($row['id']) && (int)$row['id'] > 0) {
                    $lid = (int)$row['id'];
                }
                if ($lid <= 0 || !isset($ids[$lid])) { continue; }

                $baseName = trim((string)($row['mle_lottery_name'] ?? ''));
                $display = '';
                if ($baseName !== '' && function_exists('mylottoexpertFormatLotteryLocationLine')) {
                    $display = trim((string)mylottoexpertFormatLotteryLocationLine(
                        (string)($row['state_name'] ?? ''),
                        (string)($row['country_name'] ?? ''),
                        $baseName,
                        (string)($row['game_id'] ?? ''),
                        ' - '
                    ));
                }
                if ($display === '') { $display = $baseName; }
                if ($display !== '') { $names[$lid] = $display; }
            }
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        /* non-fatal: fallback names are handled by caller */
    }
    return $names;
}

function mleAdvisoryRowLotteryDisplayName(array $row, $lid) {
    $lid = (int)$lid;
    foreach (array('lottery_name','lottery','name','game_name','title') as $key) {
        if (isset($row[$key])) {
            $value = trim((string)$row[$key]);
            if ($value !== '' && !preg_match('/^Lottery\s*(#|ID)?\s*\d+$/i', $value)) {
                return $value;
            }
        }
    }
    return $lid > 0 ? ('Lottery ID ' . $lid) : 'Lottery';
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildActiveSavedEvidence($db, $userId) {
    $userId = (int)$userId;
    if ($userId <= 0) { return array(); }
    $snCols = mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, '#__user_saved_numbers');
    if (empty($snCols)) { return array(); }

    // Command-center source of truth: build visible lottery cards from the same
    // saved-prediction source used by the classic Saved Predictions workspace.
    $select = array();
    foreach ($snCols as $c) { $select[] = 'sn.' . $db->quoteName($c); }
    $select[] = $db->quoteName('l.name', 'lottery_name');
    $select[] = $db->quoteName('l.game_id', 'mle_lottery_game_id');
    $select[] = $db->quoteName('s.name', 'mle_state_name');
    $select[] = $db->quoteName('c.name', 'mle_country_name');

    $q = $db->getQuery(true)
        ->select($select)
        ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 'sn'))
        ->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__lotteries', 'l') . ' ON sn.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = l.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id'))
        ->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__states', 's') . ' ON l.' . $db->quoteName('state_id') . ' = s.' . $db->quoteName('state_id'))
        ->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__countries', 'c') . ' ON s.' . $db->quoteName('country_id') . ' = c.' . $db->quoteName('country_id'))
        ->where('sn.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$userId)
        ->where('sn.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' > 0');

    // Match the legacy saved-predictions definition so unsaved run history does
    // not create cards. Play sets/settings/wheels are loaded inside an existing card.
    if (in_array('save_intent', $snCols, true)) {
        $q->where("(sn.save_intent = 'prediction_archive' OR (COALESCE(sn.save_intent,'') = '' AND sn.source <> 'strategy_set'))");
    } else {
        $q->where("sn.source <> 'strategy_set'");
    }
    $q->order('sn.next_draw_date DESC, sn.source ASC, COALESCE(sn.generated_at, sn.date_saved) DESC, sn.id DESC');

    try { $db->setQuery($q); $rows = $db->loadAssocList(); } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array(); }

    $out = array();
    $allowed = array('skai_prediction','ai_prediction','mcmc_prediction','skip_hit','skai','ai','mcmc','skip','skiphit','heatmap','frequency');
    foreach ((array)$rows as $row) {
        $source = strtolower(trim((string)($row['source'] ?? '')));
        if ($source === '') { $source = 'skai_prediction'; }
        if (!in_array($source, $allowed, true)) { continue; }
        foreach (array('advice_status','play_status','status') as $sf) {
            if (array_key_exists($sf, $row) && mleAdvisoryIsInactiveStatus($row[$sf])) { continue 2; }
        }
        if (array_key_exists('save_intent', $row) && mleAdvisoryIsInactiveStatus($row['save_intent'])) { continue; }
        $lid = (int)($row['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($lid <= 0) { continue; }
        $row['__method_key'] = mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey($row);
        if ($row['__method_key'] === 'strategy_set') { continue; }
        $out[$lid]['lottery_id'] = $lid;
        if (empty($out[$lid]['lottery_name'])) {
            $lotName = trim((string)($row['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
            if ($lotName === '') { $lotName = mleAdvisoryRowLotteryDisplayName($row, $lid); }
            $stateName = (string)($row['mle_state_name'] ?? '');
            $countryName = (string)($row['mle_country_name'] ?? '');
            $gameId = (string)($row['mle_lottery_game_id'] ?? $row['target_game_id'] ?? '');
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertFormatLotteryLocationLine')) {
                $displayName = trim((string)mylottoexpertFormatLotteryLocationLine($stateName, $countryName, $lotName, $gameId, ' - '));
                $out[$lid]['lottery_name'] = $displayName !== '' ? $displayName : $lotName;
            } else {
                $out[$lid]['lottery_name'] = $lotName;
            }
        }
        $out[$lid]['rows'][] = $row;
    }
    if (!empty($out)) {
        $resolvedNames = mleAdvisoryResolveLotteryNames($db, array_keys($out));
        foreach ($out as $lid => $data) {
            $currentName = trim((string)($data['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
            if (($currentName === '' || preg_match('/^Lottery\s*(#|ID)?\s*\d+$/i', $currentName)) && isset($resolvedNames[$lid]) && trim((string)$resolvedNames[$lid]) !== '') {
                $out[$lid]['lottery_name'] = (string)$resolvedNames[$lid];
            } elseif ($currentName === '') {
                $out[$lid]['lottery_name'] = 'Lottery ID ' . (int)$lid;
            }
        }
    }
    return $out;
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildActiveEvidenceIndexes(array $activeRows) {
    $idx = array('ids'=>array(), 'run_uuid'=>array(), 'snapshot_run_uuid'=>array(), 'run_identity_key'=>array(), 'prediction_target_id'=>array(), 'prediction_target_key'=>array(), 'method_by_id'=>array());
    foreach ($activeRows as $row) {
        $id = (int)($row['id'] ?? 0);
        if ($id > 0) { $idx['ids'][$id] = $id; $idx['method_by_id'][$id] = (string)($row['__method_key'] ?? mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey($row)); }
        foreach (array('run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','run_identity_key','prediction_target_id','prediction_target_key') as $k) {
            $v = strtolower(trim((string)($row[$k] ?? '')));
            if ($v !== '') { $idx[$k][$v] = $id; }
        }
    }
    return $idx;
}

function mleAdvisoryPerformanceMatchesSaved(array $perf, array $idx) {
    $rid = (int)($perf['run_id'] ?? 0);
    if ($rid > 0 && isset($idx['ids'][$rid])) { return $rid; }
    foreach (array('run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','run_identity_key','prediction_target_id','prediction_target_key') as $k) {
        $v = strtolower(trim((string)($perf[$k] ?? '')));
        if ($v !== '' && isset($idx[$k][$v])) { return (int)$idx[$k][$v]; }
    }
    return 0;
}

function mleAdvisoryLoadMatchedPerformance($db, $userId, $lotteryId, array $activeRows) {
    $userId = (int)$userId; $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0 || empty($activeRows)) { return array(); }
    $idx = mleAdvisoryBuildActiveEvidenceIndexes($activeRows);
    $perfCols = mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, '#__skai_learning_performance');
    if (empty($perfCols)) { return array(); }
    $q = $db->getQuery(true)
        ->select('*')
        ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance'))
        ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$userId)
        ->where('(' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('target_lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId . ')')
        ->order($db->quoteName('draw_date') . ' DESC, ' . $db->quoteName('run_date') . ' DESC');
    try { $db->setQuery($q, 0, 600); $rows = $db->loadAssocList(); } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array(); }
    $out = array();
    foreach ((array)$rows as $r) {
        if (isset($r['advice_status']) && in_array(strtolower((string)$r['advice_status']), array('retired','archived','deleted','learning_only','orphaned'), true)) { continue; }
        $sid = mleAdvisoryPerformanceMatchesSaved($r, $idx);
        if ($sid <= 0) { continue; }
        $r['__saved_id'] = $sid;
        $r['__method_key'] = isset($idx['method_by_id'][$sid]) ? $idx['method_by_id'][$sid] : mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($r['source'] ?? '');
        if ($r['__method_key'] === 'strategy_set') { continue; }
        $out[] = $r;
    }
    return $out;
}

function mleAdvisoryComputeMethodLeaderboardFromRows(array $perfRows) {
    $empty = array('methods'=>array(), 'proof_level'=>mleAdvisoryGetProofLevelLabel(0, 0), 'stats'=>array('total_runs'=>0,'total_draws'=>0,'method_count'=>0));
    if (empty($perfRows)) { return $empty; }
    $methods = array(); $draws = array();
    foreach ($perfRows as $row) {
        $src = (string)($row['__method_key'] ?? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($row['source'] ?? ''));
        if ($src === '' || $src === 'strategy_set') { continue; }
        $dd = (string)($row['draw_date'] ?? '');
        if ($dd !== '' && $dd !== '0000-00-00') { $draws[$dd] = 1; }
        if (!isset($methods[$src])) { $methods[$src] = array('hits_total'=>0,'top20_total'=>0,'rank_sum'=>0.0,'missing_sum'=>0,'quality_sum'=>0.0,'run_count'=>0,'draw_dates'=>array()); }
        $methods[$src]['hits_total'] += (int)($row['top10_hits'] ?? 0);
        $methods[$src]['top20_total'] += (int)($row['top20_hits'] ?? 0);
        $methods[$src]['rank_sum'] += (float)($row['avg_winning_rank'] ?? 0);
        $methods[$src]['missing_sum'] += (int)($row['missing_hits_count'] ?? 0);
        $methods[$src]['quality_sum'] += (float)($row['weighted_quality_score'] ?? 0);
        $methods[$src]['run_count']++;
        if ($dd !== '') { $methods[$src]['draw_dates'][$dd] = 1; }
    }
    $scored = array();
    foreach ($methods as $src=>$m) {
        $cnt = max(1, (int)$m['run_count']);
        $avgHits = round($m['hits_total'] / $cnt, 2);
        $avgTop20 = round($m['top20_total'] / $cnt, 2);
        $avgRank = round($m['rank_sum'] / $cnt, 2);
        $avgMissing = round($m['missing_sum'] / $cnt, 2);
        $avgQuality = round($m['quality_sum'] / $cnt, 6);
        $score = ($avgHits * 3.0) + ($avgTop20 * 1.5) + ($avgQuality * 10.0) - ($avgRank * 0.15) - ($avgMissing * 0.5);
        $scored[] = array('method'=>$src,'method_label'=>mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($src),'score'=>$score,'total_hits'=>$m['hits_total'],'avg_hits'=>$avgHits,'avg_top20'=>$avgTop20,'avg_rank'=>$avgRank,'run_count'=>$cnt,'draw_count'=>count($m['draw_dates']));
    }
    usort($scored, function($a,$b){ return ($b['score'] > $a['score']) ? 1 : (($b['score'] < $a['score']) ? -1 : 0); });
    $rank=1; foreach ($scored as &$s) {
        $s['rank'] = $rank++;
        $s['random_edge'] = mleAdvisoryAggregateRandomEdge($perfRows, (string)($s['method'] ?? ''));
    } unset($s);
    $totalRuns = count($perfRows); $totalDraws = count($draws);
    $edgeMetrics = mleAdvisoryAggregateRandomEdge($perfRows);
    return array('methods'=>$scored,'proof_level'=>mleAdvisoryGetProofLevelLabel($totalDraws,$totalRuns,0.0,0.0,$edgeMetrics),'random_edge'=>$edgeMetrics,'stats'=>array('total_runs'=>$totalRuns,'total_draws'=>$totalDraws,'method_count'=>count($scored)));
}

function mleAdvisoryComputeMethodLeaderboard($db, $userId, $lotteryId) {
    $active = mleAdvisoryBuildActiveSavedEvidence($db, $userId);
    $rows = isset($active[(int)$lotteryId]['rows']) ? $active[(int)$lotteryId]['rows'] : array();
    $perf = mleAdvisoryLoadMatchedPerformance($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $rows);
    return mleAdvisoryComputeMethodLeaderboardFromRows($perf);
}

function mleAdvisoryComputeSettingsAdvisorFromRows(array $perfRows, array $savedById, $method) {
    $noAdvice = array('has_advice'=>false,'reason'=>'Settings do not show a clear pattern yet. Keep the current settings unchanged.','try_next'=>'','why'=>'','best_recipe_desc'=>'','keep_same_list'=>'');
    $method = mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($method);
    $scored = array();
    foreach ($perfRows as $row) {
        $m = (string)($row['__method_key'] ?? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($row['source'] ?? ''));
        if ($m !== $method) { continue; }
        $sid = (int)($row['__saved_id'] ?? $row['run_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($sid <= 0 || empty($savedById[$sid])) { continue; }
        $settings = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($savedById[$sid]);
        $top10 = (int)($row['top10_hits'] ?? 0); $top20 = (int)($row['top20_hits'] ?? 0); $rank = (float)($row['avg_winning_rank'] ?? 999); $quality = (float)($row['weighted_quality_score'] ?? 0);
        $score = ($quality > 0) ? ($quality * 10.0) : (($top10 * 3.0) + ($top20 * 1.5) - ($rank * 0.3));
        $scored[] = array('score'=>$score,'settings'=>$settings,'saved_id'=>$sid);
    }
    if (count($scored) < 3) { $noAdvice['reason'] = 'More completed saved runs are needed before changing settings.'; return $noAdvice; }
    usort($scored, function($a,$b){ return ($b['score'] > $a['score']) ? 1 : (($b['score'] < $a['score']) ? -1 : 0); });
    $total = count($scored); $cut = max(1, (int)floor($total * 0.35));
    $strong = array_slice($scored, 0, $cut); $weak = array_slice($scored, -$cut);
    $keys = array('skai_window_size','draws_analyzed','skai_blend_ai_pct','sampling_temperature','diversity_penalty','gap_scale','learning_rate','dropout_rate','hidden_layers','recency_decay','chain_len','burn_in','laplace_k','best_window','auto_tune');
    $bestKey=''; $old=''; $new=''; $bestDiff=0.0;
    foreach ($keys as $key) {
        $sv=array(); $wv=array();
        foreach ($strong as $r) { if (isset($r['settings'][$key]) && is_numeric($r['settings'][$key])) { $sv[]=(float)$r['settings'][$key]; } }
        foreach ($weak as $r) { if (isset($r['settings'][$key]) && is_numeric($r['settings'][$key])) { $wv[]=(float)$r['settings'][$key]; } }
        if (count($sv) < 1 || count($wv) < 1) { continue; }
        $sa = array_sum($sv)/count($sv); $wa = array_sum($wv)/count($wv); $diff=abs($sa-$wa);
        if ($diff > $bestDiff && $diff >= 1.0) { $bestDiff=$diff; $bestKey=$key; $old=round($wa,1); $new=round($sa,1); }
    }
    $bestRecipe = !empty($strong[0]['settings']) ? mleAdvisoryBuildBestRecipeDesc($strong[0]['settings'], $method) : '';
    if ($bestKey === '') { $noAdvice['best_recipe_desc'] = $bestRecipe; return $noAdvice; }
    $label = mleAdvisoryFormatSettingLabel($bestKey);
    $reason = 'Your stronger saved runs used a different ' . $label . '. Test this one change so LottoExpert can measure whether it improves consistency without changing everything else.';
    return array('has_advice'=>true,'setting'=>$bestKey,'setting_label'=>$label,'current_value'=>(string)$old,'suggested_value'=>(string)$new,'reason'=>$reason,'try_next'=>'Create one new settings run that changes only ' . $label . ' from ' . $old . ' to ' . $new . '.','why'=>$reason,'best_recipe_desc'=>$bestRecipe,'keep_same_list'=>'Keep the best method, mode, blend, and other settings the same for this test.','proof_level'=>mleAdvisoryGetProofLevelLabel(min($total,5),$total));
}

function mleAdvisoryComputeSettingsAdvisor($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $method = 'skai') {
    $active = mleAdvisoryBuildActiveSavedEvidence($db, $userId);
    $rows = isset($active[(int)$lotteryId]['rows']) ? $active[(int)$lotteryId]['rows'] : array();
    $savedById = array(); foreach ($rows as $r) { $savedById[(int)($r['id'] ?? 0)] = $r; }
    $perf = mleAdvisoryLoadMatchedPerformance($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $rows);
    return mleAdvisoryComputeSettingsAdvisorFromRows($perf, $savedById, $method);
}

// Precision Focus: compute the narrowing range for one lottery using only that lottery's
// active saved evidence and completed scored runs. Returns stage, range, sweet spot, and summary.
// Each lottery card must call this independently - ranges are never shared between lotteries.
function mleAdvisoryComputePrecisionLockData(array $perfRows, array $savedById, $method) {
    $method = mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($method);
    $scored = array();
    $ctrlLabel = 'Blend Setting';
    $methodRows = array();

    foreach ($perfRows as $row) {
        $m = (string)($row['__method_key'] ?? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($row['source'] ?? ''));
        if ($m !== $method) { continue; }
        $sid = (int)($row['__saved_id'] ?? $row['run_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($sid <= 0 || empty($savedById[$sid])) { continue; }
        $settings = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($savedById[$sid]);

        // Find the primary percentage control for this run.
        $pct = null;
        foreach (array('skai_blend_ai_pct','blend_ai_pct','ai_pct','blend_percent','blend_pct','ai_blend_pct') as $k) {
            if (isset($settings[$k]) && is_numeric($settings[$k])) {
                $pct = (float)$settings[$k];
                $ctrlLabel = 'Blend Setting';
                break;
            }
        }
        if ($pct === null && isset($settings['skai_window_size']) && is_numeric($settings['skai_window_size'])) {
            $pct = min(100.0, max(0.0, (float)$settings['skai_window_size']));
            $ctrlLabel = 'History Window';
        }
        if ($pct === null) { continue; }

        $methodRows[] = $row;
        $edge = mleAdvisoryCalculateRandomEdgeForRow($row);
        $top10 = (int)($row['top10_hits'] ?? 0);
        $top20 = (int)($row['top20_hits'] ?? 0);
        $rank = (float)($row['avg_winning_rank'] ?? 999);
        $quality = (float)($row['weighted_quality_score'] ?? 0);
        $avgLift = (float)($edge['avg_rank_lift'] ?? 0.0);
        $penLift = (float)($edge['penalized_rank_lift'] ?? 0.0);
        $top10Lift = (float)($edge['top10_lift'] ?? 0.0);
        $top20Lift = (float)($edge['top20_lift'] ?? 0.0);

        // [[MLE_RANDOM_EDGE_UPGRADE]] Prefer runs that beat the random expectation,
        // while still using hit concentration and ranking quality as secondary evidence.
        $score = ($avgLift * 8.0)
               + ($penLift * 10.0)
               + ($top20Lift * 2.0)
               + ($top10Lift * 1.5)
               + ($quality * 4.0)
               + ($top10 * 0.8)
               + ($top20 * 0.35)
               - min(8.0, max(0.0, $rank) * 0.04);

        $scored[] = array(
            'pct' => $pct,
            'score' => $score,
            'avg_rank_lift' => $avgLift,
            'penalized_rank_lift' => $penLift,
            'random_edge' => $edge,
            'draw_date' => (string)($row['draw_date'] ?? ''),
        );
    }

    $total = is_array($scored) ? count($scored) : 0;
    $edgeMetrics = mleAdvisoryAggregateRandomEdge($methodRows, $method);
    $noData = array(
        'stage'        => 'broad_testing',
        'stage_label'  => 'Broad testing',
        'has_range'    => false,
        'range_min'    => 0.0,
        'range_max'    => 100.0,
        'sweet_min'    => null,
        'sweet_max'    => null,
        'run_count'    => $total,
        'control_label'=> $ctrlLabel,
        'summary'      => 'Not enough saved scored runs yet for this lottery. Keep saving runs for this lottery before narrowing the range further.',
        'stage_plain'  => 'This lottery is still in broad testing.',
        'evidence_line'=> 'There are not enough saved scored runs yet to compare a narrowed range against the random baseline.',
        'next_step'    => 'Keep saving scored runs for this lottery before narrowing the range further.',
        'random_edge'  => $edgeMetrics,
        'range_width'  => 100.0,
    );
    if ($total < 5) { return $noData; }

    usort($scored, function($a, $b) { return ($b['score'] > $a['score']) ? 1 : (($b['score'] < $a['score']) ? -1 : 0); });

    // Strong zone: top 40% by score, now influenced by random-edge lift.
    $cutStrong = max(1, (int)ceil($total * 0.40));
    $strongRuns = array_slice($scored, 0, $cutStrong);
    $strongPcts = array();
    foreach ($strongRuns as $r) { $strongPcts[] = $r['pct']; }
    $rangeMin = min($strongPcts);
    $rangeMax = max($strongPcts);

    // Sweet spot: top 20% by score.
    $sweetMin = null;
    $sweetMax = null;
    $cutSweet = max(1, (int)ceil($total * 0.20));
    if ($cutSweet >= 2) {
        $sweetRuns = array_slice($scored, 0, $cutSweet);
        $sweetPcts = array();
        foreach ($sweetRuns as $r) { $sweetPcts[] = $r['pct']; }
        $sweetMin = (float)min($sweetPcts);
        $sweetMax = (float)max($sweetPcts);
        if (!($sweetMin >= $rangeMin && $sweetMax <= $rangeMax && ($sweetMax - $sweetMin) < ($rangeMax - $rangeMin))) {
            $sweetMin = null;
            $sweetMax = null;
        }
    }

    $rangeWidth = $rangeMax - $rangeMin;
    $avgLift = (float)($edgeMetrics['avg_rank_lift'] ?? 0.0);
    $penLift = (float)($edgeMetrics['penalized_rank_lift'] ?? 0.0);
    $repeatCount = (int)($edgeMetrics['repeat_count'] ?? 0);
    $validationDraws = (int)($edgeMetrics['validation_draws'] ?? 0);
    $hasBasicEdge = ($avgLift >= 1.05 && $penLift >= 1.00);
    $hasGoodEdge  = ($avgLift >= 1.15 && $penLift >= 1.05);
    $hasEliteEdge = ($avgLift >= 1.20 && $penLift >= 1.10);

    // Determine stage: no heavy narrowing unless the range is also beating the random baseline.
    if ($total >= 120 && $validationDraws >= 20 && $repeatCount >= 5 && $hasEliteEdge && $sweetMin !== null && ($sweetMax - $sweetMin) <= 15.0) {
        $stage = 'precision_focus_range';
        $stageLabel = 'Precision Focus Range';
    } elseif ($total >= 75 && $validationDraws >= 12 && $repeatCount >= 4 && $hasGoodEdge && $rangeWidth <= 20.0) {
        $stage = 'validated_focus_range';
        $stageLabel = 'Validated Focus Range';
    } elseif ($total >= 45 && $validationDraws >= 6 && $repeatCount >= 3 && $hasGoodEdge && $rangeWidth <= 30.0) {
        $stage = 'narrowing_signal';
        $stageLabel = 'Narrowing Signal';
    } elseif ($total >= 27 && $validationDraws >= 4 && $repeatCount >= 2 && $hasBasicEdge && $rangeWidth <= 45.0) {
        $stage = 'exploratory_batch';
        $stageLabel = 'Exploratory Precision Batch';
    } elseif ($total >= 18 && $validationDraws >= 3 && $avgLift >= 1.00 && $rangeWidth <= 60.0) {
        $stage = 'early_direction';
        $stageLabel = 'Early Direction';
    } else {
        $stage = 'broad_testing';
        $stageLabel = 'Broad testing';
    }

    $rMin = (int)round($rangeMin);
    $rMax = (int)round($rangeMax);
