    $edgeText = 'Average rank lift ' . number_format($avgLift, 2) . 'x; penalized lift ' . number_format($penLift, 2) . 'x versus random expectation.';

    if ($stage === 'broad_testing') {
        $summary = 'This lottery is still building evidence. LottoExpert is comparing scored runs against a random baseline before narrowing too tightly.';
        $stagePlain = 'This lottery is still in broad testing.';
        $evidenceLine = $total . ' scored runs are being measured. ' . $edgeText;
        $nextStep = 'Keep saving scored runs and avoid changing everything at once.';
    } elseif ($stage === 'early_direction') {
        $summary = 'A possible signal is starting to appear for this lottery between ' . $rMin . ' and ' . $rMax . '. Keep tracking it before relying on it heavily.';
        $stagePlain = 'A possible strategy signal is forming.';
        $evidenceLine = $total . ' scored runs show an early range between ' . $rMin . ' and ' . $rMax . '. ' . $edgeText;
        $nextStep = 'Keep this range on watch and save more scored runs for this lottery.';
    } elseif ($stage === 'exploratory_batch') {
        $summary = 'This range is ready for an exploratory Precision Focus batch for this lottery. It is showing repeated evidence and early lift over random expectation.';
        $stagePlain = 'An exploratory Precision Focus batch is ready.';
        $evidenceLine = $total . ' scored runs and ' . $repeatCount . ' positive-edge runs point to ' . $rMin . ' to ' . $rMax . '. ' . $edgeText;
        $nextStep = 'Run one controlled 9-run Precision Focus batch and keep the other settings steady.';
    } elseif ($stage === 'narrowing_signal') {
        $summary = 'Recent completed draws are starting to favor a tighter setting range for this lottery. LottoExpert recommends testing inside this range instead of making large changes.';
        $stagePlain = 'This lottery has a narrowing signal.';
        $evidenceLine = $total . ' scored runs point to the ' . $ctrlLabel . ' range ' . $rMin . ' to ' . $rMax . '. ' . $edgeText;
        $nextStep = 'Keep the next test inside this range and compare only one change after the next draw.';
    } elseif ($stage === 'validated_focus_range') {
        $summary = 'This range has repeated support across completed draws and positive lift versus random expectation. Use it as the current disciplined focus area.';
        $stagePlain = 'This lottery has a validated focus range.';
        $evidenceLine = $total . ' scored runs with ' . $validationDraws . ' completed draw dates support ' . $rMin . ' to ' . $rMax . '. ' . $edgeText;
        $nextStep = 'Stay inside this focus range and continue validating after future completed draws.';
    } else {
        $sMin = (int)round($sweetMin);
        $sMax = (int)round($sweetMax);
        $summary = 'This is LottoExpert\'s strongest current focus range for this lottery: ' . $sMin . ' to ' . $sMax . '. It is a disciplined test range, not a guarantee.';
        $stagePlain = 'This lottery has a Precision Focus Range.';
        $evidenceLine = $total . ' scored runs repeatedly point to the tighter ' . $ctrlLabel . ' range ' . $sMin . ' to ' . $sMax . '. ' . $edgeText;
        $nextStep = 'Stay inside this range and use one-setting tests to confirm what keeps working for this lottery.';
    }

    return array(
        'stage'        => $stage,
        'stage_label'  => $stageLabel,
        'has_range'    => ($stage !== 'broad_testing'),
        'range_min'    => (float)$rangeMin,
        'range_max'    => (float)$rangeMax,
        'sweet_min'    => $sweetMin,
        'sweet_max'    => $sweetMax,
        'run_count'    => $total,
        'control_label'=> $ctrlLabel,
        'summary'      => $summary,
        'stage_plain'  => $stagePlain,
        'evidence_line'=> $evidenceLine,
        'next_step'    => $nextStep,
        'random_edge'  => $edgeMetrics,
        'range_width'  => (float)$rangeWidth,
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($value, $type) {
    $type = (string)$type;
    if (!is_numeric($value)) { return ''; }
    $v = (float)$value;
    if ($type === 'decimal') { return rtrim(rtrim(number_format($v, 3, '.', ''), '0'), '.'); }
    return (string)((int)round($v));
}

function mleAdvisoryGenerateEightDistinctBatchValues($rangeMin, $rangeMax, $recommendedValue, $variableType) {
    $rangeMin = (float)$rangeMin;
    $rangeMax = (float)$rangeMax;
    if ($rangeMax < $rangeMin) { $tmp = $rangeMin; $rangeMin = $rangeMax; $rangeMax = $tmp; }
    $variableType = ($variableType === 'decimal') ? 'decimal' : 'integer';
    $span = $rangeMax - $rangeMin;
    if ($variableType === 'integer') {
        $lo = (int)ceil($rangeMin);
        $hi = (int)floor($rangeMax);
        if (($hi - $lo + 1) < 8) { return array('ok'=>false,'values'=>array(),'reason'=>'LottoExpert could not create 8 useful distinct integer test values from this range.'); }
        $raw = array($lo, $lo + (($hi - $lo) * 1.0 / 7.0), $lo + (($hi - $lo) * 2.0 / 7.0), $lo + (($hi - $lo) * 3.0 / 7.0), $lo + (($hi - $lo) * 4.0 / 7.0), $lo + (($hi - $lo) * 5.0 / 7.0), $hi);
        if (is_numeric($recommendedValue)) { $raw[] = max($lo, min($hi, (float)$recommendedValue)); }
        else { $raw[] = $lo + (($hi - $lo) * 6.0 / 7.0); }
        $vals = array();
        foreach ($raw as $v) { $vals[] = (int)round($v); }
        $seen = array(); $distinct = array();
        foreach ($vals as $v) { if ($v < $lo) { $v = $lo; } if ($v > $hi) { $v = $hi; } $k = (string)$v; if (!isset($seen[$k])) { $seen[$k] = true; $distinct[] = $v; } }
        for ($v=$lo; count($distinct)<8 && $v <= $hi; $v++) { $k=(string)$v; if (!isset($seen[$k])) { $seen[$k]=true; $distinct[]=$v; } }
        sort($distinct, SORT_NUMERIC);
        if (count($distinct) > 8) {
            $sample = array();
            for ($i=0; $i<8; $i++) { $idx = (int)round($i * (count($distinct)-1) / 7); $sample[] = $distinct[$idx]; }
            $distinct = array_values(array_unique($sample));
        }
        if (count($distinct) !== 8) { return array('ok'=>false,'values'=>array(),'reason'=>'LottoExpert could not create 8 useful distinct integer test values from this range.'); }
        return array('ok'=>true,'values'=>$distinct,'reason'=>'');
    }
    if ($span <= 0) { return array('ok'=>false,'values'=>array(),'reason'=>'LottoExpert could not create 8 useful distinct decimal test values from this range.'); }
    $raw = array();
    for ($i=0; $i<7; $i++) { $raw[] = $rangeMin + ($span * $i / 6.0); }
    if (is_numeric($recommendedValue)) { $raw[] = max($rangeMin, min($rangeMax, (float)$recommendedValue)); }
    else { $raw[] = $rangeMin + ($span * 0.5); }
    $seen = array(); $distinct = array();
    foreach ($raw as $v) { $k = mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($v, 'decimal'); if ($k !== '' && !isset($seen[$k])) { $seen[$k]=true; $distinct[]=(float)$k; } }
    for ($i=0; count($distinct)<8 && $i<80; $i++) { $v = $rangeMin + ($span * $i / 79.0); $k = mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($v, 'decimal'); if ($k !== '' && !isset($seen[$k])) { $seen[$k]=true; $distinct[]=(float)$k; } }
    sort($distinct, SORT_NUMERIC);
    if (count($distinct) > 8) {
        $sample = array();
        for ($i=0; $i<8; $i++) { $idx = (int)round($i * (count($distinct)-1) / 7); $sample[] = $distinct[$idx]; }
        $tmp = array(); $seen2=array();
        foreach ($sample as $v) { $k=mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($v,'decimal'); if (!isset($seen2[$k])) { $seen2[$k]=true; $tmp[]=$v; } }
        $distinct = $tmp;
    }
    if (count($distinct) !== 8) { return array('ok'=>false,'values'=>array(),'reason'=>'LottoExpert could not create 8 useful distinct decimal test values from this range.'); }
    return array('ok'=>true,'values'=>$distinct,'reason'=>'');
}


/**
 * [[MLE_NEXT_SETTINGS_9_RUN_BATCH]]
 * Build a practical 9-run SKAI batch from the Recommended Next Settings Run.
 * This is used when the user clicks the next-settings action. It creates:
 *   Run 1  = control/current strongest settings
 *   Runs 2-9 = one controlled variable across 8 bracketed test values
 *
 * This keeps the user in the right workflow: MyLottoExpert decides the test,
 * then routes directly to the correct SKAI lottery page to run it.
 */
function mleAdvisoryBuildForcedNextSettingsSkaiBatchPlan(array $settingsAdv, array $precisionLock, array $summary = array())
{
    $hasAdvice = !empty($settingsAdv['has_advice']);
    $settingKey = trim((string)($settingsAdv['setting'] ?? ''));
    $settingLabel = trim((string)($settingsAdv['setting_label'] ?? ''));
    $currentValue = trim((string)($settingsAdv['current_value'] ?? ''));
    $suggestedValue = trim((string)($settingsAdv['suggested_value'] ?? ''));

    if (!$hasAdvice || $settingKey === '' || $settingLabel === '') {
        return array('has_recommendation' => false, 'fail_reason' => 'No recommended next setting is available yet.');
    }

    $decimalKeys = array('diversity_penalty','sampling_temperature','recency_decay','learning_rate','dropout_rate','gap_scale');
    $binaryKeys = array('best_window','auto_tune');
    $variableType = in_array($settingKey, $decimalKeys, true) ? 'decimal' : 'integer';

    // A binary 0/1 switch cannot produce 8 meaningful distinct values. When that happens,
    // route the user to a regular SKAI blend batch instead of creating fake duplicates.
    if (in_array($settingKey, $binaryKeys, true)) {
        $settingKey = 'skai_blend_ai_pct';
        $settingLabel = 'Blend Setting';
        $currentValue = '50';
        $suggestedValue = '55';
        $variableType = 'integer';
    }

    $cur = is_numeric($currentValue) ? (float)$currentValue : null;
    $sug = is_numeric($suggestedValue) ? (float)$suggestedValue : null;
    if ($cur === null && $sug === null) {
        return array('has_recommendation' => false, 'fail_reason' => 'The recommended setting is not numeric enough for a 9-run SKAI batch.');
    }
    if ($cur === null) { $cur = $sug; }
    if ($sug === null) { $sug = $cur; }

    $rangeMin = null;
    $rangeMax = null;
    if (!empty($precisionLock['has_range']) && is_numeric($precisionLock['range_min'] ?? null) && is_numeric($precisionLock['range_max'] ?? null)) {
        $rangeMin = (float)$precisionLock['range_min'];
        $rangeMax = (float)$precisionLock['range_max'];
    }

    if ($rangeMin === null || $rangeMax === null || abs($rangeMax - $rangeMin) < 1.0e-9) {
        $low = min($cur, $sug);
        $high = max($cur, $sug);
        if ($variableType === 'decimal') {
            $center = ($cur + $sug) / 2.0;
            $span = max(0.08, abs($high - $low) * 2.0);
            $rangeMin = $center - ($span / 2.0);
            $rangeMax = $center + ($span / 2.0);
        } else {
            $center = ($cur + $sug) / 2.0;
            $span = max(7.0, abs($high - $low) * 2.0);
            $rangeMin = floor($center - ($span / 2.0));
            $rangeMax = ceil($center + ($span / 2.0));
        }
    }

    if ($rangeMax < $rangeMin) {
        $tmp = $rangeMin;
        $rangeMin = $rangeMax;
        $rangeMax = $tmp;
    }

    // Percentage-style settings should stay inside 0-100.
    if (preg_match('/(pct|percent|blend)/i', $settingKey)) {
        $rangeMin = max(0.0, min(100.0, (float)$rangeMin));
        $rangeMax = max(0.0, min(100.0, (float)$rangeMax));
        if (($rangeMax - $rangeMin) < 7.0 && $variableType === 'integer') {
            $center = max(0.0, min(100.0, (float)$sug));
            $rangeMin = max(0.0, $center - 4.0);
            $rangeMax = min(100.0, $center + 4.0);
        }
    }

    // Probability-like decimal settings should usually stay inside 0-1.
    if ($variableType === 'decimal' && in_array($settingKey, array('diversity_penalty','sampling_temperature','recency_decay','dropout_rate','gap_scale'), true)) {
        $rangeMin = max(0.0, min(1.0, (float)$rangeMin));
        $rangeMax = max(0.0, min(1.0, (float)$rangeMax));
        if (($rangeMax - $rangeMin) < 0.08) {
            $center = max(0.0, min(1.0, (float)$sug));
            $rangeMin = max(0.0, $center - 0.06);
            $rangeMax = min(1.0, $center + 0.06);
        }
    }

    $valueResult = mleAdvisoryGenerateEightDistinctBatchValues($rangeMin, $rangeMax, $suggestedValue, $variableType);
    if (empty($valueResult['ok']) || count((array)($valueResult['values'] ?? array())) !== 8) {
        // Last-resort regular SKAI batch: blend range. This prevents the next-settings button
        // from dead-ending when one setting is too narrow to bracket.
        $settingKey = 'skai_blend_ai_pct';
        $settingLabel = 'Blend Setting';
        $variableType = 'integer';
        $rangeMin = 20.0;
        $rangeMax = 80.0;
        $suggestedValue = '50';
        $valueResult = mleAdvisoryGenerateEightDistinctBatchValues($rangeMin, $rangeMax, $suggestedValue, $variableType);
    }

    if (empty($valueResult['ok']) || count((array)($valueResult['values'] ?? array())) !== 8) {
        return array('has_recommendation' => false, 'fail_reason' => (string)($valueResult['reason'] ?? 'Could not build a 9-run SKAI batch.'));
    }

    $values = (array)$valueResult['values'];
    $controlValue = mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($cur, $variableType);
    $batchRunLabels = array('Control - Current Best Settings');
    $batchRunValues = array($controlValue !== '' ? $controlValue : (string)$currentValue);
    $desc = array(1=>'Low edge test',2=>'Low-mid test',3=>'Mid-low test',4=>'Center test',5=>'Mid-high test',6=>'High-mid test',7=>'High edge test',8=>'Recommended point');

    for ($i = 0; $i < 8; $i++) {
        $vText = mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($values[$i], $variableType);
        $batchRunLabels[] = 'Test ' . ($i + 1) . ' - ' . $settingLabel . ' ' . $vText . ' (' . $desc[$i + 1] . ')';
        $batchRunValues[] = $vText;
    }

    $rMinText = mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($rangeMin, $variableType);
    $rMaxText = mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($rangeMax, $variableType);

    return array(
        'has_recommendation' => true,
        'title' => 'Recommended Next Settings 9-Run SKAI Batch',
        'summary' => 'LottoExpert created a controlled 9-run SKAI batch from the recommended next setting.',
        'test_plan' => 'Create 9 SKAI runs for this lottery. Run 1 is the control. Runs 2 through 9 test only ' . $settingLabel . ' across a bracketed range so SKAI can narrow the next setting more clearly.',
        'advanced_explanation' => 'This batch keeps the base settings stable and varies one setting across 8 bracketed values.',
        'guardrail' => 'Do not change other settings while this batch is being tested.',
        'evidence_line' => ((int)($summary['total_runs'] ?? 0)) . ' saved runs are being used to create the next controlled test.',
        'batch_purpose' => 'Narrow the recommended next setting using a controlled 9-run SKAI batch.',
        'locked_settings' => trim((string)($settingsAdv['keep_same_list'] ?? 'Keep the strongest settings stable.')),
        'test_variable' => $settingLabel,
        'setting_key' => $settingKey,
        'control_run' => 'Control - Current Best Settings (' . $settingLabel . ' at ' . ($controlValue !== '' ? $controlValue : (string)$currentValue) . ').',
        'control_source' => 'Recommended Next Settings Run',
        'batch_runs' => $batchRunLabels,
        'batch_run_values' => $batchRunValues,
        'what_it_proves' => 'Which point in this setting range deserves the next focused test.',
        'preferred_use' => 'Best when the user wants the next settings recommendation to move directly into SKAI for immediate testing.',
        'range_basis' => $settingLabel,
        'current_range' => $rMinText . ' to ' . $rMaxText,
        'range_min' => $rangeMin,
        'range_max' => $rangeMax,
        'recommended_value' => $suggestedValue,
        'beginner_explanation' => 'This sends you directly to the correct SKAI lottery page with 9 controlled runs ready to test. The first run is the control; the other 8 test one setting.',
        'milestone_supported' => 'Run the next controlled SKAI test for this lottery.',
        'batch_type' => 'Next Settings 9-Run Batch'
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiPageBaseUrl($db)
{
    // [[MLE_SKAI_EXACT_ROUTE_V12]]
    // Source of truth supplied by site owner. Do not auto-discover menu items here;
    // previous discovery could route users to Skip/Hit or legacy AI pages.
    $siteBase = rtrim(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::base(), '/');

    if (defined('MLE_SKAI_PAGE_PATH')) {
        $configured = trim((string)constant('MLE_SKAI_PAGE_PATH'));
        if ($configured !== '') {
            if (preg_match('#^https?://#i', $configured)) {
                return $configured;
            }
            return $siteBase . '/' . ltrim($configured, '/');
        }
    }

    return $siteBase . '/picking-winning-numbers/artificial-intelligence/skai-lottery-prediction';
}

function mleAdvisoryNormalizeStateCodeForSkai($stateName, $countryName = '')
{
    $stateName = trim((string)$stateName);
    $countryName = trim((string)$countryName);
    if ($stateName === '') {
        return '';
    }

    $key = strtolower(preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/', ' ', $stateName));
    $key = trim(preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $key));

    $map = array(
        'alabama'=>'al','alaska'=>'ak','arizona'=>'az','arkansas'=>'ar','california'=>'ca','colorado'=>'co','connecticut'=>'ct','delaware'=>'de','district of columbia'=>'dc','florida'=>'fl','georgia'=>'ga','hawaii'=>'hi','idaho'=>'id','illinois'=>'il','indiana'=>'in','iowa'=>'ia','kansas'=>'ks','kentucky'=>'ky','louisiana'=>'la','maine'=>'me','maryland'=>'md','massachusetts'=>'ma','michigan'=>'mi','minnesota'=>'mn','mississippi'=>'ms','missouri'=>'mo','montana'=>'mt','nebraska'=>'ne','nevada'=>'nv','new hampshire'=>'nh','new jersey'=>'nj','new mexico'=>'nm','new york'=>'ny','north carolina'=>'nc','north dakota'=>'nd','ohio'=>'oh','oklahoma'=>'ok','oregon'=>'or','pennsylvania'=>'pa','rhode island'=>'ri','south carolina'=>'sc','south dakota'=>'sd','tennessee'=>'tn','texas'=>'tx','utah'=>'ut','vermont'=>'vt','virginia'=>'va','washington'=>'wa','west virginia'=>'wv','wisconsin'=>'wi','wyoming'=>'wy'
    );

    if (isset($map[$key])) {
        return $map[$key];
    }

    // If the stored state is already a two-letter code, use it.
    if (preg_match('/^[a-z]{2}$/i', $stateName)) {
        return strtolower($stateName);
    }

    // Multi-country games such as EuroMillions generally do not need st/stn.
    $combo = strtolower($stateName . ' ' . $countryName);
    if (strpos($combo, 'multi') !== false || strpos($combo, 'euro') !== false) {
        return '';
    }

    // Conservative fallback: sanitized short token. This prevents routing to the wrong page
    // while still keeping the URL valid if a non-US code is stored in the DB.
    return strtolower(substr(preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]/i', '', $stateName), 0, 12));
}

function mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiLotteryUrlMeta($db, $lotteryId)
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $meta = array(
        'gameId' => '',
        'st' => '',
        'stn' => '',
        'gm' => '',
        'lottery_id' => $lotteryId,
    );
    if ($lotteryId <= 0) {
        return $meta;
    }

    try {
        $lotteryColsRaw = $db->getTableColumns('#__lotteries', false);
        $lotteryCols = is_array($lotteryColsRaw) ? array_keys($lotteryColsRaw) : array();
        $stateColsRaw = $db->getTableColumns('#__states', false);
        $stateCols = is_array($stateColsRaw) ? array_keys($stateColsRaw) : array();

        $select = array();
        foreach (array('lottery_id','id','game_id','gameId','gid','name','game_name','title','alias','state_id') as $c) {
            if (in_array($c, $lotteryCols, true)) {
                $select[] = 'l.' . $db->quoteName($c) . ' AS ' . $db->quoteName('l_' . $c);
            }
        }
        foreach (array('state_id','name','state_name','state_code','code','abbr','abbrev','short_code','alias') as $c) {
            if (in_array($c, $stateCols, true)) {
                $select[] = 's.' . $db->quoteName($c) . ' AS ' . $db->quoteName('s_' . $c);
            }
        }
        if (empty($select)) {
            return $meta;
        }

        $where = array();
        foreach (array('lottery_id','id') as $idCol) {
            if (in_array($idCol, $lotteryCols, true)) {
                $where[] = 'l.' . $db->quoteName($idCol) . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId;
            }
        }
        if (empty($where)) {
            return $meta;
        }

        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($select)
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries', 'l'))
            ->where('(' . implode(' OR ', $where) . ')')
            ->setLimit(1);
        if (in_array('state_id', $lotteryCols, true) && in_array('state_id', $stateCols, true)) {
            $q->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__states', 's') . ' ON l.' . $db->quoteName('state_id') . ' = s.' . $db->quoteName('state_id'));
        }
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $row = $db->loadAssoc();
        if (!is_array($row)) {
            return $meta;
        }

        foreach (array('l_game_id','l_gameId','l_gid') as $k) {
            $v = trim((string)($row[$k] ?? ''));
            if ($v !== '') { $meta['gameId'] = $v; break; }
        }
        if ($meta['gameId'] === '') {
            foreach (array('l_alias','l_id','l_lottery_id') as $k) {
                $v = trim((string)($row[$k] ?? ''));
                if ($v !== '') { $meta['gameId'] = $v; break; }
            }
        }

        foreach (array('l_game_name','l_name','l_title','l_alias') as $k) {
            $v = trim((string)($row[$k] ?? ''));
            if ($v !== '') { $meta['gm'] = $v; break; }
        }

        $stateName = '';
        foreach (array('s_name','s_state_name') as $k) {
            $v = trim((string)($row[$k] ?? ''));
            if ($v !== '') { $stateName = $v; break; }
        }
        $stateCode = '';
        foreach (array('s_state_code','s_code','s_abbr','s_abbrev','s_short_code','s_alias') as $k) {
            $v = trim((string)($row[$k] ?? ''));
            if ($v !== '') { $stateCode = $v; break; }
        }
        if ($stateCode === '') {
            $stateCode = mleAdvisoryNormalizeStateCodeForSkai($stateName, '');
        } elseif (!preg_match('/^[a-z]{2}$/i', $stateCode)) {
            $stateCode = mleAdvisoryNormalizeStateCodeForSkai($stateCode, '');
        } else {
            $stateCode = strtolower($stateCode);
        }

        $meta['gameId'] = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', substr((string)$meta['gameId'], 0, 50));
        $meta['st'] = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', substr((string)$stateCode, 0, 20));
        $meta['stn'] = $stateName;
        $meta['gm'] = $meta['gm'] !== '' ? $meta['gm'] : ('Lottery ' . $lotteryId);
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return $meta;
    }

    return $meta;
}

function mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiBatchOpenUrl($db, $lotteryId, $batchId, $batchType = '')
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $batchId = (int)$batchId;
    $meta = mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiLotteryUrlMeta($db, $lotteryId);
    $gameId = (string)($meta['gameId'] ?? '');
    if ($gameId === '') {
        $gameId = (string)$lotteryId;
    }
    $gameId = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', substr((string)$gameId, 0, 50));

    $queryArgs = array(
        // SKAI's canonical URL format uses gameId, st, stn, gm.
        'gameId' => $gameId,
        'st' => (string)($meta['st'] ?? ''),
        'stn' => (string)($meta['stn'] ?? ''),
        'gm' => (string)($meta['gm'] ?? ''),
        // Keep legacy aliases too, because the SKAI PHP currently accepts game_id/gid as fallbacks.
        'game_id' => $gameId,
        'gid' => $gameId,
        'mle_skai_batch' => 1,
        'mle_precision_batch' => 1,
        'batch_id' => $batchId,
        'lottery_id' => $lotteryId,
        'open' => 'precision_batch',
        'source' => 'mylottoexpert',
    );
    $batchType = trim((string)$batchType);
    if ($batchType !== '') {
        $queryArgs['mle_batch_type'] = strtolower(preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/i', '_', $batchType));
    }

    // Remove empty display-only values so non-state/multi-country games do not get ugly blank params.
    foreach (array('st','stn','gm') as $optionalKey) {
        if (trim((string)$queryArgs[$optionalKey]) === '') {
            unset($queryArgs[$optionalKey]);
        }
    }

    return mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiPageBaseUrl($db) . '?' . http_build_query($queryArgs, '', '&', PHP_QUERY_RFC3986) . '#skai-mle-precision-batch';
}


function mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiRegularRunUrl($db, $lotteryId)
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $meta = mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiLotteryUrlMeta($db, $lotteryId);
    $gameId = (string)($meta['gameId'] ?? '');
    if ($gameId === '') {
        $gameId = (string)$lotteryId;
    }
    $gameId = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', substr((string)$gameId, 0, 50));

    $queryArgs = array(
        'gameId' => $gameId,
        'st' => (string)($meta['st'] ?? ''),
        'stn' => (string)($meta['stn'] ?? ''),
        'gm' => (string)($meta['gm'] ?? ''),
        'game_id' => $gameId,
        'gid' => $gameId,
        'source' => 'mylottoexpert',
        'open' => 'regular_batch',
        'mle_regular_batch' => 1,
        'lottery_id' => $lotteryId,
    );
    foreach (array('st','stn','gm') as $optionalKey) {
        if (trim((string)$queryArgs[$optionalKey]) === '') {
            unset($queryArgs[$optionalKey]);
        }
    }

    return mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiPageBaseUrl($db) . '?' . http_build_query($queryArgs, '', '&', PHP_QUERY_RFC3986) . '#run-batch';
}


/**
 * [[MLE_HISTORY_HORIZON_DISCOVERY_BATCH]]
 * Build a 9-run SKAI batch that compares short, medium, long, and near-full history windows.
 * This is used before a precise range is stable enough. It answers a different question than
 * Precision Focus: "Which history horizon is behaving best for this lottery right now?"
 *
 * A 9-run horizon batch still counts as one completed draw cycle after the draw is scored.
 */
function mleAdvisoryBuildHistoryHorizonSkaiBatchPlan(array $summary, array $precisionLock = array(), array $settingsAdv = array())
{
    $runCount = (int)($summary['total_runs'] ?? ($precisionLock['run_count'] ?? 0));
    $drawCount = (int)($summary['scored_draws'] ?? 0);
    $clusterCount = (int)($summary['true_cluster_support'] ?? ($precisionLock['true_cluster_support'] ?? 0));

    // Minimum evidence for a controlled horizon discovery batch.
    // Before this, the user should keep running regular SKAI batches and scoring draws.
    if ($runCount < 18 || $drawCount < 2) {
        return array(
            'has_recommendation' => false,
            'fail_reason' => 'History Horizon Discovery is not ready yet. LottoExpert first needs at least 2 completed draw cycles and about 18 scored runs so the first horizon test is not based on a single draw.'
        );
    }

    $currentValue = '';
    $settingKey = trim((string)($settingsAdv['setting'] ?? ''));
    if (in_array($settingKey, array('skai_window_size','draws_used','draws_analyzed','skip_window','window_size'), true)) {
        $currentValue = trim((string)($settingsAdv['current_value'] ?? ''));
    }
    if ($currentValue === '' && isset($precisionLock['control_value']) && is_numeric($precisionLock['control_value'])) {
        $currentValue = (string)((int)round((float)$precisionLock['control_value']));
    }
    if ($currentValue === '' || !is_numeric($currentValue)) {
        $currentValue = '100';
    }

    // Eight broad horizons. The final value is a long-history proxy; SKAI can cap to available history.
    $horizons = array(50, 75, 100, 150, 200, 300, 500, 1000);
    $labels = array(
        50 => 'Short-term window',
        75 => 'Short-mid window',
        100 => 'Balanced recent window',
        150 => 'Medium window',
        200 => 'Medium-long window',
        300 => 'Long window',
        500 => 'Deep-history window',
        1000 => 'Long/full-history proxy'
    );

    $batchRunLabels = array('Control - Current History Window');
    $batchRunValues = array((string)((int)round((float)$currentValue)));
    foreach ($horizons as $h) {
        $batchRunLabels[] = 'Test - History Window ' . (string)$h . ' draws (' . (string)$labels[$h] . ')';
        $batchRunValues[] = (string)$h;
    }

    $evidenceLine = $runCount . ' scored runs across ' . $drawCount . ' completed draw cycle' . ($drawCount === 1 ? '' : 's') . '. ';
    $evidenceLine .= 'Cluster support: ' . $clusterCount . '. This batch is for horizon discovery, not final precision narrowing.';

    return array(
        'has_recommendation' => true,
        'title' => 'History Horizon Discovery 9-Run SKAI Batch',
        'summary' => 'LottoExpert will compare short, medium, long, and long-history SKAI windows before narrowing to a tight range.',
        'test_plan' => 'Create 9 SKAI runs for this lottery. Run 1 keeps the current history window as the control. Runs 2 through 9 test broad history horizons: 50, 75, 100, 150, 200, 300, 500, and 1000 draws.',
        'advanced_explanation' => 'More draws are not automatically better. This batch compares responsiveness versus stability so LottoExpert can learn whether this lottery is behaving better with short, medium, long, or long-history windows.',
        'guardrail' => 'Do not treat this as a Precision Focus range yet. This is a discovery batch to identify the best history horizon before fine-tuning.',
        'evidence_line' => $evidenceLine,
        'batch_purpose' => 'Discover which history horizon performs best before creating a tighter Precision Focus range.',
        'locked_settings' => 'Keep all other SKAI settings stable while only the history window changes.',
        'test_variable' => 'History Window',
        'setting_key' => 'skai_window_size',
        'setting_key_aliases' => array('skai_window_size','draws_used','skip_window','window_size'),
        'control_run' => 'Control - Current History Window (' . (string)((int)round((float)$currentValue)) . ' draws).',
        'control_source' => 'Current SKAI baseline',
        'batch_runs' => $batchRunLabels,
        'batch_run_values' => $batchRunValues,
        'what_it_proves' => 'Whether this lottery is currently responding better to short, medium, long, or long-history draw windows.',
        'preferred_use' => 'Best when no stable Precision Focus range exists yet or when the history-window evidence needs broader comparison.',
        'range_basis' => 'History Window',
        'current_range' => '50 to 1000 draws',
        'range_min' => 50,
        'range_max' => 1000,
        'recommended_value' => 'Broad horizon comparison',
        'beginner_explanation' => 'This does not ignore your full database. It compares several history depths so LottoExpert can learn whether recent, medium, or deeper history is more useful for this lottery before narrowing further.',
        'milestone_supported' => 'Discover the best SKAI history horizon for this lottery.',
        'batch_type' => 'History Horizon Discovery Batch'
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildRecommendedSkaiBatchTest(array $precisionLock, array $settingsAdv, array $summary, array $currentLockedSettings = array()) {
    $runCount = (int)($precisionLock['run_count'] ?? 0);
    $drawCount = (int)($summary['scored_draws'] ?? 0);
    $trueClusterCount = (int)($summary['true_cluster_support'] ?? ($precisionLock['true_cluster_support'] ?? 0));
    $hasRange = !empty($precisionLock['has_range']);
    $stage = (string)($precisionLock['stage'] ?? 'broad_testing');
    $rangeMin = (float)($precisionLock['range_min'] ?? 0.0);
    $rangeMax = (float)($precisionLock['range_max'] ?? 100.0);
    $controlLabel = trim((string)($precisionLock['control_label'] ?? 'primary setting'));
    if ($controlLabel === '') { $controlLabel = 'primary setting'; }
    $hasAdvice = !empty($settingsAdv['has_advice']);
    $settingLabel = trim((string)($settingsAdv['setting_label'] ?? ''));
    $settingKey = trim((string)($settingsAdv['setting'] ?? ''));
    $currentValue = trim((string)($settingsAdv['current_value'] ?? ''));
    $suggestedValue = trim((string)($settingsAdv['suggested_value'] ?? ''));
    $lockReady = !empty($currentLockedSettings['has_active_lock']) || in_array((string)($currentLockedSettings['status'] ?? ''), array('Locked for Testing','Precision Focus Candidate','Elite Baseline'), true);
    $controlSource = $lockReady ? 'Current Locked Settings' : 'Current Best Settings';
    $controlRunName = $lockReady ? 'Control - Current Locked Settings' : 'Control - Current Best Settings';
    $rMinInt = (int)round($rangeMin);
    $rMaxInt = (int)round($rangeMax);
    $empty = array(
        'has_recommendation'=>false,
        'title'=>'Recommended SKAI Batch Test',
        'summary'=>'Not enough saved scored runs yet for a controlled SKAI batch test in this lottery.',
        'test_plan'=>'',
        'guardrail'=>'Keep saving and scoring runs for this lottery first.',
        'evidence_line'=>$runCount . ' saved scored runs and ' . $drawCount . ' completed draw date' . ($drawCount === 1 ? '' : 's') . '.',
        'batch_purpose'=>'',
        'locked_settings'=>'',
        'test_variable'=>'',
        'setting_key'=>'',
        'control_run'=>'',
        'control_source'=>$controlSource,
        'batch_runs'=>array(),
        'batch_run_values'=>array(),
        'what_it_proves'=>'',
        'preferred_use'=>'Best if you want SKAI to test several points inside the current Precision Focus range.',
        'range_basis'=>$controlLabel,
        'current_range'=>($rMinInt . ' to ' . $rMaxInt),
        'beginner_explanation'=>'This creates 9 SKAI runs for this lottery. The first run keeps your strongest settings unchanged. The other 8 runs test one setting inside the current Precision Focus Range. This helps LottoExpert learn which point in the range is strongest.',
        'milestone_supported'=>'',
        'fail_reason'=>'This lottery is not ready for a 9-run SKAI batch yet. LottoExpert needs more repeated saved scored evidence before creating a controlled batch.'
    );
    if ($runCount < 45 || $drawCount < 5 || !$hasRange || $trueClusterCount < 2) {
        $horizonPlan = mleAdvisoryBuildHistoryHorizonSkaiBatchPlan($summary, $precisionLock, $settingsAdv);
        if (!empty($horizonPlan['has_recommendation'])) {
            return $horizonPlan;
        }
        $empty['guardrail'] = 'This lottery is not ready for a Precision Focus 9-run batch yet. LottoExpert first needs about 5 completed regular batch cycles, at least 45 scored runs, and a repeated settings pattern. Until then, run regular SKAI batches and save the results for future scoring. After at least 2 completed draw cycles and about 18 scored runs, LottoExpert can also offer a History Horizon Discovery Batch to compare short, medium, long, and long-history windows.';
        $empty['fail_reason'] = (string)($horizonPlan['fail_reason'] ?? $empty['guardrail']);
        return $empty;
    }
    if (!in_array($stage, array('exploratory_batch','strategy_candidate','narrowing_signal','validated_focus_range','precision_focus_range'), true)) { return $empty; }
    if (!$hasAdvice || $settingLabel === '' || $settingKey === '') {
        $empty['guardrail'] = 'Keep using one clean next test until this lottery isolates a single setting strongly enough for a batch.';
        return $empty;
    }
    $binaryKeys = array('best_window','auto_tune');
    if (in_array($settingKey, $binaryKeys, true)) {
        $empty['guardrail'] = 'This lottery is not ready for a 9-run SKAI batch yet. LottoExpert needs a numeric range setting before creating a controlled batch.';
        return $empty;
    }
    $decimalKeys = array('diversity_penalty','sampling_temperature','recency_decay','learning_rate','dropout_rate','gap_scale');
    $variableType = in_array($settingKey, $decimalKeys, true) ? 'decimal' : 'integer';
    $valueResult = mleAdvisoryGenerateEightDistinctBatchValues($rangeMin, $rangeMax, $suggestedValue, $variableType);
    if (empty($valueResult['ok']) || count((array)($valueResult['values'] ?? array())) !== 8) {
        $empty['guardrail'] = (string)($valueResult['reason'] ?? 'This lottery is not ready for a 9-run SKAI batch yet. LottoExpert could not create 8 useful distinct test values from the current evidence.');
        $empty['fail_reason'] = $empty['guardrail'];
        return $empty;
    }
    $values = (array)$valueResult['values'];
    $batchRunLabels = array($controlRunName);
    $batchRunValues = array($currentValue !== '' ? $currentValue : '');
    $desc = array(1=>'Low edge of current range',2=>'Low-mid test point',3=>'Mid-low test point',4=>'Center point',5=>'Mid-high test point',6=>'High-mid test point',7=>'High edge of current range',8=>'Current recommended next setting');
    for ($i=0; $i<8; $i++) {
        $vText = mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($values[$i], $variableType);
        $batchRunLabels[] = 'Test ' . ($i+1) . ' - ' . $settingLabel . ' ' . $vText . ' (' . $desc[$i+1] . ')';
        $batchRunValues[] = $vText;
    }
    $plan = 'Create 9 saved runs for this lottery while keeping the control settings locked. The first run is the control from ' . $controlSource . '. Runs 2 through 9 test only ' . $settingLabel . ' across the current Precision Focus Range (' . $rMinInt . ' to ' . $rMaxInt . '). Compare results after the next completed draw.';
    $advancedExplanation = 'This batch keeps the base settings locked and varies only ' . $settingLabel . ' across 8 useful distinct test points inside the current Precision Focus range. The control run preserves ' . $controlSource . '.';
    return array(
        'has_recommendation'=>true,
        'title'=>'Recommended SKAI Batch Test',
        'summary'=>'Evidence is now strong enough to run a controlled 9-run SKAI batch test for this lottery only.',
        'test_plan'=>$plan,
        'advanced_explanation'=>$advancedExplanation,
        'guardrail'=>'Do not change multiple unrelated settings. Keep the current strongest setup stable and test one focused range question.',
        'evidence_line'=>$runCount . ' saved scored runs, ' . $drawCount . ' completed draw dates, and repeated cluster support in ' . $trueClusterCount . ' strong evidence runs.',
        'batch_purpose'=>'Test which exact point inside the current Precision Focus Range for ' . $settingLabel . ' performs best when all other proven settings stay locked.',
        'locked_settings'=>trim((string)($settingsAdv['keep_same_list'] ?? 'Keep the strongest settings stable.')),
        'test_variable'=>$settingLabel,
        'setting_key'=>$settingKey,
        'control_run'=>$controlRunName . ' (' . $settingLabel . ' at ' . ($currentValue !== '' ? $currentValue : 'the current value') . ').',
        'control_source'=>$controlSource,
        'batch_runs'=>$batchRunLabels,
        'batch_run_values'=>$batchRunValues,
        'what_it_proves'=>'Which exact point inside this lottery current Precision Focus Range performs best when all other proven settings stay locked.',
        'preferred_use'=>'Best if you want SKAI to test several useful distinct points inside the current Precision Focus range.',
        'range_basis'=>$controlLabel,
        'current_range'=>($rMinInt . ' to ' . $rMaxInt),
        'beginner_explanation'=>'This creates 9 SKAI runs for this lottery. The first run keeps your strongest settings unchanged. The other 8 runs test one setting inside the current Precision Focus Range. This helps LottoExpert learn which point in the range is strongest.',
        'milestone_supported'=>'Confirm the range across more completed draws.',
        'batch_type'=>'Precision Focus Batch'
    );
}


function mleAdvisoryComputeRecommendationLevel(array $precisionLock, array $summary, array $topMethod, array $settingsAdv, array $batchTest) {
    $runCount = (int)($precisionLock['run_count'] ?? ($summary['total_runs'] ?? 0));
    $drawCount = (int)($summary['scored_draws'] ?? 0);
    $methodRepeat = (int)($topMethod['run_count'] ?? 0);
    $trueClusterSupport = (int)($summary['true_cluster_support'] ?? ($precisionLock['true_cluster_support'] ?? 0));
    $clusterDrawSupport = (int)($summary['true_cluster_draw_support'] ?? 0);
    $hasRange = !empty($precisionLock['has_range']);
    $stage = (string)($precisionLock['stage'] ?? 'broad_testing');
    $isNarrow = in_array($stage, array('narrowing_signal','validated_focus_range','precision_focus_range'), true);
    $hasAdvice = !empty($settingsAdv['has_advice']);
    $hasBatch = !empty($batchTest['has_recommendation']);
    $label = 'Learning Stage';
    $key = 'learning_stage';
    $why = 'This lottery is still building completed draw-cycle evidence. Batches add scored runs, but each target date counts as one completed draw cycle.';
    $next = 'Keep saving runs and score them after completed draws.';

    if ($runCount >= 120 && $drawCount >= 20 && $methodRepeat >= 12 && $trueClusterSupport >= 5 && $clusterDrawSupport >= 5 && $isNarrow && $hasAdvice) {
        $label = 'Precision Focus Range';
        $key = 'precision_focus_range';
        $why = 'This lottery has strong completed draw-cycle support, repeated scored runs, and repeated settings cluster evidence. This is LottoExpert\'s strongest disciplined range, not a guarantee.';
        $next = $hasBatch ? 'Use the controlled Precision Focus batch and keep validating future draw cycles.' : 'Keep the strongest baseline stable and continue one-setting tests.';
    } elseif ($runCount >= 75 && $drawCount >= 12 && $trueClusterSupport >= 4 && $clusterDrawSupport >= 4 && $isNarrow && ($hasAdvice || $hasBatch)) {
        $label = 'Validated Focus Range';
        $key = 'validated_focus_range';
        $why = 'This lottery has repeated support across completed draw cycles and enough scored-run evidence to guide disciplined testing.';
        $next = $hasBatch ? 'Run the controlled 9-run SKAI batch and score it after the next draw.' : 'Create the recommended next settings run and keep measuring after the next draw.';
    } elseif ($runCount >= 45 && $drawCount >= 6 && $trueClusterSupport >= 3 && $hasRange && ($hasAdvice || $hasBatch)) {
        $label = 'Narrowing Signal';
        $key = 'narrowing_signal';
        $why = 'Repeated completed-draw evidence is starting to favor a tighter strategy range for this lottery.';
        $next = 'Keep locked settings stable and test one uncertain setting next.';
    } elseif ($runCount >= 27 && $drawCount >= 4 && $trueClusterSupport >= 2 && $hasRange && ($hasAdvice || $hasBatch)) {
        $label = 'Exploratory Precision Batch';
        $key = 'exploratory_batch';
        $why = 'This lottery has enough completed draw-cycle evidence for the first controlled 9-run Precision Focus batch.';
        $next = $hasBatch ? 'Run the controlled Precision Focus batch.' : 'Create a controlled 9-run Precision Focus batch.';
    } elseif ($runCount >= 18 && $drawCount >= 3) {
        $label = 'Early Direction';
        $key = 'early_direction';
        $why = 'A possible direction is forming, but LottoExpert needs more completed draw cycles before stronger narrowing guidance.';
        $next = 'Keep scoring saved runs until the same method or range repeats across more draw cycles.';
    }
    return array('label'=>$label,'key'=>$key,'why'=>$why,'next'=>$next,'cluster_support'=>$trueClusterSupport,'cluster_draw_support'=>$clusterDrawSupport,'saved_scored_runs'=>$runCount,'completed_draws'=>$drawCount);
}


function mleAdvisoryComputePrecisionProgress(array $precisionLock, array $summary, array $recommendationLevel, array $settingsAdv, array $batchTest) {
    $runCount = (int)($precisionLock['run_count'] ?? ($summary['total_runs'] ?? 0));
    $drawCount = (int)($summary['scored_draws'] ?? 0);
    $clusterSupport = (int)($summary['true_cluster_support'] ?? ($precisionLock['true_cluster_support'] ?? 0));
    $clusterDrawSupport = (int)($summary['true_cluster_draw_support'] ?? 0);
    $hasPending = (int)($summary['pending_runs'] ?? 0);

    $defs = mleAdvisoryPrecisionMilestoneDefinitions();
    $currentIndex = 0;
    foreach ($defs as $idx => $def) {
        $meetsDraws = ((int)$drawCount >= (int)$def['draws']);
        $meetsRuns = ((int)$runCount >= (int)$def['runs']);
        $meetsClusters = ((int)$clusterSupport >= (int)$def['clusters']);
        if ($meetsDraws && $meetsRuns && $meetsClusters) { $currentIndex = (int)$idx; }
    }

    $current = $defs[$currentIndex];
    $currentKey = (string)$current['key'];
    $nextIndex = min(count($defs) - 1, $currentIndex + 1);
    $next = $defs[$nextIndex];

    $milestones = array();
    foreach ($defs as $idx => $def) {
        $status = mleAdvisoryResolvePrecisionMilestoneStatus($currentKey, $def['key']);
        $milestones[] = array(
            'key' => (string)$def['key'],
            'label' => (string)$def['label'],
            'short' => (string)$def['short'],
            'draws_required' => (int)$def['draws'],
            'runs_required' => (int)$def['runs'],
            'clusters_required' => (int)$def['clusters'],
            'status' => $status,
        );
    }

    $drawTarget = max(1, (int)$defs[count($defs)-1]['draws']);
    $drawProgressPercent = min(100, (int)round(((int)$drawCount / $drawTarget) * 100));
    $progressPercent = (int)round((($currentIndex + 1) / count($defs)) * 100);
    if ($currentIndex < (count($defs) - 1)) { $progressPercent = min(99, $progressPercent); }

    $waitingText = mleAdvisoryBuildPrecisionWaitingText($currentKey, $drawCount, $runCount, $clusterSupport);
    if ($hasPending > 0) {
        $waitingText = 'A Precision Focus test is in progress: ' . $hasPending . ' pending run' . ($hasPending === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' are waiting for the next completed draw result. After that draw posts, score the runs to move the evidence forward.';
    }

    $why = 'This stage is based primarily on completed draw cycles, with scored runs and repeated setting clusters used as support gates.';
    if ($currentKey === 'learning_stage') { $why = 'LottoExpert is collecting evidence. A batch can create several scored runs, but it still represents one target draw cycle.'; }
    elseif ($currentKey === 'early_direction') { $why = 'A possible direction is forming across completed draw cycles. LottoExpert is not treating this as a strong narrowed range yet.'; }
    elseif ($currentKey === 'exploratory_batch') { $why = 'Enough completed draw-cycle evidence exists to test a controlled 9-run Precision Focus batch.'; }
    elseif ($currentKey === 'narrowing_signal') { $why = 'Repeated evidence is starting to favor a tighter range, but more completed draw cycles are needed before validation.'; }
    elseif ($currentKey === 'validated_focus_range') { $why = 'This range has stronger repeated support across completed draw cycles and scored runs.'; }
    elseif ($currentKey === 'precision_focus_range') { $why = 'This is LottoExpert\'s strongest disciplined range, backed by many completed draw cycles and repeated scored evidence.'; }

    $achieved = $current['label'] . ' reached: ' . $drawCount . ' completed draw cycle' . ($drawCount === 1 ? '' : 's') . ', ' . $runCount . ' scored run' . ($runCount === 1 ? '' : 's') . ', and ' . $clusterSupport . ' repeated setting cluster' . ($clusterSupport === 1 ? '' : 's') . '.';
    $evidenceLine = 'Current evidence: ' . $drawCount . ' completed draw cycle' . ($drawCount === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' • ' . $runCount . ' scored run' . ($runCount === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' • ' . $clusterSupport . ' repeated setting cluster' . ($clusterSupport === 1 ? '' : 's') . '.';
    if ($hasPending > 0) { $evidenceLine .= ' Pending activity: ' . $hasPending . ' run' . ($hasPending === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' waiting for draw results.'; }

    return array(
        'level'=>$currentIndex + 1,
        'level_name'=>(string)$current['label'],
        'level_key'=>$currentKey,
        'progress_percent'=>$progressPercent,
        'draw_progress_percent'=>$drawProgressPercent,
        'why'=>$why,
        'next_milestone'=>$currentIndex >= (count($defs)-1) ? 'Keep validating the Precision Focus Range after future completed draws.' : ((string)$next['label'] . ' at ' . (int)$next['draws'] . ' completed draw cycles and ' . (int)$next['runs'] . ' scored runs.'),
        'achieved'=>$achieved,
        'evidence_line'=>$evidenceLine,
        'beginner_explanation'=>'Precision Progress is based primarily on completed draw cycles. A 9-run batch gives nine scored comparisons, but it counts as one completed draw cycle because all nine runs are tested against the same official result.',
        'waiting_for'=>$waitingText,
        'current_draw_cycles'=>$drawCount,
        'current_scored_runs'=>$runCount,
        'current_clusters'=>$clusterSupport,
        'current_cluster_draw_support'=>$clusterDrawSupport,
        'pending_runs'=>$hasPending,
        'milestones'=>$milestones,
    );
}


function mleAdvisoryBuildTrueSettingsClusterFromStrongRuns(array $strongRuns) {
    $settingKeys = array('skai_blend_ai_pct','blend_ai_pct','ai_pct','blend_percent','blend_pct','ai_blend_pct','mode','run_mode','skai_window_size','draws_analyzed','best_window','auto_tune','diversity_penalty','sampling_temperature','recency_decay','gap_scale','learning_rate','dropout_rate','hidden_layers','chain_len','burn_in');
    $clusters = array();
    foreach ($strongRuns as $run) {
        if (!is_array($run)) { continue; }
        $settings = isset($run['settings']) && is_array($run['settings']) ? $run['settings'] : array();
        $method = trim((string)($run['method_key'] ?? ''));
        if ($method === '') { $method = 'method_unknown'; }
        $parts = array('method=' . $method);
        $labelParts = array('Method ' . mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($method));
        foreach ($settingKeys as $key) {
            if (!array_key_exists($key, $settings)) { continue; }
            $v = $settings[$key];
            if ($v === '' || $v === null) { continue; }
            if (is_bool($v)) { $norm = $v ? 'On' : 'Off'; }
            elseif (is_numeric($v)) {
                $num = (float)$v;
                if (in_array($key, array('skai_blend_ai_pct','blend_ai_pct','ai_pct','blend_percent','blend_pct','ai_blend_pct','skai_window_size','draws_analyzed'), true)) { $norm = (string)((int)round($num)); }
                else { $norm = rtrim(rtrim(number_format($num, 3, '.', ''), '0'), '.'); }
            } else { $norm = trim((string)$v); }
            if ($norm === '') { continue; }
            $parts[] = $key . '=' . strtolower($norm);
            $labelParts[] = mleAdvisoryFormatSettingLabel($key) . ' ' . $norm;
            if (count($parts) >= 5) { break; }
        }
        $clusterKey = implode('|', $parts);
        if (!isset($clusters[$clusterKey])) { $clusters[$clusterKey] = array('cluster_key'=>$clusterKey,'cluster_label'=>implode(', ', $labelParts),'strong_run_count'=>0,'completed_draw_dates'=>array(),'best_total_hits'=>0,'best_main_hits'=>0,'best_extra_hits'=>0,'score_sum'=>0.0,'members'=>array()); }
        $clusters[$clusterKey]['strong_run_count']++;
        $dd = trim((string)($run['draw_date'] ?? ''));
        if ($dd !== '') { $clusters[$clusterKey]['completed_draw_dates'][$dd] = 1; }
        $clusters[$clusterKey]['best_total_hits'] = max((int)$clusters[$clusterKey]['best_total_hits'], (int)($run['total_hits'] ?? 0));
        $clusters[$clusterKey]['best_main_hits'] = max((int)$clusters[$clusterKey]['best_main_hits'], (int)($run['main_hits'] ?? 0));
        $clusters[$clusterKey]['best_extra_hits'] = max((int)$clusters[$clusterKey]['best_extra_hits'], (int)($run['extra_hits'] ?? 0));
        $clusters[$clusterKey]['score_sum'] += (float)($run['evidence_score'] ?? 0);
        if (!empty($run['saved_id'])) { $clusters[$clusterKey]['members'][] = (int)$run['saved_id']; }
    }
    $out = array();
    foreach ($clusters as $c) {
        $cnt = max(1, (int)$c['strong_run_count']);
        $c['completed_draw_count'] = count($c['completed_draw_dates']);
        $c['average_evidence_score'] = round(((float)$c['score_sum']) / $cnt, 2);
        unset($c['completed_draw_dates'], $c['score_sum']);
        if ($cnt >= 2) { $out[] = $c; }
    }
    usort($out, function($a, $b) {
        $as = ((int)($a['strong_run_count'] ?? 0) * 1000) + ((int)($a['completed_draw_count'] ?? 0) * 100) + (float)($a['average_evidence_score'] ?? 0);
        $bs = ((int)($b['strong_run_count'] ?? 0) * 1000) + ((int)($b['completed_draw_count'] ?? 0) * 100) + (float)($b['average_evidence_score'] ?? 0);
        if ($bs == $as) { return 0; }
        return ($bs > $as) ? 1 : -1;
    });
    return $out;
}

function mleAdvisoryEvidenceStatusLabelFromRow(array $row) {
    $status = strtolower(trim((string)($row['advice_status'] ?? $row['evidence_status'] ?? $row['status'] ?? '')));
    if ($status === 'retire' || $status === 'retired' || $status === 'excluded' || $status === 'exclude' || $status === 'do_not_use') { return 'Exclude from Advice'; }
    if ($status === 'watch' || $status === 'review') { return 'Keep for Review'; }
    if ($status === 'keep' || $status === 'use' || $status === 'active' || $status === '') { return 'Use for Future Advice'; }
    return 'Keep for Review';
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildEvidenceIntelligence(array $visualRows, array $savedById, $method) {
    $method = mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($method);
    $completed = array_merge((array)($visualRows['recent'] ?? array()), (array)($visualRows['older'] ?? array()));
    $evidenceRows = array();
    $allStrongSettings = array();
    $allStrongMethods = array();
    foreach ($completed as $row) {
        if (!is_array($row)) { continue; }
        $savedId = (int)($row['saved_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($savedId <= 0 || empty($savedById[$savedId]) || !is_array($savedById[$savedId])) { continue; }
        $saved = $savedById[$savedId];
        $settings = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($saved);
        if (!is_array($settings)) { $settings = array(); }
        $mainHits = (int)($row['main_hits'] ?? $row['hits_main'] ?? 0);
        $extraHits = (int)($row['extra_hits'] ?? $row['hits_extra'] ?? 0);
        $totalHits = (int)($row['total_hits'] ?? ($mainHits + $extraHits));
        $actualMain = (array)($row['actual'] ?? array());
        $expectedMain = count($actualMain);
        if ($expectedMain <= 0) { $expectedMain = (int)($saved['pick_count'] ?? $saved['main_count'] ?? 0); }
        if ($expectedMain <= 0) { $expectedMain = max(5, $mainHits); }
        $missing = max(0, $expectedMain - $mainHits);
        $top10 = (int)($row['top10_hits'] ?? 0);
        $top20 = (int)($row['top20_hits'] ?? 0);
        $avgRank = (float)($row['avg_winning_rank'] ?? 0);
        $allMain = ($expectedMain > 0 && $mainHits >= $expectedMain);
        $score = ($mainHits * 18.0) + ($extraHits * 6.0) + ($top10 * 3.0) + ($top20 * 1.5) - ($missing * 4.0);
        if ($avgRank > 0) { $score -= min(25.0, $avgRank * 0.10); }
        if ($allMain) { $score += 60.0; }
        if ($totalHits >= 4) { $score += 12.0; }
        $evidenceStatus = mleAdvisoryEvidenceStatusLabelFromRow($row);
        $group = 'Weak but Informative';
        if ($evidenceStatus === 'Exclude from Advice') { $group = 'Excluded'; }
        elseif ($allMain || $mainHits >= max(3, $expectedMain - 1) || $score >= 55.0) { $group = 'Strong Evidence'; }
        elseif ($totalHits >= 2 || $top10 > 0 || $top20 > 0) { $group = 'Useful Evidence'; }
        $settingsSummary = mleAdvisoryBuildBestRecipeDesc($settings, (string)($saved['source'] ?? $method));
        $item = array(
            'saved_id' => $savedId,
            'draw_date' => (string)($row['draw_date'] ?? ''),
            'method_key' => (string)($row['method_key'] ?? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($row['source'] ?? $saved['source'] ?? $method)),
            'method_label' => (string)($row['method_label'] ?? mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($row['source'] ?? $saved['source'] ?? $method)),
            'main_hits' => $mainHits,
            'extra_hits' => $extraHits,
            'total_hits' => $totalHits,
            'missing_count' => $missing,
            'top10_hits' => $top10,
            'top20_hits' => $top20,
            'avg_rank' => $avgRank,
            'all_main_found' => $allMain,
            'evidence_score' => round($score, 2),
            'evidence_group' => $group,
            'evidence_status' => $evidenceStatus,
            'settings_summary' => $settingsSummary,
            'settings' => $settings
        );
        $evidenceRows[] = $item;
        if ($group === 'Strong Evidence' && $evidenceStatus !== 'Exclude from Advice') {
            $allStrongSettings[] = $settings;
            $mk = (string)$item['method_key'];
            if ($mk !== '') {
                if (!isset($allStrongMethods[$mk])) { $allStrongMethods[$mk] = array('count'=>0, 'label'=>mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($mk)); }
                $allStrongMethods[$mk]['count']++;
            }
        }
    }
    usort($evidenceRows, function($a, $b) {
        $as = (float)($a['evidence_score'] ?? 0);
        $bs = (float)($b['evidence_score'] ?? 0);
        if ($bs == $as) { return strcmp((string)($b['draw_date'] ?? ''), (string)($a['draw_date'] ?? '')); }
        return ($bs > $as) ? 1 : -1;
    });
    $strong = array(); $useful = array(); $weak = array(); $excluded = array();
    foreach ($evidenceRows as $item) {
        $g = (string)($item['evidence_group'] ?? 'Weak but Informative');
        if ($g === 'Strong Evidence') { $strong[] = $item; }
        elseif ($g === 'Useful Evidence') { $useful[] = $item; }
        elseif ($g === 'Excluded') { $excluded[] = $item; }
        else { $weak[] = $item; }
    }
    $repeat = mleAdvisoryBuildSettingsRepeatReport($allStrongSettings, $allStrongMethods);
    $trueClusters = mleAdvisoryBuildTrueSettingsClusterFromStrongRuns($strong);
    $topCluster = !empty($trueClusters[0]) && is_array($trueClusters[0]) ? $trueClusters[0] : array();
    $lock = mleAdvisoryBuildCurrentLockedSettings($repeat, count($strong), $topCluster);
    return array(
        'strong_runs' => $strong,
        'useful_runs' => $useful,
        'weak_runs' => $weak,
        'excluded_runs' => $excluded,
        'strong_count' => count($strong),
        'useful_count' => count($useful),
        'weak_count' => count($weak),
        'excluded_count' => count($excluded),
        'settings_repeat' => $repeat,
        'current_locked_settings' => $lock,
        'true_clusters' => $trueClusters,
        'top_cluster' => $topCluster,
        'true_cluster_support' => (int)($topCluster['strong_run_count'] ?? 0),
        'true_cluster_draw_support' => (int)($topCluster['completed_draw_count'] ?? 0),
        'summary' => count($strong) > 0 ? ('LottoExpert found ' . count($strong) . ' strong evidence run' . (count($strong) === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' for this lottery. These runs stay in the evidence pool so repeated settings can be found.') : 'No strong evidence runs are ready yet for this lottery. Keep saving and scoring runs.'
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildSettingsRepeatReport(array $strongSettings, array $strongMethods) {
    $keys = array('skai_blend_ai_pct','blend_ai_pct','ai_pct','blend_percent','blend_pct','ai_blend_pct','mode','run_mode','skai_window_size','draws_analyzed','best_window','auto_tune','diversity_penalty','sampling_temperature','recency_decay','gap_scale','learning_rate','dropout_rate','hidden_layers','chain_len','burn_in');
    $total = count($strongSettings);
    $repeated = array();
    $notProven = array();
    foreach ($strongMethods as $methodKey => $info) {
        $cnt = (int)($info['count'] ?? 0);
        if ($cnt >= 2) {
            $repeated[] = array('key'=>'method','label'=>'Method','value'=>(string)($info['label'] ?? mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($methodKey)),'count'=>$cnt,'support'=>'Appears in ' . $cnt . ' strong evidence runs.');
        }
    }
    foreach ($keys as $key) {
        $vals = array();
        foreach ($strongSettings as $settings) {
            if (!is_array($settings) || !array_key_exists($key, $settings)) { continue; }
            $v = $settings[$key];
            if ($v === '' || $v === null) { continue; }
            if (is_bool($v)) { $norm = $v ? 'On' : 'Off'; }
            elseif (is_numeric($v)) { $norm = (string)round((float)$v, 3); }
            else { $norm = trim((string)$v); }
            if ($norm === '') { continue; }
            if (!isset($vals[$norm])) { $vals[$norm] = 0; }
            $vals[$norm]++;
        }
        if (empty($vals)) { continue; }
        arsort($vals);
        $topVal = (string)key($vals);
        $topCount = (int)current($vals);
        $label = mleAdvisoryFormatSettingLabel($key);
        if ($topCount >= 2) {
            $support = 'Appears in ' . $topCount . ' strong evidence runs.';
            $repeated[] = array('key'=>$key,'label'=>$label,'value'=>$topVal,'count'=>$topCount,'support'=>$support);
        } else {
            $notProven[] = array('key'=>$key,'label'=>$label,'value'=>$topVal,'count'=>$topCount,'support'=>'This setting appeared in one strong run, but it is not proven yet.');
        }
    }
    return array(
        'total_strong_runs' => $total,
        'repeated' => $repeated,
        'not_proven' => $notProven,
        'summary' => !empty($repeated) ? 'Repeated settings are the clues. If the same setting keeps showing up in stronger runs, LottoExpert can start trusting it more.' : 'Strong runs exist, but the repeated settings pattern is still forming.'
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildCurrentLockedSettings(array $repeat, $strongCount, array $topCluster = array()) {
    $repeated = (array)($repeat['repeated'] ?? array());
    $locked = array();
    foreach ($repeated as $item) {
        if (!is_array($item)) { continue; }
        $count = (int)($item['count'] ?? 0);
        if ($count >= 2) { $locked[] = $item; }
    }
    $clusterCount = (int)($topCluster['strong_run_count'] ?? 0);
    $clusterDraws = (int)($topCluster['completed_draw_count'] ?? 0);
    $status = 'Not Ready';
    $reason = 'Current Locked Settings are not ready yet. LottoExpert needs more saved scored runs for this lottery before locking a baseline.';
    if ($strongCount >= 2 && $clusterCount >= 2 && count($locked) >= 2) {
        $status = 'Candidate';
        $reason = 'These settings are candidates because they repeat across the strongest saved evidence for this lottery.';
    }
    if ($strongCount >= 3 && $clusterCount >= 2 && $clusterDraws >= 1 && count($locked) >= 3) {
        $status = 'Locked for Testing';
        $reason = 'These settings are the current baseline because they repeat across the strongest saved evidence for this lottery.';
    }
    if ($strongCount >= 5 && $clusterCount >= 3 && $clusterDraws >= 2 && count($locked) >= 4) {
        $status = 'Precision Focus Candidate';
        $reason = 'These settings have repeated cluster support across multiple strong evidence runs and can be used as the controlled baseline.';
    }
    if ($strongCount >= 8 && $clusterCount >= 4 && $clusterDraws >= 2 && count($locked) >= 5) {
        $status = 'Elite Baseline';
        $reason = 'These settings have strong repeated cluster evidence and support the current elite baseline for this lottery.';
    }
    return array('status'=>$status,'items'=>$locked,'reason'=>$reason,'last_updated'=>date('Y-m-d H:i:s'),'cluster'=>$topCluster,'cluster_support'=>$clusterCount,'cluster_draw_support'=>$clusterDraws,'has_active_lock'=>false);
}

function mleAdvisoryCurrentLockReady(array $lock) {
    return in_array((string)($lock['status'] ?? ''), array('Locked for Testing','Precision Focus Candidate','Elite Baseline'), true);
}


function mleAdvisoryBestVisualCompletedRow(array $visual) {
    $recent = isset($visual['recent']) && is_array($visual['recent']) ? $visual['recent'] : array();
    if (!empty($recent) && is_array($recent[0])) { return $recent[0]; }
    $older = isset($visual['older']) && is_array($visual['older']) ? $visual['older'] : array();
    if (!empty($older) && is_array($older[0])) { return $older[0]; }
    return array();
}

function mleAdvisoryFormatDateLabel($dateValue) {
    $dateValue = trim((string)$dateValue);
    if ($dateValue === '') { return ''; }
    $ts = strtotime($dateValue);
    if ($ts === false) { return $dateValue; }
    return date('M j, Y', $ts);
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildWhySupportText($methodLabel, array $topMethod, array $visual, array $precisionLock, array $proof) {
    $methodLabel = trim((string)$methodLabel);
    if ($methodLabel === '') { $methodLabel = 'This method'; }
    $runCount = (int)($topMethod['run_count'] ?? 0);
    $drawCount = (int)($topMethod['draw_count'] ?? 0);
    $proofKey = (string)($proof['level'] ?? 'too_early');
    $bestRow = mleAdvisoryBestVisualCompletedRow($visual);
    if ($drawCount <= 0 && empty($bestRow)) {
        return 'This is still early. LottoExpert needs more saved scored runs for this lottery before it can narrow confidently.';
    }

    $parts = array();
    if ($drawCount > 0) {
        $parts[] = $drawCount . ' completed scored run' . ($drawCount === 1 ? '' : 's');
    }
    if ($runCount > 0) {
        $parts[] = $runCount . ' active saved run' . ($runCount === 1 ? '' : 's');
    }

    if (!empty($bestRow)) {
        $bestTotal = (int)($bestRow['total_hits'] ?? 0);
        $bestMain = (int)($bestRow['main_hits'] ?? 0);
        $bestExtra = (int)($bestRow['extra_hits'] ?? 0);
        $bestDate = mleAdvisoryFormatDateLabel($bestRow['draw_date'] ?? '');
        if ($bestTotal > 0 && $bestDate !== '') {
            $bestText = 'best result of ' . $bestTotal . ' total hit' . ($bestTotal === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' on ' . $bestDate;
            if ($bestMain > 0 || $bestExtra > 0) {
                $bestText .= ' (' . $bestMain . ' main';
                if ($bestExtra > 0) { $bestText .= ', ' . $bestExtra . ' extra'; }
                $bestText .= ')';
            }
            $parts[] = $bestText;
        }
    }

    if (!empty($precisionLock['has_range'])) {
        $rangeMin = (int)round((float)($precisionLock['range_min'] ?? 0));
        $rangeMax = (int)round((float)($precisionLock['range_max'] ?? 100));
        $parts[] = 'stronger results between ' . $rangeMin . ' and ' . $rangeMax;
        if (isset($precisionLock['control_label']) && trim((string)$precisionLock['control_label']) !== '') {
            $parts[] = 'measured on the ' . trim((string)$precisionLock['control_label']);
        }
    }

    $text = $methodLabel . ' is leading for this lottery because it has the strongest saved scored evidence here';
    if (!empty($parts)) {
        $text .= ': ' . implode(', ', $parts) . '.';
    } else {
        $text .= '.';
    }

    if (in_array($proofKey, array('learning_stage', 'no_clear_edge', 'early_signal', 'strategy_candidate', 'close_race'), true)) {
        $text .= ' This is still early. LottoExpert needs more saved scored runs for this lottery before it can narrow confidently.';
    }
    return $text;
}

function mleAdvisoryNumbersFromJson($raw) {
    $out = array();
    $decoded = is_string($raw) && $raw !== '' ? json_decode($raw, true) : null;
    if (is_array($decoded)) {
        $flat = array();
        $it = function($v) use (&$it, &$flat) { if (is_array($v)) { foreach ($v as $x) { $it($x); } } else { $flat[] = $v; } };
        $it($decoded);
        foreach ($flat as $n) { $n=(int)$n; if ($n > 0 && !in_array($n,$out,true)) { $out[]=$n; } }
    }
    return $out;
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildVisualRunRows(array $activeRows, array $perfRows) {
    $savedById = array();
    foreach ($activeRows as $r) { $savedById[(int)($r['id'] ?? 0)] = $r; }

    $rowsByKey = array();
    $usedSavedIds = array();

    $scoreRow = function(array $r) {
        $total = (int)($r['total_hits'] ?? 0);
        $main = (int)($r['main_hits'] ?? 0);
        $quality = is_numeric($r['quality_score'] ?? null) ? (float)$r['quality_score'] : 0.0;
        $rank = is_numeric($r['avg_rank'] ?? null) ? (float)$r['avg_rank'] : 9999.0;
        $date = strtotime((string)($r['draw_date'] ?? ''));
        if ($date === false) { $date = 0; }
        return ($total * 1000000.0) + ($main * 100000.0) + ($quality * 1000.0) - $rank + ($date / 10000000000.0);
    };

    $addRow = function(array $row) use (&$rowsByKey, $scoreRow) {
        $predKey = implode(',', array_map('intval', (array)($row['predicted'] ?? array())));
        $actualKey = implode(',', array_map('intval', (array)($row['actual'] ?? array())));
        $drawDate = (string)($row['draw_date'] ?? '');
        $method = (string)($row['method'] ?? '');
        $savedId = (int)($row['saved_id'] ?? 0);
        if (!empty($row['completed'])) {
            $key = 'c|' . $savedId . '|' . $drawDate . '|' . $method . '|' . md5($predKey);
        } else {
            $key = 'u|' . $savedId . '|' . $drawDate . '|' . $method . '|' . md5($predKey);
        }
        if (!isset($rowsByKey[$key]) || $scoreRow($row) > $scoreRow($rowsByKey[$key])) {
            $rowsByKey[$key] = $row;
        }
    };

    foreach ($perfRows as $p) {
        $sid = (int)($p['__saved_id'] ?? $p['run_id'] ?? 0);
        $s = isset($savedById[$sid]) ? $savedById[$sid] : array();
        if (empty($s)) { continue; }
        $__dailyViewForVisual = mylottoexpertExtractDailySavedView($s);
        $__isDailyForVisual = !empty($__dailyViewForVisual['is_daily']);
        $__dailyComboStringsForVisual = array_values((array)($__dailyViewForVisual['combo_strings'] ?? array()));
        $__dailyPickSizeForVisual = (int)($__dailyViewForVisual['pick_size'] ?? 0);
        $pred = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($s['main_numbers'] ?? '', true);
        $predExtra = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($s['extra_ball_numbers'] ?? '', true);
        if ($__isDailyForVisual) {
            if (!empty($__dailyViewForVisual['primary_combo_digits'])) {
                $pred = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__dailyViewForVisual['primary_combo_digits']));
            } elseif (!empty($__dailyComboStringsForVisual)) {
                $pred = mleAdvisoryDigitArrayFromComboString((string)$__dailyComboStringsForVisual[0]);
            }
            if (!empty($__dailyViewForVisual['bonus_digits'])) {
                $predExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__dailyViewForVisual['bonus_digits']));
            } elseif (!empty($__dailyViewForVisual['extra_digits'])) {
                $predExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__dailyViewForVisual['extra_digits']));
            } elseif (!empty($__dailyViewForVisual['top_extras'])) {
                $predExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__dailyViewForVisual['top_extras']));
            }
        }
        if (empty($pred)) { $pred = mleAdvisoryNumbersFromJson($p['predicted_ranking_json'] ?? ''); }
        $__actualParts = mleAdvisoryResolveActualDrawPartsForVisual($p, $s, $pred, $predExtra);
        $actual = (array)$__actualParts['main'];
        $actualExtra = (array)$__actualParts['extra'];
        if (empty($pred)) { continue; }
        $matches = array_values(array_intersect($pred, $actual));
        $extraMatches = array_values(array_intersect($predExtra, $actualExtra));
        $drawDate = (string)($p['draw_date'] ?? $s['target_draw_date'] ?? $s['next_draw_date'] ?? '');
        if ($drawDate === '0000-00-00') { $drawDate = ''; }
        $method = (string)($p['__method_key'] ?? $s['__method_key'] ?? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($s['source'] ?? $p['source'] ?? ''));
        $settings = mylottoexpertResolveRunDisplayInfo($s, array('skai_prediction'=>'SKAI','ai_prediction'=>'AI','mcmc_prediction'=>'MCMC','skip_hit'=>'Skip Hit','strategy_set'=>'Saved Run'));
        $label = (string)($settings['label'] ?? ($s['label'] ?? 'Saved run'));
        $quality = is_numeric($p['weighted_quality_score'] ?? null) ? (float)$p['weighted_quality_score'] : 0.0;
        $addRow(array(
            'saved_id'=>$sid,
            'perf_id'=>(int)($p['id'] ?? 0),
            'draw_date'=>$drawDate,
            'method'=>$method,
            'method_label'=>mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($method),
            'label'=>$label,
            'predicted'=>$pred,
            'predicted_extra'=>$predExtra,
            'actual'=>$actual,
            'actual_extra'=>$actualExtra,
            'is_daily'=>$__isDailyForVisual,
            'pred_combo_strings'=>$__dailyComboStringsForVisual,
            'daily_pick_size'=>$__dailyPickSizeForVisual,
            'daily_ranked_digits'=>(array)($__dailyViewForVisual['ranked_digits'] ?? array()),
            'daily_bonus_digits'=>(array)($__dailyViewForVisual['bonus_digits'] ?? $__dailyViewForVisual['extra_digits'] ?? $__dailyViewForVisual['top_extras'] ?? array()),
            'matches'=>$matches,
            'extra_matches'=>$extraMatches,
            'main_hits'=>count($matches),
            'extra_hits'=>count($extraMatches),
            'total_hits'=>count($matches) + count($extraMatches),
            'avg_rank'=>$p['avg_winning_rank'] ?? null,
            'quality_score'=>$quality,
            'top10_hits'=>(int)($p['top10_hits'] ?? 0),
            'top20_hits'=>(int)($p['top20_hits'] ?? 0),
            'status'=>(string)($p['advice_status'] ?? $s['advice_status'] ?? 'use_in_advice'),
            'completed'=>!empty($actual) || !empty($actualExtra)
        ));
        if ($sid > 0) { $usedSavedIds[$sid] = 1; }
    }

    foreach ($activeRows as $s) {
        $sid = (int)($s['id'] ?? 0);
        if ($sid <= 0 || isset($usedSavedIds[$sid])) { continue; }
        $__dailyViewForVisual = mylottoexpertExtractDailySavedView($s);
        $__isDailyForVisual = !empty($__dailyViewForVisual['is_daily']);
        $__dailyComboStringsForVisual = array_values((array)($__dailyViewForVisual['combo_strings'] ?? array()));
        $__dailyPickSizeForVisual = (int)($__dailyViewForVisual['pick_size'] ?? 0);
        $pred = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($s['main_numbers'] ?? '', true);
        $predExtra = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($s['extra_ball_numbers'] ?? '', true);
        if ($__isDailyForVisual) {
            if (!empty($__dailyViewForVisual['primary_combo_digits'])) {
                $pred = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__dailyViewForVisual['primary_combo_digits']));
            } elseif (!empty($__dailyComboStringsForVisual)) {
                $pred = mleAdvisoryDigitArrayFromComboString((string)$__dailyComboStringsForVisual[0]);
            }
            if (!empty($__dailyViewForVisual['bonus_digits'])) {
                $predExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__dailyViewForVisual['bonus_digits']));
            } elseif (!empty($__dailyViewForVisual['extra_digits'])) {
                $predExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__dailyViewForVisual['extra_digits']));
            } elseif (!empty($__dailyViewForVisual['top_extras'])) {
                $predExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__dailyViewForVisual['top_extras']));
            }
        }
        if (empty($pred) && empty($predExtra)) { continue; }
        $method = (string)($s['__method_key'] ?? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($s['source'] ?? ''));
        if ($method === 'strategy_set') { continue; }
        $settings = mylottoexpertResolveRunDisplayInfo($s, array('skai_prediction'=>'SKAI','ai_prediction'=>'AI','mcmc_prediction'=>'MCMC','skip_hit'=>'Skip Hit','strategy_set'=>'Saved Run'));
        $drawDate = (string)($s['target_draw_date'] ?? $s['next_draw_date'] ?? $s['date_saved'] ?? '');
        if ($drawDate === '0000-00-00') { $drawDate = ''; }
        // For past draws that have no performance record yet, attempt to resolve the
        // official actual draw numbers directly from the draw table so the visual
        // comparison shows what was drawn and which numbers worked/didn't work -
        // matching the same behavior as the Draw Results Comparison (prc-table).
        $actual = array();
        $actualExtra = array();
        $completed = false;
        if ($drawDate !== '') {
            $drawTs = strtotime($drawDate);
            if ($drawTs !== false && $drawTs < time()) {
                try {
                    $__actualParts = mleAdvisoryResolveActualDrawPartsForVisual(
                        array('draw_date' => $drawDate),
                        $s, $pred, $predExtra
                    );
                    $actual = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__actualParts['main']));
                    $actualExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__actualParts['extra']));
                    if (!empty($actual) || !empty($actualExtra)) {
                        $completed = true;
                    }
                } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
            }
        }
        $matches = $completed ? array_values(array_intersect($pred, $actual)) : array();
        $extraMatches = $completed ? array_values(array_intersect($predExtra, $actualExtra)) : array();
        $addRow(array(
            'saved_id'=>$sid,
            'perf_id'=>0,
            'draw_date'=>$drawDate,
            'method'=>$method,
            'method_label'=>mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($method),
            'label'=>(string)($settings['label'] ?? ($s['label'] ?? 'Saved run')),
            'predicted'=>$pred,
            'predicted_extra'=>$predExtra,
            'actual'=>$actual,
            'actual_extra'=>$actualExtra,
            'is_daily'=>$__isDailyForVisual,
            'pred_combo_strings'=>$__dailyComboStringsForVisual,
            'daily_pick_size'=>$__dailyPickSizeForVisual,
            'daily_ranked_digits'=>(array)($__dailyViewForVisual['ranked_digits'] ?? array()),
            'daily_bonus_digits'=>(array)($__dailyViewForVisual['bonus_digits'] ?? $__dailyViewForVisual['extra_digits'] ?? $__dailyViewForVisual['top_extras'] ?? array()),
            'matches'=>$matches,
            'extra_matches'=>$extraMatches,
            'main_hits'=>count($matches),
            'extra_hits'=>count($extraMatches),
            'total_hits'=>count($matches) + count($extraMatches),
            'avg_rank'=>null,
            'quality_score'=>0.0,
            'top10_hits'=>0,
            'top20_hits'=>0,
            'status'=>(string)($s['advice_status'] ?? 'use_in_advice'),
            'completed'=>$completed
        ));
    }

    $rows = array_values($rowsByKey);

    // v18: Keep the visual comparison consistent for every saved run on the same completed draw.
    // Some legacy performance rows store only the main actual numbers, while another row for the
