    // same lottery/date has the official extra balls resolved from the original draw-results logic.
    // Once an official result is known for a draw date, apply it to all rows for that draw date so
    // EuroMillions, Powerball, and similar games do not show bonus balls on only one prediction.
    $officialByDrawDate = array();
    foreach ($rows as $__r) {
        $dd = trim((string)($__r['draw_date'] ?? ''));
        if ($dd === '' || empty($__r['completed'])) { continue; }
        if (!empty($__r['actual']) || !empty($__r['actual_extra'])) {
            if (!isset($officialByDrawDate[$dd])) {
                $officialByDrawDate[$dd] = array('actual'=>array(), 'actual_extra'=>array());
            }
            if (!empty($__r['actual']) && count((array)$__r['actual']) >= count((array)$officialByDrawDate[$dd]['actual'])) {
                $officialByDrawDate[$dd]['actual'] = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__r['actual']));
            }
            if (!empty($__r['actual_extra']) && count((array)$__r['actual_extra']) >= count((array)$officialByDrawDate[$dd]['actual_extra'])) {
                $officialByDrawDate[$dd]['actual_extra'] = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__r['actual_extra']));
            }
        }
    }
    foreach ($rows as $__i => $__r) {
        $dd = trim((string)($__r['draw_date'] ?? ''));
        if ($dd === '' || empty($__r['completed']) || empty($officialByDrawDate[$dd])) { continue; }
        // Always apply the best-known official actual draw to every row for this draw date.
        // This ensures EuroMillions Lucky Stars and Powerball/Mega Ball are consistent
        // across all prediction rows regardless of what was stored in individual perf rows.
        if (!empty($officialByDrawDate[$dd]['actual'])) {
            $rows[$__i]['actual'] = $officialByDrawDate[$dd]['actual'];
        }
        if (!empty($officialByDrawDate[$dd]['actual_extra'])) {
            $rows[$__i]['actual_extra'] = $officialByDrawDate[$dd]['actual_extra'];
        }
        $rows[$__i]['matches'] = array_values(array_intersect((array)($rows[$__i]['predicted'] ?? array()), (array)($rows[$__i]['actual'] ?? array())));
        $rows[$__i]['extra_matches'] = array_values(array_intersect((array)($rows[$__i]['predicted_extra'] ?? array()), (array)($rows[$__i]['actual_extra'] ?? array())));
        $rows[$__i]['main_hits'] = count($rows[$__i]['matches']);
        $rows[$__i]['extra_hits'] = count($rows[$__i]['extra_matches']);
        $rows[$__i]['total_hits'] = (int)$rows[$__i]['main_hits'] + (int)$rows[$__i]['extra_hits'];
    }

    usort($rows, function($a,$b){
        if ((bool)$a['completed'] !== (bool)$b['completed']) { return $a['completed'] ? -1 : 1; }
        if ((int)$a['total_hits'] !== (int)$b['total_hits']) { return ((int)$b['total_hits'] - (int)$a['total_hits']); }
        if ((int)($a['top20_hits'] ?? 0) !== (int)($b['top20_hits'] ?? 0)) { return (int)($b['top20_hits'] ?? 0) - (int)($a['top20_hits'] ?? 0); }
        if ((int)($a['top10_hits'] ?? 0) !== (int)($b['top10_hits'] ?? 0)) { return (int)($b['top10_hits'] ?? 0) - (int)($a['top10_hits'] ?? 0); }
        $aq = (float)($a['quality_score'] ?? 0); $bq = (float)($b['quality_score'] ?? 0);
        if (abs($aq - $bq) > 0.000001) { return ($bq > $aq) ? 1 : -1; }
        return strcmp((string)$b['draw_date'], (string)$a['draw_date']);
    });

    $completed = array(); $upcoming = array();
    foreach ($rows as $r) {
        if ($r['completed']) { $completed[]=$r; } else { $upcoming[]=$r; }
    }
    if (!empty($completed)) { $completed[0]['is_best_overall'] = true; }
    return array('recent'=>array_slice($completed,0,6),'older'=>array_slice($completed,6),'upcoming'=>$upcoming);
}



// [[MLE_V21_PENDING_DRAW_RECOMMENDATIONS]]
// Score pending SKAI / Precision Focus runs for the next draw without pretending they are proven.
// A pending run has not been scored yet; this ranks the saved options by available evidence and completeness.
if (!function_exists('mleAdvisoryRunPredictionCount')) {
    function mleAdvisoryRunPredictionCount(array $row): int
    {
        $main = (array)($row['predicted'] ?? array());
        $extra = (array)($row['predicted_extra'] ?? array());
        $combos = (array)($row['pred_combo_strings'] ?? array());
        $dailyDigits = (array)($row['daily_ranked_digits'] ?? array());
        return count(array_unique(array_map('strval', array_merge($main, $extra, $combos, $dailyDigits))));
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleAdvisoryRunSpreadScore')) {
    function mleAdvisoryRunSpreadScore(array $numbers): float
    {
        $numbers = array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', $numbers)));
        $numbers = array_values(array_filter($numbers, static function($v){ return $v > 0; }));
        $count = count($numbers);
        if ($count <= 1) { return 0.45; }
        sort($numbers);
        $range = max($numbers) - min($numbers);
        $avgGap = $range / max(1, $count - 1);
        $clusterPenalty = 0.0;
        for ($i = 1; $i < $count; $i++) {
            if (($numbers[$i] - $numbers[$i - 1]) <= 1) { $clusterPenalty += 0.05; }
        }
        $rangeScore = min(1.0, max(0.0, $range / max(1, max($numbers))));
        $gapScore = min(1.0, max(0.0, $avgGap / 6.0));
        return max(0.0, min(1.0, (0.65 * $rangeScore) + (0.35 * $gapScore) - $clusterPenalty));
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleAdvisoryPendingRunEvidenceScore')) {
    function mleAdvisoryPendingRunEvidenceScore(array $run, array $context, array $selectedRuns = array()): array
    {
        $score = 28.0;
        $reasons = array();
        $warnings = array();

        $scoredRuns = max(0, (int)($context['scored_runs'] ?? 0));
        $drawCycles = max(0, (int)($context['draw_cycles'] ?? 0));
        $strongCount = max(0, (int)($context['strong_count'] ?? 0));
        $method = strtolower((string)($run['method'] ?? ''));
        $methodLabel = trim((string)($run['method_label'] ?? 'Saved run'));
        $label = strtolower((string)($run['label'] ?? ''));
        $topMethod = strtolower((string)($context['top_method'] ?? ''));
        $precisionStage = strtolower((string)($context['precision_stage'] ?? ''));
        $progressKey = strtolower((string)($context['progress_key'] ?? ''));
        $predCount = mleAdvisoryRunPredictionCount($run);
        $hasNumbers = $predCount > 0;

        $score += min(16.0, $scoredRuns * 0.28);
        if ($scoredRuns >= 45) { $reasons[] = 'meaningful scored-run history'; }
        elseif ($scoredRuns >= 18) { $reasons[] = 'some scored-run history'; }
        else { $warnings[] = 'thin scored-run history'; }

        $score += min(16.0, $drawCycles * 1.25);
        if ($drawCycles >= 6) { $reasons[] = 'multiple completed draw cycles'; }
        elseif ($drawCycles >= 3) { $reasons[] = 'early draw-cycle evidence'; }
        else { $warnings[] = 'few completed draw cycles'; }

        if ($hasNumbers) { $score += 8.0; $reasons[] = 'saved numbers are present'; }
        else { $score -= 25.0; $warnings[] = 'missing saved numbers'; }

        if ($topMethod !== '' && $method !== '' && $method === $topMethod) {
            $score += 10.0;
            $reasons[] = 'matches the current leading method';
        } elseif ($method === 'skai') {
            $score += 6.0;
            $reasons[] = 'SKAI run';
        }

        if (strpos($label, 'control') !== false || strpos($label, 'current strongest') !== false) {
            $score += 8.0;
            $reasons[] = 'control/current-strongest test point';
        }
        if (strpos($label, 'precision') !== false || strpos($label, 'narrow') !== false || strpos($label, 'focus') !== false || strpos($label, 'recommended') !== false) {
            $score += 9.0;
            $reasons[] = 'tied to the Precision Focus plan';
        }
        if (strpos($label, 'divers') !== false || strpos($label, 'alternate') !== false) {
            $score += 4.0;
            $reasons[] = 'useful alternate / diversity test';
        }

        if ($strongCount >= 3) { $score += 8.0; $reasons[] = 'supported by repeated strong evidence'; }
        elseif ($strongCount >= 1) { $score += 4.0; $reasons[] = 'some strong evidence exists'; }

        if (strpos($precisionStage, 'precision') !== false || strpos($progressKey, 'precision') !== false) {
            $score += 6.0;
            $reasons[] = 'higher precision-progress stage';
        } elseif (strpos($precisionStage, 'validated') !== false || strpos($progressKey, 'validated') !== false) {
            $score += 5.0;
            $reasons[] = 'validated-focus progress stage';
        } elseif (strpos($precisionStage, 'narrow') !== false || strpos($progressKey, 'narrow') !== false) {
            $score += 3.0;
            $reasons[] = 'narrowing signal is forming';
        }

        $spread = mleAdvisoryRunSpreadScore((array)($run['predicted'] ?? array()));
        $score += 7.0 * $spread;
        if ($spread >= 0.62) { $reasons[] = 'healthy number spread'; }
        elseif ($spread < 0.35 && $hasNumbers) { $warnings[] = 'number spread is concentrated'; }

        if (!empty($selectedRuns) && $hasNumbers) {
            $main = array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', (array)($run['predicted'] ?? array()))));
            $maxOverlapRatio = 0.0;
            foreach ($selectedRuns as $sel) {
                $selMain = array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', (array)($sel['predicted'] ?? array()))));
                if (empty($main) || empty($selMain)) { continue; }
                $overlap = count(array_intersect($main, $selMain));
                $ratio = $overlap / max(1, min(count($main), count($selMain)));
                if ($ratio > $maxOverlapRatio) { $maxOverlapRatio = $ratio; }
            }
            if ($maxOverlapRatio >= 0.75) {
                $score -= 7.0;
                $warnings[] = 'high overlap with another highlighted run';
            } elseif ($maxOverlapRatio <= 0.45) {
                $score += 4.0;
                $reasons[] = 'good alternate coverage';
            }
        }

        $score = (int)round(max(0, min(100, $score)));
        $reasonText = 'Best available balance of saved numbers, evidence history, method alignment, stability, and coverage quality.';
        if (!empty($reasons)) {
            $reasonText = ucfirst(implode('; ', array_slice(array_values(array_unique($reasons)), 0, 4))) . '.';
        }
        if (!empty($warnings)) {
            $reasonText .= ' Caution: ' . implode('; ', array_slice(array_values(array_unique($warnings)), 0, 2)) . '.';
        }
        return array('score' => $score, 'reason' => $reasonText, 'warnings' => $warnings, 'has_numbers' => $hasNumbers, 'method_label' => $methodLabel);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleAdvisoryBuildPendingDrawRecommendations')) {
    function mleAdvisoryBuildPendingDrawRecommendations(array $upcomingRows, array $completedRows, array $context): array
    {
        $out = array(
            'has_pending' => !empty($upcomingRows),
            'confidence' => 'not_ready',
            'confidence_label' => 'Not Ready',
            'title' => 'SKAI Pending Draw Recommendations',
            'summary' => 'No pending saved runs are available for a responsible recommendation yet.',
            'draw_date' => '',
            'top' => array(),
            'all' => array(),
            'note' => '',
        );
        if (empty($upcomingRows)) { return $out; }

        $groups = array();
        foreach ($upcomingRows as $r) {
            $dd = trim((string)($r['draw_date'] ?? ''));
            if ($dd === '' || $dd === '0000-00-00') { $dd = 'Upcoming'; }
            if (!isset($groups[$dd])) { $groups[$dd] = array(); }
            $groups[$dd][] = $r;
        }
        uksort($groups, static function($a, $b){
            if ($a === 'Upcoming') { return 1; }
            if ($b === 'Upcoming') { return -1; }
            return strcmp($a, $b);
        });
        $drawDate = (string)array_key_first($groups);
        $pendingForDraw = array_values((array)$groups[$drawDate]);
        $out['draw_date'] = $drawDate;

        $scoredRuns = max(0, (int)($context['scored_runs'] ?? count($completedRows)));
        $drawCycles = max(0, (int)($context['draw_cycles'] ?? 0));
        $completedCount = count($completedRows);
        $hasEnoughPending = count($pendingForDraw) >= 2;
        $hasBasicHistory = ($completedCount >= 3 || $scoredRuns >= 3);
        $hasStrongHistory = ($completedCount >= 5 && $scoredRuns >= 5 && $drawCycles >= 1);

        $scored = array();
        foreach ($pendingForDraw as $r) {
            $eval = mleAdvisoryPendingRunEvidenceScore($r, $context, array_column($scored, 'row'));
            $r['pending_evidence_score'] = (int)$eval['score'];
            $r['pending_evidence_reason'] = (string)$eval['reason'];
            $r['pending_has_numbers'] = !empty($eval['has_numbers']);
            $scored[] = array('row' => $r, 'score' => (int)$eval['score']);
        }
        usort($scored, static function($a, $b){
            if ((int)$a['score'] !== (int)$b['score']) { return (int)$b['score'] - (int)$a['score']; }
            return strcmp((string)($a['row']['label'] ?? ''), (string)($b['row']['label'] ?? ''));
        });
        $ranked = array();
        foreach ($scored as $item) { $ranked[] = $item['row']; }
        $out['all'] = $ranked;

        $top = array_slice($ranked, 0, 2);
        $topScore = isset($top[0]) ? (int)($top[0]['pending_evidence_score'] ?? 0) : 0;
        $secondScore = isset($top[1]) ? (int)($top[1]['pending_evidence_score'] ?? 0) : 0;
        $avgScore = 0.0;
        if (!empty($ranked)) {
            foreach ($ranked as $r) { $avgScore += (int)($r['pending_evidence_score'] ?? 0); }
            $avgScore = $avgScore / max(1, count($ranked));
        }
        $marginVsSecond = $topScore - $secondScore;
        $marginVsAvg = $topScore - $avgScore;
        $allTopHaveNumbers = !empty($top);
        foreach ($top as $r) { if (empty($r['pending_has_numbers'])) { $allTopHaveNumbers = false; } }

        if (!$hasEnoughPending || !$allTopHaveNumbers || !$hasBasicHistory) {
            $out['confidence'] = 'not_ready';
            $out['confidence_label'] = 'Not Ready';
            $out['top'] = array();
            $out['summary'] = 'SKAI has saved pending numbers for this draw, but there is not enough completed-run evidence to responsibly choose a top two yet.';
            $out['note'] = 'You may still review all pending runs. LottoExpert recommends waiting for more completed scored runs before treating any pending set as preferred.';
            return $out;
        }

        $out['top'] = $top;
        if ($hasStrongHistory && $topScore >= 78 && ($marginVsSecond >= 5 || $marginVsAvg >= 7)) {
            $out['confidence'] = 'strong';
            $out['confidence_label'] = 'Strong';
            $out['summary'] = 'Top 2 recommendations are available for this pending draw based on the strongest available evidence.';
            $out['note'] = 'These are still pending predictions, not guarantees. Review them first after the draw and score the full group.';
        } else {
            $out['confidence'] = 'limited';
            $out['confidence_label'] = 'Limited';
            $out['summary'] = 'SKAI can rank the saved pending runs, but the evidence base is still thin or the score margin is not yet strong.';
            $out['note'] = 'These are the best current options from the saved pending runs, but use caution until more completed draw cycles build up.';
        }
        return $out;
    }
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildBatchCleanupRecommendationFromVisual(array $visualRows) {
    $all = array_merge((array)$visualRows['recent'], (array)$visualRows['older']);
    if (empty($all)) { return array('has_recommendation'=>false); }
    usort($all, function($a,$b){ if ((int)$b['total_hits'] !== (int)$a['total_hits']) { return (int)$b['total_hits'] - (int)$a['total_hits']; } return strcmp((string)$b['draw_date'], (string)$a['draw_date']); });
    $total = count($all); $keepCount = min(2,$total); $reviewCount = min(3,max(0,$total-$keepCount));
    return array('has_recommendation'=>true,'total_runs'=>$total,'keep'=>array_slice($all,0,$keepCount),'review'=>array_slice($all,$keepCount,$reviewCount),'archive'=>array_slice($all,$keepCount+$reviewCount));
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildBatchCleanupRecommendation($db, $userId, $lotteryId) {
    $active = mleAdvisoryBuildActiveSavedEvidence($db, $userId);
    $rows = isset($active[(int)$lotteryId]['rows']) ? $active[(int)$lotteryId]['rows'] : array();
    $perf = mleAdvisoryLoadMatchedPerformance($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $rows);
    return mleAdvisoryBuildBatchCleanupRecommendationFromVisual(mleAdvisoryBuildVisualRunRows($rows, $perf));
}


function mleAdvisoryLoadSavedSettingsForLottery($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $limit = 30) {
    $userId = (int)$userId; $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId; $limit = max(1, min(100, (int)$limit));
    if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0) { return array(); }
    $cols = mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, '#__user_saved_settings');
    if (empty($cols)) { return array(); }
    $select = array(); foreach ($cols as $c) { $select[] = $db->quoteName($c); }
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($select)
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_settings'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId);
        if (in_array('status', $cols, true)) {
            $q->where('LOWER(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('status') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) NOT IN (' . $db->quote('deleted') . ',' . $db->quote('archived') . ',' . $db->quote('retired') . ')');
        }
        if (in_array('created_at', $cols, true)) {
            $q->order($db->quoteName('created_at') . ' DESC');
        } else {
            $q->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC');
        }
        $db->setQuery($q, 0, $limit);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        return is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array(); }
}

function mleAdvisoryLoadNumbersToPlayForLottery($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $limit = 30) {
    $userId = (int)$userId; $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId; $limit = max(1, min(100, (int)$limit));
    if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0) { return array(); }
    $cols = mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, '#__user_saved_numbers');
    if (empty($cols)) { return array(); }
    $select = array(); foreach ($cols as $c) { $select[] = 'sn.' . $db->quoteName($c); }
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($select)
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 'sn'))
            ->where('sn.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
            ->where('sn.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)
            ->where('sn.' . $db->quoteName('source') . ' = ' . $db->quote('strategy_set'));
        if (in_array('save_intent', $cols, true)) {
            $q->where("(sn.save_intent IN ('play_set','custom_play','wheel_candidate') OR COALESCE(sn.save_intent,'') = '')");
        }
        if (in_array('play_status', $cols, true)) {
            $q->where("LOWER(COALESCE(sn.play_status,'')) NOT IN ('deleted','archived','retired')");
        }
        $q->order('COALESCE(sn.date_saved, sn.generated_at, sn.id) DESC');
        $db->setQuery($q, 0, $limit);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        return is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array(); }
}

function mleAdvisoryInferPickSizeFromRows(array $rows) {
    foreach ($rows as $row) {
        foreach (array('target_pick_size','daily_pick_size','pick_size') as $k) {
            if (isset($row[$k]) && (int)$row[$k] > 0) { return (int)$row[$k]; }
        }
        $nums = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($row['main_numbers'] ?? '', true);
        if (!empty($nums)) { return count($nums); }
    }
    return 0;
}

function mleAdvisoryLoadFavoriteWheelsForLottery($db, $userId, $lotteryId, array $activeRows, $limit = 12) {
    $userId = (int)$userId; $limit = max(1, min(50, (int)$limit));
    if ($userId <= 0) { return array(); }
    $pickSize = mleAdvisoryInferPickSizeFromRows($activeRows);
    $data = mylottoexpertLoadHydratedWheelFavorites($db, $userId);
    $items = isset($data['available']) && is_array($data['available']) ? $data['available'] : array();
    if (empty($items)) {
        $catalog = mylottoexpertLoadEffectiveCatalog($db);
        $items = is_array($catalog) ? array_values($catalog) : array();
    }
    $out = array();
    foreach ($items as $item) {
        $itemPick = (int)($item['pick_size'] ?? 0);
        if ($pickSize > 0 && $itemPick > 0 && $itemPick !== $pickSize) { continue; }
        $out[] = $item;
        if (count($out) >= $limit) { break; }
    }
    return $out;
}

function mleAdvisoryFormatSavedSettingName(array $row) {
    foreach (array('setting_name','name','label','template_name') as $k) {
        if (isset($row[$k]) && trim((string)$row[$k]) !== '') { return trim((string)$row[$k]); }
    }
    return 'Saved settings #' . (int)($row['id'] ?? 0);
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildLotteryCard($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $lotteryName = '') {
    $userId=(int)$userId; $lotteryId=(int)$lotteryId;
    $empty=array('lottery_id'=>$lotteryId,'lottery_name'=>$lotteryName,'has_data'=>false,'top_method'=>null,'leaderboard'=>array(),'settings_advice'=>array('has_advice'=>false),'proof_level'=>mleAdvisoryGetProofLevelLabel(0,0),'stats'=>array(),'visual_runs'=>array('recent'=>array(),'older'=>array(),'upcoming'=>array()),'batch_cleanup'=>null,'prediction_summary'=>array(),'saved_settings'=>array(),'numbers_to_play'=>array(),'wheel_systems'=>array(),'precision_lock'=>array(),'recommendation_level'=>array(),'precision_progress'=>array(),'recommended_skai_batch_test'=>array());
    if ($userId<=0 || $lotteryId<=0) { return $empty; }
    $activeAll=mleAdvisoryBuildActiveSavedEvidence($db,$userId);
    $activeRows=isset($activeAll[$lotteryId]['rows'])?$activeAll[$lotteryId]['rows']:array();
    if (empty($activeRows)) { return $empty; }
    $resolvedLotteryName = trim((string)$lotteryName);
    if ($resolvedLotteryName === '' || preg_match('/^Lottery\s*(#|ID)?\s*\d+$/i', $resolvedLotteryName)) {
        $resolvedLotteryName = trim((string)($activeAll[$lotteryId]['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
    }
    if ($resolvedLotteryName === '' || preg_match('/^Lottery\s*(#|ID)?\s*\d+$/i', $resolvedLotteryName)) {
        $nameMap = mleAdvisoryResolveLotteryNames($db, array($lotteryId));
        if (!empty($nameMap[$lotteryId])) { $resolvedLotteryName = (string)$nameMap[$lotteryId]; }
    }
    if ($resolvedLotteryName === '') { $resolvedLotteryName = 'Lottery ID ' . $lotteryId; }

    $perf=mleAdvisoryLoadMatchedPerformance($db,$userId,$lotteryId,$activeRows);
    $savedById=array(); foreach($activeRows as $r){$savedById[(int)($r['id']??0)]=$r;}
    $leaderboard=mleAdvisoryComputeMethodLeaderboardFromRows($perf);
    $methods=$leaderboard['methods']??array();

    if (empty($methods)) {
        $methodCounts = array();
        foreach ($activeRows as $row) {
            $mk = (string)($row['__method_key'] ?? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($row['source'] ?? ''));
            if ($mk === '' || $mk === 'strategy_set') { continue; }
            if (!isset($methodCounts[$mk])) { $methodCounts[$mk] = 0; }
            $methodCounts[$mk]++;
        }
        arsort($methodCounts);
        $fallbackMethod = !empty($methodCounts) ? (string)key($methodCounts) : 'skai';
        $methods = array(array('method'=>$fallbackMethod,'method_label'=>mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($fallbackMethod),'score'=>0,'total_hits'=>0,'avg_hits'=>0,'avg_top20'=>0,'avg_rank'=>'','run_count'=>0,'draw_count'=>0,'rank'=>1));
        $leaderboard = array('methods'=>$methods,'proof_level'=>mleAdvisoryGetProofLevelLabel(0,0),'stats'=>array('total_runs'=>count($activeRows),'total_draws'=>0,'method_count'=>count($methodCounts)));
    }

    $topMethod=$methods[0];
    $topLabel=mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($topMethod['method']);
    $settingsAdv=mleAdvisoryComputeSettingsAdvisorFromRows($perf,$savedById,$topMethod['method']);
    $proof=$leaderboard['proof_level'];
    $proofKey=$proof['level']??'too_early';
    if (in_array($proofKey, array('validated_focus_range','precision_focus_range','narrowing_signal'), true)) { $decision='Stay with '.$topLabel.' for now.'; }
    elseif (in_array($proofKey, array('strategy_candidate','early_signal','close_race'), true)) { $decision='Keep testing '.$topLabel.' while the evidence builds.'; }
    else { $decision='Keep building evidence before making a firm call.'; }
    $visual=mleAdvisoryBuildVisualRunRows($activeRows,$perf);
    $cleanup=mleAdvisoryBuildBatchCleanupRecommendationFromVisual($visual);
    $bestRecipe=!empty($settingsAdv['best_recipe_desc'])?(string)$settingsAdv['best_recipe_desc']:'';
    if ($bestRecipe === '' && !empty($activeRows[0])) { $bestRecipe = mleAdvisoryBuildBestRecipeDesc(mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($activeRows[0]), $activeRows[0]['source'] ?? ''); }
    $baseRunId=0; $bestScore=-PHP_FLOAT_MAX; foreach($perf as $p){$q=(float)($p['weighted_quality_score']??0)+((int)($p['top10_hits']??0))*2.0; if($q>$bestScore){$bestScore=$q;$baseRunId=(int)($p['__saved_id']??$p['run_id']??0);}}
    if ($baseRunId <= 0 && !empty($activeRows[0]['id'])) { $baseRunId = (int)$activeRows[0]['id']; }
    $methodOpinions=array(); $topScore=!empty($methods)?(float)($methods[0]['score']??0):0; foreach($methods as $i=>$m){$score=(float)($m['score']??0); $op=($i===0)?'Best direction right now':(($i===1 && $topScore>0 && ($score/$topScore)>=0.88)?'Close backup':'Not leading right now'); $methodOpinions[]=array('method_label'=>$m['method_label'],'opinion'=>$op,'method_key'=>$m['method']);}
    $precisionLock = mleAdvisoryComputePrecisionLockData($perf, $savedById, $topMethod['method']);
    $evidenceIntel = mleAdvisoryBuildEvidenceIntelligence($visual, $savedById, $topMethod['method']);
    $repeatReport = (array)($evidenceIntel['settings_repeat'] ?? array());
    $currentLockedSettings = (array)($evidenceIntel['current_locked_settings'] ?? array());
    $persistedCurrentLock = mleAdvisoryLoadCurrentLockedSettings($db, $userId, $lotteryId);
    if (!empty($persistedCurrentLock['has_active_lock'])) {
        $currentLockedSettings['has_active_lock'] = true;
        $currentLockedSettings['persisted_lock_id'] = (int)($persistedCurrentLock['id'] ?? 0);
        $currentLockedSettings['status'] = (string)($persistedCurrentLock['locked_status'] ?? $currentLockedSettings['status'] ?? '');
        $currentLockedSettings['reason'] = (string)($persistedCurrentLock['locked_reason'] ?? $currentLockedSettings['reason'] ?? '');
        $currentLockedSettings['last_updated'] = (string)($persistedCurrentLock['updated_at'] ?? $currentLockedSettings['last_updated'] ?? '');
        $currentLockedSettings['settings_json'] = (string)($persistedCurrentLock['settings_json'] ?? '');
        $currentLockedSettings['settings_array'] = is_array($persistedCurrentLock['settings_array'] ?? null) ? $persistedCurrentLock['settings_array'] : array();
    }
    if (!empty($repeatReport['repeated'])) {
        $lockedLabels = array();
        foreach ((array)$repeatReport['repeated'] as $repItem) {
            if (!is_array($repItem)) { continue; }
            $lockedLabels[] = (string)($repItem['label'] ?? '') . ': ' . (string)($repItem['value'] ?? '');
            if (count($lockedLabels) >= 6) { break; }
        }
        if (!empty($lockedLabels)) { $settingsAdv['keep_same_list'] = 'Keep stable: ' . implode(', ', $lockedLabels) . '. Only test the recommended setting next.'; }
    }
    $why = mleAdvisoryBuildWhySupportText($topLabel, $topMethod, $visual, $precisionLock, $proof);
    $summary=array('total_runs'=>count($activeRows),'scored_draws'=>count(array_unique(array_filter(array_map(function($r){return (string)($r['draw_date']??'');},$perf)))),'best_analysis'=>$topLabel,'best_recipe'=>$bestRecipe,'keep_count'=>count($cleanup['keep']??array()),'watch_count'=>count($cleanup['review']??array()),'retire_count'=>count($cleanup['archive']??array()),'short_reason'=>$why,'individual_runs'=>$activeRows);
    $summary['strong_evidence_count'] = (int)($evidenceIntel['strong_count'] ?? 0);
    $summary['true_cluster_support'] = (int)($evidenceIntel['true_cluster_support'] ?? 0);
    $summary['true_cluster_draw_support'] = (int)($evidenceIntel['true_cluster_draw_support'] ?? 0);
    $summary['pending_runs'] = count((array)($visual['upcoming'] ?? array()));
    $summary['evidence_model_summary'] = (string)($evidenceIntel['summary'] ?? '');
    $precisionLock['true_cluster_support'] = $summary['true_cluster_support'];
    $precisionLock['true_cluster_draw_support'] = $summary['true_cluster_draw_support'];
    $recommendedBatchTest = mleAdvisoryBuildRecommendedSkaiBatchTest($precisionLock, $settingsAdv, $summary, $currentLockedSettings);
    $recommendationLevel = mleAdvisoryComputeRecommendationLevel($precisionLock, $summary, $topMethod, $settingsAdv, $recommendedBatchTest);
    $precisionProgress = mleAdvisoryComputePrecisionProgress($precisionLock, $summary, $recommendationLevel, $settingsAdv, $recommendedBatchTest);
    $bestVisualRow = mleAdvisoryBestVisualCompletedRow($visual);
    $bestResultText = 'No completed scored result yet.';
    if (!empty($bestVisualRow)) {
        $bestTotalHits = (int)($bestVisualRow['total_hits'] ?? 0);
        $bestDateText = mleAdvisoryFormatDateLabel($bestVisualRow['draw_date'] ?? '');
        if ($bestTotalHits > 0) {
            $bestResultText = 'Best result so far: ' . $bestTotalHits . ' total hit' . ($bestTotalHits === 1 ? '' : 's');
            if ($bestDateText !== '') { $bestResultText .= ' on ' . $bestDateText; }
            $bestMainHits = (int)($bestVisualRow['main_hits'] ?? 0);
            $bestExtraHits = (int)($bestVisualRow['extra_hits'] ?? 0);
            if ($bestMainHits > 0 || $bestExtraHits > 0) {
                $bestResultText .= ' (' . $bestMainHits . ' main';
                if ($bestExtraHits > 0) { $bestResultText .= ', ' . $bestExtraHits . ' extra'; }
                $bestResultText .= ')';
            }
            $bestResultText .= '.';
        }
    }
    $strongestRangeText = !empty($precisionLock['has_range'])
        ? ((int)round((float)($precisionLock['range_min'] ?? 0)) . ' to ' . (int)round((float)($precisionLock['range_max'] ?? 100)))
        : 'Still forming';
    $missingEvidenceParts = array();
    if ((int)($summary['scored_draws'] ?? 0) < 3) { $missingEvidenceParts[] = 'more completed draw dates'; }
    if ((int)($precisionLock['run_count'] ?? 0) < 20) { $missingEvidenceParts[] = 'more saved scored runs'; }
    if ((int)($topMethod['run_count'] ?? 0) < 8) { $missingEvidenceParts[] = 'more repeated support for the leading method'; }
    if (!in_array((string)($precisionLock['stage'] ?? ''), array('narrowing_signal', 'validated_focus_range', 'precision_focus_range'), true)) { $missingEvidenceParts[] = 'a tighter Precision Focus range'; }
    if (empty($settingsAdv['has_advice'])) { $missingEvidenceParts[] = 'a clearer repeated setting difference'; }
    if ((int)($summary['true_cluster_support'] ?? 0) < 3) { $missingEvidenceParts[] = 'true repeated cluster support'; }
    $recommendationLevel['evidence_strength'] = (string)($proof['label'] ?? 'Too Early');
    $recommendationLevel['leading_method'] = $topLabel;
    $recommendationLevel['precision_stage'] = (string)($precisionLock['stage_label'] ?? 'Broad testing');
    $recommendationLevel['next_best_action'] = !empty($recommendedBatchTest['has_recommendation']) ? 'Create Recommended SKAI Batch Test' : (!empty($settingsAdv['has_advice']) ? 'Create Recommended Next Settings Run' : 'Keep scoring saved runs');
    $recommendationLevel['strongest_range'] = $strongestRangeText;
    $recommendationLevel['consistent_settings'] = ($bestRecipe !== '' ? $bestRecipe : 'Still building a clear settings profile');
    $recommendationLevel['best_result'] = $bestResultText;
    $recommendationLevel['missing_evidence'] = !empty($missingEvidenceParts) ? ('More evidence is still needed before High Evidence Candidate: ' . implode(', ', $missingEvidenceParts) . '.') : 'Current evidence supports the present recommendation level.';
    $recommendationLevel['what_this_means'] = 'This lottery is currently at ' . $recommendationLevel['label'] . '. ' . $topLabel . ' has the strongest saved scored support so far, and the best-supported range is ' . $strongestRangeText . '.';
    $precisionProgress['beginner_explanation'] = 'Precision Progress shows how much useful evidence this lottery has built. As you save and score more runs, LottoExpert can move this lottery closer to a stronger recommendation.';
    $precisionProgress['milestone_message'] = '';
    if (!empty($recommendedBatchTest['has_recommendation'])) {
        $recommendedBatchTest['lottery_name'] = $resolvedLotteryName;
        $recommendedBatchTest['recommendation_level'] = (string)($recommendationLevel['label'] ?? '');
        $recommendedBatchTest['precision_progress_level'] = (string)($precisionProgress['level_name'] ?? '');
        $recommendedBatchTest['evidence_strength'] = (string)($proof['label'] ?? 'Too Early');
        $recommendedBatchTest['milestone_supported'] = (string)($precisionProgress['next_milestone'] ?? '');
    }
    $settingsRows = mleAdvisoryLoadSavedSettingsForLottery($db, $userId, $lotteryId, 30);
    $playRows = mleAdvisoryLoadNumbersToPlayForLottery($db, $userId, $lotteryId, 30);
    $wheelRows = mleAdvisoryLoadFavoriteWheelsForLottery($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $activeRows, 12);
    return array('lottery_id'=>$lotteryId,'lottery_name'=>$resolvedLotteryName,'has_data'=>true,'top_method'=>$topMethod,'leaderboard'=>$methods,'method_opinions'=>$methodOpinions,'settings_advice'=>$settingsAdv,'proof_level'=>$proof,'next_step'=>!empty($settingsAdv['has_advice'])?'Create the recommended next settings run and test only one change.':'Keep saving and scoring runs before changing settings.','what_to_do'=>'Use the visual run comparison to keep strong runs, remove noisy runs from advice, and create the next settings test.','decision'=>$decision,'why_support'=>$why,'base_run_id'=>$baseRunId,'stats'=>array('total_runs'=>$leaderboard['stats']['total_runs']??count($activeRows),'completed_draws'=>$leaderboard['stats']['total_draws']??0,'active_methods'=>$leaderboard['stats']['method_count']??0),'batch_cleanup'=>($cleanup['has_recommendation']??false)?$cleanup:null,'prediction_summary'=>$summary,'visual_runs'=>$visual,'active_rows'=>$activeRows,'saved_settings'=>$settingsRows,'numbers_to_play'=>$playRows,'wheel_systems'=>$wheelRows,'precision_lock'=>$precisionLock,'recommendation_level'=>$recommendationLevel,'precision_progress'=>$precisionProgress,'recommended_skai_batch_test'=>$recommendedBatchTest,'evidence_intelligence'=>$evidenceIntel,'settings_that_repeat'=>$repeatReport,'current_locked_settings'=>$currentLockedSettings);
}

function mleAdvisoryLoadAllLotteryCards($db, $userId) {
    $userId=(int)$userId; if($userId<=0){return array('has_any_data'=>false,'cards'=>array(),'total_lotteries'=>0);}
    $active=mleAdvisoryBuildActiveSavedEvidence($db,$userId); if(empty($active)){return array('has_any_data'=>false,'cards'=>array(),'total_lotteries'=>0);}
    $cards=array(); foreach($active as $lid=>$data){$card=mleAdvisoryBuildLotteryCard($db,$userId,(int)$lid,(string)($data['lottery_name']??'')); if(!empty($card['has_data'])){$cards[]=$card;}}
    return array('has_any_data'=>!empty($cards),'cards'=>$cards,'total_lotteries'=>count($cards));
}

// ------------------------------------------------------------------
// Ensure SKAI batch header and run tables exist.
// Safe to call on every page load (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS).
// ------------------------------------------------------------------
function mylottoexpertEnsureCurrentLockedSettingsTable($db) {
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $table = $prefix . 'mle_current_locked_settings';
    $sql = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$table}` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lottery_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lottery_name` varchar(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `source` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `method` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `base_run_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `base_settings_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `settings_json` mediumtext,
  `locked_status` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Not Ready',
  `recommendation_level` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `precision_progress_level` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `precision_lock_stage` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `range_basis` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `range_min` decimal(10,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `range_max` decimal(10,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  `evidence_summary` text,
  `locked_reason` text,
  `repeated_cluster_key` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `repeated_cluster_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `completed_draw_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `strong_evidence_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_user_lottery_active` (`user_id`,`lottery_id`,`is_active`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci";
    try { $db->setQuery($sql); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
}

function mleAdvisoryLoadCurrentLockedSettings($db, $userId, $lotteryId) {
    $userId = (int)$userId; $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0) { return array(); }
    mylottoexpertEnsureCurrentLockedSettingsTable($db);
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select('*')->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_current_locked_settings'))->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)->where($db->quoteName('is_active') . ' = 1')->order($db->quoteName('updated_at') . ' DESC');
        $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1);
        $row = $db->loadAssoc();
        if (!is_array($row) || empty($row)) { return array(); }
        $settings = array();
        if (isset($row['settings_json']) && trim((string)$row['settings_json']) !== '') { $tmp = json_decode((string)$row['settings_json'], true); if (is_array($tmp)) { $settings = $tmp; } }
        $row['settings_array'] = $settings;
        $row['has_active_lock'] = true;
        $row['status'] = (string)($row['locked_status'] ?? '');
        $row['reason'] = (string)($row['locked_reason'] ?? '');
        $row['last_updated'] = (string)($row['updated_at'] ?? '');
        return $row;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array(); }
}

function mleAdvisoryPersistCurrentLockedSettings($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $lotteryName, array $computedLock, array $baseSettings, $baseRunId, array $precisionLock, array $recommendationLevel, array $precisionProgress, array $evidenceIntel, $source, $method) {
    $userId = (int)$userId; $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId; $baseRunId = (int)$baseRunId;
    if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0 || empty($baseSettings) || !mleAdvisoryCurrentLockReady($computedLock)) { return 0; }
    mylottoexpertEnsureCurrentLockedSettingsTable($db);
    $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
    $cluster = is_array($computedLock['cluster'] ?? null) ? $computedLock['cluster'] : array();
    $settingsJson = json_encode($baseSettings, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)->update($db->quoteName('#__mle_current_locked_settings'))->set($db->quoteName('is_active') . ' = 0')->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)->where($db->quoteName('is_active') . ' = 1');
        $db->setQuery($q); $db->execute();
        $cols = array('user_id','lottery_id','lottery_name','source','method','base_run_id','base_settings_id','settings_json','locked_status','recommendation_level','precision_progress_level','precision_lock_stage','range_basis','range_min','range_max','evidence_summary','locked_reason','repeated_cluster_key','repeated_cluster_count','completed_draw_count','strong_evidence_count','is_active','created_at','updated_at');
        $vals = array((int)$userId,(int)$lotteryId,$db->quote((string)$lotteryName),$db->quote((string)$source),$db->quote((string)$method),(int)$baseRunId,(int)$baseRunId,$db->quote((string)$settingsJson),$db->quote((string)($computedLock['status'] ?? '')),$db->quote((string)($recommendationLevel['label'] ?? '')),$db->quote((string)($precisionProgress['level_name'] ?? '')),$db->quote((string)($precisionLock['stage'] ?? '')),$db->quote((string)($precisionLock['control_label'] ?? '')),$db->quote((string)round((float)($precisionLock['range_min'] ?? 0),4)),$db->quote((string)round((float)($precisionLock['range_max'] ?? 100),4)),$db->quote((string)($evidenceIntel['summary'] ?? '')),$db->quote((string)($computedLock['reason'] ?? '')),$db->quote((string)($cluster['cluster_key'] ?? '')),(int)($computedLock['cluster_support'] ?? 0),(int)($computedLock['cluster_draw_support'] ?? 0),(int)($evidenceIntel['strong_count'] ?? 0),1,$db->quote($now),$db->quote($now));
        $q = 'INSERT INTO ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_current_locked_settings') . ' (`' . implode('`,`', $cols) . '`) VALUES (' . implode(',', $vals) . ')';
        $db->setQuery($q); $db->execute();
        return (int)$db->insertid();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { error_log('[MLE Lock] save error: ' . $e->getMessage()); return 0; }
}

function mylottoexpertEnsureSkaiBackTestTables($db) {
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $headerTable = $prefix . 'mle_skai_batch_header';
    $runTable = $prefix . 'mle_skai_batch_run';
    $sql1 = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$headerTable}` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lottery_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lottery_name` varchar(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `batch_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `batch_source` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'advisory',
  `batch_type` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Precision Focus Batch',
  `source_page` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'MyLottoExpert',
  `status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `test_variable` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `range_min` decimal(10,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `range_max` decimal(10,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  `recommended_value` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `precision_lock_stage` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `recommendation_level` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `precision_progress_level` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `evidence_summary` text,
  `base_settings_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `locked_settings_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_user_lottery` (`user_id`,`lottery_id`),
  KEY `idx_status` (`status`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci";
    $sql2 = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$runTable}` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `batch_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `user_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lottery_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `run_order` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `run_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `is_control` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `source` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `full_settings_json` mediumtext,
  `test_variable` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `test_value` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_batch_id` (`batch_id`),
  KEY `idx_user_lottery` (`user_id`,`lottery_id`),
  KEY `idx_status` (`status`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci";
    try { $db->setQuery($sql1); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e) { /* non-fatal */ }
    try { $db->setQuery($sql2); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e) { /* non-fatal */ }
    try { $cols = $db->getTableColumns('#__mle_skai_batch_header', false); $names = is_array($cols) ? array_keys($cols) : array(); if (!in_array('batch_type', $names, true)) { $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `" . $headerTable . "` ADD COLUMN `batch_type` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Precision Focus Batch' AFTER `batch_source`"); $db->execute(); } if (!in_array('source_page', $names, true)) { $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `" . $headerTable . "` ADD COLUMN `source_page` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'MyLottoExpert' AFTER `batch_type`"); $db->execute(); } if (!in_array('locked_settings_id', $names, true)) { $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `" . $headerTable . "` ADD COLUMN `locked_settings_id` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `base_settings_id`"); $db->execute(); } } catch (\Throwable $e) { /* non-fatal */ }
}

function mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, $tableName)
{
    try {
        $cols = $db->getTableColumns($tableName, false);
        return is_array($cols) ? array_keys($cols) : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return array();
    }
}

function mylottoexpertTableExistsByRawName($db, $rawTableName)
{
    try {
        $tables = $db->getTableList();
        return is_array($tables) && in_array($rawTableName, $tables, true);
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return false;
    }
}

function mylottoexpertBuildBatchSettingsSummary($settings)
{
    if (!is_array($settings) || empty($settings)) {
        return '';
    }
    $map = array(
        'skai_run_mode' => 'Mode',
        'blend' => 'Blend Setting',
        'skai_blend_ai_pct' => 'Blend Setting',
        'blend_ai_pct' => 'Blend Setting',
        'ai_pct' => 'Blend Setting',
        'skai_window_size' => 'History Window',
        'skip_window' => 'History Window',
        'draws_used' => 'Past Draws Checked',
        'best_window' => 'Best History Search',
        'auto_tune' => 'Auto Adjust',
        'training_style' => 'Training Style'
    );
    $parts = array();
    foreach ($map as $key => $label) {
        if (!array_key_exists($key, $settings) || $settings[$key] === '' || $settings[$key] === null) {
            continue;
        }
        if ($label === 'Blend Setting' && ($key === 'skai_blend_ai_pct' || $key === 'blend_ai_pct' || $key === 'ai_pct')) {
            $parts[] = $label . ': ' . mylottoexpertFormatPercentForLabel($settings[$key]) . '%';
            continue;
        }
        $value = $settings[$key];
        if ($value === 1 || $value === '1') {
            $value = 'On';
        } elseif ($value === 0 || $value === '0') {
            $value = 'Off';
        }
        $parts[] = $label . ': ' . (string)$value;
        if (count($parts) >= 6) {
            break;
        }
    }
    return implode(' | ', $parts);
}

function mylottoexpertLoadBatchRunsForReview($db, $batchId, $userId, $lotteryId)
{
    $batchId = (int)$batchId;
    $userId = (int)$userId;
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    if ($batchId <= 0 || $userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0) {
        return array();
    }
    $runCols = mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__mle_skai_batch_run');
    if (empty($runCols)) {
        return array();
    }
    $selectCols = array('id', 'batch_id', 'user_id', 'lottery_id', 'run_order', 'run_name', 'is_control', 'source', 'method', 'test_variable', 'test_value', 'status', 'full_settings_json', 'settings_json');
    $select = array();
    foreach ($selectCols as $col) {
        if (in_array($col, $runCols, true)) {
            $select[] = $db->quoteName($col);
        }
    }
    if (empty($select)) {
        return array();
    }
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($select)
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('batch_id') . ' = ' . $batchId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)
            ->order($db->quoteName('run_order') . ' ASC');
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $rows = array();
    }
    $rows = is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
    foreach ($rows as $idx => $row) {
        $jsonRaw = '';
        if (isset($row['full_settings_json']) && trim((string)$row['full_settings_json']) !== '') {
            $jsonRaw = (string)$row['full_settings_json'];
        } elseif (isset($row['settings_json']) && trim((string)$row['settings_json']) !== '') {
            $jsonRaw = (string)$row['settings_json'];
        }
        $settings = array();
        if ($jsonRaw !== '') {
            $tmp = json_decode($jsonRaw, true);
            if (is_array($tmp)) {
                $settings = $tmp;
            }
        }
        $rows[$idx]['_settings'] = $settings;
        $rows[$idx]['_summary'] = mylottoexpertBuildBatchSettingsSummary($settings);
    }
    return $rows;
}


function mylottoexpertCountGeneratedPrecisionBatchSaves($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $batchId)
{
    $userId = (int)$userId;
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $batchId = (int)$batchId;
    $out = array('saved_count' => 0, 'saved_run_count' => 0, 'matched_saved_ids' => array(), 'matched_run_orders' => array());
    if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0 || $batchId <= 0) {
        return $out;
    }
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    if (!mylottoexpertTableExistsByRawName($db, $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers')) {
        return $out;
    }
    $cols = mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__user_saved_numbers');
    if (empty($cols)) {
        return $out;
    }

    // Primary path: newer SKAI saves write source_batch_id/source_batch_run_id directly.
    if (in_array('source_batch_id', $cols, true)) {
        try {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select('COUNT(*)')
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
                ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)
                ->where($db->quoteName('source_batch_id') . ' = ' . $batchId);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $out['saved_count'] = (int)$db->loadResult();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $out['saved_count'] = 0;
        }
        if (in_array('source_batch_run_id', $cols, true)) {
            try {
                $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->select('COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $db->quoteName('source_batch_run_id') . ')')
                    ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                    ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('source_batch_id') . ' = ' . $batchId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('source_batch_run_id') . ' > 0');
                $db->setQuery($q);
                $out['saved_run_count'] = (int)$db->loadResult();
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $out['saved_run_count'] = 0;
            }
        } else {
            $out['saved_run_count'] = $out['saved_count'];
        }
    }

    // Compatibility path: older SKAI saves may have generated the runs but not written
    // source_batch_id/source_batch_run_id. Reconcile by finding batch metadata inside
    // labels, settings_json, or prediction_target_json so stale "Batch Ready" alerts clear.
    if ((int)$out['saved_run_count'] <= 0) {
        $selectCols = array('id', 'label', 'settings_json', 'prediction_target_json', 'source_batch_id', 'source_batch_run_id', 'source_batch_run_order', 'origin_source', 'source');
        $select = array();
        foreach ($selectCols as $col) {
            if (in_array($col, $cols, true)) {
                $select[] = $db->quoteName($col);
            }
        }
        if (!empty($select)) {
            try {
                $likeBatch = '%' . $db->escape('Batch ' . $batchId, true) . '%';
                $jsonLike1 = '%' . $db->escape('"source_batch_id":' . $batchId, true) . '%';
                $jsonLike2 = '%' . $db->escape('"batch_id":' . $batchId, true) . '%';
                $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->select($select)
                    ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                    ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)
                    ->where('(' .
                        (in_array('label', $cols, true) ? $db->quoteName('label') . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote($likeBatch, false) : '0') .
                        (in_array('settings_json', $cols, true) ? ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('settings_json') . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote($jsonLike1, false) . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('settings_json') . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote($jsonLike2, false) : '') .
                        (in_array('prediction_target_json', $cols, true) ? ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('prediction_target_json') . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote($jsonLike1, false) . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('prediction_target_json') . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote($jsonLike2, false) : '') .
                    ')')
                    ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC')
                    ->setLimit(100);
                $db->setQuery($q);
                $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $rows = array();
            }
            $rows = is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
            $runOrders = array();
            $savedIds = array();
            foreach ($rows as $row) {
                $savedId = (int)($row['id'] ?? 0);
                if ($savedId > 0) { $savedIds[$savedId] = true; }
                $order = 0;
                foreach (array('source_batch_run_order', 'source_batch_run_id') as $orderCol) {
                    if (isset($row[$orderCol]) && (int)$row[$orderCol] > 0) { $order = (int)$row[$orderCol]; break; }
                }
                if ($order <= 0 && !empty($row['label']) && preg_match('/Run\s+(\d+)/i', (string)$row['label'], $m)) {
                    $order = (int)$m[1];
                }
                if ($order <= 0) {
                    foreach (array('settings_json', 'prediction_target_json') as $jsonCol) {
                        if (empty($row[$jsonCol])) { continue; }
                        $tmp = json_decode((string)$row[$jsonCol], true);
                        if (!is_array($tmp)) { continue; }
                        $tracking = array();
                        if (isset($tmp['_batch_tracking']) && is_array($tmp['_batch_tracking'])) { $tracking = $tmp['_batch_tracking']; }
                        elseif (isset($tmp['batch_tracking']) && is_array($tmp['batch_tracking'])) { $tracking = $tmp['batch_tracking']; }
                        if (!empty($tracking)) {
                            if ((int)($tracking['source_batch_id'] ?? $tracking['batch_id'] ?? 0) === $batchId) {
                                $order = (int)($tracking['source_batch_run_order'] ?? $tracking['run_order'] ?? $tracking['source_batch_run_id'] ?? 0);
                                break;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                if ($order > 0) { $runOrders[$order] = true; }
            }
            if (!empty($savedIds)) {
                $out['saved_count'] = max((int)$out['saved_count'], count($savedIds));
                $out['saved_run_count'] = max((int)$out['saved_run_count'], !empty($runOrders) ? count($runOrders) : count($savedIds));
                $out['matched_saved_ids'] = array_keys($savedIds);
                $out['matched_run_orders'] = array_keys($runOrders);
            }
        }
    }

    return $out;
}

function mylottoexpertReconcilePrecisionBatchStatus($db, $userId, $lotteryId, array $header, array $runs)
{
    $userId = (int)$userId;
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $batchId = (int)($header['id'] ?? 0);
    $status = strtolower(trim((string)($header['status'] ?? 'pending')));
    $runCount = count($runs);
    $generatedRunStatusCount = 0;
    $failedRunStatusCount = 0;
    foreach ($runs as $run) {
        $runStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($run['status'] ?? '')));
        if (in_array($runStatus, array('generated', 'completed', 'saved', 'scored'), true)) {
            $generatedRunStatusCount++;
        } elseif (in_array($runStatus, array('failed', 'error'), true)) {
            $failedRunStatusCount++;
        }
    }
    $saveCounts = mylottoexpertCountGeneratedPrecisionBatchSaves($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $batchId);
    $savedRunCount = (int)($saveCounts['saved_run_count'] ?? 0);
    $savedCount = (int)($saveCounts['saved_count'] ?? 0);
    $effectiveGeneratedCount = max($generatedRunStatusCount, $savedRunCount);

    $computedStatus = $status !== '' ? $status : 'pending';
    if ($runCount >= 9 && $effectiveGeneratedCount >= 9) {
        $computedStatus = 'generated';
    } elseif ($effectiveGeneratedCount > 0) {
        $computedStatus = 'partially_generated';
    } elseif ($failedRunStatusCount > 0 && $failedRunStatusCount >= max(1, $runCount)) {
        $computedStatus = 'failed';
    }

    $header['_saved_count'] = $savedCount;
    $header['_saved_run_count'] = $savedRunCount;
    $header['_generated_run_status_count'] = $generatedRunStatusCount;
    $header['_effective_generated_count'] = $effectiveGeneratedCount;
    $header['_computed_status'] = $computedStatus;
    $header['_is_not_started'] = in_array($computedStatus, array('pending', 'ready'), true) && $effectiveGeneratedCount === 0;
    $header['_is_in_progress'] = ($computedStatus === 'partially_generated') || ($effectiveGeneratedCount > 0 && $effectiveGeneratedCount < 9);
    $header['_is_generated'] = in_array($computedStatus, array('generated', 'completed', 'scored'), true) || $effectiveGeneratedCount >= 9;

    if ($batchId > 0 && $computedStatus !== $status) {
        try {
            $cols = mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__mle_skai_batch_header');
            if (in_array('status', $cols, true)) {
                $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->update($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_header'))
                    ->set($db->quoteName('status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($computedStatus))
                    ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $batchId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId);
                $db->setQuery($q);
                $db->execute();
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { /* non-fatal reconciliation */ }
    }

    return $header;
}

function mylottoexpertLoadPrecisionLockBatchesForLottery($db, $userId, $lotteryId)
{
    $userId = (int)$userId;
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $result = array('available' => false, 'ready' => array(), 'history' => array());
    if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0) {
        return $result;
    }
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $headerTable = $prefix . 'mle_skai_batch_header';
    $runTable = $prefix . 'mle_skai_batch_run';
    if (!mylottoexpertTableExistsByRawName($db, $headerTable) || !mylottoexpertTableExistsByRawName($db, $runTable)) {
        return $result;
    }
    $headerCols = mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__mle_skai_batch_header');
    if (empty($headerCols)) {
        return $result;
    }
    $result['available'] = true;
    $selectCols = array('id', 'user_id', 'lottery_id', 'lottery_name', 'batch_name', 'batch_type', 'batch_source', 'source_page', 'status', 'created_at', 'test_variable', 'range_min', 'range_max', 'recommended_value', 'precision_lock_stage', 'recommendation_level', 'precision_progress_level', 'evidence_summary');
    $select = array();
    foreach ($selectCols as $col) {
        if (in_array($col, $headerCols, true)) {
            $select[] = $db->quoteName($col);
        }
    }
    if (empty($select)) {
        return $result;
    }
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($select)
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_header'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)
            ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC');
        $db->setQuery($q, 0, 50);
        $headers = $db->loadAssocList();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $headers = array();
    }
    $headers = is_array($headers) ? $headers : array();
    foreach ($headers as $header) {
        $batchId = (int)($header['id'] ?? 0);
        if ($batchId <= 0) {
            continue;
        }
        try {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select('COUNT(*)')
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('batch_id') . ' = ' . $batchId)
                ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
                ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $header['run_count'] = (int)$db->loadResult();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $header['run_count'] = 0;
        }
        $header['runs'] = mylottoexpertLoadBatchRunsForReview($db, $batchId, $userId, $lotteryId);
        $header = mylottoexpertReconcilePrecisionBatchStatus($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $header, $header['runs']);
        $status = strtolower(trim((string)($header['_computed_status'] ?? ($header['status'] ?? ''))));
        if (!empty($header['_is_not_started'])) {
            $result['ready'][] = $header;
        } elseif (!empty($header['_is_in_progress'])) {
            if (!isset($result['in_progress']) || !is_array($result['in_progress'])) { $result['in_progress'] = array(); }
            $result['in_progress'][] = $header;
        } else {
            $result['history'][] = $header;
        }
    }
    return $result;
}

function mylottoexpertEnsureBatchTrackingColumnsOnSavedPredictions($db)
{
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $rawName = $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers';
    $cols = mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__user_saved_numbers');
    if (empty($cols)) {
        return;
    }
    $needed = array(
        'source_batch_id' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `source_batch_id` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `origin_source`",
        'source_batch_run_id' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `source_batch_run_id` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `source_batch_id`",
        'source_batch_type' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `source_batch_type` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `source_batch_run_id`",
        'source_batch_run_order' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `source_batch_run_order` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `source_batch_type`",
        'source_batch_origin' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `source_batch_origin` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `source_batch_run_order`",
        'batch_control_flag' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `batch_control_flag` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `source_batch_origin`"
    );
    foreach ($needed as $col => $sql) {
        if (in_array($col, $cols, true)) {
            continue;
        }
        try {
            $db->setQuery($sql);
            $db->execute();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { /* non-fatal */ }
    }
}


mleAdvisoryEnsureSchemaColumns($db);
mylottoexpertEnsureCurrentLockedSettingsTable($db);
mylottoexpertEnsureSkaiBackTestTables($db);

if ($__mleAction === 'play_set_payload') {
    $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true);
    $app->setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0', true);
    $app->setHeader('Pragma', 'no-cache', true);

    $playSetId = $app->input->getInt('play_set_id', 0);
    if ($playSetId <= 0) {
        echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Missing play_set_id.'));
        exit;
    }

    $snCols = array();
    try {
        $snColsRaw = $db->getTableColumns('#__user_saved_numbers', false);
        $snCols = is_array($snColsRaw) ? array_keys($snColsRaw) : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $snCols = array();
    }

    $q = $db->getQuery(true)
        ->select('*')
        ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
        ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$playSetId)
        ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
    if (in_array('save_intent', $snCols, true)) {
        $q->where(
            '(' .
            $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " IN ('play_set','custom_play','wheel_candidate')" .
            ' OR (' . $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " = '' AND " . $db->quoteName('source') . " = 'strategy_set')" .
            ')'
        );
    } else {
        $q->where($db->quoteName('source') . " = 'strategy_set'");
    }
    $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1);
    $row = $db->loadAssoc();

    if (empty($row)) {
        echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Play set not found.'));
        exit;
    }

    $meta = mylottoexpertResolvePlayIntentMeta($row);
    $main = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($row['main_numbers'] ?? '', true);
    $extra = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($row['extra_ball_numbers'] ?? '', true);
    if (empty($main)) {
        echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Play set has no main numbers.'));
        exit;
    }

    // [[MLE_WHEEL_CONTRACT]] Build the wheel-import payload.
    // target_prediction_family is required by Wheel Builder to block daily/Pick game imports.
    // settings_json, risk_profile, and strategy carry run-context for settings transfer.
    $__psSettingsJson = '';
    foreach (array('settings_json', 'settings', 'params_json', 'params') as $__psSKey) {
        if (isset($row[$__psSKey]) && (string)$row[$__psSKey] !== '') {
            $__psSettingsJson = (string)$row[$__psSKey];
            break;
        }
    }
    $payload = array(
        'play_set_id'                => (int)($row['id'] ?? 0),
        'lottery_id'                 => (int)($row['lottery_id'] ?? 0),
        'target_game_id'             => trim((string)($row['target_game_id'] ?? '')),
        // target_prediction_family: canonical column written by SKAI at save time.
        // Falls back to prediction_family for play sets saved before the target_ prefix
        // was introduced (legacy rows where both columns may be present).
        // target_prediction_type follows the same two-column convention.
        'target_prediction_family'   => trim((string)($row['target_prediction_family'] ?? $row['prediction_family'] ?? '')),
        'target_prediction_type'     => trim((string)($row['target_prediction_type'] ?? $row['prediction_type'] ?? '')),
        'target_pick_size'           => (int)($row['target_pick_size'] ?? count($main)),
        'target_extra_count'         => (int)($row['target_extra_count'] ?? count($extra)),
        'main_numbers'               => $main,
        'extra_ball_numbers'         => $extra,
        'label'                      => trim((string)($row['label'] ?? '')),
        'origin_source'              => $meta['origin_source'],
        'save_intent'                => $meta['save_intent'],
        'play_status'                => $meta['play_status'],
        'settings_json'              => $__psSettingsJson,
        'risk_profile'               => trim((string)($row['risk_profile'] ?? '')),
        'strategy'                   => trim((string)($row['strategy'] ?? ''))
    );

    echo json_encode(array('ok' => true, 'payload' => $payload), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
    exit;
}

// --------------------------------------------------
// Numbers to Play list endpoint for Wheel Builder picker
// --------------------------------------------------
if ($__mleAction === 'play_sets_list') {
    $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true);
    $app->setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0', true);
    $app->setHeader('Pragma', 'no-cache', true);

    $snCols2 = array();
    try {
        $snColsRaw2 = $db->getTableColumns('#__user_saved_numbers', false);
        $snCols2 = is_array($snColsRaw2) ? array_keys($snColsRaw2) : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $snCols2 = array();
    }

    $q = $db->getQuery(true)
        ->select(array(
            $db->quoteName('id'),
            $db->quoteName('label'),
            $db->quoteName('lottery_id'),
            $db->quoteName('main_numbers'),
            $db->quoteName('extra_ball_numbers'),
            $db->quoteName('date_saved'),
            $db->quoteName('source')
        ))
        ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
        ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);

    if (in_array('origin_source', $snCols2, true)) {
        $q->select($db->quoteName('origin_source'));
    }
    if (in_array('play_notes', $snCols2, true)) {
        $q->select($db->quoteName('play_notes'));
    }
    if (in_array('play_status', $snCols2, true)) {
        $q->select($db->quoteName('play_status'));
        $q->where($db->quoteName('play_status') . " <> 'archived'");
    }
    if (in_array('save_intent', $snCols2, true)) {
        $q->where(
            '(' .
            $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " IN ('play_set','custom_play','wheel_candidate')" .
            ' OR (' . $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " = '' AND " . $db->quoteName('source') . " = 'strategy_set')" .
            ')'
        );
    } else {
        $q->where($db->quoteName('source') . " = 'strategy_set'");
    }
    $q->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC');
    $db->setQuery($q, 0, 50);
    $listRows = $db->loadAssocList() ?: array();

    $listSets = array();
    foreach ($listRows as $lRow) {
        $lMain = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($lRow['main_numbers'] ?? '', true);
        if (empty($lMain)) { continue; }
        $lLabel = trim((string)($lRow['label'] ?? ''));
        $lOrigin = strtolower(trim((string)($lRow['origin_source'] ?? $lRow['source'] ?? '')));
        if (in_array($lOrigin, array('skai_prediction', 'prediction', 'ai_prediction'), true)) {
            $lBadge = 'From Prediction';
        } elseif (in_array($lOrigin, array('strategy_builder', 'strategy_set'), true) || ($lRow['source'] ?? '') === 'strategy_set') {
            $lBadge = 'From Strategy Builder';
        } elseif (in_array($lOrigin, array('manual', 'custom'), true)) {
            $lBadge = 'Custom Selection';
        } else {
            $lBadge = 'Saved Set';
        }
        $lSavedTs = strtotime((string)($lRow['date_saved'] ?? ''));
        $lSavedLabel = $lSavedTs ? date('M j, Y', $lSavedTs) : trim((string)($lRow['date_saved'] ?? ''));
        $listSets[] = array(
            'id'                 => (int)$lRow['id'],
            'label'              => $lLabel !== '' ? $lLabel : ('Play Set #' . (int)$lRow['id']),
            'main_numbers'       => $lMain,
            'extra_ball_numbers' => mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($lRow['extra_ball_numbers'] ?? '', true),
            'source_badge'       => $lBadge,
            'date_saved'         => $lSavedLabel,
            'notes'              => trim((string)($lRow['play_notes'] ?? '')),
        );
    }
    echo json_encode(array('ok' => true, 'sets' => $listSets), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
    exit;
}

if ($__mleAction === 'wheel_favorites_list') {
    if ($user->guest || $workspaceUserId <= 0) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'login_required' => true, 'error' => 'You must be logged in to use this feature.'));
    }
    $__wfData = mylottoexpertLoadHydratedWheelFavorites($db, $workspaceUserId);
    mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array(
        'ok'             => true,
        'favorites'      => $__wfData['available'],
        'missing'        => $__wfData['missing'],
        'favorite_ids'   => $__wfData['ids'],
        'catalog_loaded' => $__wfData['catalog_loaded'],
    ));

// --------------------------------------------------
// Wheel Favorites: save endpoint
// POST only. CSRF required.
// --------------------------------------------------
if ($__mleAction === 'save_wheel_favorite') {
    if ($app->input->getMethod() !== 'POST') {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'POST required.'));
    }
    if ($user->guest || $workspaceUserId <= 0) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'login_required' => true, 'error' => 'You must be logged in to save favorites.'));
    }
    if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'This action is not available in demo mode.'));
    }
    if (!\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid security token. Please refresh and try again.'));
    }
    $__rawSysId = $app->input->post->getString('system_id', '');
    $__sysId    = mylottoexpertSanitizeWheelSystemId($__rawSysId);
    if ($__sysId === '') {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid system ID.'));
    }
    // Validate system_id against the JSON catalog - but only when the catalog is
    // non-empty.  If wheels-index.json is absent or empty we skip validation rather
    // than blocking every save on a temporarily inaccessible file.
    $__saveCatalog = mylottoexpertLoadWheelCatalogFromJson();
    if (!empty($__saveCatalog) && !isset($__saveCatalog[$__sysId])) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'This wheeling system could not be verified.'));
    }
    try {
        // Build INSERT column/value lists dynamically so the query succeeds even when
        // legacy NOT NULL columns exist.  The Ensure function adds safe DEFAULTs to
        // legacy columns, but we include them here as a belt-and-suspenders measure.
        $__now      = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDate()->toSql();
        $__wfCols   = mylottoexpertGetWheelPrefCols($db);
        $__insCols  = array('user_id', 'system_id', 'created_at');
        $__insVals  = array((int)$workspaceUserId, $db->quote($__sysId), $db->quote($__now));
        if (isset($__wfCols['date_saved'])) {
            $__insCols[] = 'date_saved';
            $__insVals[] = $db->quote($__now);
        }
        if (isset($__wfCols['source'])) {
            $__insCols[] = 'source';
            $__insVals[] = $db->quote('json_catalog');
        }
        if (isset($__wfCols['status'])) {
            $__insCols[] = 'status';
            $__insVals[] = $db->quote('active');
        }
        // Safe defaults for legacy NOT NULL columns that have no column-level default.
        $__legacySafe = array(
            'pick_size'         => '0',
            'number_range'      => '0',
            'assurance_level'   => $db->quote(''),
            'numbers_to_wheel'  => $db->quote(''),
            'pool_numbers_json' => $db->quote('[]'),
        );
        foreach ($__legacySafe as $__lc => $__lv) {
            if (isset($__wfCols[$__lc])) {
                $__insCols[] = $__lc;
                $__insVals[] = $__lv;
            }
        }
        // INSERT IGNORE - the UNIQUE KEY (uq_user_system) handles duplicate saves
        // atomically without a race-condition-prone SELECT+INSERT pattern.
        $__quotedCols = array_map(function ($c) use ($db) { return $db->quoteName($c); }, $__insCols);
        $db->setQuery(
            "INSERT IGNORE INTO " . $db->quoteName('#__user_wheeling_preferences')
          . " (" . implode(', ', $__quotedCols) . ")"
          . " VALUES (" . implode(', ', $__insVals) . ")"
        );
        $db->execute();
    } catch (\Throwable $__e) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Could not save favorite. Please try again.'));
    }
    $__wfIds = mylottoexpertLoadUserWheelFavoriteIds($db, $workspaceUserId);
    mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => true, 'message' => 'Favorite wheeling system saved.', 'favorite_ids' => $__wfIds));
}

// --------------------------------------------------
// Wheel Favorites: remove endpoint
// POST only. CSRF required.
// --------------------------------------------------
if ($__mleAction === 'remove_wheel_favorite') {
    // Detect whether this is an AJAX call (Wheeling Systems page) or a plain form POST (dashboard).
    $__isAjax = (isset($_SERVER['HTTP_X_REQUESTED_WITH']) && strtolower($_SERVER['HTTP_X_REQUESTED_WITH']) === 'xmlhttprequest');
    // Helper: respond correctly for the request type.
    // AJAX to JSON. Form POST to Joomla flash message plus page redirect.
    $__removeRedirectPath = \Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->getPath();

    if ($app->input->getMethod() !== 'POST') {
        if ($__isAjax) {
            mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'POST required.'));
        }
        $app->enqueueMessage('Invalid request.', 'error');
        $app->redirect($__removeRedirectPath);
        exit;
    }
    if ($user->guest || $workspaceUserId <= 0) {
        if ($__isAjax) {
            mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'login_required' => true, 'error' => 'You must be logged in to manage favorites.'));
        }
        $app->enqueueMessage('You must be logged in to manage favorites.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect($__removeRedirectPath);
        exit;
    }
    if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) {
        if ($__isAjax) {
            mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'This action is not available in demo mode.'));
        }
        $app->enqueueMessage('This action is not available in demo mode.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect($__removeRedirectPath);
        exit;
    }
    if (!\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        if ($__isAjax) {
            mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid security token. Please refresh and try again.'));
        }
        $app->enqueueMessage('Your session has expired. Please reload the page and try again.', 'error');
        $app->redirect($__removeRedirectPath);
        exit;
    }
    $__rawSysId2 = $app->input->post->getString('system_id', '');
    $__sysId2    = mylottoexpertSanitizeWheelSystemId($__rawSysId2);
    if ($__sysId2 === '') {
        if ($__isAjax) {
            mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid system ID.'));
        }
        $app->enqueueMessage('Invalid system ID.', 'error');
