        $app->redirect($__removeRedirectPath);
        exit;
    }
    try {
        $__delQ = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->delete($db->quoteName('#__user_wheeling_preferences'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id')   . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('system_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($__sysId2));
        $db->setQuery($__delQ);
        $db->execute();
    } catch (\Throwable $__e) {
        if ($__isAjax) {
            mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Could not remove favorite. Please try again.'));
        }
        $app->enqueueMessage('Could not remove favorite. Please try again.', 'error');
        $app->redirect($__removeRedirectPath);
        exit;
    }
    $__wfIds2 = mylottoexpertLoadUserWheelFavoriteIds($db, $workspaceUserId);
    if ($__isAjax) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => true, 'message' => 'Favorite wheeling system removed.', 'favorite_ids' => $__wfIds2));
    }
    $app->enqueueMessage('Favorite wheeling system removed.', 'message');
    $app->redirect($__removeRedirectPath);
    exit;
}
// ------------------------------------------------------------------
// save_advisory_recipe (user-facing: Create Recommended Next Settings Run)
// ------------------------------------------------------------------
if ($__mleAction === 'save_advisory_recipe') {
    if ($app->input->getMethod() !== 'POST' || !\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Session expired. Please refresh and try again.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Demo mode: Cannot create a recommended settings run.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    if ($workspaceUserId <= 0) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Please log in to create a recommended settings run.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    $__advLotteryId    = $app->input->getInt('lottery_id', 0);
    $__advMethod       = strtolower(trim($app->input->getString('method', $app->input->getString('source_method', ''))));
    $__advSettingKey   = trim($app->input->getString('setting_key', ''));
    $__advSettingLabel = trim($app->input->getString('setting_label', ''));
    $__advOldValue     = trim($app->input->getString('old_value', ''));
    $__advNewValue     = trim($app->input->getString('new_value', ''));
    $__advReason       = trim($app->input->getString('reason', ''));
    $__advProofLabel   = trim($app->input->getString('proof_label', $app->input->getString('proof_level', '')));
    $__advBaseSavedId  = $app->input->getInt('base_saved_number_id', 0);
    $__advBaseRecipeId = $app->input->getInt('base_recipe_id', 0);
    if ($__advLotteryId <= 0 || $__advMethod === '' || $__advSettingKey === '' || $__advNewValue === '' || ($__advBaseSavedId <= 0 && $__advBaseRecipeId <= 0)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('LottoExpert could not create the recommended next settings run because the full base settings could not be found. Please save the source settings first.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    $__advParams = array();
    try {
        if ($__advBaseSavedId > 0) {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select('*')->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$__advBaseSavedId)->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
            $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1);
            $__baseRow = $db->loadAssoc();
            if (is_array($__baseRow) && !empty($__baseRow)) { $__advParams = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($__baseRow); }
        }
        if (empty($__advParams) && $__advBaseRecipeId > 0) {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select('*')->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_settings'))->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$__advBaseRecipeId)->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
            $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1);
            $__baseRecipe = $db->loadAssoc();
            if (is_array($__baseRecipe) && !empty($__baseRecipe)) {
                foreach (array('params','saved_params','settings_json') as $__pcol) {
                    if (!empty($__baseRecipe[$__pcol])) { $d = json_decode((string)$__baseRecipe[$__pcol], true); if (is_array($d)) { $__advParams = $d; break; } }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { $__advParams = array(); }
    if (empty($__advParams)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('LottoExpert could not create the recommended next settings run because the full base settings could not be found. Please save the source settings first.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    $__advParams[$__advSettingKey] = $__advNewValue;
    $__advMethodLabel = mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($__advMethod);
    $__advRecipeName = 'Recommended Next Settings Run - ' . $__advMethodLabel;
    if ($__advSettingLabel !== '') { $__advRecipeName .= ' - ' . $__advSettingLabel; }
    try {
        $__colsRaw = $db->getTableColumns('#__user_saved_settings', false);
        $__cols = is_array($__colsRaw) ? array_keys($__colsRaw) : array();
        $__insertCols = array(); $__insertVals = array();
        $__add = function($col, $val) use (&$__insertCols, &$__insertVals, $__cols, $db) { if (in_array($col, $__cols, true)) { $__insertCols[] = $db->quoteName($col); $__insertVals[] = ($val === null ? 'NULL' : $db->quote((string)$val)); } };
        $__add('user_id', $workspaceUserId); $__add('lottery_id', $__advLotteryId); $__add('source', $__advMethod); $__add('setting_name', $__advRecipeName); $__add('label', $__advRecipeName);
        $__json = json_encode($__advParams, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
        $__add('params', $__json); $__add('saved_params', $__json); $__add('settings_json', $__json); $__add('date_saved', date('Y-m-d H:i:s')); $__add('created_at', date('Y-m-d H:i:s'));
        $__add('advisory_reason', $__advReason); $__add('advisory_old_value', $__advOldValue); $__add('advisory_new_value', $__advNewValue); $__add('advisory_setting_key', $__advSettingKey); $__add('advisory_proof_level', $__advProofLabel); $__add('advisory_method', $__advMethod);
        if (empty($__insertCols)) { throw new \RuntimeException('No insert columns.'); }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)->insert($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_settings'))->columns($__insertCols)->values(implode(',', $__insertVals));
        $db->setQuery($q); $db->execute();
        $app->enqueueMessage('Recommended next settings run created. LottoExpert copied your strongest current settings and changed only ' . ($__advSettingLabel !== '' ? $__advSettingLabel : $__advSettingKey) . '.', 'message');
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[MLE Advisory] save_advisory_recipe error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        $app->enqueueMessage('LottoExpert could not create the recommended next settings run because the full base settings could not be found. Please save the source settings first.', 'error');
    }
    $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
    return;
}

// ------------------------------------------------------------------
// save_current_locked_settings (user-facing: Save as Current Locked Settings)
// ------------------------------------------------------------------
if ($__mleAction === 'save_current_locked_settings') {
    if ($app->input->getMethod() !== 'POST' || !\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Session expired. Please refresh and try again.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) { $app->enqueueMessage('Demo mode: Current Locked Settings were not saved.', 'warning'); $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString()); return; }
    if ($workspaceUserId <= 0) { $app->enqueueMessage('Please log in to save Current Locked Settings.', 'warning'); $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString()); return; }
    $__lockLotteryId = $app->input->getInt('lottery_id', 0);
    if ($__lockLotteryId <= 0) { $app->enqueueMessage('Current Locked Settings were not saved because LottoExpert could not identify the lottery.', 'error'); $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString()); return; }
    $__lockActive = mleAdvisoryBuildActiveSavedEvidence($db, $workspaceUserId);
    $__lockRows = isset($__lockActive[$__lockLotteryId]['rows']) && is_array($__lockActive[$__lockLotteryId]['rows']) ? $__lockActive[$__lockLotteryId]['rows'] : array();
    if (empty($__lockRows)) { $app->enqueueMessage('Current Locked Settings are not ready yet. LottoExpert needs more repeated saved scored evidence for this lottery before locking a baseline.', 'warning'); $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString()); return; }
    $__lockSavedById = array(); foreach ($__lockRows as $__lr) { $__lockSavedById[(int)($__lr['id'] ?? 0)] = $__lr; }
    $__lockPerf = mleAdvisoryLoadMatchedPerformance($db, $workspaceUserId, $__lockLotteryId, $__lockRows);
    $__lockLeaderboard = mleAdvisoryComputeMethodLeaderboardFromRows($__lockPerf);
    $__lockMethods = is_array($__lockLeaderboard['methods'] ?? null) ? $__lockLeaderboard['methods'] : array();
    if (empty($__lockMethods)) { $app->enqueueMessage('Current Locked Settings are not ready yet. LottoExpert needs completed scored evidence for this lottery before locking a baseline.', 'warning'); $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString()); return; }
    $__lockTopMethod = $__lockMethods[0];
    $__lockVisual = mleAdvisoryBuildVisualRunRows($__lockRows, $__lockPerf);
    $__lockEvidence = mleAdvisoryBuildEvidenceIntelligence($__lockVisual, $__lockSavedById, $__lockTopMethod['method']);
    $__lockComputed = is_array($__lockEvidence['current_locked_settings'] ?? null) ? $__lockEvidence['current_locked_settings'] : array();
    if (!mleAdvisoryCurrentLockReady($__lockComputed)) { $app->enqueueMessage('Current Locked Settings are not ready yet. LottoExpert needs more repeated saved scored evidence for this lottery before locking a baseline.', 'warning'); $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString()); return; }
    $__lockBaseRunId = 0; $__lockBestScore = -PHP_FLOAT_MAX;
    foreach ($__lockPerf as $__lp) { $__lq = (float)($__lp['weighted_quality_score'] ?? 0) + ((int)($__lp['top10_hits'] ?? 0)) * 2.0; if ($__lq > $__lockBestScore) { $__lockBestScore = $__lq; $__lockBaseRunId = (int)($__lp['__saved_id'] ?? $__lp['run_id'] ?? 0); } }
    if ($__lockBaseRunId <= 0 && !empty($__lockRows[0]['id'])) { $__lockBaseRunId = (int)$__lockRows[0]['id']; }
    $__lockBaseSettings = array(); if ($__lockBaseRunId > 0 && !empty($__lockSavedById[$__lockBaseRunId])) { $__lockBaseSettings = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($__lockSavedById[$__lockBaseRunId]); }
    if (empty($__lockBaseSettings)) { $app->enqueueMessage('Current Locked Settings were not saved because the base settings record could not be confirmed.', 'error'); $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString()); return; }
    $__lockPrecision = mleAdvisoryComputePrecisionLockData($__lockPerf, $__lockSavedById, $__lockTopMethod['method']);
    $__lockDates = array(); foreach ($__lockPerf as $__ld) { $__lockDates[] = (string)($__ld['draw_date'] ?? ''); }
    $__lockSummary = array('total_runs'=>count($__lockRows),'scored_draws'=>count(array_unique(array_filter($__lockDates))),'true_cluster_support'=>(int)($__lockEvidence['true_cluster_support'] ?? 0),'true_cluster_draw_support'=>(int)($__lockEvidence['true_cluster_draw_support'] ?? 0));
    $__lockPrecision['true_cluster_support'] = (int)$__lockSummary['true_cluster_support'];
    $__lockPrecision['true_cluster_draw_support'] = (int)$__lockSummary['true_cluster_draw_support'];
    $__lockSettingsAdv = mleAdvisoryComputeSettingsAdvisorFromRows($__lockPerf, $__lockSavedById, $__lockTopMethod['method']);
    $__lockBatch = mleAdvisoryBuildRecommendedSkaiBatchTest($__lockPrecision, $__lockSettingsAdv, $__lockSummary, $__lockComputed);
    $__lockLevel = mleAdvisoryComputeRecommendationLevel($__lockPrecision, $__lockSummary, $__lockTopMethod, $__lockSettingsAdv, $__lockBatch);
    $__lockProgress = mleAdvisoryComputePrecisionProgress($__lockPrecision, $__lockSummary, $__lockLevel, $__lockSettingsAdv, $__lockBatch);
    $__lockLotteryName = (string)($__lockActive[$__lockLotteryId]['lottery_name'] ?? '');
    $__lockId = mleAdvisoryPersistCurrentLockedSettings($db, $workspaceUserId, $__lockLotteryId, $__lockLotteryName, $__lockComputed, $__lockBaseSettings, $__lockBaseRunId, $__lockPrecision, $__lockLevel, $__lockProgress, $__lockEvidence, (string)($__lockTopMethod['method'] ?? 'skai'), (string)($__lockTopMethod['method'] ?? 'skai'));
    if ($__lockId > 0) { $app->enqueueMessage('Current Locked Settings saved. LottoExpert can use this baseline for future SKAI batches for this lottery.', 'message'); }
    else { $app->enqueueMessage('Current Locked Settings were not saved because LottoExpert could not confirm a repeated settings baseline.', 'error'); }
    $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
    return;
}

// ------------------------------------------------------------------
// create_skai_batch (user-facing: Create Recommended SKAI Batch Test)
// ------------------------------------------------------------------
if ($__mleAction === 'create_skai_batch') {
    if ($app->input->getMethod() !== 'POST' || !\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Session expired. Please refresh and try again.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Demo mode: Cannot create a SKAI batch test.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    if ($workspaceUserId <= 0) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Please log in to create a SKAI batch test.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    // Only accept lottery_id from the browser. Everything else is rebuilt server-side.
    $__batchLotteryId = $app->input->getInt('lottery_id', 0);
    if ($__batchLotteryId <= 0) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch test was not created because LottoExpert could not identify the lottery.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    // Verify ownership: user must have active saved evidence for this lottery.
    $__batchActive = mleAdvisoryBuildActiveSavedEvidence($db, $workspaceUserId);
    if (empty($__batchActive[$__batchLotteryId])) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch test was not created because this lottery does not have enough saved scored evidence yet.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    // Rebuild the batch recommendation entirely server-side from saved evidence.
    // When the user comes from Recommended Next Settings Run, force a practical
    // 9-run SKAI batch even if the stricter Precision Focus batch gate is not ready.
    $__batchForceNextSettings = ((int)$app->input->getInt('mle_force_next_batch', 0) === 1);
    $__batchRows = is_array($__batchActive[$__batchLotteryId]['rows'] ?? null) ? $__batchActive[$__batchLotteryId]['rows'] : array();
    $__batchSavedById = array();
    foreach ($__batchRows as $r) { $__batchSavedById[(int)($r['id'] ?? 0)] = $r; }
    $__batchPerf = mleAdvisoryLoadMatchedPerformance($db, $workspaceUserId, $__batchLotteryId, $__batchRows);
    $__batchLeaderboard = mleAdvisoryComputeMethodLeaderboardFromRows($__batchPerf);
    $__batchMethods = is_array($__batchLeaderboard['methods'] ?? null) ? $__batchLeaderboard['methods'] : array();
    if (empty($__batchMethods)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch test was not created because this lottery does not have enough saved scored evidence yet.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    $__batchTopMethod = $__batchMethods[0];
    $__batchSettingsAdv = mleAdvisoryComputeSettingsAdvisorFromRows($__batchPerf, $__batchSavedById, $__batchTopMethod['method']);
    $__batchPrecisionLock = mleAdvisoryComputePrecisionLockData($__batchPerf, $__batchSavedById, $__batchTopMethod['method']);
    $__batchPerfDates = array();
    foreach ($__batchPerf as $__bp) { $__batchPerfDates[] = (string)($__bp['draw_date'] ?? ''); }
    $__batchScoredDraws = count(array_unique(array_filter($__batchPerfDates)));
    unset($__batchPerfDates, $__bp);
    $__batchVisual = mleAdvisoryBuildVisualRunRows($__batchRows, $__batchPerf);
    $__batchEvidenceIntel = mleAdvisoryBuildEvidenceIntelligence($__batchVisual, $__batchSavedById, $__batchTopMethod['method']);
    $__batchCurrentLock = (array)($__batchEvidenceIntel['current_locked_settings'] ?? array());
    $__batchPersistedLock = mleAdvisoryLoadCurrentLockedSettings($db, $workspaceUserId, $__batchLotteryId);
    if (!empty($__batchPersistedLock['has_active_lock'])) { $__batchCurrentLock['has_active_lock'] = true; $__batchCurrentLock['persisted_lock_id'] = (int)($__batchPersistedLock['id'] ?? 0); $__batchCurrentLock['settings_array'] = is_array($__batchPersistedLock['settings_array'] ?? null) ? $__batchPersistedLock['settings_array'] : array(); $__batchCurrentLock['status'] = (string)($__batchPersistedLock['locked_status'] ?? ''); }
    $__batchSummary = array('total_runs' => count($__batchRows), 'scored_draws' => $__batchScoredDraws, 'true_cluster_support' => (int)($__batchEvidenceIntel['true_cluster_support'] ?? 0), 'true_cluster_draw_support' => (int)($__batchEvidenceIntel['true_cluster_draw_support'] ?? 0));
    $__batchPrecisionLock['true_cluster_support'] = (int)$__batchSummary['true_cluster_support'];
    $__batchPrecisionLock['true_cluster_draw_support'] = (int)$__batchSummary['true_cluster_draw_support'];
    $__batchPlan = mleAdvisoryBuildRecommendedSkaiBatchTest($__batchPrecisionLock, $__batchSettingsAdv, $__batchSummary, $__batchCurrentLock);
    if (empty($__batchPlan['has_recommendation']) && $__batchForceNextSettings) {
        $__batchPlan = mleAdvisoryBuildForcedNextSettingsSkaiBatchPlan($__batchSettingsAdv, $__batchPrecisionLock, $__batchSummary);
    }
    if (empty($__batchPlan['has_recommendation'])) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch test was not created because this lottery does not have enough saved scored evidence yet.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    $__batchRunLabels = is_array($__batchPlan['batch_runs'] ?? null) ? $__batchPlan['batch_runs'] : array();
    $__batchRunValues = is_array($__batchPlan['batch_run_values'] ?? null) ? $__batchPlan['batch_run_values'] : array();
    if (count($__batchRunLabels) !== 9 || count($__batchRunValues) !== 9) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch test was not created because LottoExpert could not identify one clean setting to test.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    $__batchValueSeen = array();
    for ($__bvi = 1; $__bvi < count($__batchRunValues); $__bvi++) { $__bvk = trim((string)$__batchRunValues[$__bvi]); if ($__bvk === '' || isset($__batchValueSeen[$__bvk])) { $app->enqueueMessage('Batch test was not created because LottoExpert could not create 8 useful distinct test values from the current evidence.', 'error'); $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString()); return; } $__batchValueSeen[$__bvk] = true; }
    unset($__bvi, $__bvk, $__batchValueSeen);
    // Find the strongest base run to copy full settings from.
    $__batchBaseRunId = 0;
    $__batchBestScore = -PHP_FLOAT_MAX;
    foreach ($__batchPerf as $__bp) {
        $__bq = (float)($__bp['weighted_quality_score'] ?? 0) + ((int)($__bp['top10_hits'] ?? 0)) * 2.0;
        if ($__bq > $__batchBestScore) { $__batchBestScore = $__bq; $__batchBaseRunId = (int)($__bp['__saved_id'] ?? $__bp['run_id'] ?? 0); }
    }
    unset($__bp, $__bq);
    if ($__batchBaseRunId <= 0 && !empty($__batchRows[0]['id'])) { $__batchBaseRunId = (int)$__batchRows[0]['id']; }
    $__batchBaseSettings = array();
    if ($__batchBaseRunId > 0 && !empty($__batchSavedById[$__batchBaseRunId])) {
        $__batchBaseSettings = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($__batchSavedById[$__batchBaseRunId]);
    }
    if (!empty($__batchCurrentLock['has_active_lock']) && !empty($__batchCurrentLock['settings_array']) && is_array($__batchCurrentLock['settings_array'])) {
        $__batchBaseSettings = $__batchCurrentLock['settings_array'];
        $__batchBaseRunId = (int)($__batchPersistedLock['base_settings_id'] ?? $__batchPersistedLock['base_run_id'] ?? $__batchBaseRunId);
    }
    if (empty($__batchBaseSettings)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch test was not created because the base settings record could not be confirmed.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    // Ensure batch tables exist before writing.
    mylottoexpertEnsureSkaiBackTestTables($db);
    $__batchLotteryName = (string)($__batchActive[$__batchLotteryId]['lottery_name'] ?? '');
    $__batchTestVar = (string)($__batchPlan['test_variable'] ?? '');
    $__batchSettingKey = (string)($__batchPlan['setting_key'] ?? '');
    $__batchTypeLabel = (string)($__batchPlan['batch_type'] ?? ($__batchForceNextSettings ? 'Next Settings 9-Run Batch' : 'Precision Focus Batch'));
    $__batchRangeMinForSave = array_key_exists('range_min', $__batchPlan) ? (float)$__batchPlan['range_min'] : (float)($__batchPrecisionLock['range_min'] ?? 0);
    $__batchRangeMaxForSave = array_key_exists('range_max', $__batchPlan) ? (float)$__batchPlan['range_max'] : (float)($__batchPrecisionLock['range_max'] ?? 100);
    $__batchRecommendedForSave = (string)($__batchPlan['recommended_value'] ?? ($__batchSettingsAdv['suggested_value'] ?? ''));
    $__batchNow = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
    try {
        $__batchPrefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $__batchHeaderTable = $__batchPrefix . 'mle_skai_batch_header';
        $__batchRunTable = $__batchPrefix . 'mle_skai_batch_run';
        $__batchLevelData = mleAdvisoryComputeRecommendationLevel($__batchPrecisionLock, $__batchSummary, $__batchTopMethod, $__batchSettingsAdv, $__batchPlan);
        $__batchProgressData = mleAdvisoryComputePrecisionProgress($__batchPrecisionLock, $__batchSummary, $__batchLevelData, $__batchSettingsAdv, $__batchPlan);
        $__batchEvidenceSummary = (string)($__batchPlan['evidence_line'] ?? '');
        $__batchNamePrefix = $__batchForceNextSettings ? 'Next Settings 9-Run SKAI Batch - ' : 'SKAI Batch Test - ';
        if ($__batchTypeLabel === 'History Horizon Discovery Batch') {
            $__batchNamePrefix = 'History Horizon SKAI Batch - ';
        } elseif ($__batchTypeLabel === 'Precision Focus Batch') {
            $__batchNamePrefix = 'Precision Focus SKAI Batch - ';
        }
        $db->setQuery(
            "INSERT INTO `{$__batchHeaderTable}` (`user_id`,`lottery_id`,`lottery_name`,`batch_name`,`batch_source`,`batch_type`,`source_page`,`status`,`test_variable`,`range_min`,`range_max`,`recommended_value`,`precision_lock_stage`,`recommendation_level`,`precision_progress_level`,`evidence_summary`,`base_settings_id`,`locked_settings_id`,`created_at`) VALUES ("
            . (int)$workspaceUserId . ','
            . (int)$__batchLotteryId . ','
            . $db->quote($__batchLotteryName) . ','
            . $db->quote($__batchNamePrefix . $__batchLotteryName) . ','
            . $db->quote('advisory') . ','
            . $db->quote($__batchTypeLabel) . ','
            . $db->quote('MyLottoExpert') . ','
            . $db->quote('pending') . ','
            . $db->quote($__batchTestVar) . ','
            . $db->quote((string)round($__batchRangeMinForSave, 4)) . ','
            . $db->quote((string)round($__batchRangeMaxForSave, 4)) . ','
            . $db->quote($__batchRecommendedForSave) . ','
            . $db->quote((string)($__batchPrecisionLock['stage'] ?? '')) . ','
            . $db->quote((string)($__batchLevelData['label'] ?? '')) . ','
            . $db->quote((string)($__batchProgressData['level_name'] ?? '')) . ','
            . $db->quote($__batchEvidenceSummary) . ','
            . (int)$__batchBaseRunId . ','
            . (int)($__batchCurrentLock['persisted_lock_id'] ?? 0) . ','
            . $db->quote($__batchNow)
            . ')'
        );
        $db->execute();
        $__batchHeaderId = (int)$db->insertid();
        if ($__batchHeaderId <= 0) { throw new \RuntimeException('Batch header was not saved.'); }
        $__batchSource = (string)($__batchTopMethod['method'] ?? 'skai');
        foreach ($__batchRunLabels as $__batchRunIdx => $__batchRunLabel) {
            $__batchRunOrder = $__batchRunIdx + 1;
            $__batchIsControl = ($__batchRunOrder === 1) ? 1 : 0;
            // Run 1 is the control and keeps base settings unchanged.
            // Runs 2-9 copy the base settings and override only the test variable.
            $__batchRunSettings = $__batchBaseSettings;
            $__batchRunTestValue = '';
            if ($__batchIsControl) {
                $__batchRunTestValue = (string)($__batchSettingsAdv['current_value'] ?? '');
            } else {
                $__batchRunTestValue = isset($__batchRunValues[$__batchRunIdx]) ? (string)$__batchRunValues[$__batchRunIdx] : '';
                if ($__batchSettingKey !== '' && $__batchRunTestValue !== '') {
                    $__batchRunSettings[$__batchSettingKey] = $__batchRunTestValue;
                    $__batchSettingAliases = is_array($__batchPlan['setting_key_aliases'] ?? null) ? $__batchPlan['setting_key_aliases'] : array();
                    foreach ($__batchSettingAliases as $__batchAliasKey) {
                        $__batchAliasKey = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/', '', (string)$__batchAliasKey);
                        if ($__batchAliasKey !== '') {
                            $__batchRunSettings[$__batchAliasKey] = $__batchRunTestValue;
                        }
                    }
                    unset($__batchAliasKey, $__batchSettingAliases);
                }
            }
            $__batchRunSettingsJson = json_encode($__batchRunSettings, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
            $db->setQuery(
                "INSERT INTO `{$__batchRunTable}` (`batch_id`,`user_id`,`lottery_id`,`run_order`,`run_name`,`is_control`,`source`,`full_settings_json`,`test_variable`,`test_value`,`status`,`created_at`) VALUES ("
                . (int)$__batchHeaderId . ','
                . (int)$workspaceUserId . ','
                . (int)$__batchLotteryId . ','
                . (int)$__batchRunOrder . ','
                . $db->quote((string)$__batchRunLabel) . ','
                . (int)$__batchIsControl . ','
                . $db->quote($__batchSource) . ','
                . $db->quote((string)$__batchRunSettingsJson) . ','
                . $db->quote($__batchTestVar) . ','
                . $db->quote($__batchRunTestValue) . ','
                . $db->quote('pending') . ','
                . $db->quote($__batchNow)
                . ')'
            );
            $db->execute();
        }
        unset($__batchRunIdx, $__batchRunLabel, $__batchRunOrder, $__batchIsControl, $__batchRunSettings, $__batchRunTestValue, $__batchRunSettingsJson);
        $__batchOpenSkaiUrl = mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiBatchOpenUrl($db, $__batchLotteryId, $__batchHeaderId, $__batchTypeLabel);
        // [[MLE_SKAI_PRECISION_BATCH_HANDOFF_V10]]
        // Database is the source of truth, but this same-session handoff helps SKAI
        // acknowledge the batch immediately after redirect and gives admins a clean
        // diagnostic breadcrumb if the target page cannot load the batch rows.
        try {
            $app->setUserState('mle.skai.precision_batch.latest', array(
                'batch_id' => (int)$__batchHeaderId,
                'lottery_id' => (int)$__batchLotteryId,
                'lottery_name' => (string)$__batchLotteryName,
                'batch_type' => (string)$__batchTypeLabel,
                'created_at' => time(),
                'open_url' => (string)$__batchOpenSkaiUrl,
            ));
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { /* non-fatal */ }
        $app->enqueueMessage($__batchTypeLabel . ' created. LottoExpert is opening the correct SKAI lottery page now.', 'message');
        $app->redirect($__batchOpenSkaiUrl);
        return;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[MLE Batch] create_skai_batch error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch test was not created because LottoExpert could not identify one clean setting to test.', 'error');
    }
    $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
    return;
}

// ------------------------------------------------------------------
// run_skai_precision_lock_batch (user-facing: Run Batch)
// ------------------------------------------------------------------
if ($__mleAction === 'run_skai_precision_lock_batch') {
    if ($app->input->getMethod() !== 'POST' || !\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Session expired. Please refresh and try again.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run in demo mode.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    if ($workspaceUserId <= 0) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because you must be logged in.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    $batchId = $app->input->post->getInt('batch_id', 0);
    if ($batchId <= 0) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because no batch was selected.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $headerRawTable = $prefix . 'mle_skai_batch_header';
    $runRawTable = $prefix . 'mle_skai_batch_run';
    if (!mylottoexpertTableExistsByRawName($db, $headerRawTable) || !mylottoexpertTableExistsByRawName($db, $runRawTable)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Precision Focus batch tables are not available yet for this account.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    $headerCols = mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__mle_skai_batch_header');
    $runCols = mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__mle_skai_batch_run');
    if (empty($headerCols) || empty($runCols)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because batch tables are not readable.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    try {
        $hq = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select('*')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_header'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$batchId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
        $db->setQuery($hq, 0, 1);
        $header = $db->loadAssoc();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $header = array();
    }
    if (!is_array($header) || empty($header)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because this batch does not belong to your account.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    $headerStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($header['status'] ?? 'pending')));
    if (!in_array($headerStatus, array('pending', 'ready', 'partially_generated', 'failed'), true)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because this batch status is not runnable right now.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    $lotteryId = (int)($header['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
    if ($lotteryId <= 0) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because the lottery could not be found.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    try {
        $lq = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select(array($db->quoteName('lottery_id'), $db->quoteName('game_id'), $db->quoteName('name')))
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId);
        $db->setQuery($lq, 0, 1);
        $lotteryRow = $db->loadAssoc();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $lotteryRow = array();
    }
    if (!is_array($lotteryRow) || empty($lotteryRow)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because the lottery could not be found.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    $runs = mylottoexpertLoadBatchRunsForReview($db, $batchId, $workspaceUserId, $lotteryId);
    if (count($runs) !== 9) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because it does not contain exactly 9 runs.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    $orderSeen = array();
    foreach ($runs as $run) {
        $order = (int)($run['run_order'] ?? 0);
        if ($order < 1 || $order > 9) {
            $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because run order values must be 1 through 9.', 'error');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }
        $orderSeen[$order] = true;
        if ((int)($run['user_id'] ?? 0) !== (int)$workspaceUserId || (int)($run['lottery_id'] ?? 0) !== (int)$lotteryId) {
            $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because one or more runs do not belong to your account.', 'error');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }
        if (!is_array($run['_settings']) || empty($run['_settings'])) {
            $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because one or more runs are missing full settings.', 'error');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }
    }
    for ($o = 1; $o <= 9; $o++) {
        if (!isset($orderSeen[$o])) {
            $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because run order values must be 1 through 9.', 'error');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }
    }

    mylottoexpertEnsureBatchTrackingColumnsOnSavedPredictions($db);
    $savedCols = mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__user_saved_numbers');
    $runUpdatedAt = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
    $generatedCount = 0;
    $skippedCount = 0;
    $failedCount = 0;
    $generatorMissing = false;

    foreach ($runs as $run) {
        $runId = (int)($run['id'] ?? 0);
        $runOrder = (int)($run['run_order'] ?? 0);
        $runStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($run['status'] ?? 'pending')));
        if (in_array($runStatus, array('generated', 'completed'), true)) {
            $skippedCount++;
            continue;
        }

        $alreadyGenerated = false;
        if (in_array('source_batch_run_id', $savedCols, true)) {
            try {
                $dq = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->select('COUNT(*)')
                    ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                    ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('source_batch_id') . ' = ' . (int)$batchId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('source_batch_run_id') . ' = ' . (int)$runId);
                $db->setQuery($dq);
                $alreadyGenerated = ((int)$db->loadResult() > 0);
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $alreadyGenerated = false;
            }
        }
        if ($alreadyGenerated) {
            $skippedCount++;
            continue;
        }

        $settings = is_array($run['_settings']) ? $run['_settings'] : array();
        $predictionPayload = array();
        $generatorNames = array(
            'mylottoexpertGeneratePredictionFromSettings',
            'mylottoexpertRunSkaiPredictionFromSettings',
            'skaiGeneratePredictionFromSettings',
            'skaiRunPredictionFromSettings'
        );
        foreach ($generatorNames as $fn) {
            if (!is_callable($fn)) {
                continue;
            }
            try {
                $tmpPayload = call_user_func($fn, array(
                    'db' => $db,
                    'user_id' => (int)$workspaceUserId,
                    'lottery_id' => (int)$lotteryId,
                    'lottery' => $lotteryRow,
                    'settings' => $settings,
                    'batch_header' => $header,
                    'batch_run' => $run
                ));
                if (is_array($tmpPayload) && !empty($tmpPayload)) {
                    $predictionPayload = $tmpPayload;
                    break;
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $predictionPayload = array();
            }
        }

        if (empty($predictionPayload)) {
            $fallbackMain = array();
            $fallbackExtra = array();
            if (isset($settings['main_numbers'])) {
                $fallbackMain = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv(is_array($settings['main_numbers']) ? implode(',', $settings['main_numbers']) : (string)$settings['main_numbers'], true);
            }
            if (isset($settings['extra_ball_numbers'])) {
                $fallbackExtra = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv(is_array($settings['extra_ball_numbers']) ? implode(',', $settings['extra_ball_numbers']) : (string)$settings['extra_ball_numbers'], true);
            }
            if (!empty($fallbackMain)) {
                $predictionPayload = array('main_numbers' => $fallbackMain, 'extra_ball_numbers' => $fallbackExtra);
            } else {
                $generatorMissing = true;
                $failedCount++;
                if (in_array('status', $runCols, true)) {
                    try {
                        $rq = $db->getQuery(true)
                            ->update($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'))
                            ->set($db->quoteName('status') . " = 'failed'")
                            ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$runId)
                            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
                        if (in_array('updated_at', $runCols, true)) {
                            $rq->set($db->quoteName('updated_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($runUpdatedAt));
                        }
                        if (in_array('error_message', $runCols, true)) {
                            $rq->set($db->quoteName('error_message') . ' = ' . $db->quote('Missing server-side SKAI generation payload.'));
                        }
                        $db->setQuery($rq);
                        $db->execute();
                    } catch (\Throwable $e) { /* non-fatal */ }
                }
                continue;
            }
        }

        $mainNumbers = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv(is_array($predictionPayload['main_numbers'] ?? null) ? implode(',', $predictionPayload['main_numbers']) : (string)($predictionPayload['main_numbers'] ?? ''), true);
        $extraNumbers = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv(is_array($predictionPayload['extra_ball_numbers'] ?? null) ? implode(',', $predictionPayload['extra_ball_numbers']) : (string)($predictionPayload['extra_ball_numbers'] ?? ''), true);
        if (empty($mainNumbers)) {
            $failedCount++;
            continue;
        }

        $drawDateRaw = trim((string)($predictionPayload['target_draw_date'] ?? $predictionPayload['next_draw_date'] ?? date('Y-m-d')));
        $drawTs = strtotime($drawDateRaw);
        $drawDate = $drawTs ? date('Y-m-d', $drawTs) : date('Y-m-d');
        $drawAt = trim((string)($predictionPayload['target_draw_at'] ?? ''));
        $drawSession = mylottoexpertNormalizeTargetSession((string)($predictionPayload['target_draw_session'] ?? ''));
        $family = trim((string)($predictionPayload['target_prediction_family'] ?? 'regular'));
        $ptype = trim((string)($predictionPayload['target_prediction_type'] ?? $family));

        $target = mylottoexpertBuildPredictionTarget(array(
            'game_id' => (string)($lotteryRow['game_id'] ?? ''),
            'lottery_id' => (int)$lotteryId,
            'draw_date' => $drawDate,
            'draw_at' => $drawAt,
            'draw_session' => $drawSession,
            'timezone_id' => 'America/New_York',
            'prediction_family' => $family,
            'prediction_type' => $ptype,
            'pick_size' => count($mainNumbers),
            'extra_count' => count($extraNumbers)
        ));

        $batchMeta = array(
            'batch_id' => (int)$batchId,
            'batch_run_id' => (int)$runId,
            'batch_type' => (string)($header['batch_type'] ?? 'Precision Focus Batch'),
            'batch_run_order' => (int)$runOrder,
            'batch_control_flag' => ((int)($run['is_control'] ?? 0) === 1) ? 1 : 0,
            'test_variable' => (string)($run['test_variable'] ?? ''),
            'test_value' => (string)($run['test_value'] ?? ''),
            'origin_source' => 'mle_precision_lock_batch'
        );
        $settingsWithMeta = is_array($settings) ? $settings : array();
        $settingsWithMeta['_batch_tracking'] = $batchMeta;
        $settingsJson = json_encode($settingsWithMeta, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
        $targetJson = json_decode((string)($target['prediction_target_json'] ?? ''), true);
        if (!is_array($targetJson)) {
            $targetJson = array();
        }
        $targetJson['batch_tracking'] = $batchMeta;

        $insert = array(
            'user_id' => (int)$workspaceUserId,
            'lottery_id' => (int)$lotteryId,
            'next_draw_date' => $drawDate,
            'next_draw_at' => ($target['target_draw_at'] ?? null),
            'draw_session' => ($target['target_draw_session'] ?? null),
            'source' => 'skai_prediction',
            'label' => 'Precision Focus Batch ' . (int)$batchId . ' - Run ' . (int)$runOrder,
            'main_numbers' => implode(',', $mainNumbers),
            'extra_ball_numbers' => implode(',', $extraNumbers),
            'date_saved' => $runUpdatedAt,
            'generated_at' => $runUpdatedAt,
            'run_uuid' => mylottoexpertGenerateRunUuid(),
            'snapshot_run_uuid' => mylottoexpertGenerateRunUuid(),
            'prediction_target_id' => ($target['prediction_target_id'] ?? null),
            'prediction_target_key' => ($target['prediction_target_key'] ?? null),
            'prediction_target_json' => json_encode($targetJson, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES),
            'target_game_id' => ($target['target_game_id'] ?? null),
            'target_lottery_id' => ($target['target_lottery_id'] ?? null),
            'target_draw_date' => ($target['target_draw_date'] ?? null),
            'target_draw_at' => ($target['target_draw_at'] ?? null),
            'target_draw_session' => ($target['target_draw_session'] ?? null),
            'target_timezone_id' => ($target['target_timezone_id'] ?? null),
            'target_prediction_family' => ($target['target_prediction_family'] ?? null),
            'target_prediction_type' => ($target['target_prediction_type'] ?? null),
            'target_pick_size' => ($target['target_pick_size'] ?? null),
            'target_extra_count' => ($target['target_extra_count'] ?? null),
            'save_intent' => 'prediction_archive',
            'origin_source' => 'mle_precision_lock_batch',
            'source_batch_id' => (int)$batchId,
            'source_batch_run_id' => (int)$runId,
            'source_batch_type' => (string)($header['batch_type'] ?? 'Precision Focus Batch'),
            'source_batch_run_order' => (int)$runOrder,
            'source_batch_origin' => 'mle_precision_lock_batch',
            'batch_control_flag' => ((int)($run['is_control'] ?? 0) === 1) ? 1 : 0,
            'settings_json' => $settingsJson
        );
        $cols = array();
        $vals = array();
        foreach ($insert as $col => $val) {
            if (!in_array($col, $savedCols, true)) {
                continue;
            }
            $cols[] = $db->quoteName($col);
            if ($val === null || $val === '') {
                $vals[] = 'NULL';
            } elseif (is_int($val) || is_float($val)) {
                $vals[] = (string)$val;
            } else {
                $vals[] = $db->quote((string)$val);
            }
        }
        if (empty($cols)) {
            $failedCount++;
            continue;
        }

        try {
            $iq = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->insert($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                ->columns($cols)
                ->values(implode(',', $vals));
            $db->setQuery($iq);
            $db->execute();
            $savedPredictionId = (int)$db->insertid();
            $generatedCount++;

            if (in_array('status', $runCols, true)) {
                $rq = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->update($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'))
                    ->set($db->quoteName('status') . " = 'generated'")
                    ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$runId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
                if (in_array('generated_at', $runCols, true)) {
                    $rq->set($db->quoteName('generated_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($runUpdatedAt));
                }
                if (in_array('updated_at', $runCols, true)) {
                    $rq->set($db->quoteName('updated_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($runUpdatedAt));
                }
                if (in_array('generated_prediction_id', $runCols, true)) {
                    $rq->set($db->quoteName('generated_prediction_id') . ' = ' . (int)$savedPredictionId);
                }
                if (in_array('error_message', $runCols, true)) {
                    $rq->set($db->quoteName('error_message') . " = ''");
                }
                $db->setQuery($rq);
                $db->execute();
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $failedCount++;
            if (in_array('status', $runCols, true)) {
                try {
                    $rq = $db->getQuery(true)
                        ->update($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'))
                        ->set($db->quoteName('status') . " = 'failed'")
                        ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$runId)
                        ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
                    if (in_array('error_message', $runCols, true)) {
                        $rq->set($db->quoteName('error_message') . ' = ' . $db->quote('Prediction save failed.'));
                    }
                    $db->setQuery($rq);
                    $db->execute();
                } catch (\Throwable $e2) { /* non-fatal */ }
            }
        }
    }

    $headerNextStatus = 'failed';
    if ($generatedCount === 9 || ($generatedCount > 0 && $failedCount === 0 && ($generatedCount + $skippedCount) >= 9)) {
        $headerNextStatus = 'generated';
    } elseif ($generatedCount > 0 || $skippedCount > 0) {
        $headerNextStatus = 'partially_generated';
    }

    try {
        $hq = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->update($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_header'))
            ->set($db->quoteName('status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($headerNextStatus))
            ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$batchId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
        if (in_array('generated_at', $headerCols, true) && $headerNextStatus !== 'failed') {
            $hq->set($db->quoteName('generated_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($runUpdatedAt));
        }
        if (in_array('updated_at', $headerCols, true)) {
            $hq->set($db->quoteName('updated_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($runUpdatedAt));
        }
        if (in_array('error_message', $headerCols, true) && $failedCount > 0) {
            $hq->set($db->quoteName('error_message') . ' = ' . $db->quote('One or more runs failed.'));
        }
        $db->setQuery($hq);
        $db->execute();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { /* non-fatal */ }

    if ($generatedCount === 9 || ($generatedCount > 0 && $failedCount === 0 && ($generatedCount + $skippedCount) >= 9)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('SKAI generated 9 Precision Focus batch runs from MyLottoExpert.', 'message');
    } elseif ($generatorMissing) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because one or more runs are missing generated numbers from the server-side SKAI generator.', 'error');
    } elseif ($generatedCount > 0) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch run completed with partial results. Generated: ' . (int)$generatedCount . '. Skipped duplicates: ' . (int)$skippedCount . '. Failed: ' . (int)$failedCount . '.', 'warning');
    } else {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because no new predictions were generated.', 'error');
    }
    $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
    return;
}

// ------------------------------------------------------------------
// update_advice_status  (JSON response)
// ------------------------------------------------------------------
if ($__mleAction === 'update_advice_status') {
    $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true);
    if (!\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) { echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid token.')); exit; }
    if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) { echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Demo mode.')); exit; }
    if ($workspaceUserId <= 0) { echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Not logged in.')); exit; }
    $__advRunId = $app->input->getInt('run_id', 0);
    $__advStatus = strtolower(trim($app->input->getString('status', '')));
    if ($__advRunId <= 0) { echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Missing run_id.')); exit; }
    if (!in_array($__advStatus, array('use_in_advice', 'watch', 'retired', 'excluded', ''), true)) { echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid status.')); exit; }
    mleAdvisoryEnsureSchemaColumns($db);
    try {
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->update($db->quoteName($prefix . 'skai_learning_performance'))
            ->set($db->quoteName('advice_status') . ' = ' . ($__advStatus === '' ? 'NULL' : $db->quote($__advStatus)))
            ->where($db->quoteName('id')      . ' = ' . $__advRunId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $workspaceUserId);
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $db->execute();
        echo json_encode(array('ok' => true, 'status' => $__advStatus));
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[MLE Advisory] update_advice_status error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Database error.'));
    }
    exit;
}

// ------------------------------------------------------------------
// apply_evidence_choices (user-facing: Apply Run Selection)
// ------------------------------------------------------------------
if ($__mleAction === 'apply_evidence_choices' || $__mleAction === 'apply_batch_cleanup') {
    if ($app->input->getMethod() !== 'POST' || !\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Session expired. Please refresh and try again.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Demo mode: Cannot apply run selection.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    if ($workspaceUserId <= 0) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Please log in to apply run selection.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    mleAdvisoryEnsureSchemaColumns($db);
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    try {
        $snColsRaw = $db->getTableColumns('#__user_saved_numbers', false);
        $snCols = is_array($snColsRaw) ? array_keys($snColsRaw) : array();
        if (!in_array('advice_status', $snCols, true)) { $db->setQuery('ALTER TABLE `' . $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers` ADD COLUMN `advice_status` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT \'use_in_advice\''); $db->execute(); }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { $snCols = array(); }
    $sets = array(
        'use_in_advice' => array_map('intval', (array)$app->input->post->get('keep_ids', array(), 'ARRAY')),
        'watch' => array_map('intval', (array)$app->input->post->get('watch_ids', array(), 'ARRAY')),
        'retired' => array_map('intval', (array)$app->input->post->get('retire_ids', $app->input->post->get('archive_ids', array(), 'ARRAY'), 'ARRAY'))
    );
    $updated = 0; $keep=0; $watch=0; $retired=0;
    foreach ($sets as $status => $ids) {
        foreach ($ids as $id) {
            $id = (int)$id; if ($id <= 0) { continue; }
            try {
                $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select('*')->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance'))->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $id)->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
                $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1); $perf = $db->loadAssoc(); if (empty($perf)) { continue; }
                $q = $db->getQuery(true)->update($db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance'))->set($db->quoteName('advice_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($status))->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $id)->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
                $db->setQuery($q); $db->execute(); $updated++;
                $savedId = (int)($perf['run_id'] ?? 0);
                if ($savedId > 0) {
                    try { $q2 = $db->getQuery(true)->update($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))->set($db->quoteName('advice_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($status))->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $savedId)->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId); $db->setQuery($q2); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e2) {}
                }
                if ($status === 'use_in_advice') { $keep++; } elseif ($status === 'watch') { $watch++; } else { $retired++; }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        }
    }
    if ($updated > 0) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Run selection applied. Used for future advice: ' . $keep . '. Kept for review: ' . $watch . '. Excluded from Advice: ' . $retired . '. These choices will now shape future recommendations for this lottery.', 'message');
    } else {
        $app->enqueueMessage('No evidence choices were changed. LottoExpert could not match the submitted evidence rows to active saved runs.', 'warning');
    }
    $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
    return;
}

// New Features toggle (persisted in #__user_profiles)
// Stored as '1' (show) / '0' (hide).
// We can safely call helpers before their textual definition (PHP parses file first).
$showNewFeatures = ($workspaceUserId > 0)
    ? (mylottoexpertGetUserPref($db, $workspaceUserId, 'showNewFeatures', '1') === '1')
    : true;
// Allow POST toggle via form
if (!MLE_DEMO_MODE && $app->input->getMethod() === 'POST' && $app->input->post->get('toggle_new_features', '', 'STRING') !== '') {    if (!\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Your session has expired. Please refresh and try again.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        exit;
    }
    $newVal = $app->input->post->get('new_features_enabled', '0', 'STRING') === '1' ? '1' : '0';
    mylottoexpertSetUserPref($db, $workspaceUserId, 'showNewFeatures', $newVal);
    $showNewFeatures = ($newVal === '1');
}
// --------------------------------------------------
// Prediction List: Recency Sort Preference (persisted in #__user_profiles)
// --------------------------------------------------
$predSortPref = ($workspaceUserId > 0)
    ? mylottoexpertGetUserPref($db, $workspaceUserId, 'predSort', 'desc')
    : 'desc'; // 'desc' = newest-to-oldest (default)
$predSortDir  = (strtolower($predSortPref) === 'asc') ? 'ASC' : 'DESC';

// Allow POST change via form
if (!MLE_DEMO_MODE && $app->input->getMethod() === 'POST' && $app->input->post->get('change_sort_dir', '', 'STRING') !== '') {    if (!\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Your session has expired. Please refresh and try again.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        exit;
    }
    $dir = strtolower($app->input->post->get('pred_sort_dir', 'desc', 'STRING'));
    $dir = ($dir === 'asc') ? 'asc' : 'desc';
    mylottoexpertSetUserPref($db, $workspaceUserId, 'predSort', $dir);
    $predSortDir = ($dir === 'asc') ? 'ASC' : 'DESC';
}

// --------------------------------------------------
// Workspace View Mode Preference
// beginner = plain-language guided workspace
// standard = balanced view
// advanced = full analytical workspace
// --------------------------------------------------
$__mleWorkspaceMode = ($workspaceUserId > 0)
    ? strtolower((string) mylottoexpertGetUserPref($db, $workspaceUserId, 'workspaceMode', 'standard'))
    : 'standard';
if (!in_array($__mleWorkspaceMode, array('beginner', 'standard', 'advanced'), true)) {
    $__mleWorkspaceMode = 'standard';
}
if (!MLE_DEMO_MODE && $app->input->getMethod() === 'POST' && $app->input->post->get('change_workspace_mode', '', 'STRING') !== '') {
    if (!\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Your session has expired. Please refresh and try again.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        exit;
    }
$__requestedMode = strtolower(trim((string)$app->input->post->get('workspace_mode', 'standard', 'STRING')));
if (!in_array($__requestedMode, array('beginner', 'standard', 'advanced'), true)) {
    $__requestedMode = 'standard';
}
    mylottoexpertSetUserPref($db, $workspaceUserId, 'workspaceMode', $__requestedMode);
    $__mleWorkspaceMode = $__requestedMode;
    $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
    exit;
}

// --------------------------------------------------
// Handle Prediction Deletion / Template Actions
// IMPORTANT: Only enforce CSRF when THIS page's actions are triggered.
// This avoids breaking unrelated module POSTs that may target this URL.
// --------------------------------------------------

if (!MLE_DEMO_MODE && $app->input->getMethod() === 'POST') {
    // Detect whether this POST is intended for mylottoexpert actions
    $hasDashboardAction =
        ($app->input->post->getInt('delete_set', 0) > 0) ||
        ($app->input->post->get('delete_set_selected', '', 'STRING') !== '') ||
        ($app->input->post->get('delete_all_predictions', '', 'STRING') !== '') ||
        ($app->input->post->get('delete_lottery_predictions', '', 'STRING') !== '') ||
        ($app->input->post->getInt('save_prediction_as_play', 0) > 0) ||
        ($app->input->post->getInt('duplicate_play_entry', 0) > 0) ||
        ($app->input->post->getInt('update_play_entry', 0) > 0) ||
        ($app->input->post->getInt('archive_play_entry', 0) > 0) ||
        ($app->input->post->getInt('delete_play_entry', 0) > 0) ||
        ($app->input->post->getInt('send_play_to_wheel', 0) > 0) ||
        ($app->input->post->getInt('delete_setting_template', 0) > 0) ||
        ($app->input->post->get('save_setting_template', '', 'STRING') !== '') ||
        ($app->input->post->getInt('update_setting_note', 0) > 0) ||
        ($app->input->post->get('toggle_new_features', '', 'STRING') !== '') ||
        ($app->input->post->get('change_sort_dir', '', 'STRING') !== '') ||
        ($app->input->post->get('change_workspace_mode', '', 'STRING') !== '') ||
        ($app->input->post->getInt('save_strategy_set', 0) > 0);

    if ($hasDashboardAction && !\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Your session expired. Please refresh and try again.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        exit;
    }

    $__actionSnCols = array();
    try {
        $__actionSnColsRaw = $db->getTableColumns('#__user_saved_numbers', false);
        $__actionSnCols = is_array($__actionSnColsRaw) ? array_keys($__actionSnColsRaw) : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $__snColsE) {
        $__actionSnCols = array();
    }

    // Delete single prediction (hardened: use Joomla input filtering)
    $id = $app->input->post->getInt('delete_set', 0);
    if ($id > 0) {

        $q = $db->getQuery(true)

            ->delete($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $id)
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $workspaceUserId);
        if (in_array('save_intent', $__actionSnCols, true)) {
            $q->where(
                '(' .
                $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " = 'prediction_archive' OR (" .
                $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " = '' AND " . $db->quoteName('source') . " <> 'strategy_set'))"
            );
        }

        $db->setQuery($q);
        try {
            $db->execute();
            $app->enqueueMessage('Prediction deleted.', 'message');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            error_log('[MLE] Error deleting prediction id=' . $id . ': ' . $e->getMessage());
            $app->enqueueMessage('An error occurred while deleting. Please try again.', 'error');
        }
    }
    // Delete multiple predictions via PRC table checkboxes (comma-separated IDs)
    $__rawSelected = $app->input->post->get('delete_set_selected', '', 'STRING');
    if ($__rawSelected !== '') {
        // intval() cast ensures all values are pure integers; safe to embed directly in SQL.
        $__selectedIds = array_values(array_filter(array_map('intval', explode(',', $__rawSelected))));
        if (!empty($__selectedIds)) {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->delete($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', $__selectedIds) . ')')
                ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $workspaceUserId);
            if (in_array('save_intent', $__actionSnCols, true)) {
                $q->where(
                    '(' .
                    $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " = 'prediction_archive' OR (" .
                    $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " = '' AND " . $db->quoteName('source') . " <> 'strategy_set'))"
                );
            }
            $db->setQuery($q);
            try {
                $db->execute();
                $count = count((array)$__selectedIds);
                $app->enqueueMessage($count . ' prediction' . ($count !== 1 ? 's' : '') . ' deleted.', 'message');
                $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            } catch (Exception $e) {
                error_log('[MLE] Error deleting multiple predictions: ' . $e->getMessage());
                $app->enqueueMessage('An error occurred while deleting. Please try again.', 'error');
            }
        }
    }

    // Delete all predictions (hardened: use Joomla input filtering)
    $doDeleteAll = $app->input->post->get('delete_all_predictions', '', 'STRING') !== '';
    if ($doDeleteAll) {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->delete($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $workspaceUserId);
        if (in_array('save_intent', $__actionSnCols, true)) {
            $q->where(
                '(' .
                $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " = 'prediction_archive' OR (" .
                $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " = '' AND " . $db->quoteName('source') . " <> 'strategy_set'))"
            );
        }

        $db->setQuery($q);
        try {
            $db->execute();
            $app->enqueueMessage('All predictions deleted.', 'message');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            error_log('[MLE] Error deleting all predictions for user=' . $workspaceUserId . ': ' . $e->getMessage());
            $app->enqueueMessage('An error occurred while deleting. Please try again.', 'error');
        }
    }

// Delete all predictions for a single canonical target draw (group delete) - hardened input
$doGroupDelete          = $app->input->post->get('delete_lottery_predictions', '', 'STRING') !== '';
$lotteryId              = $app->input->post->getInt('lottery_id', 0);
$drawDateRaw            = $app->input->post->getString('draw_date', '');
$predictionTargetIdPost = trim($app->input->post->getString('prediction_target_id', ''));
$targetDrawSessionPost  = mylottoexpertNormalizeTargetSession($app->input->post->getString('target_draw_session', ''));
$targetDrawAtPost       = trim($app->input->post->getString('target_draw_at', ''));
if ($doGroupDelete && ($predictionTargetIdPost !== '' || ($lotteryId && $drawDateRaw !== ''))) {
    $drawDate = '';
    if ($drawDateRaw !== '') {
        $drawDateTs = strtotime($drawDateRaw);
        $drawDate   = $drawDateTs !== false ? date('Y-m-d', $drawDateTs) : '';
    }

    // [FIX-DELETE-COLS] $__snCols is defined much later in this file (at the page-render phase).
    // Fetch column names locally here so the delete handler knows which optional columns exist,
    // regardless of where in the page lifecycle this POST fires.
    $__delSnCols = array();
    try {
        $__delSnColsRaw = $db->getTableColumns('#__user_saved_numbers', false);
        $__delSnCols = is_array($__delSnColsRaw) ? array_keys($__delSnColsRaw) : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $__delE) { $__delSnCols = array(); }

    // Helper: build the draw-date WHERE fragment using target_draw_date (COALESCE) when the
    // column exists, or next_draw_date as the sole fallback.  Reused in both branches below.
    $__buildDateCond = function ($date) use ($db, $__delSnCols) {
        if (in_array('target_draw_date', $__delSnCols, true)) {
            return 'DATE(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('target_draw_date') . ',' . $db->quoteName('next_draw_date') . ')) = ' . $db->quote($date);
        }
        return 'DATE(' . $db->quoteName('next_draw_date') . ') = ' . $db->quote($date);
    };

    $q = $db->getQuery(true)
        ->delete($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
        ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $workspaceUserId);
    if (in_array('save_intent', $__actionSnCols, true)) {
        $q->where(
            '(' .
            $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " = 'prediction_archive' OR (" .
            $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " = '' AND " . $db->quoteName('source') . " <> 'strategy_set'))"
        );
    }

    // [FIX-DELETE-LEGACY] When prediction_target_id is available (new rows), use it directly.
    // Older rows may have the column present but empty because they were saved before the
    // target-identity system was introduced. To delete both old and new rows reliably we
    // combine: (prediction_target_id = X  OR  (lottery_id = Y AND date = Z)).
    // The OR ensures legacy rows without a populated prediction_target_id are also removed.
    $hasPtidCol = in_array('prediction_target_id', $__delSnCols, true);
    if ($predictionTargetIdPost !== '' && $hasPtidCol && $lotteryId && $drawDate !== '') {
        $q->where(
            '(' .
            $db->quoteName('prediction_target_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($predictionTargetIdPost) .
            ' OR (' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId . ' AND ' . $__buildDateCond($drawDate) . ')' .
            ')'
        );
    } elseif ($predictionTargetIdPost !== '' && $hasPtidCol) {
        $q->where($db->quoteName('prediction_target_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($predictionTargetIdPost));
    } else {
        $q->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId);
        if ($drawDate !== '') {
            $q->where($__buildDateCond($drawDate));
        }
        if ($targetDrawSessionPost !== '' && in_array('target_draw_session', $__delSnCols, true)) {
            $q->where('LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('target_draw_session') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('draw_session') . '))) = ' . $db->quote($targetDrawSessionPost));
        }
        if ($targetDrawAtPost !== '' && in_array('target_draw_at', $__delSnCols, true)) {
            $q->where('COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('target_draw_at') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('next_draw_at') . ') = ' . $db->quote($targetDrawAtPost));
        }
    }

    $db->setQuery($q);
    try {
        $db->execute();
        $app->enqueueMessage('Deleted all predictions for this draw.', 'message');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
    } catch (Exception $e) {
        error_log('[MLE] Error deleting prediction group for user=' . $workspaceUserId . ': ' . $e->getMessage());
        $app->enqueueMessage('An error occurred while deleting. Please try again.', 'error');
    }
}

// Save prediction as Numbers to Play
$__savePredictionAsPlay = $app->input->post->getInt('save_prediction_as_play', 0);
if ($__savePredictionAsPlay > 0) {
    $__predictionSetId = $app->input->post->getInt('prediction_set_id', 0);
    if ($__predictionSetId > 0) {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select('*')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $__predictionSetId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $workspaceUserId);
        $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1);
        $__srcRow = (array)$db->loadAssoc();

        if (!empty($__srcRow)) {
            $__srcMain = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($__srcRow['main_numbers'] ?? '', true);
            if (!empty($__srcMain)) {
                $__playInsert = $__srcRow;
                unset($__playInsert['id']);
                $__playInsert['source'] = 'strategy_set';
                $__playInsert['date_saved'] = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
                $__playInsert['generated_at'] = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
                $__playInsert['label'] = trim((string)($__srcRow['label'] ?? '')) !== ''
                    ? (trim((string)$__srcRow['label']) . ' - Play')
                    : ('Play Set - ' . date('Y-m-d H:i'));
                $__playInsert['save_intent'] = 'play_set';
                $__playInsert['origin_source'] = 'skai_prediction';
                $__playInsert['play_status'] = 'ready';
                $__playInsert['user_editable'] = 1;
                $__playInsert['wheel_export_count'] = 0;
                $__playInsert['wheel_exported_at'] = null;
                $__playInsert['is_favorite_play'] = 0;
                $__playInsert['play_notes'] = null;

                $__cols = array();
                $__vals = array();
                foreach ($__playInsert as $__col => $__val) {
                    if (!empty($__actionSnCols) && !in_array($__col, $__actionSnCols, true)) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    $__cols[] = $db->quoteName($__col);
                    if ($__val === null || $__val === '') {
                        $__vals[] = 'NULL';
                    } elseif (is_int($__val) || is_float($__val)) {
                        $__vals[] = (string)$__val;
                    } else {
                        $__vals[] = $db->quote((string)$__val);
                    }
                }

                if (!empty($__cols)) {
                    $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                        ->insert($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                        ->columns($__cols)
                        ->values(implode(',', $__vals));
                    $db->setQuery($q);
                    try {
                        $db->execute();
                        $app->enqueueMessage('Saved as play set in Numbers to Play.', 'message');
                    } catch (Exception $__spE) {
                        error_log('[MLE] Failed Save as Play for row=' . $__predictionSetId . ': ' . $__spE->getMessage());
                        $app->enqueueMessage('Could not save this play set right now.', 'error');
                    }
                }
            } else {
                $app->enqueueMessage('This prediction has no numbers to save as a play set.', 'warning');
            }
        }
    }
    $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
    exit;
}

// Update play set label/notes
$__updatePlayEntry = $app->input->post->getInt('update_play_entry', 0);
if ($__updatePlayEntry > 0) {
    $__playId = $app->input->post->getInt('play_set_id', 0);
    $__newLabel = substr(trim($app->input->post->getString('play_label', '')), 0, 80);
    $__newNotes = substr(trim($app->input->post->getString('play_notes', '')), 0, 1000);
    if ($__playId > 0 && $__newLabel !== '') {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->update($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
            ->set($db->quoteName('label') . ' = ' . $db->quote($__newLabel))
            ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $__playId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $workspaceUserId);
        if (in_array('play_notes', $__actionSnCols, true)) {
            $q->set($db->quoteName('play_notes') . ' = ' . ($__newNotes !== '' ? $db->quote($__newNotes) : 'NULL'));
        }
        $db->setQuery($q);
        try {
            $db->execute();
            $app->enqueueMessage('Play set updated.', 'message');
        } catch (Exception $__upe) {
            error_log('[MLE] update_play_entry failed: ' . $__upe->getMessage());
            $app->enqueueMessage('Could not update this play set right now.', 'error');
        }
    }
    $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
    exit;
}

// Duplicate play entry
$__duplicatePlayEntry = $app->input->post->getInt('duplicate_play_entry', 0);
if ($__duplicatePlayEntry > 0) {
    $__playId = $app->input->post->getInt('play_set_id', 0);
    if ($__playId > 0) {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select('*')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $__playId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $workspaceUserId);
        if (in_array('save_intent', $__actionSnCols, true)) {
            $q->where(
                '(' . $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " IN ('play_set','custom_play','wheel_candidate')" .
                ' OR (' . $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " = '' AND " . $db->quoteName('source') . " = 'strategy_set')" .
                ')'
            );
        }
        $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1);
        $__dupRow = (array)$db->loadAssoc();
        if (!empty($__dupRow)) {
            unset($__dupRow['id']);
            $__dupRow['label'] = substr(trim((string)($__dupRow['label'] ?? '')) . ' (Copy)', 0, 80);
            $__dupRow['date_saved'] = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
            $__dupRow['generated_at'] = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
            if (in_array('wheel_export_count', $__actionSnCols, true)) { $__dupRow['wheel_export_count'] = 0; }
            if (in_array('wheel_exported_at', $__actionSnCols, true)) { $__dupRow['wheel_exported_at'] = null; }

            $__cols = array();
            $__vals = array();
            foreach ($__dupRow as $__col => $__val) {
                if (!empty($__actionSnCols) && !in_array($__col, $__actionSnCols, true)) {
                    continue;
                }
                $__cols[] = $db->quoteName($__col);
                if ($__val === null || $__val === '') {
                    $__vals[] = 'NULL';
                } elseif (is_int($__val) || is_float($__val)) {
                    $__vals[] = (string)$__val;
                } else {
                    $__vals[] = $db->quote((string)$__val);
                }
            }

            if (!empty($__cols)) {
                $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->insert($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                    ->columns($__cols)
                    ->values(implode(',', $__vals));
                $db->setQuery($q);
                try {
                    $db->execute();
                    $app->enqueueMessage('Play set duplicated.', 'message');
                } catch (Exception $__dpe) {
                    error_log('[MLE] duplicate_play_entry failed: ' . $__dpe->getMessage());
                    $app->enqueueMessage('Could not duplicate this play set right now.', 'error');
                }
            }
        }
    }
    $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
    exit;
}

// Archive play entry
$__archivePlayEntry = $app->input->post->getInt('archive_play_entry', 0);
if ($__archivePlayEntry > 0) {
    $__playId = $app->input->post->getInt('play_set_id', 0);
    if ($__playId > 0 && in_array('play_status', $__actionSnCols, true)) {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->update($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
            ->set($db->quoteName('play_status') . " = 'archived'")
            ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $__playId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $workspaceUserId);
        if (in_array('save_intent', $__actionSnCols, true)) {
            $q->where($db->quoteName('save_intent') . " IN ('play_set','custom_play','wheel_candidate')");
        }
        $db->setQuery($q);
        try {
            $db->execute();
