                  <?php
                    // [[MLE_SKAI_PRECISION_BRIDGE]] Client-side launch payload.
                    // MyLottoExpert creates the controlled 9-run plan; SKAI owns the visible
                    // progress runner and auto-save workflow. The button stores this batch
                    // in localStorage/sessionStorage and opens SKAI with mle_skai_batch=1.
                    $__qGameIdForSkai = '';
                    try {
                        $__gidQ = $db->getQuery(true)
                            ->select($db->quoteName('game_id'))
                            ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries'))
                            ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$__advLid);
                        $db->setQuery($__gidQ, 0, 1);
                        $__qGameIdForSkai = (string)$db->loadResult();
                    } catch (\Throwable $__gidEx) { $__qGameIdForSkai = ''; }
                    if (trim($__qGameIdForSkai) === '') { $__qGameIdForSkai = (string)$__advLid; }

                    $__qBridgeRuns = array();
                    foreach ((array)$__qRuns as $__qBridgeRun) {
                        if (!is_array($__qBridgeRun)) { continue; }
                        $__qBridgeSettings = is_array($__qBridgeRun['_settings'] ?? null) ? $__qBridgeRun['_settings'] : array();
                        $__qBridgeProfile = strtolower(trim((string)($__qBridgeSettings['profile'] ?? $__qBridgeSettings['risk_profile'] ?? $__qBridgeSettings['training_style'] ?? 'balanced')));
                        if (!in_array($__qBridgeProfile, array('balanced','explorative','conservative'), true)) { $__qBridgeProfile = 'balanced'; }
                        $__qBridgeStrategy = strtolower(trim((string)($__qBridgeSettings['strategy'] ?? $__qBridgeSettings['skai_mode_method'] ?? 'hybrid')));
                        if (in_array($__qBridgeStrategy, array('ai-forward','ai_forward'), true)) { $__qBridgeStrategy = 'ai'; }
                        if (in_array($__qBridgeStrategy, array('skip-pattern','skip_pattern','skip_pattern_boost'), true)) { $__qBridgeStrategy = 'skip'; }
                        if (!in_array($__qBridgeStrategy, array('ai','hybrid','skip'), true)) { $__qBridgeStrategy = 'hybrid'; }
                        $__qBridgeRuns[] = array(
                            'batch_run_id' => (int)($__qBridgeRun['id'] ?? 0),
                            'run_order' => (int)($__qBridgeRun['run_order'] ?? 0),
                            'label' => (string)($__qBridgeRun['run_name'] ?? ('Precision Focus Run ' . (int)($__qBridgeRun['run_order'] ?? 0))),
                            'profile' => $__qBridgeProfile,
                            'strategy' => $__qBridgeStrategy,
                            'is_control' => (int)($__qBridgeRun['is_control'] ?? 0),
                            'test_variable' => (string)($__qBridgeRun['test_variable'] ?? ''),
                            'test_value' => (string)($__qBridgeRun['test_value'] ?? ''),
                            'settings' => $__qBridgeSettings,
                        );
                    }
                    $__qBridgePayload = array(
                        'schema' => 'mle_precision_lock_batch_v1',
                        'source' => 'mylottoexpert_precision_lock',
                        'created_at' => time(),
                        'batch_id' => (int)$__qBatchId,
                        'lottery_id' => (int)$__advLid,
                        'game_id' => (string)$__qGameIdForSkai,
                        'lottery_name' => (string)$__qLotteryName,
                        'batch_type' => (string)($__qBatch['batch_type'] ?? 'Precision Focus Batch'),
                        'test_variable' => (string)($__qBatch['test_variable'] ?? ''),
                        'range_min' => (string)($__qBatch['range_min'] ?? ''),
                        'range_max' => (string)($__qBatch['range_max'] ?? ''),
                        'recommended_value' => (string)($__qBatch['recommended_value'] ?? ''),
                        'runs' => $__qBridgeRuns,
                    );
                    $__qBridgePayloadJson = htmlspecialchars(json_encode($__qBridgePayload, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
                    $__qSkaiUrl = mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiBatchOpenUrl($db, (int)$__advLid, (int)$__qBatchId);
                  ?>

                <?php endif; ?>

    <section class="mle-visual-comparison" id="<?php echo $__advVisualSectionId; ?>">
      <div class="mle-section-headline">
        <div><h4>Visual Run Comparison</h4><p>Best runs are shown first.</p></div>
        <button type="button" class="mle-section-toggle" data-mle-primary-section-toggle="1" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="<?php echo $__advVisualBodyId; ?>"><span>Hide Visual Run Comparison</span></button>

      <div id="<?php echo $__advVisualBodyId; ?>" class="mle-section-body" data-mle-primary-section-body="1" style="display:block" aria-hidden="false">
        <?php
          $__renderVisualRows = function(array $__rows, $__emptyText) use ($__advLid) {
            if (empty($__rows)) { echo '<div class="mle-visual-empty">' . htmlspecialchars($__emptyText, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</div>'; return; }
            echo '<div class="mle-visual-table">';
            foreach ($__rows as $__vr) {
              $__date = htmlspecialchars((string)($__vr['draw_date'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
              $__method = htmlspecialchars((string)($__vr['method_label'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
              $__label = htmlspecialchars((string)($__vr['label'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
              $__hits = (int)($__vr['main_hits'] ?? 0); $__total = (int)($__vr['total_hits'] ?? 0); $__perfId = (int)($__vr['perf_id'] ?? 0); $__savedId = (int)($__vr['saved_id'] ?? 0);
              $__bestClass = !empty($__vr['is_best_overall']) ? ' mle-visual-row--best' : '';
              echo '<div class="mle-visual-row' . $__bestClass . '">';
              echo '<div class="mle-visual-row__meta"><strong>' . ($__date !== '' ? $__date : 'Upcoming') . '</strong>' . (!empty($__vr['is_best_overall']) ? '<em class="mle-best-run-chip">Best run so far</em>' : '') . '<span>' . $__method . '</span><small>' . $__label . '</small></div>';
              echo '<div class="mle-visual-row__balls"><span class="mle-visual-label">Your numbers</span>' . mleAdvisoryRenderVisualRunNumbersHtml($__vr, false) . '</div>';
              $__hasActualBalls = !empty($__vr['actual']) || !empty($__vr['actual_extra']);
              echo '<div class="mle-visual-row__balls"><span class="mle-visual-label">Actual draw</span>' . ($__hasActualBalls ? mleAdvisoryRenderVisualRunNumbersHtml($__vr, true) : '<span class="mle-visual-upcoming">Upcoming</span>') . '</div>';
              $__top20 = (int)($__vr['top20_hits'] ?? 0); $__top10 = (int)($__vr['top10_hits'] ?? 0); $__extraHits = (int)($__vr['extra_hits'] ?? 0);
              echo '<div class="mle-visual-row__result"><strong>' . $__total . '</strong><span>Total hits</span><small>Main hits: ' . $__hits . '</small><small>Extra hits: ' . $__extraHits . '</small><small>Top 20: ' . $__top20 . ' | Top 10: ' . $__top10 . '</small></div>';
              echo '<div class="mle-visual-row__actions">';
              if (!MLE_DEMO_MODE && $__perfId > 0) {
                foreach (array('keep_ids[]'=>'Use for Future Advice','watch_ids[]'=>'Keep for Review','retire_ids[]'=>'Exclude from Advice') as $__field=>$__labelBtn) {
                  echo '<form method="post" class="mle-inline-action"><input type="hidden" name="mle_action" value="apply_evidence_choices"><input type="hidden" name="' . $__field . '" value="' . $__perfId . '">' . \Joomla\CMS\HTML\HTMLHelper::_('form.token') . '<button type="submit">' . htmlspecialchars($__labelBtn, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</button></form>';
                }
              }
              if (!MLE_DEMO_MODE && $__savedId > 0) {
                echo '<form method="post" class="mle-inline-action mle-inline-action--delete"><input type="hidden" name="delete_set" value="' . $__savedId . '">' . \Joomla\CMS\HTML\HTMLHelper::_('form.token') . '<button type="submit">Delete run</button></form>';
              } elseif (MLE_DEMO_MODE) { echo '<span class="mle-visual-disabled">Run actions disabled in demo mode</span>'; }
              echo '</div></div>';
            }
            echo '</div>';
          };
        ?>
        <div class="mle-visual-group"><h5>Best Completed Runs</h5><?php $__renderVisualRows((array)($__advVisual['recent'] ?? array()), 'No completed scored runs yet.'); ?></div>
        <div class="mle-visual-group mle-visual-group--collapsed">
          <button type="button" class="mle-section-toggle" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="<?php echo $__advOlderBodyId; ?>"><span>Show More Completed Runs</span></button>
          <div id="<?php echo $__advOlderBodyId; ?>" class="mle-section-body" style="display:none" aria-hidden="true"><?php $__renderVisualRows((array)($__advVisual['older'] ?? array()), 'No older completed runs yet.'); ?></div>
        </div>
        <div class="mle-visual-group mle-visual-group--collapsed">
          <button type="button" class="mle-section-toggle" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="<?php echo $__advUpcomingBodyId; ?>"><span>Show Upcoming Saved Runs</span></button>
          <div id="<?php echo $__advUpcomingBodyId; ?>" class="mle-section-body" style="display:none" aria-hidden="true"><?php $__renderVisualRows((array)($__advVisual['upcoming'] ?? array()), 'No upcoming saved runs for this lottery.'); ?></div>

    <?php if (!empty($__advBClean) && !empty($__advBClean['has_recommendation'])):
      $__advClKeep = (array)($__advBClean['keep'] ?? array()); $__advClReview = (array)($__advBClean['review'] ?? array()); $__advClArch = (array)($__advBClean['archive'] ?? array());
      $__rsTotal = count($__advClKeep) + count($__advClReview) + count($__advClArch);
    ?>
    <section class="mle-batch-cleanup" id="<?php echo $__advEvidencePanelId; ?>">
      <div class="mle-batch-cleanup__title">Run Selection for Better Advice</div>

      <!-- Guidance / criteria callout -->
      <details class="mle-rs-guide">
        <summary class="mle-rs-guide__summary">How does LottoExpert decide? What should I do?</summary>
        <div class="mle-rs-guide__body">
          <p><strong>How the groups are determined:</strong> After each draw LottoExpert scores your saved runs against the actual winning numbers. Runs are ranked from most hits to fewest. The top-ranked runs go into <em>Use for Future Advice</em>, mid-ranked runs go to <em>Keep for Review</em>, and the lowest-ranked runs go to <em>Exclude from Advice</em>. Runs without a completed draw date cannot be scored yet and appear as "Upcoming."</p>
          <p><strong>What each group does:</strong></p>
          <ul class="mle-rs-guide__list">
            <li><strong>Use for Future Advice</strong> - These runs will guide the next prediction. LottoExpert weighs their settings and numbers more heavily. Keep 2-3 of your strongest performers here.</li>
            <li><strong>Keep for Review</strong> - These runs are on hold. They will not steer future advice but remain on record so you can revisit them. Useful for runs that had mixed results or not enough draws to judge.</li>
            <li><strong>Exclude from Advice</strong> - These runs are excluded from future predictions. <em>They are not deleted</em> - you can still see them and their history. This is simply a way to tell LottoExpert "ignore this approach for now."</li>
          </ul>
          <?php if ($__rsTotal > 10): ?>
          <p><strong>You have <?php echo $__rsTotal; ?> runs.</strong> With many runs it is best to keep only the top 2-3 for advice. The rest can go to review or archive so LottoExpert focuses on what has actually been working. You can always change a run's status later using the individual buttons below.</p>
          <?php else: ?>
          <p><strong>Tip:</strong> If you disagree with where a run was placed, use the individual buttons on each run to override it. You can move any run to a different group at any time.</p>
          <?php endif; ?>
          <p><strong>Applying vs. leaving as is:</strong> Until you click a button, nothing changes. Clicking <em>Accept</em> on a single run sets only that run's status. Clicking <em>Apply All</em> at the bottom sets every run in one action.</p>
        </div>
      </details>

      <?php
        $__csrfToken = \Joomla\CMS\HTML\HTMLHelper::_('form.token');
        // Helper: render one run card with an inline accept button.
        // $__rsGroup = 'keep' | 'review' | 'archive'
        $__rsRenderRun = function(array $__r, string $__rsGroup) use ($__advLid, $__csrfToken) {
          $__rsLabel   = htmlspecialchars((string)($__r['label']        ?? 'Saved run'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
          $__rsMethod  = htmlspecialchars((string)($__r['method_label'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
          $__rsDate    = htmlspecialchars((string)($__r['draw_date']    ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
          $__rsHits    = (int)($__r['total_hits']  ?? 0);
          $__rsMainH   = (int)($__r['main_hits']   ?? 0);
          $__rsExtraH  = (int)($__r['extra_hits']  ?? 0);
          $__rsDone    = !empty($__r['completed']);
          $__rsPerfId  = (int)($__r['perf_id']     ?? 0);
          $__rsSavedId = (int)($__r['saved_id']    ?? 0);
          $__rsNums    = mleAdvisoryRenderVisualRunNumbersHtml($__r, false);
          $__rsActual  = ($__rsDone && (!empty($__r['actual']) || !empty($__r['actual_extra'])))
            ? mleAdvisoryRenderVisualRunNumbersHtml($__r, true)
            : '';

          echo '<div class="mle-rs-run">';
          // Header: label + hits
          echo '<div class="mle-rs-run__header">';
          echo '<div class="mle-rs-run__info">';
          echo '<strong>' . $__rsLabel . '</strong>';
          echo '<span>' . $__rsMethod . ($__rsDate !== '' ? ' - draw ' . $__rsDate : '') . '</span>';
          if ($__rsDone) {
            $__rsHitDetail = $__rsMainH . ' main' . ($__rsExtraH > 0 ? ' + ' . $__rsExtraH . ' extra' : '');
            echo '<span class="mle-rs-run__hits">' . $__rsHits . ' hit' . ($__rsHits !== 1 ? 's' : '') . ' matched (' . $__rsHitDetail . ')</span>';
          } else {
            echo '<span class="mle-rs-run__hits mle-rs-run__hits--upcoming">Upcoming draw - not yet scored</span>';
          }
          echo '</div>';
          // Per-run action controls (allow moving this run to any status)
          if ($__rsPerfId > 0) {
            $__rsCurrentStatus = ($__rsGroup === 'keep') ? 'keep' : (($__rsGroup === 'review') ? 'review' : 'archive');
            echo '<div class="mle-rs-run__actions-wrap">';
            echo '<div class="mle-rs-run__action-help">Choose where this run should go. You can move it anytime.</div>';
            echo '<div class="mle-rs-run__actions">';
            foreach (array(
              'keep'    => array('field' => 'keep_ids[]',   'label' => 'Use for Future Advice', 'css' => 'mle-rs-accept-btn mle-rs-accept-btn--keep', 'tip' => 'This run helps shape upcoming advice.'),
              'review'  => array('field' => 'watch_ids[]',  'label' => 'Keep for Review',        'css' => 'mle-rs-accept-btn mle-rs-accept-btn--review', 'tip' => 'This run stays saved but paused from advice.'),
              'archive' => array('field' => 'retire_ids[]', 'label' => 'Exclude from Advice',   'css' => 'mle-rs-accept-btn mle-rs-accept-btn--archive', 'tip' => 'This run is excluded from advice.')
            ) as $__rsActionKey => $__rsAction) {
              $__btnCss = $__rsAction['css'];
              $__btnLabel = $__rsAction['label'];
              if ($__rsActionKey === $__rsCurrentStatus) {
                $__btnCss .= ' mle-rs-accept-btn--current';
                $__btnLabel .= ' (Current)';
              }
              echo '<form method="post" class="mle-rs-run__accept-form">'
                . '<input type="hidden" name="mle_action" value="apply_evidence_choices">'
                . '<input type="hidden" name="lottery_id" value="' . (int)$__advLid . '">'
                . '<input type="hidden" name="' . htmlspecialchars((string)$__rsAction['field'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" value="' . $__rsPerfId . '">'
                . $__csrfToken
                . '<button type="submit" class="' . $__btnCss . '" title="' . htmlspecialchars((string)$__rsAction['tip'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '">' . $__btnLabel . '</button>'
                . '</form>';
            }
            echo '</div></div>';
          }
          echo '</div>';
          // Balls
          echo '<div class="mle-rs-run__balls"><span class="mle-visual-label">Your numbers</span>' . $__rsNums . '</div>';
          if ($__rsActual !== '') {
            echo '<div class="mle-rs-run__balls"><span class="mle-visual-label">Actual draw</span>' . $__rsActual . '</div>';
          }
          // Delete button (available from any run group)
          if ($__rsSavedId > 0) {
            echo '<div class="mle-rs-run__delete">'
              . '<form method="post" class="mle-inline-action mle-inline-action--delete">'
              . '<input type="hidden" name="delete_set" value="' . $__rsSavedId . '">'
              . $__csrfToken
              . '<button type="submit">Delete this run permanently</button>'
              . '</form></div>';
          }
          echo '</div>';
        };
      ?>

      <div class="mle-rs-groups">

        <?php if (!empty($__advClKeep)): ?>
        <div class="mle-rs-group mle-rs-group--keep">
          <div class="mle-rs-group__header">
            <span class="mle-rs-group__badge mle-rs-group__badge--keep">Use for Future Advice - <?php echo count($__advClKeep); ?> run<?php echo count($__advClKeep) !== 1 ? 's' : ''; ?></span>
            <p class="mle-rs-group__reason">These are your <strong>strongest runs</strong> - they matched the most actual draw numbers. LottoExpert uses these to shape future predictions. You can now change any run to <em>Use for Future Advice</em>, <em>Keep for Review</em>, or <em>Exclude from Advice</em> directly from each run card.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="mle-rs-group__runs">
            <?php foreach ($__advClKeep as $__r): $__rsRenderRun($__r, 'keep'); endforeach; ?>
          </div>
        </div>
        <?php endif; ?>

        <?php if (!empty($__advClReview)): ?>
        <div class="mle-rs-group mle-rs-group--review">
          <div class="mle-rs-group__header">
            <span class="mle-rs-group__badge mle-rs-group__badge--review">Keep for Review - <?php echo count($__advClReview); ?> run<?php echo count($__advClReview) !== 1 ? 's' : ''; ?></span>
            <p class="mle-rs-group__reason">These are <strong>moderate performers</strong>. They had some hits but not enough to lead. They are paused - they do not steer the next prediction but remain in your history. You can move any run between all three statuses at any time.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="mle-rs-group__runs">
            <?php foreach ($__advClReview as $__r): $__rsRenderRun($__r, 'review'); endforeach; ?>
          </div>
        </div>
        <?php endif; ?>

        <?php if (!empty($__advClArch)): ?>
        <div class="mle-rs-group mle-rs-group--archive">
          <div class="mle-rs-group__header">
            <span class="mle-rs-group__badge mle-rs-group__badge--archive">Exclude from Advice - <?php echo count($__advClArch); ?> run<?php echo count($__advClArch) !== 1 ? 's' : ''; ?></span>
            <p class="mle-rs-group__reason">These runs had the <strong>fewest hits</strong>. Excluding them from advice keeps the focus on what has been working. <em>They are not deleted</em> - they stay in your history unless you choose <em>Delete this run permanently</em>. You can also move these runs back to advice or review any time.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="mle-rs-group__runs">
            <?php foreach ($__advClArch as $__r): $__rsRenderRun($__r, 'archive'); endforeach; ?>
          </div>
        </div>
        <?php endif; ?>

      </div><!-- /.mle-rs-groups -->

      <?php if (!MLE_DEMO_MODE): ?>
      <div class="mle-rs-apply-all">
        <p class="mle-rs-apply-all__note">Want to apply all suggestions at once?</p>
        <form method="post" class="mle-advisory-actions">
          <input type="hidden" name="mle_action" value="apply_evidence_choices">
          <input type="hidden" name="lottery_id" value="<?php echo $__advLid; ?>">
          <?php foreach ($__advClKeep as $__r): if (!empty($__r['perf_id'])): ?><input type="hidden" name="keep_ids[]" value="<?php echo (int)$__r['perf_id']; ?>"><?php endif; endforeach; ?>
          <?php foreach ($__advClReview as $__r): if (!empty($__r['perf_id'])): ?><input type="hidden" name="watch_ids[]" value="<?php echo (int)$__r['perf_id']; ?>"><?php endif; endforeach; ?>
          <?php foreach ($__advClArch as $__r): if (!empty($__r['perf_id'])): ?><input type="hidden" name="retire_ids[]" value="<?php echo (int)$__r['perf_id']; ?>"><?php endif; endforeach; ?>
          <?php echo \Joomla\CMS\HTML\HTMLHelper::_('form.token'); ?>
          <button type="submit" class="mle-advisory-btn mle-advisory-btn--primary">Apply All Suggestions</button>
          <button type="button" class="mle-advisory-btn mle-advisory-btn--ghost mle-leave-as-is-btn" data-target-panel="<?php echo $__advEvidencePanelId; ?>">Leave as is</button>
        </form>
      </div>
      <?php endif; ?>
    </section>
    <?php endif; ?>

    <button type="button" class="mle-section-toggle" data-mle-primary-section-toggle="1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="<?php echo $__advRunsBodyId; ?>"><span>View Saved Predictions</span></button>
    <div id="<?php echo $__advRunsBodyId; ?>" class="mle-section-body mle-saved-runs-panel" data-mle-primary-section-body="1" style="display:none" aria-hidden="true">
      <?php
        $__spAllRuns = array_merge(
          (array)($__advVisual['recent']   ?? array()),
          (array)($__advVisual['older']    ?? array()),
          (array)($__advVisual['upcoming'] ?? array())
        );
        if (empty($__spAllRuns)):
      ?>
        <div class="mle-visual-empty">No saved predictions for this lottery yet.</div>
      <?php else: ?>
        <div class="mle-sp-run-list">
        <?php foreach ($__spAllRuns as $__spRun):
          $__spLabel    = htmlspecialchars((string)($__spRun['label']        ?? 'Saved run'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
          $__spMethod   = htmlspecialchars((string)($__spRun['method_label'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
          $__spDate     = htmlspecialchars((string)($__spRun['draw_date']    ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
          $__spSavedId  = (int)($__spRun['saved_id'] ?? 0);
          $__spHits     = (int)($__spRun['total_hits']  ?? 0);
          $__spMainHits = (int)($__spRun['main_hits']   ?? 0);
          $__spExtraHits= (int)($__spRun['extra_hits']  ?? 0);
          $__spCompleted= !empty($__spRun['completed']);
          $__spNums     = mleAdvisoryRenderVisualRunNumbersHtml($__spRun, false);
          $__spActual   = ($__spCompleted && (!empty($__spRun['actual']) || !empty($__spRun['actual_extra'])))
            ? mleAdvisoryRenderVisualRunNumbersHtml($__spRun, true)
            : '';
        ?>
        <div class="mle-sp-run-card<?php echo $__spCompleted ? ' mle-sp-run-card--scored' : ''; ?>">
          <div class="mle-sp-run-card__header">
            <div class="mle-sp-run-card__meta">
              <strong><?php echo $__spLabel; ?></strong>
              <span><?php echo $__spMethod; ?><?php echo $__spDate !== '' ? ' - ' . $__spDate : ''; ?></span>
            </div>
            <?php if ($__spCompleted): ?>
            <div class="mle-sp-run-card__hits">
              <strong><?php echo $__spHits; ?></strong>
              <span>Total hits</span>
              <?php if ($__spMainHits > 0 || $__spExtraHits > 0): ?>
              <small><?php echo $__spMainHits; ?> main<?php echo $__spExtraHits > 0 ? ' + ' . $__spExtraHits . ' extra' : ''; ?></small>
              <?php endif; ?>
            </div>
            <?php else: ?>
            <div class="mle-sp-run-card__hits mle-sp-run-card__hits--upcoming">
              <span>Upcoming</span>
            </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
          </div>
          <div class="mle-sp-run-card__balls">
            <span class="mle-visual-label">Your numbers</span><?php echo $__spNums; ?>
          </div>
          <?php if ($__spActual !== ''): ?>
          <div class="mle-sp-run-card__balls">
            <span class="mle-visual-label">Actual draw</span><?php echo $__spActual; ?>
          </div>
          <?php endif; ?>
          <?php if (!MLE_DEMO_MODE && $__spSavedId > 0): ?>
          <div class="mle-sp-run-card__actions">
            <form method="post" class="mle-inline-action mle-inline-action--delete">
              <input type="hidden" name="delete_set" value="<?php echo $__spSavedId; ?>">
              <?php echo \Joomla\CMS\HTML\HTMLHelper::_('form.token'); ?>
              <button type="submit">Delete this run</button>
            </form>
          </div>
          <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php endforeach; ?>
        </div>
      <?php endif; ?>
    </div>



    <?php
      $__advPlayRows = (array)($__advCard['numbers_to_play'] ?? array());
      $__advSettingsRows = (array)($__advCard['saved_settings'] ?? array());
    ?>

    <section class="mle-lottery-roof-section">
      <div class="mle-section-headline">
        <div><h4>Saved Numbers to Play</h4><p>Approved play sets for this lottery only. Use these when you are ready to wheel or play a refined set.</p></div>
        <button type="button" class="mle-section-toggle" data-mle-primary-section-toggle="1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="<?php echo $__advPlayBodyId; ?>"><span>Show Saved Numbers to Play</span></button>
      </div>
      <div id="<?php echo $__advPlayBodyId; ?>" class="mle-section-body" data-mle-primary-section-body="1" style="display:none" aria-hidden="true">
        <?php if (empty($__advPlayRows)): ?>
          <div class="mle-visual-empty">No saved Numbers to Play for this lottery yet.</div>
        <?php else: ?>
          <div class="mle-card-list-grid">
          <?php foreach ($__advPlayRows as $__playRow):
            $__playName = htmlspecialchars((string)($__playRow['label'] ?? ('Play set #' . (int)($__playRow['id'] ?? 0))), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
            $__playDate = htmlspecialchars((string)($__playRow['next_draw_date'] ?? $__playRow['target_draw_date'] ?? $__playRow['date_saved'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
            $__playDailyView = mylottoexpertExtractDailySavedView($__playRow);
            if (!empty($__playDailyView['is_daily'])) {
              $__playComboStrings = array_values((array)($__playDailyView['combo_strings'] ?? array()));
              $__playExtraDigits = !empty($__playDailyView['bonus_digits']) ? (array)$__playDailyView['bonus_digits'] : (!empty($__playDailyView['extra_digits']) ? (array)$__playDailyView['extra_digits'] : (array)($__playDailyView['top_extras'] ?? array()));
              $__playNums = mleAdvisoryRenderVisualRunNumbersHtml(array(
                'is_daily' => true,
                'pred_combo_strings' => $__playComboStrings,
                'predicted' => !empty($__playDailyView['primary_combo_digits']) ? (array)$__playDailyView['primary_combo_digits'] : (!empty($__playComboStrings) ? mleAdvisoryDigitArrayFromComboString((string)$__playComboStrings[0]) : array()),
                'predicted_extra' => array_values(array_map('intval', $__playExtraDigits)),
                'actual' => array(),
                'actual_extra' => array(),
                'daily_pick_size' => (int)($__playDailyView['pick_size'] ?? 0),
              ), false);
            } else {
              $__playNums = mleAdvisoryRenderBallListHtml(mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($__playRow['main_numbers'] ?? '', true), array(), false);
            }
          ?>
            <div class="mle-mini-card"><strong><?php echo $__playName; ?></strong><span><?php echo $__playDate !== '' ? $__playDate : 'Saved play set'; ?></span><div><?php echo $__playNums; ?></div></div>
          <?php endforeach; ?>
          </div>
        <?php endif; ?>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="mle-lottery-roof-section">
      <div class="mle-section-headline">
        <div><h4>Saved Settings for This Lottery</h4><p>Saved settings profiles for this lottery only. These are the profiles LottoExpert can compare or use as a base for the next narrowing test.</p></div>
        <button type="button" class="mle-section-toggle" data-mle-primary-section-toggle="1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="<?php echo $__advSettingsBodyId; ?>"><span>Show Saved Settings</span></button>
      </div>
      <div id="<?php echo $__advSettingsBodyId; ?>" class="mle-section-body" data-mle-primary-section-body="1" style="display:none" aria-hidden="true">
        <?php if (empty($__advSettingsRows)): ?>
          <div class="mle-visual-empty">No saved settings for this lottery yet.</div>
        <?php else: ?>
          <div class="mle-card-list-grid">
          <?php foreach ($__advSettingsRows as $__setRow):
            $__setName = htmlspecialchars(mleAdvisoryFormatSavedSettingName($__setRow), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
            $__setSource = htmlspecialchars(mleAdvisoryMethodLabel((string)($__setRow['source'] ?? '')), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
            $__setParams = array();
            if (!empty($__setRow['params'])) { $__decodedParams = json_decode((string)$__setRow['params'], true); if (is_array($__decodedParams)) { $__setParams = $__decodedParams; } }
            $__setSummary = htmlspecialchars(mleAdvisoryBuildBestRecipeDesc($__setParams, (string)($__setRow['source'] ?? '')), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
          ?>
            <div class="mle-mini-card"><strong><?php echo $__setName; ?></strong><span><?php echo $__setSource; ?></span><p><?php echo $__setSummary; ?></p></div>
          <?php endforeach; ?>
          </div>
        <?php endif; ?>
      </div>
    </section>


    <button type="button" class="mle-section-toggle mle-advanced-only" data-mle-primary-section-toggle="1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="<?php echo $__advAdvancedBodyId; ?>"><span>Show Advanced Details</span></button>
    <div id="<?php echo $__advAdvancedBodyId; ?>" class="mle-section-body mle-advanced-only" data-mle-primary-section-body="1" style="display:none" aria-hidden="true">
      <p>Advanced details show how each prediction method performed across all your scored runs for this lottery. Use this to see which approach has the strongest track record.</p>
      <?php
        $__advLbRows = (array)($__advCard['leaderboard'] ?? array());
        if (empty($__advLbRows)):
      ?>
        <div class="mle-visual-empty">No scored runs yet for this lottery. Save and score at least one run to see performance data here.</div>
      <?php else: ?>
      <div class="mle-adv-legend">
        <strong>Column guide:</strong>
        <span><em>Runs</em> = number of saved runs using this analysis</span>
        <span><em>Draws scored</em> = how many actual draws were compared</span>
        <span><em>Total hits</em> = cumulative matched numbers across all scored draws</span>
        <span><em>Avg hits/draw</em> = average matched numbers per completed draw</span>
        <span><em>Top 20 hits</em> = draws where at least one number landed in the top 20 predicted</span>
        <span><em>Avg rank</em> = average position of winning numbers in the ranked list (lower is better; 1 = top)</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mle-adv-proof-wrap">
      <table class="mle-adv-proof-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>Analysis method</th>
            <th>Runs</th>
            <th>Draws scored</th>
            <th>Total hits</th>
            <th>Avg hits/draw</th>
            <th>Top 20 hits</th>
            <th>Avg rank</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
        <?php foreach ($__advLbRows as $__i => $__m):
          $__mLabel     = htmlspecialchars((string)($__m['method_label'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
          $__mRunCount  = (int)($__m['run_count']   ?? 0);
          $__mDrawCount = (int)($__m['draw_count']  ?? 0);
          $__mTotalHits = (int)($__m['total_hits']  ?? 0);
          $__mAvgHits   = ($__mDrawCount > 0) ? round($__mTotalHits / $__mDrawCount, 1) : '-';
          $__mTop20     = (int)($__m['avg_top20']   ?? 0);
          $__mRank      = ($__m['avg_rank'] !== null && $__m['avg_rank'] !== '') ? htmlspecialchars((string)$__m['avg_rank'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') : '-';
          $__mScore     = (float)($__m['score']     ?? 0);
          $__mIsTop     = ($__i === 0);
        ?>
        <tr class="<?php echo $__mIsTop ? 'mle-adv-proof-table__row--top' : ''; ?>">
          <td>
            <?php if ($__mIsTop): ?><span class="mle-adv-top-badge">Leading</span><?php endif; ?>
            <?php echo $__mLabel; ?>
          </td>
          <td><?php echo $__mRunCount > 0 ? $__mRunCount : '-'; ?></td>
          <td><?php echo $__mDrawCount > 0 ? $__mDrawCount : '-'; ?></td>
          <td><?php echo $__mTotalHits > 0 ? $__mTotalHits : '0'; ?></td>
          <td><?php echo $__mAvgHits; ?></td>
          <td><?php echo $__mTop20 > 0 ? $__mTop20 : '0'; ?></td>
          <td><?php echo $__mRank; ?></td>
        </tr>
        <?php endforeach; ?>
        </tbody>
      </table>
      </div>
      <?php if ($__advTotalDraws < 3): ?>
      <p class="mle-adv-note">You have <?php echo $__advTotalDraws; ?> scored draw<?php echo $__advTotalDraws !== 1 ? 's' : ''; ?> so far. Data becomes more meaningful after 5-10 completed, scored draws.</p>
      <?php endif; ?>
      <?php endif; ?>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<?php endforeach; ?>
<script>
(function(){
  "use strict";
  if (window.__MLE_SKAI_PRECISION_BRIDGE_INIT__) { return; }
  window.__MLE_SKAI_PRECISION_BRIDGE_INIT__ = true;
  document.addEventListener('click', function(ev){
    var btn = ev.target && ev.target.closest ? ev.target.closest('.mle-open-skai-precision-batch') : null;
    if (!btn) { return; }
    ev.preventDefault();
    var payloadRaw = btn.getAttribute('data-batch-payload') || '';
    var url = btn.getAttribute('data-skai-url') || '';
    try {
      var payload = JSON.parse(payloadRaw);
      if (!payload || !payload.runs || payload.runs.length !== 9) {
        alert('This Precision Focus batch does not contain exactly 9 runnable SKAI settings.');
        return;
      }
      localStorage.setItem('mle_precision_lock_batch_payload_v1', JSON.stringify(payload));
      sessionStorage.setItem('mle_precision_lock_batch_payload_v1', JSON.stringify(payload));
    } catch (e) {
      alert('This Precision Focus batch could not be prepared for SKAI. Please refresh and try again.');
      return;
    }
    if (url) { window.location.href = url; }
  }, false);
})();
</script>
<?php endif; ?>
</div>
