            ($__lpSkaiSource || $__lpHasBlendSignal || $__lpHasWindowSignal)
        ) ? 1 : 0;

        // Calibration: flagged when auto_tune is on or tune_used is set
        $__lpCalibEnabled = (!empty($__lpSettings['tune_used']) || $__lpAutoTune) ? 1 : 0;
        $__lpCalibActive  = (!empty($__lpSettings['tune_used'])) ? 1 : 0;
        // Shared learning: flagged when draws_analyzed >= 20 (broad historical window)
        $__lpShared = ((int)($__lpSettings['draws_analyzed'] ?? 0) >= 20) ? 1 : 0;

        // Draw date and run date
        $__lpDrawDate = (string)($__lpRun['draw_date'] ?? '');
        $__lpRunDate  = '';
        if (isset($__savedSetsById[$__lpRunId])) {
            $__lpSR = (array)$__savedSetsById[$__lpRunId];
            $__lpRunDate = (string)($__lpSR['generated_at'] ?? $__lpSR['date_saved'] ?? '');
        }
        if ($__lpDrawDate !== '') {
            $__lpDrawTs = strtotime($__lpDrawDate);
            if ($__lpDrawTs) {
                $__lpDrawDate = date('Y-m-d', $__lpDrawTs);
            }
        }

        // Combo hit summary (regular lotteries only; daily lotteries use digit combos)
        $__lpComboSummary = array();
        if (empty($__lpRun['is_daily'])) {
            $__lpComboSummary = array(
                'hits_main'  => (int)($__lpRun['hits_main']  ?? 0),
                'hits_extra' => (int)($__lpRun['hits_extra'] ?? 0),
            );
        }

        // Derive the actual run setting (AI share used %, strategy family) from the
        // saved run's settings for persistence in notes_json.  This is what the
        // KPI panel surfaces as the "run setting" - the real slider value used.
        $__lpSavedRowForBlend = $__lpSavedRow;
        $__lpBlendInfo = mylottoexpertBuildBlendDisplayInfo($__lpSavedRowForBlend, $__lpSettings);

        $__lpData = array(
            'lottery_id'            => (int)$__lpLid,
            'lottery_name'          => $__lpLotteryName,
            'draw_date'             => $__lpDrawDate,
            'run_date'              => $__lpRunDate,
            'run_id'                => $__lpRunId,
            'run_uuid'              => (string)($__lpLineageMeta['run_uuid'] ?? ''),
            'snapshot_run_uuid'     => (string)($__lpLineageMeta['snapshot_run_uuid'] ?? ''),
            'run_identity_key'      => (string)($__lpLineageMeta['run_identity_key'] ?? ''),
            'prediction_target_id'  => (string)($__lpTargetMeta['prediction_target_id'] ?? ''),
            'prediction_target_key' => (string)($__lpTargetMeta['prediction_target_key'] ?? ''),
            'target_game_id'        => (string)($__lpTargetMeta['target_game_id'] ?? ''),
            'target_lottery_id'     => (int)($__lpTargetMeta['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0),
            'target_draw_date'      => (string)($__lpTargetMeta['target_draw_date'] ?? ''),
            'target_draw_at'        => (string)($__lpTargetMeta['target_draw_at'] ?? ''),
            'target_draw_session'   => (string)($__lpTargetMeta['target_draw_session'] ?? ''),
            'target_timezone_id'    => (string)($__lpTargetMeta['target_timezone_id'] ?? ''),
            'target_prediction_family' => (string)($__lpTargetMeta['target_prediction_family'] ?? ''),
            'target_prediction_type'   => (string)($__lpTargetMeta['target_prediction_type'] ?? ''),
            'source'                => $__lpSource,
            'actual_numbers'        => $__lpActualMain,
            'predicted_ranking'     => $__lpPredMain,
            'avg_winning_rank'      => $__lpMetrics['avg_rank'],
            'best_winning_rank'     => $__lpMetrics['best_rank'],
            'worst_winning_rank'    => $__lpMetrics['worst_rank'],
            'median_winning_rank'   => $__lpMetrics['median_rank'],
            'weighted_quality_score'=> $__lpMetrics['weighted_score'],
            'top10_hits'            => $__lpMetrics['top10_hits'],
            'top20_hits'            => $__lpMetrics['top20_hits'],
            'top30_hits'            => $__lpMetrics['top30_hits'],
            'top50_hits'            => $__lpMetrics['top50_hits'],
            'missing_hits_count'    => $__lpMetrics['missing_count'],
            'combo_hit_summary'     => $__lpComboSummary,
            'tail_enabled'          => $__lpTailEnabled,
            'tail_active'           => $__lpTailActive,
            'tail_promoted_count'   => 0,
            'tail_promoted_hit_count' => 0,
            'calibration_enabled'   => $__lpCalibEnabled,
            'calibration_active'    => $__lpCalibActive,
            'shared_learning_enabled' => $__lpShared,
            'pairwise_enabled'      => $__lpPairwise,
            'gibbs_enabled'         => $__lpGibbs,
            'live_tuning_enabled'   => $__lpLiveTune,
            'confidence_level'      => 'scored',
            'trend_bucket'          => 'pending',
            // Run configuration snapshot persisted for the KPI panel.
            // Stored in notes_json so existing schema is unchanged.
            // Legacy rows with null/[] notes_json are handled gracefully at render time.
            'notes'                 => array(
                'run_ai_pct'          => $__lpBlendInfo['ai'],
                'run_skip_pct'        => $__lpBlendInfo['skip'],
                'run_strategy_family' => $__lpBlendInfo['strategy_label'],
                'prediction_target_id'=> (string)($__lpTargetMeta['prediction_target_id'] ?? ''),
                'run_uuid'            => (string)($__lpLineageMeta['effective_run_uuid'] ?? ''),
            ),
        );
        if ($workspaceUserId > 0) {
            skaiUpsertPerformanceRecord($db, $workspaceUserId, $__lpData);
        }
    }
}

unset($__lpLottery, $__lpRun, $__lpMetrics, $__lpData);


// PRL uses the shared 7-tier ranking model: total hits -> main hits -> extra hits ->
// successful combo count -> combo quality score -> pos_sum -> run_id.
// This ensures both the "best" highlight and the sort order always agree.
foreach ($__runSummary as $__rscLid => $__rscLsData) {
    if (!isset($bestOpps[$__rscLid]['best_avg_hits'])) { continue; }
    $__rscBestRid = (int)$__rscLsData['best_run_id'];
    if (0 >= $__rscBestRid) { continue; }

    // Look up the saved-set row for the PRL-identified best run.
    // Prefer the DB-fetched row; fall back to the in-memory savedSets lookup.
    if (isset($__winnerRows[$__rscBestRid])) {
        $__rscWinnerRow = $__winnerRows[$__rscBestRid];
    } elseif (isset($__savedSetsById[$__rscBestRid])) {
        $__rscWinnerRow = $__savedSetsById[$__rscBestRid];
    } else {
        continue;
    }

    $__rscDispInfo    = mylottoexpertResolveRunDisplayInfo((array)$__rscWinnerRow, $__methodLabels);
    $__rscDisplayName = $__rscDispInfo['label'];
    $__rscRunMode     = $__rscDispInfo['mode'];

    // Find the last draw date for this specific run in the PRL run list.
    // Runs are sorted by hits desc (not date), so we scan all to find the max date.
    $__rscLastDate = '';
    foreach ($__rscLsData['runs'] as $__rscRun) {
        if ((int)$__rscRun['run_id'] === $__rscBestRid && $__rscRun['has_draw']
            && (string)$__rscRun['draw_date'] > $__rscLastDate) {
            $__rscLastDate = (string)$__rscRun['draw_date'];
        }
    }

    $bestOpps[$__rscLid]['best_avg_hits']['run_id']       = $__rscBestRid;
    $bestOpps[$__rscLid]['best_avg_hits']['max_hits']     = (int)$__rscLsData['max_hits'];
    $bestOpps[$__rscLid]['best_avg_hits']['display_name'] = $__rscDisplayName;
    $bestOpps[$__rscLid]['best_avg_hits']['run_mode']     = $__rscRunMode;
    if ($__rscLastDate !== '') {
        $bestOpps[$__rscLid]['best_avg_hits']['last_scored_date'] = $__rscLastDate;
    }
}

// 5) Analysis types used to render per-method prediction columns.
$modules = array(
    array('key' => 'skip_hit',        'label' => 'SKIP Model',           'icon' => '', 'tooltip' => 'Analyzes historical draw patterns'),
    array('key' => 'ai_prediction',   'label' => 'Neural Network',        'icon' => '', 'tooltip' => 'Deep learning model trained on draw history'),
    array('key' => 'mcmc_prediction', 'label' => 'MCMC',                  'icon' => '', 'tooltip' => 'Statistical sampling method'),
    array('key' => 'heatmap',         'label' => 'Frequency Map',         'icon' => '', 'tooltip' => 'Visual frequency analysis'),
    array('key' => 'skai_prediction', 'label' => 'SKAI Model',            'icon' => '', 'tooltip' => 'Combines multiple analytical methods'),
);

?>

<!-- ==================================================
     CSS Styles (Sorcerer style block)
     ================================================== -->

<?php
// Workspace decision summary metrics
$__intelligenceCards = array();
$__intelligenceTotalRuns = 0;
$__intelligenceActionableLotteries = 0;
$__intelligenceHighConfidenceLotteries = 0;
$__intelligenceActiveLotteries = count((array)$bestOpps);

$__mleEliteRankTone = function ($rank) {
    if ($rank === null || $rank === '') {
        return array(
            'class' => 'mle-ci-rank-tone--none',
            'label' => 'Not scored yet'
        );
    }
    $rank = (float)$rank;
    if ($rank <= 5) {
        return array('class' => 'mle-ci-rank-tone--elite', 'label' => 'Elite rank');
    }
    if ($rank <= 10) {
        return array('class' => 'mle-ci-rank-tone--strong', 'label' => 'Strong rank');
    }
    if ($rank <= 20) {
        return array('class' => 'mle-ci-rank-tone--moderate', 'label' => 'Moderate rank');
    }
    return array('class' => 'mle-ci-rank-tone--weak', 'label' => 'Weak rank');
};

$__mleEliteRecommendationTone = function ($signalScore, $stageScore, $zoneSupport, $bestSetupHits, $scoredRuns, $drawCount) {
    $signalScore = (int)$signalScore;
    $stageScore = (int)$stageScore;
    $zoneSupport = (int)$zoneSupport;
    $bestSetupHits = (int)$bestSetupHits;
    $scoredRuns = (int)$scoredRuns;
    $drawCount = (int)$drawCount;

    /*
    |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
    | CURRENT READ RECOMMENDATION MATURITY GATES
    |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
    | Exploration Mode
    |   - fewer than 5 scored runs OR fewer than 2 completed draws
    | Early Recommendation
    |   - 5 to 9 scored runs, or sample still too small to trust strongly
    | Actionable Recommendation
    |   - at least 10 scored runs, at least 3 completed draws,
    |     repeated support plus a validated setup anchor
    | High-conviction Recommendation
    |   - at least 20 scored runs, at least 5 completed draws,
    |     strong multi-layer agreement and validated setup support
    |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
    */

    if ($scoredRuns < 5 || $drawCount < 2) {
        return array(
            'class' => 'mle-ci-decision-hero--explore',
            'badge' => 'Exploration mode',
            'note'  => 'There is not enough reliable history yet. Use these runs to learn the lottery before trusting a directional recommendation.'
        );
    }

    if (
        $scoredRuns >= 20
        && $drawCount >= 5
        && $signalScore >= 4
        && $stageScore >= 4
        && $zoneSupport >= 8
        && $bestSetupHits > 0
    ) {
        return array(
            'class' => 'mle-ci-decision-hero--strong',
            'badge' => 'High-conviction recommendation',
            'note'  => 'Multiple evidence layers are aligned across a meaningful scored sample and enough completed draws to treat this as the page\'s strongest direction.'
        );
    }

    if (
        $scoredRuns >= 10
        && $drawCount >= 3
        && $bestSetupHits > 0
        && (
            ($signalScore >= 3 && $stageScore >= 3)
            || $zoneSupport >= 5
        )
    ) {
        return array(
            'class' => 'mle-ci-decision-hero--building',
            'badge' => 'Actionable recommendation',
            'note'  => 'There is enough repeated support to begin narrowing choices, but the sample is still short of a high-conviction call.'
        );
    }

    return array(
        'class' => 'mle-ci-decision-hero--early',
        'badge' => 'Early recommendation',
        'note'  => 'Patterns are starting to repeat, but the sample is still small. Use this as a clue, not a strong conclusion.'
    );
};

$__mleEvidenceStageClass = function ($label) {
    $label = strtolower(trim((string)$label));
    if ($label === 'top focus') {
        return 'prc-badge prc-badge--stage-topfocus';
    }
    if ($label === 'watch next') {
        return 'prc-badge prc-badge--stage-watch';
    }
    if ($label === 'building') {
        return 'prc-badge prc-badge--stage-building';
    }
    return 'prc-badge prc-badge--stage-early';
};

$__mleSignalStrengthClass = function ($label) {
    $label = strtolower(trim((string)$label));
    if ($label === 'high') {
        return 'prc-badge prc-badge--signal-high';
    }
    if ($label === 'moderate') {
        return 'prc-badge prc-badge--signal-moderate';
    }
    if ($label === 'developing') {
        return 'prc-badge prc-badge--signal-developing';
    }
    return 'prc-badge prc-badge--signal-weak';
};

foreach ($bestOpps as $__dLid => $__dOpp) {
    $__lotteryName = (string)($__dOpp['lottery_name'] ?? 'Lottery');
    $__totalRuns = (int)($__dOpp['total_runs'] ?? 0);
    $__scoredRuns = count((array)($__dOpp['all_scored_runs'] ?? array()));
    $__agreementScore = (int)($__dOpp['best_agreement']['score'] ?? 0);
    $__agreementNumbers = array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', (array)($__dOpp['best_agreement']['numbers'] ?? array()))));
    $__bestSetupName = (string)($__dOpp['best_avg_hits']['display_name'] ?? 'No validated setup yet');
    $__bestSetupHits = (int)($__dOpp['best_avg_hits']['max_hits'] ?? 0);
    $__bestSetupScoredRuns = (int)($__dOpp['best_avg_hits']['scored_runs'] ?? 0);
    $__bestSetupRunId = (int)($__dOpp['best_avg_hits']['run_id'] ?? 0);
    $__bestSetupRow = ($__bestSetupRunId > 0 && isset($__savedSetsById[$__bestSetupRunId])) ? (array)$__savedSetsById[$__bestSetupRunId] : array();
    $__bestSetupSource = (string)($__bestSetupRow['source'] ?? ($__dOpp['best_rank']['source'] ?? ''));
    $__drawDates = array();
    $__numberCounts = array();
    $__modeStats = array();
    $__topHitCount = 0;

    foreach ((array)($__dOpp['all_scored_runs'] ?? array()) as $__scoredRun) {
        $__drawDate = (string)($__scoredRun['draw_date'] ?? '');
        if ($__drawDate !== '') {
            $__drawDates[$__drawDate] = true;
        }
        foreach ((array)($__scoredRun['pred_main'] ?? array()) as $__num) {
            $__num = (int)$__num;
            if ($__num <= 0) {
                continue;
            }
            if (!isset($__numberCounts[$__num])) {
                $__numberCounts[$__num] = 0;
            }
            $__numberCounts[$__num]++;
            if ($__numberCounts[$__num] > $__topHitCount) {
                $__topHitCount = $__numberCounts[$__num];
            }
        }

        $__runId = (int)($__scoredRun['run_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($__runId > 0 && isset($__savedSetsById[$__runId])) {
            $__runRow = (array)$__savedSetsById[$__runId];
            if ((string)($__runRow['source'] ?? '') === 'skai_prediction') {
                $__runDisp = mylottoexpertResolveRunDisplayInfo($__runRow, $__methodLabels);
                $__modeLabel = $__runDisp['mode'] !== '' ? $__runDisp['mode'] : 'Default';
                $__modeRankScore = (float)($__scoredRun['rank_score'] ?? 0);
                $__modeHitScore = (int)($__scoredRun['hits'] ?? 0);
                $__modeBlendInfo = mylottoexpertBuildBlendDisplayInfo($__runRow, (array)($__runDisp['settings'] ?? array()));
                $__modeBlendValue = '';
                if (isset($__modeBlendInfo['ai']) && $__modeBlendInfo['ai'] !== null && $__modeBlendInfo['ai'] !== '') {
                    $__modeAiText = mylottoexpertFormatPercentForLabel($__modeBlendInfo['ai']);
                    if ($__modeAiText !== '') {
                        $__modeBlendValue = $__modeAiText . '%';
                    }
                }

                if (!isset($__modeStats[$__modeLabel])) {
                    $__modeStats[$__modeLabel] = array(
                        'count' => 0,
                        'best_rank_score' => -1,
                        'best_hits' => -1,
                        'best_run_id' => 0,
                        'blend_value' => ''
                    );
                }

                $__modeStats[$__modeLabel]['count']++;

                $__modeIsBetter = (
                    $__modeRankScore > (float)$__modeStats[$__modeLabel]['best_rank_score']
                    || ($__modeRankScore === (float)$__modeStats[$__modeLabel]['best_rank_score']
                        && $__modeHitScore > (int)$__modeStats[$__modeLabel]['best_hits'])
                    || ($__modeRankScore === (float)$__modeStats[$__modeLabel]['best_rank_score']
                        && $__modeHitScore === (int)$__modeStats[$__modeLabel]['best_hits']
                        && $__runId > (int)$__modeStats[$__modeLabel]['best_run_id'])
                );
                if ($__modeIsBetter) {
                    $__modeStats[$__modeLabel]['best_rank_score'] = $__modeRankScore;
                    $__modeStats[$__modeLabel]['best_hits'] = $__modeHitScore;
                    $__modeStats[$__modeLabel]['best_run_id'] = $__runId;
                    $__modeStats[$__modeLabel]['blend_value'] = $__modeBlendValue;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    arsort($__numberCounts);
    $__repeatPool = array_slice(array_keys($__numberCounts), 0, 6);
    $__repeatPoolDisplay = !empty($__repeatPool) ? implode(', ', $__repeatPool) : 'No repeat pool yet';
    $__repeatSupportLabel = $__topHitCount > 0 ? $__topHitCount . ' run' . ($__topHitCount === 1 ? '' : 's') : 'No repeated support yet';

    $__drawCount = count((array)$__drawDates);
    $__evidenceStage = 'Too early';
    $__evidenceNote = 'Recommendations are still early. Keep building the sample before treating any pattern as durable.';
    $__stageScore = 1;
    if ($__totalRuns >= 20 || $__scoredRuns >= 10) {
        $__evidenceStage = 'Top focus';
        $__evidenceNote = 'You now have enough sample to let repeatability drive decisions instead of isolated wins.';
        $__stageScore = 4;
        $__intelligenceHighConfidenceLotteries++;
    } elseif ($__totalRuns >= 10 || $__scoredRuns >= 5) {
        $__evidenceStage = 'Watch next';
        $__evidenceNote = 'The pattern is strong enough to narrow your choices, but you should still compare it with your best setup and your past results.';
        $__stageScore = 3;
        $__intelligenceActionableLotteries++;
    } elseif ($__totalRuns >= 5 || $__scoredRuns >= 3) {
        $__evidenceStage = 'Building';
        $__evidenceNote = 'You can start seeing a direction, but this is still the stage for careful testing, not full trust.';
        $__stageScore = 2;
    }

    $__signalStrength = 'Weak';
    $__signalNote = 'This lottery still needs more repeated numbers or more scored history before the page can give stronger guidance.';
    $__signalScore = 1;
    if ($__agreementScore >= 3 && $__topHitCount >= 3 && $__bestSetupHits > 0 && $__scoredRuns >= 10 && $__drawCount >= 5) {
        $__signalStrength = 'High';
        $__signalNote = 'Repeated numbers and past results are reinforcing one another across enough completed draws to support a stronger directional read.';
        $__signalScore = 4;
    } elseif ((($__agreementScore >= 2 && $__topHitCount >= 2) || ($__topHitCount >= 3 && $__bestSetupHits > 0)) && $__scoredRuns >= 5 && $__drawCount >= 3) {
        $__signalStrength = 'Moderate';
        $__signalNote = 'There is enough alignment to narrow the pool, but the sample is still too small to treat this as a high-confidence signal.';
        $__signalScore = 3;
    } elseif ($__agreementScore >= 2 || $__scoredRuns >= 3 || $__topHitCount >= 2) {
        $__signalStrength = 'Developing';
        $__signalNote = 'Useful clues are appearing, but this page should still be treated as a narrowing tool until more completed draws are scored.';
        $__signalScore = 2;
    }

    $__dominantModeText = 'No dominant SKAI mode yet';
    $__dominantModeEntries = array();
    if (!empty($__modeStats)) {
        $__modeTotal = 0;
        foreach ($__modeStats as $__modeStatTotal) {
            $__modeTotal += (int)($__modeStatTotal['count'] ?? 0);
        }
        uasort($__modeStats, function ($a, $b) {
            $aRank = (float)($a['best_rank_score'] ?? -1);
            $bRank = (float)($b['best_rank_score'] ?? -1);
            if ($bRank > $aRank) { return 1; }
            if ($bRank < $aRank) { return -1; }

            $aHits = (int)($a['best_hits'] ?? -1);
            $bHits = (int)($b['best_hits'] ?? -1);
            if ($bHits > $aHits) { return 1; }
            if ($bHits < $aHits) { return -1; }

            $aCount = (int)($a['count'] ?? 0);
            $bCount = (int)($b['count'] ?? 0);
            if ($bCount > $aCount) { return 1; }
            if ($bCount < $aCount) { return -1; }

            $aRunId = (int)($a['best_run_id'] ?? 0);
            $bRunId = (int)($b['best_run_id'] ?? 0);
            if ($bRunId > $aRunId) { return 1; }
            if ($bRunId < $aRunId) { return -1; }
            return 0;
        });
        $__modeParts = array();
        $__modeShown = 0;
        foreach ($__modeStats as $__modeLabel => $__modeStat) {
            $__modeCount = (int)($__modeStat['count'] ?? 0);
            $__modeLabelRaw = trim((string)$__modeLabel);
            $__modeDisplayLabel = $__modeLabelRaw;
            $__modeUsageShare = (int)round(($__modeCount / max(1, $__modeTotal)) * 100);
            $__modeBlendValue = trim((string)($__modeStat['blend_value'] ?? ''));
            $__modeMainLabel = $__modeLabelRaw;

            if ($__modeBlendValue === '') {
                if (preg_match('/^(.*)\(([^()]*)\)\s*$/', $__modeLabelRaw, $__modeMatch)) {
                    $__modeMainLabel = trim((string)$__modeMatch[1]);
                    $__modeBlendValue = trim((string)$__modeMatch[2]);
                    $__modeDisplayLabel = $__modeMainLabel;
                } else {
                    if (preg_match('/AI\s+share\s*:\s*(AI|Skip)\s*(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%/i', $__modeLabelRaw, $__modeBlendInline)) {
                        $__modeBlendValue = strtoupper(trim((string)$__modeBlendInline[1])) . ' ' . trim((string)$__modeBlendInline[2]) . '%';
                    } elseif (preg_match('/Blend\s*:\s*(AI|Skip)\s*(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%/i', $__modeLabelRaw, $__modeBlendInline2)) {
                        $__modeBlendValue = strtoupper(trim((string)$__modeBlendInline2[1])) . ' ' . trim((string)$__modeBlendInline2[2]) . '%';
                    } elseif (preg_match('/\b(AI|Skip)\s*(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%\b/i', $__modeLabelRaw, $__modeBlendLoose)) {
                        $__modeBlendValue = strtoupper(trim((string)$__modeBlendLoose[1])) . ' ' . trim((string)$__modeBlendLoose[2]) . '%';
                    } elseif (preg_match('/^(.*?)(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%\s*AI\s*[-|]?\s*(.*)$/i', $__modeLabelRaw, $__modeMatchAlt)) {
                        $__modeMainLabel = trim((string)$__modeMatchAlt[1], " -|\t\r\n \v");
                        $__modeBlendValue = 'AI ' . trim((string)$__modeMatchAlt[2]) . '%';
                        $__modeBlendTail = trim((string)$__modeMatchAlt[3], " -|\t\r\n \v");
                        if ($__modeBlendTail !== '') {
                            $__modeDisplayLabel = $__modeMainLabel !== '' ? ($__modeMainLabel . ' - ' . $__modeBlendTail) : $__modeBlendTail;
                        } else {
                            $__modeDisplayLabel = $__modeMainLabel;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            if ($__modeDisplayLabel === '') {
                $__modeDisplayLabel = $__modeLabelRaw;
            }

            $__dominantModeEntries[] = array(
                'profile_label' => $__modeDisplayLabel,
                'blend_value' => $__modeBlendValue,
                'usage_share' => $__modeUsageShare,
                'run_count' => (int)$__modeCount
            );

            $__modeParts[] = $__modeDisplayLabel . ' - ' . $__modeUsageShare . '%';
            $__modeShown++;
            if ($__modeShown >= 2) {
                break;
            }
        }
        $__dominantModeText = implode(' | ', $__modeParts);
    }

    $__recommendation = 'Keep building your saved history. This lottery does not yet have enough repeated evidence to support a stronger move.';
    $__nextMove = 'Run more saved analyses for this lottery before you shrink to a final pool.';

    if ($__stageScore <= 1 && $__signalScore <= 2) {
        $__neededRuns = max(1, 5 - $__totalRuns);
        $__recommendation = 'Keep ' . $__lotteryName . ' in exploration mode. You need at least ' . $__neededRuns . ' more saved run' . ($__neededRuns === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' before recommendations here should carry real weight.';
        $__nextMove = 'Save more runs, keep the current baseline stable, and do not overreact to any single configuration.';
    } elseif ($__signalScore >= 4) {
        $__recommendation = 'Make ' . $__lotteryName . ' a priority. The strongest overlap, repeat pool, and validated history are now reinforcing one another across saved runs.';
        $__nextMove = 'Build a reduced pool around ' . $__repeatPoolDisplay . ', then verify rank placement in Performance before finalizing the play.';
    } elseif ($__signalScore >= 3 && $__bestSetupHits > 0) {
        $__recommendation = 'Use ' . $__lotteryName . ' as an actionable focus. The signal is repeating enough to narrow your pool, but the historical leader should still anchor the decision.';
        $__nextMove = 'Start with the repeat pool, compare it against the validated setup, then cut the pool only after the two stories align.';
    } elseif ($__bestSetupHits > 0) {
        $__recommendation = 'Lean on the validated setup first for ' . $__lotteryName . '. History is carrying more weight than live agreement right now.';
        $__nextMove = 'Reuse the validated setup as your anchor, then add only the repeated numbers that keep resurfacing in new runs.';
    }

    $__tweakAdvice = mylottoexpertBuildActionTweakFromSettings($__bestSetupRow);
    $__summaryBullets = array();
    if ($__agreementScore > 0) {
        $__summaryBullets[] = 'Strongest current agreement: ' . $__agreementScore . ' shared number' . ($__agreementScore === 1 ? '' : 's') . (!empty($__agreementNumbers) ? ' (' . implode(', ', array_slice($__agreementNumbers, 0, 8)) . ')' : '') . '.';
    }
    if ($__bestSetupHits > 0) {
        $__summaryBullets[] = 'Best proven setup: ' . $__bestSetupName . ' with ' . $__bestSetupHits . ' top visible hit' . ($__bestSetupHits === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' and ' . $__bestSetupScoredRuns . ' scored run' . ($__bestSetupScoredRuns === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' behind it.';
    }
    if (!empty($__repeatPool)) {
        $__summaryBullets[] = 'Numbers resurfacing across scored runs: ' . $__repeatPoolDisplay . ' (' . $__repeatSupportLabel . ' for the most repeated number).';
    }
    if (!empty($__modeStats)) {
        $__summaryBullets[] = 'Dominant SKAI mode / blend mix: ' . $__dominantModeText . '.';
    }
    if ($__drawCount > 0) {
        $__summaryBullets[] = 'Completed draws represented: ' . $__drawCount . '; total scored runs: ' . $__scoredRuns . '.';
    }

    $__eliteValidRuns = array();
    foreach ((array)($__dOpp['all_scored_runs'] ?? array()) as $__eliteRun) {
        $__eliteRunId = (int)($__eliteRun['run_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($__eliteRunId <= 0 || !isset($__savedSetsById[$__eliteRunId])) {
            continue;
        }
        $__eliteRow = (array)$__savedSetsById[$__eliteRunId];
        if ((string)($__eliteRow['source'] ?? '') !== 'skai_prediction') {
            continue;
        }

        $__eliteSettings = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($__eliteRow);
        $__eliteBlendInfo = mylottoexpertBuildBlendDisplayInfo($__eliteRow, $__eliteSettings);
        $__eliteAi = isset($__eliteBlendInfo['ai']) ? mylottoexpertClampBlendPercent($__eliteBlendInfo['ai']) : null;
        if ($__eliteAi === null) {
            continue;
        }

        $__eliteTrainingRaw = '';
        if (!empty($__eliteSettings['training_style'])) {
            $__eliteTrainingRaw = (string)$__eliteSettings['training_style'];
        } elseif (!empty($__eliteSettings['profile'])) {
            $__eliteTrainingRaw = (string)$__eliteSettings['profile'];
        } elseif (!empty($__eliteSettings['risk_profile'])) {
            $__eliteTrainingRaw = (string)$__eliteSettings['risk_profile'];
        } else {
            $__eliteDisp = mylottoexpertResolveRunDisplayInfo($__eliteRow, $__methodLabels);
            $__eliteTrainingRaw = (string)($__eliteDisp['run_mode'] ?? '');
        }

        $__eliteTrainingLabel = mylottoexpertBuildSimpleModeLabel($__eliteTrainingRaw);
        if ($__eliteTrainingLabel === '') {
            $__eliteTrainingLabel = 'Not enough data yet';
        }

        $__elitePerf = 0.0;
        if (isset($__eliteRun['rank_score']) && $__eliteRun['rank_score'] !== null && $__eliteRun['rank_score'] !== '') {
            $__elitePerf += ((float)$__eliteRun['rank_score']) * 1000.0;
        }
        $__elitePerf += ((int)($__eliteRun['hits'] ?? 0)) * 100.0;
        if (isset($__eliteRun['avg_rank']) && $__eliteRun['avg_rank'] !== null && $__eliteRun['avg_rank'] !== '') {
            $__elitePerf += max(0.0, 100.0 - (float)$__eliteRun['avg_rank']);
        }
        $__elitePerf += max(0, 10 - (int)($__eliteRun['missing_hits_count'] ?? 0));

        $__eliteValidRuns[] = array(
            'run_id' => $__eliteRunId,
            'ai' => (float)$__eliteAi,
            'training_style' => $__eliteTrainingLabel,
            'strategy_family' => (string)($__eliteBlendInfo['strategy_label'] ?? ''),
            'performance_score' => $__elitePerf,
        );
    }

    $__supportRuns = array();
    $__validationPreview = array();
    $__scoredRunsSorted = array_values((array)($__dOpp['all_scored_runs'] ?? array()));
    usort($__scoredRunsSorted, function ($a, $b) {
        $aRank = (float)($a['rank_score'] ?? 0);
        $bRank = (float)($b['rank_score'] ?? 0);
        if ($bRank > $aRank) { return 1; }
        if ($bRank < $aRank) { return -1; }
        $aHits = (int)($a['hits'] ?? 0);
        $bHits = (int)($b['hits'] ?? 0);
        if ($bHits !== $aHits) { return $bHits <=> $aHits; }
        return strcmp((string)($b['draw_date'] ?? ''), (string)($a['draw_date'] ?? ''));
    });
    foreach ($__scoredRunsSorted as $__supportRun) {
        if (count((array)$__supportRuns) >= 5) {
            break;
        }
        $__supportRunId = (int)($__supportRun['run_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($__supportRunId <= 0 || !isset($__savedSetsById[$__supportRunId])) {
            continue;
        }
        $__supportRow = (array)$__savedSetsById[$__supportRunId];
        $__supportDisp = mylottoexpertResolveRunDisplayInfo($__supportRow, $__methodLabels);
        $__supportSettings = (array)($__supportDisp['settings'] ?? array());
        $__supportBlendInfo = mylottoexpertBuildBlendDisplayInfo($__supportRow, $__supportSettings);
        $__supportAiLabel = '';
        if (isset($__supportBlendInfo['ai']) && $__supportBlendInfo['ai'] !== null && $__supportBlendInfo['ai'] !== '') {
            $__supportAiLabel = mylottoexpertFormatPercentForLabel($__supportBlendInfo['ai']) . '%';
        }
        $__supportTrainingRaw = '';
        if (!empty($__supportSettings['training_style'])) {
            $__supportTrainingRaw = (string)$__supportSettings['training_style'];
        } elseif (!empty($__supportSettings['profile'])) {
            $__supportTrainingRaw = (string)$__supportSettings['profile'];
        } elseif (!empty($__supportSettings['risk_profile'])) {
            $__supportTrainingRaw = (string)$__supportSettings['risk_profile'];
        } else {
            $__supportTrainingRaw = (string)($__supportDisp['run_mode'] ?? '');
        }
        $__supportTrainingLabel = mylottoexpertBuildSimpleModeLabel($__supportTrainingRaw);
        if ($__supportTrainingLabel === '') {
            $__supportTrainingLabel = 'Not labeled yet';
        }
        $__supportRuns[] = array(
            'run_id' => $__supportRunId,
            'title' => (string)($__supportDisp['label'] ?: ('Run #' . $__supportRunId)),
            'draw_date' => (string)($__supportRun['draw_date'] ?? ''),
            'hits' => (int)($__supportRun['hits'] ?? 0),
            'avg_rank' => (isset($__supportRun['avg_rank']) && $__supportRun['avg_rank'] !== null && $__supportRun['avg_rank'] !== '') ? round((float)$__supportRun['avg_rank'], 1) : null,
            'ai_share' => $__supportAiLabel !== '' ? $__supportAiLabel : '-',
            'training_style' => $__supportTrainingLabel,
            'strategy_family' => (string)($__supportBlendInfo['strategy_label'] ?? 'Unclassified'),
            'source_label' => (string)($__supportDisp['base_label'] ?? '')
        );
    }
    $__recentRuns = array_values((array)($__dOpp['all_scored_runs'] ?? array()));
    usort($__recentRuns, function ($a, $b) {
        return strcmp((string)($b['draw_date'] ?? ''), (string)($a['draw_date'] ?? ''));
    });
    foreach ($__recentRuns as $__recentRun) {
        if (count((array)$__validationPreview) >= 5) {
            break;
        }
        $__recentRunId = (int)($__recentRun['run_id'] ?? 0);
        $__recentLabel = 'Run #' . $__recentRunId;
        if ($__recentRunId > 0 && isset($__savedSetsById[$__recentRunId])) {
            $__recentRow = (array)$__savedSetsById[$__recentRunId];
            $__recentDisp = mylottoexpertResolveRunDisplayInfo($__recentRow, $__methodLabels);
            $__recentLabel = (string)($__recentDisp['label'] ?: $__recentLabel);
        }
        $__validationPreview[] = array(
            'draw_date' => (string)($__recentRun['draw_date'] ?? ''),
            'label' => $__recentLabel,
            'hits' => (int)($__recentRun['hits'] ?? 0),
            'avg_rank' => (isset($__recentRun['avg_rank']) && $__recentRun['avg_rank'] !== null && $__recentRun['avg_rank'] !== '') ? round((float)$__recentRun['avg_rank'], 1) : null,
            'rank_score' => (isset($__recentRun['rank_score']) && $__recentRun['rank_score'] !== null && $__recentRun['rank_score'] !== '') ? round((float)$__recentRun['rank_score'], 3) : null
        );
    }

    $__elitePrimarySignal = $__bestSetupName;
    $__eliteZoneLabel = 'Need at least 5 scored SKAI runs before this zone can be trusted';
    $__eliteTrainingZoneLabel = 'Still building enough repeated history';
    $__eliteActionLabel = 'Keep saving SKAI runs across completed draws before narrowing to a final blend range.';
    $__eliteConfidenceLabel = 'Early read';
    $__eliteZoneSupport = 0;

    if (!empty($__eliteValidRuns)) {
        usort($__eliteValidRuns, function ($a, $b) {
            if ((float)$b['performance_score'] > (float)$a['performance_score']) { return 1; }
            if ((float)$b['performance_score'] < (float)$a['performance_score']) { return -1; }
            return (int)$b['run_id'] <=> (int)$a['run_id'];
        });

        $__eliteTopCount = count((array)$__eliteValidRuns) >= 5 ? max(3, (int)ceil(count((array)$__eliteValidRuns) * 0.5)) : count((array)$__eliteValidRuns);
        $__eliteTopRuns = array_slice($__eliteValidRuns, 0, $__eliteTopCount);
        $__eliteAiValues = array();
        $__eliteTrainingCounts = array();
        foreach ($__eliteTopRuns as $__eliteTopRun) {
            $__eliteAiValues[] = (float)$__eliteTopRun['ai'];
            $__eliteTrainingKey = trim((string)$__eliteTopRun['training_style']);
            if ($__eliteTrainingKey === '') {
                $__eliteTrainingKey = 'Unclassified';
            }
            if (!isset($__eliteTrainingCounts[$__eliteTrainingKey])) {
                $__eliteTrainingCounts[$__eliteTrainingKey] = 0;
            }
            $__eliteTrainingCounts[$__eliteTrainingKey]++;
        }

        if (!empty($__eliteAiValues)) {
            sort($__eliteAiValues);
            $__eliteZoneMin = (int)round(min($__eliteAiValues));
            $__eliteZoneMax = (int)round(max($__eliteAiValues));
            $__eliteZoneSupport = count((array)$__eliteTopRuns);
            $__eliteZoneLabel = 'AI Share ' . $__eliteZoneMin . '% to ' . $__eliteZoneMax . '%';

            if ($__eliteZoneSupport >= 8) {
                $__eliteConfidenceLabel = 'Strong pattern';
            } elseif ($__eliteZoneSupport >= 5) {
                $__eliteConfidenceLabel = 'Building pattern';
            } else {
                $__eliteConfidenceLabel = 'Early read';
            }

            if (!empty($__eliteTrainingCounts)) {
                arsort($__eliteTrainingCounts);
                $__eliteTrainingTop = (string)key($__eliteTrainingCounts);
                $__eliteTrainingTopCount = (int)current($__eliteTrainingCounts);
                $__eliteTrainingZoneLabel = $__eliteTrainingTop . ' (' . $__eliteTrainingTopCount . ' of ' . $__eliteZoneSupport . ' top run' . ($__eliteZoneSupport === 1 ? '' : 's') . ')';
                $__eliteActionLabel = 'Keep future testing inside ' . $__eliteZoneMin . '% to ' . $__eliteZoneMax . '% AI share and prioritize ' . $__eliteTrainingTop . ' before testing outside that band.';
            } else {
                $__eliteActionLabel = 'Keep future testing inside ' . $__eliteZoneMin . '% to ' . $__eliteZoneMax . '% AI share until a stronger training-style pattern emerges.';
            }
        }
    }

    $__recommendationTone = $__mleEliteRecommendationTone($__signalScore, $__stageScore, $__eliteZoneSupport, $__bestSetupHits, $__scoredRuns, $__drawCount);

    $__priorityScore = ($__signalScore * 100) + ($__stageScore * 10) + min($__totalRuns, 9);
    $__intelligenceTotalRuns += $__totalRuns;
    $__intelligenceCards[] = array(
        'lottery_name' => $__lotteryName,
        'evidence_stage' => $__evidenceStage,
        'evidence_stage_class' => $__mleEvidenceStageClass($__evidenceStage),
        'evidence_note' => $__evidenceNote,
        'signal_strength' => $__signalStrength,
        'signal_strength_class' => $__mleSignalStrengthClass($__signalStrength),
        'signal_note' => $__signalNote,
        'recommendation' => $__recommendation,
        'summary_bullets' => $__summaryBullets,
        'next_move' => $__nextMove,
        'tweak_action' => (string)$__tweakAdvice['action'],
        'tweak_stable' => (string)$__tweakAdvice['stable'],
        'priority_score' => $__priorityScore,
        'agreement_score' => $__agreementScore,
        'agreement_numbers_display' => !empty($__agreementNumbers) ? implode(', ', array_slice($__agreementNumbers, 0, 8)) : 'No overlap cluster yet',
        'best_setup_name' => $__bestSetupName,
        'best_setup_hits' => $__bestSetupHits,
        'best_setup_scored_runs' => $__bestSetupScoredRuns,
        'repeat_pool_display' => $__repeatPoolDisplay,
        'repeat_support_label' => $__repeatSupportLabel,
        'dominant_mode_text' => $__dominantModeText,
        'dominant_mode_entries' => $__dominantModeEntries,
        'elite_primary_signal' => $__elitePrimarySignal,
        'elite_zone_label' => $__eliteZoneLabel,
        'elite_training_zone_label' => $__eliteTrainingZoneLabel,
        'elite_action_label' => $__eliteActionLabel,
        'elite_confidence_label' => $__eliteConfidenceLabel,
        'elite_zone_support' => $__eliteZoneSupport,
        'recommendation_tone_class' => (string)$__recommendationTone['class'],
        'recommendation_tone_badge' => (string)$__recommendationTone['badge'],
        'recommendation_tone_note' => (string)$__recommendationTone['note'],
        'lottery_id' => (int)$__dLid,
        'best_setup_source' => $__bestSetupSource,
        'support_runs' => $__supportRuns,
        'validation_preview' => $__validationPreview,
        'total_runs' => $__totalRuns,
        'scored_runs' => $__scoredRuns,
        'draw_count' => $__drawCount,
        'coverage_note' => $__scoredRuns . ' scored run' . ($__scoredRuns === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' across ' . $__drawCount . ' completed draw' . ($__drawCount === 1 ? '' : 's') . '.',
    );
}

usort($__intelligenceCards, function ($a, $b) {
    return (int)$b['priority_score'] <=> (int)$a['priority_score'];
});
?>
<div class="mle-decision-summary" id="mle-decision-workspace" role="region" aria-label="What to focus on now summary">
  <div class="mle-decision-summary__header" style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
    <div>
      <div class="mle-decision-summary__eyebrow">Decision workspace</div>
      <h2 class="mle-decision-summary__title">Lottery Decision Workspace</h2>
      <p class="mle-decision-summary__subtitle">Each lottery opens into one guided workspace so the recommendation, proof, supporting runs, and recent validation stay together instead of being scattered across the page.</p>
    </div>
    <button type="button" class="prc-toggle-btn" id="mle-ci-toggle-all" aria-expanded="true">Collapse all</button>
  </div>
  <div class="mle-section-jump" aria-label="Decision Workspace quick navigation" style="margin:0 0 1rem;">
    <span class="mle-section-jump__label">Jump to</span>
    <div class="mle-section-jump__links">
      <a href="#info-card" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Overview</a>
      <a href="#mle-historical-validation-wrap" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Draw Results</a>
      <a href="#my-lotteries" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">My Lotteries</a>
      <a href="#numbers-to-play" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Numbers to Play</a>
      <a href="#favorite-lotteries" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Favorite Lotteries</a>
      <a href="#favorite-wheeling-systems" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Wheeling Systems</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="margin:0 0 1rem 0; padding:0.85rem 1rem; border:1px solid #dbe4f0; border-radius:12px; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f8fbff 0%,#ffffff 100%);">
    <div style="font-size:0.72rem; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em; color:#5b6b84; margin-bottom:0.45rem;">Visual guide</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:0.35rem;">Header badges</div>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.45rem 0.55rem; margin-bottom:0.65rem;">
      <span class="mle-ci-chip" style="border-color:#d1d5db; background:#f3f4f6; color:#374151;">Too early = not enough history yet</span>
      <span class="mle-ci-chip mle-ci-chip--amber">Building = patterns are starting to repeat</span>
      <span class="mle-ci-chip" style="border-color:#bfd3f2; background:#eef4ff; color:#1d4ed8;">Watch next = worth checking soon</span>
      <span class="mle-ci-chip mle-ci-chip--teal">Top focus = one of your strongest areas right now</span>
      <span class="mle-ci-chip" style="border-color:#d1d5db; background:#f8fafc; color:#334155;">Weak = low confirmation</span>
      <span class="mle-ci-chip mle-ci-chip--amber">Developing = useful clues appearing</span>
      <span class="mle-ci-chip" style="border-color:#bfd3f2; background:#eef4ff; color:#1d4ed8;">Moderate = enough to narrow</span>
      <span class="mle-ci-chip mle-ci-chip--teal">High = strongest confirmation</span>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:0.25rem;">Current Read badge</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.9rem; line-height:1.6; color:#334155;">
      Read each lottery card in this order: <strong>current read</strong>, <strong>why it is being recommended</strong>, <strong>which runs support it</strong>, and <strong>what to test next</strong>. The colored pill inside <strong>Current Read</strong> uses its own recommendation scale: <strong>High Conviction</strong>, <strong>Actionable</strong>, <strong>Early Signal</strong>, and <strong>Exploration Mode</strong>.
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="mle-decision-summary__grid" style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
    <div class="mle-summary-card">
      <span class="mle-summary-card__label">Lotteries in review</span>
      <span class="mle-summary-card__value"><?php echo (int)$__intelligenceActiveLotteries; ?></span>
      <div class="mle-summary-card__text">How many lotteries are included in this summary.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="mle-summary-card">
      <span class="mle-summary-card__label">Total saved results</span>
      <span class="mle-summary-card__value"><?php echo (int)$__intelligenceTotalRuns; ?></span>
      <div class="mle-summary-card__text">All saved results included in this summary.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="mle-summary-card">
      <span class="mle-summary-card__label">Patterns worth watching</span>
      <span class="mle-summary-card__value"><?php echo (int)$__intelligenceActionableLotteries; ?></span>
      <div class="mle-summary-card__text">Lotteries where patterns are starting to repeat enough to watch closely.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="mle-summary-card">
      <span class="mle-summary-card__label">Top focus lotteries</span>
      <span class="mle-summary-card__value"><?php echo (int)$__intelligenceHighConfidenceLotteries; ?></span>
      <div class="mle-summary-card__text">Lotteries with enough history to trust repeated patterns more than one lucky result.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="mle-next-step-box" style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
    <span class="mle-next-step-box__label">How this gets clearer over time</span>
    <p style="margin:0 0 0.55rem 0;"><strong>Fewer than 5 saved results:</strong> treat this as an early clue only. <strong>5 to 9 results:</strong> early patterns begin to appear. <strong>10 to 19 results:</strong> the page starts giving more dependable direction. <strong>20+ results:</strong> the page becomes much more useful for decision-making.</p>
    <p style="margin:0;">Each lottery card below explains what is repeating, what has worked, and what you may want to do next.</p>
  </div>

  <?php if (!empty($__intelligenceCards)): ?>
    <?php foreach ($__intelligenceCards as $__intIndex => $__intCard): ?>
      <?php
        $__ciSectionId = 'mle-ci-sec-' . (int)$__intIndex;
        $__agreementDisplay = (int)($__intCard['agreement_score'] ?? 0);
        $__bestSetupHitsDisplay = (int)($__intCard['best_setup_hits'] ?? 0);
        $__bestSetupRunsDisplay = (int)($__intCard['best_setup_scored_runs'] ?? 0);
        $__scoredRunsDisplay = (int)($__intCard['scored_runs'] ?? 0);
        $__drawCountDisplay = (int)($__intCard['draw_count'] ?? 0);
        $__repeatSupportDisplay = (string)($__intCard['repeat_support_label'] ?? '');
      ?>
      <div class="mle-ci-lottery-card mle-ci-section" id="<?php echo $__ciSectionId; ?>">
        <div class="prc-header" data-ci-toggle="<?php echo $__ciSectionId; ?>" role="button" tabindex="0"
             aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="<?php echo $__ciSectionId; ?>-body"
             >
          <div class="prc-header-left">
            <h3 class="prc-title"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__intCard['lottery_name'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></h3>
            <span class="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__intCard['evidence_stage_class'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__intCard['evidence_stage'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
            <span class="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__intCard['signal_strength_class'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__intCard['signal_strength'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
          </div>
          <button type="button" class="prc-toggle-btn" data-ci-id="<?php echo $__ciSectionId; ?>" data-ci-toggle-btn="1">Expand</button>
        </div>
        <div class="mle-ci-body" id="<?php echo $__ciSectionId; ?>-body" style="display:none;">
          <div class="mle-ci-decision-shell">
            <div class="mle-ci-decision-hero <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__intCard['recommendation_tone_class'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
              <?php
              $__currentReadBadge = ($__mleWorkspaceMode === 'beginner')
                  ? $__mleBeginnerStatusLabel($__intCard['recommendation_tone_badge'])
                  : (string)$__intCard['recommendation_tone_badge'];
              $__currentReadNote = ($__mleWorkspaceMode === 'beginner')
                  ? $__mleBeginnerStatusExplain($__intCard['recommendation_tone_badge'])
                  : (string)$__intCard['recommendation_tone_note'];
              ?>

Lower is better because it means the real draw showed up closer to the top of the list.</p>

<?php
// -- Best Setup Snapshot (server-side render) ----------------------
$__snapHasData = false;
foreach ($bestOpps as $__sopp) {
    $__bav = isset($__sopp['best_avg_hits']) ? $__sopp['best_avg_hits'] : null;
    if ($__bav && (int)($__bav['scored_runs'] ?? 0) > 0) { $__snapHasData = true; break; }
}

// Count totals for the summary metrics
$__snapTotalLotteries  = count((array)$bestOpps);
$__snapScoredLotteries = 0;
$__snapTotalScoredRuns = 0;
foreach ($bestOpps as $__sopp) {
    $__bav = isset($__sopp['best_avg_hits']) ? $__sopp['best_avg_hits'] : null;
    if ($__bav && (int)($__bav['scored_runs'] ?? 0) > 0) {
        $__snapScoredLotteries++;
        $__snapTotalScoredRuns += (int)$__bav['scored_runs'];
    }
}
?>

  <?php foreach ($__runSummary as $__prcLid => $__prcData):
      $__prcRuns      = $__prcData['runs'] ?? array();
      if (empty($__prcRuns)) { continue; }
      $__prcDisplayMeta = mylottoexpertResolveDisplayLocationMeta(
          (string)($__prcData['state_name'] ?? ''),
          (string)($__prcData['country_name'] ?? ''),
          (string)($__prcData['lottery_name'] ?? ''),
          (string)($__prcData['game_id'] ?? '')
      );
      $__prcLotName   = htmlspecialchars((string)$__prcDisplayMeta['lottery'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
      $__prcState     = htmlspecialchars((string)$__prcDisplayMeta['state'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
      $__prcMaxHits   = (int)$__prcData['max_hits'];
      $__prcBestRunId = (int)$__prcData['best_run_id'];
      $__prcTotal     = count((array)$__prcRuns);
      $__prcScored    = 0;
      foreach ($__prcRuns as $__pr) { if ($__pr['has_draw']) { $__prcScored++; } }
      $__prcPending   = max(0, $__prcTotal - $__prcScored);
      $__prcOfficialUrl = '';
      if (isset($lottoUrlsById[(int)$__prcLid])) {
          $__prcUrlCandidate = trim((string)$lottoUrlsById[(int)$__prcLid]);

              $__prcOfficialUrl = $__prcUrlCandidate;
          }
      }
      $__prcSectionId = 'prc-sec-' . (int)$__prcLid;
  ?>
  <div class="prc-section" id="<?php echo $__prcSectionId; ?>" data-historical-lottery="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__prcData['lottery_name'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
    <div class="prc-header" data-prc-toggle="<?php echo $__prcSectionId; ?>" role="button" tabindex="0"
          aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="<?php echo $__prcSectionId; ?>-body"
          >
<div class="prc-header-left">
        <h3 class="prc-title"><?php echo $__prcLotName; ?><?php echo $__prcState ? ' - ' . $__prcState : ''; ?></h3>

        <span class="prc-badge"><?php echo $__prcScored; ?> scored</span>
        <span class="prc-badge"><?php echo $__prcPending; ?> pending</span>
        <?php if ($__prcMaxHits > 0): ?>
          <span class="prc-badge prc-badge-best">Best: <?php echo $__prcMaxHits; ?> hits</span>

        <?php endif; ?>
        <button type="button" class="btn-secondary" style="padding:0.35rem 0.75rem;font-size:0.78rem;white-space:nowrap;" data-prc-print-lottery="1">Print This Lottery Result Table</button>

      </div>

          <tr>

            <th>Actual Numbers</th>
            <th>Main Hits</th>
            <th>Extra</th>
            <th>Total</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <?php
          $__prcRowNum   = 0;
          $__prevHasDraw = true;
          $__prcColCount = 10;
          foreach ($__prcRuns as $__pr):
              $__prcRowNum++;
              $__prSrc        = (string)$__pr['source'];
              $__prHasD       = (bool)$__pr['has_draw'];
              $__prMainHits   = ($__prHasD && $__pr['hits_main'] !== null)  ? (int)$__pr['hits_main']  : null;
              $__prExtraHits  = ($__prHasD && $__pr['hits_extra'] !== null) ? (int)$__pr['hits_extra'] : null;
              $__prTotal      = (int)($__prMainHits ?? 0) + (int)($__prExtraHits ?? 0);
              $__prIsBest     = ($__prHasD && (int)$__pr['run_id'] === $__prcBestRunId && $__prcMaxHits > 0);
              $__prRowClass   = $__prIsBest ? 'prc-row-best' : ($__prHasD ? '' : 'prc-row-pending');

              // Insert separator row before upcoming section
              if ($__prevHasDraw && !$__prHasD):
          ?>
          <tr><td colspan="10" class="prc-section-subhead">Upcoming draws not yet scored</td></tr>
          <?php
              endif;
              $__prevHasDraw = $__prHasD;

              // Draw date display
              $__prDateTs  = strtotime((string)$__pr['draw_date']);
              $__prDateStr = $__prDateTs ? date('M j, Y', $__prDateTs) : htmlspecialchars((string)$__pr['draw_date'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');

              // Method badge class
              $__prSrcClass = 'prc-src-skip';
              if ($__prSrc === 'ai_prediction')   { $__prSrcClass = 'prc-src-ai'; }
              elseif ($__prSrc === 'mcmc_prediction') { $__prSrcClass = 'prc-src-mcmc'; }
              elseif ($__prSrc === 'skai_prediction') { $__prSrcClass = 'prc-src-skai'; }
              elseif ($__prSrc === 'heatmap')         { $__prSrcClass = 'prc-src-heatmap'; }

              $__prDispInfo   = $__pr['disp'];
              $__prBaseLabel  = htmlspecialchars((string)$__prDispInfo['base_label'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
              $__prMode       = htmlspecialchars((string)$__prDispInfo['mode'],  ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
              $__prLabel      = htmlspecialchars((string)$__prDispInfo['label'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
              $__prModeLabel  = $__prLabel !== '' ? $__prLabel : ($__prMode !== '' ? $__prMode : ' - ');
              $__prDiag       = (array)($__pr['diag'] ?? array());
              $__showDailyDiag = !empty($__pr['is_daily']) && $__prHasD && empty($__pr['actual_extra']);
          ?>
          <tr class="<?php echo $__prRowClass; ?>">
            <td class="prc-del-col">
              <input type="checkbox" name="prc_del_<?php echo $__prcSectionId; ?>" value="<?php echo (int)$__pr['run_id']; ?>" id="pdel-<?php echo (int)$__pr['run_id']; ?>" aria-label="Select prediction #<?php echo $__prcRowNum; ?> for deletion">
            </td>

              <?php if ($__prIsBest): ?><span class="prc-trophy"></span><?php endif; ?>
              <?php echo $__prcRowNum; ?>

            <td style="color:#475569;font-size:0.8rem;"><?php echo $__prModeLabel; ?></td>
            <td>
              <?php
                // Use array_flip for O(1) lookup instead of O(m) in_array per number
                $__actualLookup      = $__prHasD ? array_flip((array)$__pr['actual_main']) : array();
                $__actualExtraLookup = $__prHasD ? array_flip((array)$__pr['actual_extra']) : array();
                // Build predicted-extra lookup (all predicted extras) for hit-highlighting below
                if (!empty($__pr['pred_extra_all'])) {
                    $__predExtraAllLookup = array_flip($__pr['pred_extra_all']);
                } elseif ($__pr['pred_extra'] !== null && $__pr['pred_extra'] !== '') {
                    $__predExtraAllLookup = array((int)$__pr['pred_extra'] => 0);
                } else {
                    $__predExtraAllLookup = array();
                }
              ?>
              <?php if (!empty($__pr['is_daily']) && !empty($__pr['pred_combo_strings'])): ?>
                <?php $__dailyActualDigits = $__prHasD ? array_values((array)$__pr['actual_main']) : array(); ?>
                <?php foreach ($__pr['pred_combo_strings'] as $__combo): ?>
                  <?php
                    $__comboDigitsDisp = str_split((string)$__combo);
                    $__dailyActualRemaining = $__prHasD ? array_count_values(array_map('strval', $__dailyActualDigits)) : array();
                  ?>
                  <div class="prc-daily-combo-row">
                    <?php foreach ($__comboDigitsDisp as $__idx => $__digit): ?>
                      <?php
                        $__dailyDigitKey = (string)$__digit;
                        $__dailyDigitHit = ($__prHasD && !empty($__dailyActualRemaining[$__dailyDigitKey]));
                        if ($__dailyDigitHit) {
                            $__dailyActualRemaining[$__dailyDigitKey]--;
                        }
                      ?>
                      <span class="prc-num <?php echo $__dailyDigitHit ? 'prc-num-hit' : ''; ?>"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__digit, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                  </div>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
                <?php if (!empty($__pr['pred_extra_all'])): ?>
                  <div class="prc-daily-combo-row">
                    <span class="prc-extra-group"><?php foreach ($__pr['pred_extra_all'] as $__pex):
                      $__predExHit = $__prHasD && isset($__actualExtraLookup[$__pex]); ?>
                    <span class="prc-num <?php echo $__predExHit ? 'prc-num-extra' : 'prc-num-extra-miss'; ?>" title="Predicted extra ball">
                      <?php echo htmlspecialchars(mylottoexpertFormatBonusDigit($__pex), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
                    </span>
                    <?php endforeach; ?></span>
                  </div>
                <?php endif; ?>
              <?php else: ?>
                <?php foreach ($__pr['pred_main'] as $__pn):

                <?php if (!empty($__pr['pred_extra_all'])): ?>
                  <span class="prc-extra-group"><?php foreach ($__pr['pred_extra_all'] as $__pex):

                  <span class="prc-num <?php echo $__predExHit ? 'prc-num-extra' : 'prc-num-extra-miss'; ?>" title="Predicted extra ball">
                    <?php echo (int)$__pex; ?>
                  </span>
                  <?php endforeach; ?></span>
                <?php elseif ($__pr['pred_extra'] > 0): ?>
                  <span class="prc-extra-group"><?php $__predExHit = $__prHasD && isset($__actualExtraLookup[$__pr['pred_extra']]); ?>
                  <span class="prc-num <?php echo $__predExHit ? 'prc-num-extra' : 'prc-num-extra-miss'; ?>" title="Predicted extra ball">
                    <?php echo (int)$__pr['pred_extra']; ?>
                  </span></span>
                <?php endif; ?>
              <?php endif; ?>
            </td>
            <td>
              <?php if ($__prHasD && !empty($__pr['actual_main'])): ?>
                <?php if (!empty($__pr['is_daily'])): ?>
                  <?php $__bestDailyDigitsActual = array_values((array)$__pr['pred_main']); ?>
                  <?php $__bestDailyPredRemaining = array_count_values(array_map('strval', $__bestDailyDigitsActual)); ?>
                  <?php foreach ($__pr['actual_main'] as $__ai => $__an):
                    $__actualDailyKey = (string)$__an;

                    if ($__anHit) {
                        $__bestDailyPredRemaining[$__actualDailyKey]--;

                ?><span class="prc-num <?php echo $__anHit ? 'prc-num-hit' : ''; ?>"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__an, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span><?php endforeach; ?>

                <?php
                  // Green for actual numbers that were predicted (matched)

                ?><span class="prc-num <?php echo $__anHit ? 'prc-num-hit' : ''; ?>"><?php echo (int)$__an; ?></span><?php endforeach; ?>

              <?php elseif (!$__prHasD): ?>

                <span class="prc-pending-lbl">N/A</span>
              <?php endif; ?>

            </td>

<?php
// -- SKAI Learning performance: preload history for all active lottery IDs --
// Keyed by lottery_id => array of performance records (most-recent-first)
$__skaiPerfByLottery = array();
foreach ($groups as $__g2) {
    $__g2Lid = (int)$__g2['lottery_id'];
    if (!isset($__skaiPerfByLottery[$__g2Lid])) {
        $__skaiPerfByLottery[$__g2Lid] = skaiLoadPerformanceHistory($db, $workspaceUserId, $__g2Lid, 100);
    }
}
unset($__g2, $__g2Lid);

// -- Build per-lottery grouped list (outer container by lottery, draws sorted newest first) --
$__byLottery = array();           // lottery_id => ['lottery_id','lottery_name','groups'=>[...]]
$__lotteryOrder = array();        // preserve first-seen lottery ordering
foreach ($groups as $__gKey => $__gVal) {
    $__lid = (int)$__gVal['lottery_id'];
    if (!isset($__byLottery[$__lid])) {
        $__byLottery[$__lid] = array(
            'lottery_id'   => $__lid,
            'lottery_name' => (string)$__gVal['lottery_name'],
            'groups'       => array(),
        );
        $__lotteryOrder[] = $__lid;
    }
    $__byLottery[$__lid]['groups'][$__gKey] = $__gVal;
}
// Within each lottery, sort draws newest-first
foreach ($__byLottery as &$__lotRef) {
    uasort($__lotRef['groups'], function ($a, $b) {
        return strcmp((string)($b['draw_date'] ?? ''), (string)($a['draw_date'] ?? ''));
    });
}
unset($__lotRef);
?>

  <div class="mle-lottery-outer-body">

  }
  $meta     = $lottoMetaById[$g['lottery_id']] ?? [];
  $state    = $meta['state'] ?? '';
  $country  = $meta['country'] ?? '';
?>

  <div class="sdi-header lottery-header skai-card__header">
    <div class="sdi-snapshot-bar">
      <div class="sdi-snap-left">

<?php
  $logo = ['path'=>'','exists'=>false,'alt'=>''];
  if (!empty($g['lottery_name'])) {
      $logo = buildLotteryLogoPath((string)$state, (string)$g['lottery_name']);

      $parts = preg_split('/\s+/', (string)$g['lottery_name']);
      $ini   = '';
      foreach ($parts as $p) { if ($p !== '') { $ini .= mb_strtoupper(mb_substr($p,0,1)); if (mb_strlen($ini) >= 2) break; } }
      $iniFallback = htmlspecialchars($ini ?: 'LE', ENT_QUOTES);

  $lotName = '';

  $__drawHeader = mylottoexpertFormatLotteryLocationLine($state, $country, $lotName, (string)($g['game_id'] ?? ''));
?>

      $ts = strtotime((string)($g['draw_date'] ?? ''));

          Collapse

                 aria-label="Print all predictions for this lottery"

               aria-label="Delete predictions for this draw"
               data-confirm-submit="Delete all predictions for this draw?">
          <?php echo \Joomla\CMS\HTML\HTMLHelper::_('form.token'); ?>
          <input type="hidden" name="delete_lottery_predictions" value="1">
          <input type="hidden" name="lottery_id" value="<?php echo (int)$g['lottery_id']; ?>">
          <input type="hidden" name="draw_date" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($g['draw_date'], ENT_QUOTES); ?>">
          <input type="hidden" name="prediction_target_id" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($g['prediction_target_id'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES); ?>">
          <input type="hidden" name="target_draw_at" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($g['target_draw_at'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES); ?>">
          <input type="hidden" name="target_draw_session" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($g['target_draw_session'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES); ?>">
          <button type="submit"
                   class="sdi-delete-btn"
                   aria-label="Delete all predictions for this draw"
                   title="Delete all predictions for this draw">
            <span aria-hidden="true"></span> Delete
          </button>
        </form><?php endif; ?>
