    </div>
  </div>
  
  <div class="lottery-collapsible-content">

      <?php
        // --------------------------------------------------------------
        // GROUP-LEVEL: Placement & Performance Stats (per lottery/draw)
        // Derives rank positions from the order of saved main_numbers.
        // Also sets pre/post mode based on whether the actual draw exists.
        // --------------------------------------------------------------

        // Build per-method buckets for this group
$methodKeys = ['skip_hit','ai_prediction','mcmc_prediction','skai_prediction','heatmap'];
        $predsBySource = [];
        foreach ($g['preds'] as $__r) { $predsBySource[$__r->source][] = $__r; }

        // Fetch single actual draw row for the group (once)
        $__fields   = getDrawFields($g['game_id']);
        $__drawRow  = getDrawByDate($g['game_id'], $g['draw_date'], $db, ($g['target_draw_session'] ?? null), ($g['target_draw_at'] ?? null));
        $__drawMain = [];
        $__drawExtra = [];
        if ($__drawRow) {
          foreach (($__fields['main'] ?? []) as $__c) {
            if (isset($__drawRow[$__c]) && $__drawRow[$__c] !== '') { $__drawMain[] = (int)$__drawRow[$__c]; }
          }
          if (!empty($__fields['extra']) && isset($__drawRow[$__fields['extra']]) && $__drawRow[$__fields['extra']] !== '') {
            $__drawExtra[] = (int)$__drawRow[$__fields['extra']];
          }
          // Fallback for daily games: no main_ball_columns configured, so the loop above
          // produces no data. Use the defensive numeric-scan extractor on the raw row.
          if (empty($__drawMain)) {
              $__hmExt   = mylottoexpertExtractDrawNumbersFromRow($g['game_id'], $__drawRow);
              $__drawMain  = $__hmExt['main'];   // includes 0 (valid Pick3/4 digit)
              if (empty($__drawExtra)) { $__drawExtra = $__hmExt['extra']; }
          }
        }

        // Mode: pre (no draw yet) vs post (draw completed)
        $__mode = $__drawRow ? 'post' : 'pre';

        // Limits: up to 20 main ranks, up to 5 extra ranks
        $__maxRankMain  = 20;
        $__maxRankExtra = 5;

        // Initialize stats
        $placementStats = [];
        $hitsByMethod   = [];
        $predCountByMethod = [];
        foreach ($methodKeys as $__m) {
          $placementStats[$__m] = [
            'main'  => array_fill(1, $__maxRankMain, 0),
            'extra' => array_fill(1, $__maxRankExtra, 0),
            'main_hits_total'  => 0,
            'extra_hits_total' => 0
          ];
          $hitsByMethod[$__m] = ['runs'=>0,'mainHits'=>0,'extraHits'=>0];
          $predCountByMethod[$__m] = isset($predsBySource[$__m]) ? count($predsBySource[$__m]) : 0;
        }

        $totalRuns = count((array)($g['preds'] ?? array()));
        $totalMainHits = 0;
        $totalExtraHits = 0;

        // Helper: map number -> position (1-based) for a prediction string
        $toPositions = function (string $csv, int $limit) {
          $arr = array_values(array_filter(array_map('trim', explode(',', $csv)), fn($v)=>$v!==''));
          $pos = [];
          foreach ($arr as $i => $n) {
            if ($i >= $limit) break;
            $num = (int)$n;
            if (!isset($pos[$num])) { $pos[$num] = $i + 1; } // first occurrence = rank
          }
          return $pos;
        };

        // Crunch stats - use the BEST run per method (most total hits -> lowest
        // pos_sum tiebreak -> highest run_id) so the heatmap reflects the
        // prediction that performed best, not merely the first saved run.

        // Pass 1: identify best run per method
        $__heatmapBestRun = array();
        foreach ($g['preds'] as $__run) {
          $src = $__run->source;
          if (!in_array($src, $methodKeys, true)) { $src = 'skip_hit'; }

          $posMain  = $toPositions((string)($__run->main_numbers ?? ''), $__maxRankMain);
          $posExtra = $toPositions((string)($__run->extra_ball_numbers ?? ''), $__maxRankExtra);

          // Score this run against the actual draw
          $__rmh = 0; $__reh = 0; $__rps = 0;
          foreach ($__drawMain  as $__dh) { if (isset($posMain[$__dh]))  { $__rmh++; $__rps += $posMain[$__dh]; } }
          foreach ($__drawExtra as $__de) { if (isset($posExtra[$__de])) { $__reh++; } }
          $__rTotal = $__rmh + $__reh;
          $__runId  = (int)$__run->id;

          $__ex = $__heatmapBestRun[$src] ?? null;
          // Priority: 1) most total hits (main+extra), 2) lowest pos_sum
          // (matched numbers appear earlier in the ranked list = better),
          // 3) highest run_id (most recent save wins the tiebreak).
          $__better = ($__ex === null)
            || ($__rTotal > $__ex['totalHits'])
            || ($__rTotal === $__ex['totalHits'] && $__rps < $__ex['posSum'])
            || ($__rTotal === $__ex['totalHits'] && $__rps === $__ex['posSum'] && $__runId > $__ex['runId']);
          if ($__better) {
            $__heatmapBestRun[$src] = [
              'run'       => $__run,
              'posMain'   => $posMain,
              'posExtra'  => $posExtra,
              'totalHits' => $__rTotal,
              'posSum'    => $__rps,
              'runId'     => $__runId,
            ];
          }
        }

        // Pass 2: accumulate placement stats using only the best run per method
        foreach ($__heatmapBestRun as $src => $__hbr) {
          $posMain  = $__hbr['posMain'];
          $posExtra = $__hbr['posExtra'];

          $hitsByMethod[$src]['runs']++;

          // Compare to actual draw mains (only meaningful if post mode)
          foreach ($__drawMain as $__hit) {
            if (isset($posMain[$__hit])) {
              $rank = (int)$posMain[$__hit];
              if ($rank >= 1 && $__maxRankMain >= $rank) {
                $placementStats[$src]['main'][$rank]++;
                $placementStats[$src]['main_hits_total']++;
                $hitsByMethod[$src]['mainHits']++;
                $totalMainHits++;
              }
            }
          }

          // Compare to actual extra(s)
          foreach ($__drawExtra as $__e) {
            if (isset($posExtra[$__e])) {
              $rankE = (int)$posExtra[$__e];
              if ($rankE >= 1 && $__maxRankExtra >= $rankE) {
                $placementStats[$src]['extra'][$rankE]++;
                $placementStats[$src]['extra_hits_total']++;
                $hitsByMethod[$src]['extraHits']++;
                $totalExtraHits++;
              }
            }
          }
        }

        // Compute method "sweet spots": top 2 rank positions by main hit count
        $sweetSpots = [];
        foreach ($methodKeys as $__m) {
          $row = $placementStats[$__m]['main'];
          arsort($row);
          $tops = array_slice(array_keys($row), 0, 2);
          $tops = array_values(array_filter($tops, fn($k) => $placementStats[$__m]['main'][$k] > 0));
          $sweetSpots[$__m] = $tops; // e.g., [4,7]
        }

        // Averages
        $avgMainHitsPerRun  = $totalRuns ? round($totalMainHits / $totalRuns, 2) : 0;
        $avgExtraHitsPerRun = $totalRuns ? round($totalExtraHits / $totalRuns, 2) : 0;

        // Short labels
        $labelShort = [
          'skip_hit'        => 'Skip & Hit',
          'ai_prediction'   => 'AI',
          'mcmc_prediction' => 'MCMC',
          'skai_prediction' => 'SKAI',      // NEW
          'heatmap'         => 'Heatmap',
        ];

        // Extra-ball label for this draw
        $__extraLabel = 'Extra Ball';
        $__lcCfg = $configData['lotteries'][$g['game_id']]['lotteryConfig'] ?? [];
        if (!empty($__lcCfg['extra_ball_label'])) {
            $__extraLabel = (string)$__lcCfg['extra_ball_label'];
        } else {
            $__lname = strtolower((string)($g['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
            if     (strpos($__lname, 'powerball')  !== false) $__extraLabel = 'Powerball';
            elseif (strpos($__lname, 'mega')       !== false) $__extraLabel = 'Mega Ball';
            elseif (strpos($__lname, 'lucky star') !== false) $__extraLabel = 'Lucky Star';
            elseif (strpos($__lname, 'bonus')      !== false) $__extraLabel = 'Bonus Ball';
        }

        // Whether any saved prediction for this group has an extra ball
        $__anyExtraPred = false;
        foreach ($g['preds'] as $__xr) {
            if (!empty($__xr->extra_ball_numbers)) { $__anyExtraPred = true; break; }
        }
      ?>

  <!-- SDI: one-sentence summary -->
  <div class="sdi-summary">
    <?php
      $__mwh = 0; $__br = [];
      foreach ($methodKeys as $__sm) {
        if ($hitsByMethod[$__sm]['mainHits'] > 0) {
          $__mwh++;
          $tops = $sweetSpots[$__sm] ?? [];
          $__br = array_merge($__br, $tops);
        }
      }
      $__br = array_unique($__br); sort($__br);
      $__rct = $totalRuns === 1 ? '1 saved run' : $totalRuns . ' saved runs';
      if ($__mode === 'post') {
        if ($totalMainHits === 0) {
          $__sum = $__rct . ' saved - no main-number hits recorded yet.';
        } else {
          $__rt = !empty($__br) ? 'strongest at rank ' . implode(', ', array_slice($__br,0,3)) : 'distributed across ranks';
          $__sum = $__rct . ' - ' . $totalMainHits . ' main hit' . ($totalMainHits !== 1 ? 's' : '') . ' across ' . $__mwh . ' method' . ($__mwh !== 1 ? 's' : '') . ', ' . $__rt . '.';
        }
      } else {
        $__sum = $__rct . ' for the upcoming draw. Check the Past results tab for rank placement.';
      }
    ?>
    <?php echo $__sum; ?>
    <span class="sdi-badge-wrap" data-sdi-badges
          style="display:none; margin-left:0.5rem;">
      <span class="sdi-badge sdi-badge--ovl"
             data-sdi-overlap-badge
             aria-label="Overlap count">Overlap: 0</span>
      <span class="sdi-badge sdi-badge--conf"
             data-sdi-confidence-badge
             aria-label="Confidence level">Level:  - </span>
    </span>
  </div>
  <!-- SDI Tab Bar -->
  <div class="sdi-tab-bar" role="tablist" aria-label="Draw analysis sections">
    <button class="sdi-tab" role="tab" type="button"
             aria-selected="true" data-sdi-tab="overview"
             tabindex="0"><?php echo $__mleWorkspaceMode === 'beginner' ? 'Simple view' : 'Current draw support'; ?></button>
    <button class="sdi-tab" role="tab" type="button"
             aria-selected="false" data-sdi-tab="performance"
             tabindex="-1"><?php echo $__mleWorkspaceMode === 'beginner' ? 'Completed draw proof' : 'Past results'; ?></button>
    <?php if ($__mleWorkspaceMode !== 'beginner'): ?>
    <button class="sdi-tab" role="tab" type="button"
             aria-selected="false" data-sdi-tab="methods"
             tabindex="-1">Method comparison</button>
    <?php endif; ?>
    <?php if ($__mleWorkspaceMode === 'advanced'): ?>
    <button class="sdi-tab" role="tab" type="button"
             aria-selected="false" data-sdi-tab="settings"
             tabindex="-1">Saved run details</button>
    <?php endif; ?>
  </div>
  <!-- OVERVIEW TAB -->
  <div class="sdi-panel" data-sdi-panel="overview" role="tabpanel">
    <?php
      // Pre-compute game config shared by both PRE and POST overview modes
      $__swGid        = (string)($g['game_id'] ?? '');
      $__swHasExtra   = 0; $__swMainMax = 0; $__swExtraMax = 0; $__swExtraCnt = 0;
      $__swExtraLabel = 'Extra Ball';
      $__swCfgFile    = JPATH_ROOT . '/lottery_skip_config.json';
      if (is_file($__swCfgFile)) {
        $__swCfg = json_decode((string)file_get_contents($__swCfgFile), true);
        if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE && !empty($__swCfg['lotteries'][$__swGid]['lotteryConfig'])) {
          $__swLc       = $__swCfg['lotteries'][$__swGid]['lotteryConfig'];
          $__swMainMax  = (int)($__swLc['max_main_ball_number'] ?? 0);
          $__swHasExtra = !empty($__swLc['has_extra_ball']) ? 1 : 0;
          $__swExtraMax = (int)($__swLc['max_extra_ball_number'] ?? 0);
          $__swExtraCnt = max(0, (int)($__swLc['num_extra_balls_drawn'] ?? 0));
          if (!empty($__swLc['extra_ball_label'])) { $__swExtraLabel = (string)$__swLc['extra_ball_label']; }
        }
      }
      if ($__swExtraLabel === 'Extra Ball') {
        $__swLname = strtolower((string)($g['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
        if      (strpos($__swLname, 'powerball') !== false) { $__swExtraLabel = 'Powerball'; }
        elseif  (strpos($__swLname, 'mega')      !== false) { $__swExtraLabel = 'Mega Ball'; }
        elseif  (strpos($__swLname, 'star')      !== false) { $__swExtraLabel = 'Lucky Star'; }
        elseif  (strpos($__swLname, 'bonus')     !== false) { $__swExtraLabel = 'Bonus Ball'; }
      }
      $__swModMap   = [];
      foreach ($modules as $__swM2) { $__swModMap[$__swM2['key']] = $__swM2; }
      $__swPredData = [];
      foreach ($g['preds'] as $__swS2) {
        $__swPredData[] = [
          'id'     => (int)$__swS2->id,
          'source' => (string)$__swS2->source,
          'label'  => (string)($__swS2->label ?? ''),
          'mains'  => array_values(array_filter(array_map('intval', explode(',', (string)($__swS2->main_numbers ?? ''))))),
          'extras' => array_values(array_filter(array_map('intval', explode(',', (string)($__swS2->extra_ball_numbers ?? ''))))),
        ];
      }
      $__swModListJson = json_encode(
        array_map(function($m){ return ['key'=>$m['key'],'label'=>$m['label']]; }, $modules),
        JSON_HEX_TAG | JSON_HEX_AMP
      );
    ?>

    <?php
      $__spMainFreq = array();
      $__spSourceFreq = array();
      $__spSavedRunsLite = array();
      foreach ($g['preds'] as $__spPred) {
          $__spMains = array_values(array_filter(array_map('intval', explode(',', (string)($__spPred->main_numbers ?? '')))));
          foreach ($__spMains as $__spNum) {
              $__spMainFreq[$__spNum] = ($__spMainFreq[$__spNum] ?? 0) + 1;
          }
          $__spSource = (string)($__spPred->source ?? '');
          if ($__spSource !== '') {
              $__spSourceFreq[$__spSource] = ($__spSourceFreq[$__spSource] ?? 0) + 1;
          }
          $__spSavedRunsLite[] = array(
              'label' => trim((string)($__spPred->label ?? '')),
              'source' => $__spSource,
              'saved_at' => (string)($__spPred->generated_at ?: $__spPred->date_saved),
              'mains' => $__spMains
          );
      }
      arsort($__spMainFreq);
      arsort($__spSourceFreq);
      $__spTopNums = array_slice(array_keys($__spMainFreq), 0, 5);
      $__spTopSourceKey = !empty($__spSourceFreq) ? (string)array_key_first($__spSourceFreq) : '';
      $__spTopSourceLabel = $__swModMap[$__spTopSourceKey]['label'] ?? ($__spTopSourceKey !== '' ? ucwords(str_replace('_',' ', $__spTopSourceKey)) : 'No method yet');
      $__spCompletedProofCount = 0;
      foreach ($g['preds'] as $__spPredCheck) {
          if (!empty($__spPredCheck->draw_results) || !empty($__spPredCheck->total_hits)) { $__spCompletedProofCount++; }
      }
      $__spTrustLabel = 'Too early to trust';
      $__spTrustText = 'You are still building history. Use these saved runs as early clues only.';
      if ($totalRuns >= 10 && $__spCompletedProofCount >= 3) {
          $__spTrustLabel = 'Ready to follow';
          $__spTrustText = 'You now have enough saved history to start narrowing attention to the strongest repeated runs.';
      } elseif ($totalRuns >= 5 || $__spCompletedProofCount >= 2) {
          $__spTrustLabel = 'Starting to become useful';
          $__spTrustText = 'Some repetition is appearing, but you still need more completed draws before trusting it strongly.';
      }
      $__spNextStep = ($totalRuns < 5)
          ? 'Keep saving only your strongest run for each draw so this section becomes easier to trust.'
          : (($__spCompletedProofCount < 2)
              ? 'Wait for more completed draws, then check whether the same runs or methods keep showing up.'
              : 'Keep watching the saved runs and repeated numbers below before changing direction.');
      $__spTopRuns = array_slice($__spSavedRunsLite, 0, min(3, count($__spSavedRunsLite)));
    ?>
    <?php if ($__mleWorkspaceMode === 'beginner'): ?>
    <?php
      $__spTrustClass = 'mle-sp-beginner__card mle-sp-beginner__card--early';
      if ($__spTrustLabel === 'Ready to follow') {
          $__spTrustClass = 'mle-sp-beginner__card mle-sp-beginner__card--ready';
      } elseif ($__spTrustLabel === 'Starting to become useful') {
          $__spTrustClass = 'mle-sp-beginner__card mle-sp-beginner__card--building';
      }
      $__spRepeatText = !empty($__spTopNums)
          ? implode(', ', $__spTopNums)
          : 'No clear repeat pattern yet';
      $__spRepeatExplain = !empty($__spTopNums)
          ? 'These are the main numbers showing up most often across the saved runs you kept for this draw.'
          : 'Your saved runs are still too scattered to point to a clear repeating set of numbers.';
      $__spMethodExplain = ($__spTopSourceLabel !== 'Mixed')
          ? 'This method is showing up most often in the runs you decided to keep for this draw.'
          : 'No single method is dominating yet. The saved runs are still mixed.';
    ?>
    <div class="mle-sp-beginner">
      <span class="mle-sp-beginner__eyebrow">Beginner Saved Predictions View</span>

      <p class="mle-sp-beginner__text">This is the beginner read for this draw. Start at the top left, move across, and finish with the next-step card so you know exactly what matters first.</p>
      <div class="mle-sp-beginner__grid">
        <div class="<?php echo $__spTrustClass; ?>">
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-label">1. Can I trust this yet?</span>
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__spTrustLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-sub"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__spTrustText, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
        </div>
        <div class="mle-sp-beginner__card">
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-label">2. What keeps repeating?</span>
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__spRepeatText, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-sub"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__spRepeatExplain, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
        </div>
        <div class="mle-sp-beginner__card">
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-label">3. Which style shows up most?</span>
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__spTopSourceLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-sub"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__spMethodExplain, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
        </div>
        <div class="mle-sp-beginner__card mle-sp-beginner__card--next">
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-label">4. What should I do next?</span>
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-value">Follow the strongest repeats</span>
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-sub"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__spNextStep, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <?php if (!empty($__spTopRuns)): ?>
      <div class="mle-sp-beginner__runs-wrap">
        <div class="mle-sp-beginner__runs-head">
          <strong>Saved runs to watch first</strong>
          <span>These are the few runs worth checking before you open deeper tabs.</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mle-sp-beginner__runs">
          <?php foreach ($__spTopRuns as $__spTopRun): ?>
            <?php
              $__spRunName = $__spTopRun['label'] !== '' ? $__spTopRun['label'] : ($__swModMap[$__spTopRun['source']]['label'] ?? 'Saved run');

    <!-- =====================================================
         POST-DRAW OVERVIEW: Learning Center

    <?php
      // Compute best-performing method and active method count for the Result Recap card
      // All source variables ($hitsByMethod, $methodKeys, $labelShort, $sweetSpots, $__br)
      // are already set by the heatmap stats block and the sdi-summary block above.
      $__postBestMethod = null;
      $__postBestHits   = 0;
      $__postActiveMethodCount = 0;
      foreach ($methodKeys as $__pbm) {
        // isset() guard: $hitsByMethod is always initialised for all $methodKeys above,
        // but defensive check prevents errors if array structure is ever unexpected.
        if (isset($hitsByMethod[$__pbm]['runs']) && $hitsByMethod[$__pbm]['runs'] > 0) {
          $__postActiveMethodCount++;
        }
        if (isset($hitsByMethod[$__pbm]['mainHits']) && $hitsByMethod[$__pbm]['mainHits'] > $__postBestHits) {
          $__postBestHits   = $hitsByMethod[$__pbm]['mainHits'];
          $__postBestMethod = $__pbm;
        }
      }

      // $__br is sorted array of best rank positions (from sdi-summary block)
      $__postBestRanks = array_slice($__br, 0, 3);

      // Build formatted rank string once - reused in both the stats row and the takeaway
      $__postRankStr = '';
      if (!empty($__postBestRanks)) {
        $__brf = [];
        foreach ($__postBestRanks as $__brv) { $__brf[] = '#' . (int)$__brv; }
        $__postRankStr = implode(', ', $__brf);
      }

      // Hero subtitle: constructed here for readability, not inline in HTML
      if ($totalMainHits > 0) {
        $__postHeroSub = 'This draw recorded ' . (int)$totalMainHits . ' main-number match'
          . ($totalMainHits !== 1 ? 'es' : '')
          . ' across ' . (int)$__mwh . ' method'
          . ($__mwh !== 1 ? 's' : '')
          . '. Review where support was strongest and carry that evidence into the next cycle.';
      } else {
        $__postHeroSub = 'No main-number matches were recorded for this draw. This is useful baseline evidence - use it to understand which rank positions and methods need calibration before the next draw.';
      }

      // Build strongest takeaway sentence from actual result data
      if ($totalMainHits === 0) {
        $__postTakeaway = 'No main-number matches were recorded for this draw. This is useful calibration evidence - review rank placement in the Performance tab to understand where methods placed relative to the drawn numbers.';
      } elseif ($__postBestMethod !== null && $__postRankStr !== '') {
        $__ptLabel  = htmlspecialchars((string)($labelShort[$__postBestMethod] ?? $__postBestMethod), ENT_QUOTES);
        $__postTakeaway = 'Support was strongest in the ' . $__ptLabel . ' method. Rank concentration appeared at position ' . $__postRankStr . '. Carry this rank preference into the next cycle.';
      } elseif ($__postBestMethod !== null) {
        $__ptLabel  = htmlspecialchars((string)($labelShort[$__postBestMethod] ?? $__postBestMethod), ENT_QUOTES);
        $__postTakeaway = 'Support was strongest in the ' . $__ptLabel . ' method. Review the Performance tab for detailed rank placement data.';
      } else {
        $__postTakeaway = 'Review the Performance tab for detailed rank placement data relative to the drawn numbers.';
      }
    ?>

    <!-- A. Hero Strip (data-aware copy) -->
    <div class="skai-ov-hero">
      <div class="skai-ov-hero-label">After the draw</div>
      <div class="skai-ov-hero-title">How your predictions scored</div>
      <div class="skai-ov-hero-sub"><?php echo $__postHeroSub; ?></div>
    </div>

    <!-- B. KPI Signal Row (success gradient on Main Hits when confirmed matches exist) -->
    <div class="skai-ov-kpi-row">
      <div class="skai-ov-kpi-card<?php echo $totalMainHits > 0 ? ' skai-ov-kpi-card--success' : ''; ?>">
        <div class="skai-ov-kpi-label">Main Hits</div>
        <div class="skai-ov-kpi-value"><?php echo (int)$totalMainHits; ?></div>
        <?php if ($__swHasExtra): ?>
        <div class="skai-ov-kpi-sub"><?php echo (int)$totalExtraHits; ?> <?php echo htmlspecialchars($__swExtraLabel, ENT_QUOTES); ?> hit<?php echo $totalExtraHits !== 1 ? 's' : ''; ?></div>
        <?php endif; ?>
      </div>
      <div class="skai-ov-kpi-card">

        <div class="skai-ov-kpi-sub">of <?php echo (int)$__postActiveMethodCount; ?> active</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skai-ov-kpi-card">

        <div class="skai-ov-kpi-value" data-skai-kpi-overlap> - </div>
      </div>

          </div>
          <div class="skai-ov-recap-stat">

            </div>
          </div><!-- end Decision Set -->
          <div style="padding:0 1rem 0.85rem; border-top:1px dashed #e3e7ef; margin-top:0.15rem; font-size:0.78rem; color:#4b5563; display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.5rem 0.75rem; align-items:center;">
            <span style="font-weight:600; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.04em; font-size:0.75rem; color:#6b7280;">Number Tags:</span>
            <span class="btag btag-hit">HIT</span> <span style="font-size:0.75rem;">Matched the actual draw</span>
            <span class="btag btag-ovl">OVL</span> <span style="font-size:0.75rem;">Appears in 2+ methods</span>
            <span class="btag btag-ai">NN</span>  <span style="font-size:0.75rem;">Neural network</span>
            <span class="btag btag-sh">SK</span>  <span style="font-size:0.75rem;">SKIP Model</span>
            <span class="btag btag-mm">MC</span>  <span style="font-size:0.75rem;">MCMC</span>
            <span class="btag btag-hm">FM</span>  <span style="font-size:0.75rem;">Frequency map</span>
          </div>
        </div><!-- end common-card (post-draw) -->
      </div><!-- end skai-ov-evidence-zone (post-draw) -->

      <!-- C4: Carry Learning Forward (post-draw action rail) -->
      <div class="skai-ov-action-card">
        <div class="skai-ov-action-header">
          <div class="skai-ov-action-eyebrow">Next draw</div>
          <div class="skai-ov-action-title">Carry this learning forward</div>
        </div>
        <div class="skai-ov-action-body">
          <ul class="skai-ov-action-list">
            <li class="skai-ov-action-item">
              <span class="skai-ov-action-icon skai-ov-action-icon--green">1</span>
              <span>Review the rank placement in the Performance tab to see where each method placed the drawn numbers.</span>
            </li>
            <li class="skai-ov-action-item">
              <span class="skai-ov-action-icon skai-ov-action-icon--green">2</span>
              <span>Methods that placed drawn numbers at rank 1 - 5 carry more useful signal - weight those more heavily next cycle.</span>
            </li>
            <li class="skai-ov-action-item">
              <span class="skai-ov-action-icon skai-ov-action-icon--green">3</span>
              <span>Save a new strategy run after reviewing - carry rank evidence forward, not just top-rank number lists.</span>
            </li>
          </ul>
          <hr class="skai-ov-action-divider">
          <div style="font-size:0.78rem; color:#7F8DAA; margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Review supporting evidence</div>
          <div class="skai-ov-tab-chips">
            <button type="button" class="skai-ov-tab-chip" data-skai-goto-tab="performance">Performance</button>
            <button type="button" class="skai-ov-tab-chip" data-skai-goto-tab="methods">Methods</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div><!-- end action card (post-draw) -->

    </div><!-- end evidence-action-row (post-draw) -->

    <!-- D. Secondary Evidence Footer (post-draw) -->
    <div class="skai-ov-footer">
      <div class="skai-ov-footer-grid">
        <div class="skai-ov-footer-card">
          <div class="skai-ov-footer-card-title">Reading Rank Placement</div>
          <div class="skai-ov-footer-card-text">A match at rank 1 or 2 means a method placed a drawn number at the very top of its list - that is stronger evidence than a match at rank 15. Focus on where your best matches appeared, not just the total count.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="skai-ov-footer-card">
          <div class="skai-ov-footer-card-title">Agreement and Validation</div>
          <div class="skai-ov-footer-card-text">When multiple methods agree on a number and that number is drawn, it validates the overlap signal. Use this draw to adjust method weights and rank focus for the next cycle - not as a guarantee of future results.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div><!-- end footer post-draw -->

    <?php
    // -- Setting intelligence ------------------------------------------
    // Analyses $bestOpps[$lid]['all_scored_runs'] to identify which settings
    // families have been most consistent across completed draws.
    // Uses $__savedSetsById (run_id => row array) already built above.
    // All helper logic uses closures so re-definition inside the foreach is safe.
    // -----------------------------------------------------------------------

    $__ciLid        = (int)$g['lottery_id'];
    $__ciScoredRuns = isset($bestOpps[$__ciLid]['all_scored_runs'])
                      ? $bestOpps[$__ciLid]['all_scored_runs']
                      : array();

    // Helper: extract flat settings array from a saved-row array
    $__ciGetSettings = function(array $row) {
        $settings = array();
        $cols = array('source','skai_run_mode','auto_tune','best_window','skai_window_size',
                      'sampling_temperature','diversity_penalty','gap_scale',
                      'skai_blend_skip_pct','skai_blend_ai_pct',
                      'draws_analyzed','freq_weight','skip_weight','hist_weight','pure_mode',
                      'walks','burn_in','laplace_k','decay','chain_len',
                      'epochs','batch_size','dropout_rate','learning_rate','recency_decay');
        foreach ($cols as $col) {
            if (isset($row[$col]) && $row[$col] !== null && $row[$col] !== '') {
                $settings[$col] = $row[$col];
            }
        }
        // Overlay any richer JSON payload
        foreach (array('settings_json','settings','params_json','params') as $k) {
            if (!empty($row[$k])) {
                $decoded = json_decode((string)$row[$k], true);
                if (is_array($decoded)) {
                    foreach ($decoded as $dk => $dv) {
                        if (!isset($settings[$dk]) || $settings[$dk] === '') {
                            $settings[$dk] = $dv;
                        }
                    }
                }
                break;
            }
        }
        return $settings;
    };

    // Helper: derive a bucketed family key from settings
    $__ciFamilyKey = function(array $settings) {
        $src = (string)($settings['source'] ?? 'unknown');
        if ($methodKey === 'skai') {
            $mode = !empty($settings['skai_run_mode'])
                    ? strtolower(str_replace(' ', '_', trim((string)$settings['skai_run_mode'])))
                    : 'default';
            $bw = (!empty($settings['best_window']) && (string)$settings['best_window'] !== '0') ? 'bw_on' : 'bw_off';
            $ws = (float)($settings['skai_window_size'] ?? 0);
            $wsb = ($ws <= 0) ? 'default' : (($ws <= 20) ? 'short' : (($ws <= 50) ? 'medium' : 'long'));
            return 'skai:' . $mode . ':' . $bw . ':win_' . $wsb;
        }
        if ($src === 'skip_hit') {
            $da = (int)($settings['draws_analyzed'] ?? 0);
            $dab = ($da <= 0) ? 'default' : (($da <= 50) ? 'short' : (($da <= 150) ? 'medium' : 'deep'));
            $sw = (float)($settings['skip_weight'] ?? 1.0);
            $hw = (float)($settings['hist_weight'] ?? 1.0);
            $wb = ($sw > $hw * 1.3) ? 'skip_heavy' : (($hw > $sw * 1.3) ? 'hist_heavy' : 'balanced');
            return 'skip:draws_' . $dab . ':' . $wb;
        }
        if ($src === 'mcmc_prediction') {
            $cl = (int)($settings['chain_len'] ?? 0);
            $clb = ($cl <= 0) ? 'default' : (($cl <= 1000) ? 'short' : (($cl <= 5000) ? 'medium' : 'long'));
            $dc = (float)($settings['decay'] ?? 0);
            $dcb = ($dc < 0.5) ? 'low' : (($dc < 0.8) ? 'medium' : 'high');
            return 'mcmc:chain_' . $clb . ':decay_' . $dcb;
        }
        if ($src === 'ai_prediction') {
            $ep = (int)($settings['epochs'] ?? 0);
            $epb = ($ep <= 0) ? 'default' : (($ep <= 50) ? 'light' : (($ep <= 200) ? 'medium' : 'deep'));
            $rd = (float)($settings['recency_decay'] ?? 0);
            $rdb = ($rd < 0.5) ? 'low' : (($rd < 0.8) ? 'medium' : 'high');
            return 'ai:epochs_' . $epb . ':decay_' . $rdb;
        }
        return $src . ':default';
    };

    // Helper: derive a human-readable label for a family
    $__ciFamilyLabel = function(array $settings) {
        $src = (string)($settings['source'] ?? '');
        $parts = array();
        if ($methodKey === 'skai') {
            $mode = !empty($settings['skai_run_mode'])
                    ? ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', (string)$settings['skai_run_mode']))
                    : 'Standard';
            $parts[] = 'SKAI ' . $mode;
            $bwOn = (!empty($settings['best_window']) && (string)$settings['best_window'] !== '0');
            if ($bwOn) { $parts[] = 'Best Window'; }
            $ws = (float)($settings['skai_window_size'] ?? 0);
            if ($ws > 0) {
                $wsb = ($ws <= 20) ? 'short' : (($ws <= 50) ? 'medium' : 'long');
                $parts[] = ucfirst($wsb) . ' window';
            }
        } elseif ($src === 'skip_hit') {
            $parts[] = 'Skip &amp; Hit';
            $da = (int)($settings['draws_analyzed'] ?? 0);
            if ($da > 0) {
                $dab = ($da <= 50) ? 'short' : (($da <= 150) ? 'medium' : 'deep');
                $parts[] = ucfirst($dab) . ' draw depth';
            }
            $sw = (float)($settings['skip_weight'] ?? 1.0);
            $hw = (float)($settings['hist_weight'] ?? 1.0);
            if ($sw > $hw * 1.3)     { $parts[] = 'Skip-heavy weighting'; }
            elseif ($hw > $sw * 1.3) { $parts[] = 'History-heavy weighting'; }
            else                     { $parts[] = 'Balanced weighting'; }
        } elseif ($src === 'mcmc_prediction') {
            $parts[] = 'MCMC';
            $cl = (int)($settings['chain_len'] ?? 0);
            if ($cl > 0) {
                $clb = ($cl <= 1000) ? 'short' : (($cl <= 5000) ? 'medium' : 'long');
                $parts[] = ucfirst($clb) . ' chain';
            }
            $dc = (float)($settings['decay'] ?? 0);
            if ($dc > 0) {
                $dcb = ($dc < 0.5) ? 'low' : (($dc < 0.8) ? 'medium' : 'high');
                $parts[] = ucfirst($dcb) . ' decay';
            }
        } elseif ($src === 'ai_prediction') {
            $parts[] = 'Neural Network';
            $ep = (int)($settings['epochs'] ?? 0);
            if ($ep > 0) {
                $epb = ($ep <= 50) ? 'light' : (($ep <= 200) ? 'medium' : 'deep');
                $parts[] = ucfirst($epb) . ' training';
            }
        } elseif ($src === 'heatmap') {
            $parts[] = 'Frequency Map';
        }
        return implode(', ', $parts);
    };

    // Helper: derive key tags for a settings family (2 - 4 key details)
    $__ciSettingsTags = function(array $settings) {
        $src = (string)($settings['source'] ?? '');
        $tags = array();
        if ($methodKey === 'skai') {
            if (!empty($settings['skai_run_mode'])) {
                $tags[] = ucwords(str_replace('_',' ',(string)$settings['skai_run_mode'])) . ' mode';
            }
            if (!empty($settings['best_window']) && (string)$settings['best_window'] !== '0') {
                $tags[] = 'Best Window on';
            }
            if (!empty($settings['auto_tune']) && (string)$settings['auto_tune'] !== '0') {
                $tags[] = 'Auto-tune';
            }
            $ws = (float)($settings['skai_window_size'] ?? 0);
            if ($ws > 0) { $tags[] = 'Window ' . (int)$ws; }
            $temp = (float)($settings['sampling_temperature'] ?? 0);
            if ($temp > 0) { $tags[] = 'Temp ' . round($temp, 2); }
            $dp = (float)($settings['diversity_penalty'] ?? 0);
            if ($dp > 0) { $tags[] = 'Diversity ' . round($dp, 2); }
        } elseif ($src === 'skip_hit') {
            $da = (int)($settings['draws_analyzed'] ?? 0);
            if ($da > 0) { $tags[] = $da . ' draws'; }
            $sw = isset($settings['skip_weight']) ? round((float)$settings['skip_weight'], 2) : null;
            $hw = isset($settings['hist_weight']) ? round((float)$settings['hist_weight'], 2) : null;
            if ($sw !== null) { $tags[] = 'Skip wt ' . $sw; }
            if ($hw !== null) { $tags[] = 'Hist wt ' . $hw; }
            $pm = (int)($settings['pure_mode'] ?? 0);
            if ($pm) { $tags[] = 'Pure mode'; }
        } elseif ($src === 'mcmc_prediction') {
            $cl = (int)($settings['chain_len'] ?? 0);
            if ($cl > 0) { $tags[] = 'Chain ' . $cl; }
            $bi = (int)($settings['burn_in'] ?? 0);
            if ($bi > 0) { $tags[] = 'Burn-in ' . $bi; }
            $dc = isset($settings['decay']) ? round((float)$settings['decay'], 2) : null;
            if ($dc !== null) { $tags[] = 'Decay ' . $dc; }
        } elseif ($src === 'ai_prediction') {
            $ep = (int)($settings['epochs'] ?? 0);
            if ($ep > 0) { $tags[] = $ep . ' epochs'; }
            $lr = isset($settings['learning_rate']) ? (float)$settings['learning_rate'] : null;
            if ($lr !== null) { $tags[] = 'LR ' . $lr; }
            $rd = isset($settings['recency_decay']) ? round((float)$settings['recency_decay'], 2) : null;
            if ($rd !== null) { $tags[] = 'Recency ' . $rd; }
        }
        return array_slice($tags, 0, 4);
    };

    // Helper: weighted consistency score for a family aggregate
    $__ciScore = function(array $f) {
        $n  = max(1, (int)$f['n_runs']);
        $nd = max(1, (int)$f['n_draws']);
        $avgHits  = (float)$f['total_hits'] / $n;
        $hitRate  = (float)$f['draws_with_hit'] / $nd;
        $rankNorm = ((float)$f['rank_sum'] / $n) / 5000.0;
        $raw = ($avgHits * 4.0) + ($hitRate * 8.0) + $rankNorm;
        if ($hitRate > 0.5) { $raw += 2.0; } // repeatability bonus
        // Small sample penalty: penalise families seen in only 1 - 4 draws to prevent
        // rare one-off spikes from outranking configurations with broader evidence.
        // Thresholds chosen so a single-draw family scores <=55% of its raw value,
        // a two-draw family <=75%, and a four-draw family <=88%.
        if ($nd < 2)      { $factor = 0.55; }
        elseif ($nd < 3)  { $factor = 0.75; }
        elseif ($nd < 5)  { $factor = 0.88; }
        else              { $factor = 1.0; }
        return round($raw * $factor, 4);
    };

    // -- Aggregate runs into family buckets ----------------------------------
    $__ciFamilies = array();
    foreach ($__ciScoredRuns as $__ciRun) {
        $__ciRunId  = (int)($__ciRun['run_id'] ?? 0);
        $__ciSavedRow = isset($__savedSetsById[$__ciRunId]) ? $__savedSetsById[$__ciRunId] : null;
        if (!$__ciSavedRow) { continue; }

        $__ciSettings = $__ciGetSettings($__ciSavedRow);
        $__ciKey      = $__ciFamilyKey($__ciSettings);
        $__ciLabel    = $__ciFamilyLabel($__ciSettings);
        $__ciTags     = $__ciSettingsTags($__ciSettings);
        $__ciRunHits  = (int)($__ciRun['hits']       ?? 0);
        $__ciRunExtra = (int)($__ciRun['extra_hits']  ?? 0);
        $__ciRunRS    = (float)($__ciRun['rank_score'] ?? 0);
        $__ciRunDD    = (string)($__ciRun['draw_date'] ?? '');

        if (!isset($__ciFamilies[$__ciKey])) {
            $__ciFamilies[$__ciKey] = array(
                'key'             => $__ciKey,
                'label'           => $__ciLabel ?: $__ciKey,
                'source'          => (string)($__ciSettings['source'] ?? ''),
                'n_runs'          => 0,
                'draws'           => array(),
                'n_draws'         => 0,
                'total_hits'      => 0,
                'total_extra'     => 0,
                'draws_with_hit'  => 0,
                'rank_sum'        => 0.0,
                'best_run_score'  => -1.0,
                'best_run_hits'   => 0,
                'example_settings'=> $__ciSettings,
                'tags'            => $__ciTags,
                'score'           => 0.0,
            );
        }
        $__ciFamilies[$__ciKey]['n_runs']++;
        if ($__ciRunDD !== '') {
            $__ciFamilies[$__ciKey]['draws'][$__ciRunDD] = true;
        }
        $__ciFamilies[$__ciKey]['total_hits']  += $__ciRunHits;
        $__ciFamilies[$__ciKey]['total_extra'] += $__ciRunExtra;
        if ($__ciRunHits > 0) { $__ciFamilies[$__ciKey]['draws_with_hit']++; }
        if ($__ciRunRS  > 0)  { $__ciFamilies[$__ciKey]['rank_sum'] += $__ciRunRS; }
        if ($__ciRunRS  > $__ciFamilies[$__ciKey]['best_run_score']) {
            $__ciFamilies[$__ciKey]['best_run_score'] = $__ciRunRS;
            $__ciFamilies[$__ciKey]['best_run_hits']  = $__ciRunHits;
        }
    }
    // Finalise draw counts and scores
    foreach ($__ciFamilies as $__ciK => $__ciF) {
        $__ciFamilies[$__ciK]['n_draws'] = count($__ciF['draws']);
        $__ciFamilies[$__ciK]['score']   = $__ciScore($__ciFamilies[$__ciK]);
    }

    // Sort descending by score
    $__ciRanked = array_values($__ciFamilies);
    usort($__ciRanked, function($a, $b) {
        if ($b['score'] > $a['score']) { return 1; }
        if ($b['score'] < $a['score']) { return -1; }
        return 0;
    });

    // -- Derive the four insights ---------------------------------------------
    $__ciTotalScoredRuns  = count($__ciScoredRuns);
    $__ciTotalDrawDates   = 0;
    $__ciAllDrawDates     = array();
    foreach ($__ciScoredRuns as $__r) {
        $__dd = (string)($__r['draw_date'] ?? '');
        if ($__dd) { $__ciAllDrawDates[$__dd] = true; }
    }
    $__ciTotalDrawDates = count($__ciAllDrawDates);

    $__ciHasEnoughData = ($__ciTotalScoredRuns >= 3);

    // Insight A: Most consistent Configuration (top family)
    $__ciInsightA = !empty($__ciRanked) ? $__ciRanked[0] : null;

    // Insight B: Most stable pattern (first family with >=2 draws, could be same as A)
    $__ciInsightB = null;
    foreach ($__ciRanked as $__cif) {
        if ($__cif['n_draws'] >= 2) { $__ciInsightB = $__cif; break; }
    }
    if ($__ciInsightB === null && !empty($__ciRanked)) { $__ciInsightB = $__ciRanked[0]; }

    // Insight C: Weaker or more volatile pattern (bottom of ranked list, different from A)
    $__ciInsightC = null;
    $__ciRevRanked = array_reverse($__ciRanked);
    foreach ($__ciRevRanked as $__cif) {
        if ($__ciInsightA === null || $__cif['key'] !== $__ciInsightA['key']) {
            $__ciInsightC = $__cif;
            break;
        }
    }
    // If only one family, still reference it but note the caveat
    if ($__ciInsightC === null && !empty($__ciRanked)) { $__ciInsightC = $__ciRanked[count((array)$__ciRanked)-1]; }

    // Insight D: Suggested next test (derived from best family)
    $__ciNextTweak      = '';
    $__ciStableAdvice   = '';
    if ($__ciInsightA !== null) {
        $__ciSrc = (string)($__ciInsightA['source'] ?? '');
        $__ciEs  = $__ciInsightA['example_settings'];
        if ($__ciSrc === 'skai_prediction') {
            $bwOn = (!empty($__ciEs['best_window']) && (string)$__ciEs['best_window'] !== '0');
            $ws   = (float)($__ciEs['skai_window_size'] ?? 0);
            if (!$bwOn) {
                $__ciNextTweak    = 'Increase testing discipline by turning on Best Window while keeping the current run mode and window size unchanged.';
                $__ciStableAdvice = 'Current run mode and window size appear stable. Do not change both at once.';
            } elseif ($ws > 50) {
                $__ciNextTweak    = 'Decrease the SKAI window slightly and keep the current run mode and Best Window setting unchanged so you can isolate the effect.';
                $__ciStableAdvice = 'Keep run mode and Best Window setting stable while testing window size.';
            } elseif (!empty($__ciEs['auto_tune']) && (string)$__ciEs['auto_tune'] === '0') {
                $__ciNextTweak    = 'Increase adaptability by enabling Auto-tune while preserving the current run mode and window configuration.';
                $__ciStableAdvice = 'Current run mode and window are producing consistent early-rank placement. Keep them stable.';
            } else {
                $__ciNextTweak    = 'Adjust the diversity penalty one step at a time while keeping the run mode and window unchanged.';
                $__ciStableAdvice = 'Run mode and window size are the most critical anchors here - keep them stable.';
            }
        } elseif ($__ciSrc === 'skip_hit') {
            $sw = (float)($__ciEs['skip_weight'] ?? 1.0);
            $hw = (float)($__ciEs['hist_weight'] ?? 1.0);
            if ($sw > $hw * 1.3) {
                $__ciNextTweak    = 'Increase historical weight slightly while keeping draw depth stable so you can see whether historical bias improves repeat support.';
                $__ciStableAdvice = 'Draw depth (draws_analyzed) is most influential here - do not change it yet.';
            } else {
                $__ciNextTweak    = 'Increase or decrease draws analyzed by about 20 while keeping the weighting balance unchanged.';
                $__ciStableAdvice = 'Current weighting balance appears stable - change only one variable at a time.';
            }
        } elseif ($__ciSrc === 'mcmc_prediction') {
            $__ciNextTweak    = 'Increase or decrease chain length while keeping the current decay rate unchanged.';
            $__ciStableAdvice = 'Decay rate is the most influential parameter here - keep it stable while testing chain length.';
        } elseif ($__ciSrc === 'ai_prediction') {
            $__ciNextTweak    = 'Increase or decrease recency decay slightly while keeping epoch count and architecture unchanged.';
            $__ciStableAdvice = 'Epoch count and hidden layer structure appear stable - change only one variable at a time.';
        } else {
            $__ciNextTweak    = 'Add more varied runs across completed draws before making a setting change recommendation.';
            $__ciStableAdvice = 'Maintain current method settings until more completed-draw evidence is available.';
        }
    }

    // -- Build "why it stands out" sentences --------------------------------
    $__ciBuildWhy = function(array $f, bool $isConsistent) {
        $n  = (int)$f['n_runs'];
        $nd = (int)$f['n_draws'];
        $hr = $nd > 0 ? round((float)$f['draws_with_hit'] / $nd * 100) : 0;
        $avgH = $n > 0 ? round((float)$f['total_hits'] / $n, 1) : 0;
        if ($isConsistent) {
            if ($nd >= 3 && $hr >= 50) {
                return 'Hit in ' . $hr . '% of completed draws (' . $f['draws_with_hit'] . ' of ' . $nd . '), averaging ' . $avgH . ' main match' . ($avgH != 1 ? 'es' : '') . ' per draw. This pattern has shown reliable early-rank placement.';
            } elseif ($nd >= 2) {
                return 'Present in ' . $nd . ' completed draws, averaging ' . $avgH . ' main match' . ($avgH != 1 ? 'es' : '') . ' per draw. Consistent evidence across multiple draws is more meaningful than a single strong result.';
            } else {
                return 'Currently the strongest individual result for this lottery. Requires more completed draws before it can be called a repeatable pattern.';
            }
        } else {
            if ($nd >= 2 && $hr < 30) {
                return 'Hit in only ' . $hr . '% of its completed draws. Higher variance and weaker repeat early-rank support compared to other configurations.';
            } else {
                return 'Based on available evidence, this pattern has shown less consistent early-rank placement. Treat results with caution until more draws are completed.';
            }
        }
    };
    ?>

    <!-- =====================================================
         CONFIGURATION INTELLIGENCE MODULE
         Appears in post-draw Overview only.
         Data source: $bestOpps[$lid]['all_scored_runs']
         + $__savedSetsById for settings lookup.
    ===================================================== -->
    <div class="skai-ci-module">
      <div class="skai-ci-header">
        <div class="skai-ci-eyebrow">Setup performance review</div>
        <div class="skai-ci-title">Which setups are worth repeating</div>
        <div class="skai-ci-sub">This section shows which prediction setups have placed the drawn numbers highest across completed draws, and suggests one thing to adjust for the next run.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skai-ci-body">

        <?php if (!$__ciHasEnoughData): ?>
        <!-- Not enough data state -->
        <div class="skai-ci-empty">
          <div class="skai-ci-empty-title">Still building history for this lottery</div>
          <div class="skai-ci-empty-text">This section needs at least 3 completed and scored prediction runs for <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($g['lottery_name'] ?? 'this lottery'), ENT_QUOTES); ?>. Keep saving runs across upcoming draws and this analysis will unlock automatically.</div>
        </div>

        <?php else: ?>
        <!-- Primary Insight Grid -->
        <div class="skai-ci-grid">

          <!-- Card A: Most consistent Configuration -->
          <div class="skai-ci-card">
            <div class="skai-ci-card-header skai-ci-card-header--best">
              <div class="skai-ci-card-eyebrow">Most consistent</div>
              <div class="skai-ci-card-title">Setup with the strongest repeat support</div>
            </div>
            <div class="skai-ci-card-body">
              <?php if ($__ciInsightA): ?>
              <div class="skai-ci-config-name"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__ciInsightA['label'] ?: $__ciInsightA['key'], ENT_QUOTES); ?></div>
              <?php if (!empty($__ciInsightA['tags'])): ?>
              <div class="skai-ci-tag-row">
                <?php foreach ($__ciInsightA['tags'] as $__ciTag): ?>
                <span class="skai-ci-tag skai-ci-tag--success"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__ciTag, ENT_QUOTES); ?></span>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
              </div>
              <?php endif; ?>
              <div class="skai-ci-stat-row">
                <div class="skai-ci-stat">
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-val skai-ci-stat-val--success"><?php echo (int)$__ciInsightA['total_hits']; ?></span>
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-lbl">Total hits</span>
                </div>
                <div class="skai-ci-stat">
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-val"><?php echo (int)$__ciInsightA['n_draws']; ?></span>
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-lbl">Draws</span>
                </div>
                <div class="skai-ci-stat">
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-val"><?php echo (int)$__ciInsightA['draws_with_hit']; ?></span>
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-lbl">Draws with a hit</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="skai-ci-why"><?php echo $__ciBuildWhy($__ciInsightA, true); ?></div>
              <?php else: ?>
              <div class="skai-ci-why">There is not enough scored data for this lottery yet.</div>
              <?php endif; ?>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Card B: Most stable pattern -->
          <div class="skai-ci-card">
            <div class="skai-ci-card-header skai-ci-card-header--stable">
              <div class="skai-ci-card-eyebrow">Most stable pattern</div>
              <div class="skai-ci-card-title">Broader setup family with steady evidence</div>
            </div>
            <div class="skai-ci-card-body">
              <?php if ($__ciInsightB): ?>
              <div class="skai-ci-config-name"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__ciInsightB['label'] ?: $__ciInsightB['key'], ENT_QUOTES); ?></div>
              <?php if (!empty($__ciInsightB['tags'])): ?>
              <div class="skai-ci-tag-row">
                <?php foreach ($__ciInsightB['tags'] as $__ciTag): ?>
                <span class="skai-ci-tag"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__ciTag, ENT_QUOTES); ?></span>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
              </div>
              <?php endif; ?>
              <div class="skai-ci-stat-row">
                <div class="skai-ci-stat">
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-val"><?php echo (int)$__ciInsightB['n_runs']; ?></span>
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-lbl">Runs</span>
                </div>
                <div class="skai-ci-stat">
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-val"><?php echo (int)$__ciInsightB['n_draws']; ?></span>
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-lbl">Draws</span>
                </div>
                <div class="skai-ci-stat">
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-val"><?php
                    $__ciHr = ($__ciInsightB['n_draws'] > 0)
                              ? round((float)$__ciInsightB['draws_with_hit'] / $__ciInsightB['n_draws'] * 100)
                              : 0;
                    echo $__ciHr . '%';
                  ?></span>
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-lbl">Hit rate</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="skai-ci-why"><?php echo $__ciBuildWhy($__ciInsightB, true); ?></div>
              <?php else: ?>
              <div class="skai-ci-why">There is not enough cross-draw data yet to identify a stable pattern.</div>
              <?php endif; ?>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Card C: Pattern to Use caution -->
          <div class="skai-ci-card">
            <div class="skai-ci-card-header skai-ci-card-header--caution">
              <div class="skai-ci-card-eyebrow">Use caution</div>
              <div class="skai-ci-card-title">Pattern with weaker or more uneven evidence</div>
            </div>
            <div class="skai-ci-card-body">
              <?php if ($__ciInsightC && $__ciInsightA && $__ciInsightC['key'] !== $__ciInsightA['key']): ?>
              <div class="skai-ci-config-name"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__ciInsightC['label'] ?: $__ciInsightC['key'], ENT_QUOTES); ?></div>
              <?php if (!empty($__ciInsightC['tags'])): ?>
              <div class="skai-ci-tag-row">
                <?php foreach ($__ciInsightC['tags'] as $__ciTag): ?>
                <span class="skai-ci-tag skai-ci-tag--caution"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__ciTag, ENT_QUOTES); ?></span>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
              </div>
              <?php endif; ?>
              <div class="skai-ci-stat-row">
                <div class="skai-ci-stat">
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-val skai-ci-stat-val--caution"><?php echo (int)$__ciInsightC['total_hits']; ?></span>
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-lbl">Total hits</span>
                </div>
                <div class="skai-ci-stat">
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-val"><?php echo (int)$__ciInsightC['n_draws']; ?></span>
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-lbl">Draws</span>
                </div>
                <div class="skai-ci-stat">
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-val"><?php
                    $__ciCHr = ($__ciInsightC['n_draws'] > 0)
                               ? round((float)$__ciInsightC['draws_with_hit'] / $__ciInsightC['n_draws'] * 100)
                               : 0;
                    echo $__ciCHr . '%';
                  ?></span>
                  <span class="skai-ci-stat-lbl">Hit rate</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="skai-ci-why"><?php echo $__ciBuildWhy($__ciInsightC, false); ?></div>
              <?php elseif (count((array)$__ciRanked) <= 1): ?>
              <div class="skai-ci-why">Only one configuration family is represented so far. Save runs with varied settings across more draws to enable comparison.</div>
              <?php else: ?>
              <div class="skai-ci-why">All current configurations are showing comparable performance. Differences will become clearer with more completed draw cycles.</div>
              <?php endif; ?>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Card D: Recommended Next Tweak -->
          <div class="skai-ci-card">
            <div class="skai-ci-card-header skai-ci-card-header--neutral">
              <div class="skai-ci-card-eyebrow">Recommended Next Tweak</div>
              <div class="skai-ci-card-title">What to change next, if anything</div>
            </div>
            <div class="skai-ci-card-body">
              <?php if ($__ciNextTweak !== ''): ?>
              <div class="skai-ci-config-name">Test one change</div>
              <div class="skai-ci-why" style="margin-bottom:0.5rem;"><?php echo $__ciNextTweak; ?></div>
              <div style="padding:0.45rem 0.7rem; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#EFEFF5 0%,#fff 100%); border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:7px;">
                <span style="font-size:0.65rem; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.07em; color:#7F8DAA; display:block; margin-bottom:0.15rem;">Keep the same</span>
                <span style="font-size:0.78rem; color:#374151; line-height:1.4;"><?php echo $__ciStableAdvice; ?></span>
              </div>
              <?php else: ?>
              <div class="skai-ci-why">Save more runs across completed draws to unlock clearer guidance on what to change and what to keep the same.</div>
              <?php endif; ?>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div><!-- end ci-grid -->

        <!-- Supporting Footer Row -->
        <div class="skai-ci-footer-row">
          <div class="skai-ci-footer-card">
            <div class="skai-ci-footer-card-title">History used for <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($g['lottery_name'] ?? 'this lottery'), ENT_QUOTES); ?></div>
            <div class="skai-ci-footer-card-text"><?php
              echo (int)$__ciTotalScoredRuns . ' scored run' . ($__ciTotalScoredRuns !== 1 ? 's' : '')
                 . ' across ' . (int)$__ciTotalDrawDates . ' completed draw'
                 . ($__ciTotalDrawDates !== 1 ? 's' : '') . '. '
                 . count((array)$__ciFamilies) . ' distinct configuration '
                 . (count((array)$__ciFamilies) !== 1 ? 'families' : 'family') . ' identified.';
            ?></div>
          </div>
          <div class="skai-ci-footer-card">
            <div class="skai-ci-footer-card-title">About this analysis</div>
            <div class="skai-ci-footer-card-text">The strongest single result and the most repeatable pattern are not always the same. This module prioritises repeatability and hit rate across multiple draws over one-off peak performance.</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <?php endif; // end has-enough-data ?>
      </div><!-- end skai-ci-body -->
    </div><!-- end skai-ci-module -->

    <?php
    // -- Stability guide (Layer 3) ---------------------------------------------
    // Reuses CI variables: $__ciInsightA, $__ciInsightC, $__ciNextTweak,
    // $__ciStableAdvice, $__ciRanked, $__ciScoredRuns, $__ciFamilies,
    // $__ciHasEnoughData.
    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

    // A: Keep the same - anchor variables to preserve
    $__scKeepStable = $__ciStableAdvice;
    if (empty($__scKeepStable)) {
        $__scKeepStable = 'Maintain the current configuration base. Avoid changing multiple variables simultaneously until a clearer pattern emerges.';
    }

    // B: Test next - the one disciplined variable to adjust
    $__scTestNext = $__ciNextTweak;
    if (empty($__scTestNext)) {
        $__scTestNext = 'Save predictions across more completed draws before recommending a specific next test.';
    }

    // Shared flag: two distinct insight families available for comparison
    $__hasDistinctTopAndBottom = ($__ciInsightA !== null && $__ciInsightC !== null
                                  && $__ciInsightC['key'] !== $__ciInsightA['key']);

    // C: Reduce or pause - deprioritise the weaker/volatile pattern
    $__scReducePause = '';
    if ($__hasDistinctTopAndBottom) {
        $__scCsrc = (string)($__ciInsightC['source'] ?? '');
        if ($__scCsrc === 'skai_prediction') {
            $__scReducePause = 'Reduce focus on the lower-scoring SKAI variants. High-variance configurations can produce strong single results but weaker sustained repeatability across draw cycles.';
        } elseif ($__scCsrc === 'skip_hit') {
            $__scReducePause = 'Pause testing extreme Skip &amp; Hit weight combinations until balanced configurations produce a clearer comparative pattern.';
        } elseif ($__scCsrc === 'mcmc_prediction') {
            $__scReducePause = 'Pause aggressive MCMC depth or decay variations until the baseline configuration shows more stable repeatability across completed draws.';
        } elseif ($__scCsrc === 'ai_prediction') {
            $__scReducePause = 'Reduce deep neural network variants until a more consistent performance baseline is established across multiple draw cycles.';
        } else {
            $__scReducePause = 'Use the weaker setup family less often until more repeated history is available.';
        }
    } else {
        $__scReducePause = 'No clearly weaker pattern has emerged yet. As more completed draws are added, configuration families will separate more distinctly. Continue building the record.';
    }

    // D: Testing note - detect over-tuning and sample quality
    $__scRunSources   = array();
    foreach ($__ciScoredRuns as $__scr) {
        $__scSrc = (string)($__scr['source'] ?? 'unknown');
        $__scRunSources[$__scSrc] = ($__scRunSources[$__scSrc] ?? 0) + 1;
    }
    $__scUniqueSources = count((array)$__scRunSources);
    $__scFamilyCount   = count((array)$__ciFamilies);
    $__scDisciplineNote = '';
    if ($__scUniqueSources >= 3) {
        $__scDisciplineNote = 'Runs span ' . $__scUniqueSources . ' distinct methods. Testing multiple methods simultaneously makes it harder to isolate which change drives an improvement. Consider focusing on one method family at a time to build cleaner evidence.';
    } elseif ($__scFamilyCount >= 5) {
        $__scDisciplineNote = $__scFamilyCount . ' configuration families are currently in the pool. Narrowing down to 1 - 2 focused families will produce cleaner comparative evidence more quickly.';
    } elseif ($__ciHasEnoughData) {
        $__scDisciplineNote = 'The evidence base is building well. Continue varying one setting at a time to maintain clear causal insight across draw cycles.';
    } else {
        $__scDisciplineNote = 'The sample is still early. Avoid making configuration changes based on fewer than 3 completed draws - the signal is forming but not yet reliable enough to act on.';
    }

    // -- Evidence quality + Pattern Drift (Layer 4) ---------------------------
    // Derives confidence level from completed draw count and scored run count.
    // Compares top vs bottom family settings to surface pattern drift.
    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

    $__eqTotalRuns   = $__ciTotalScoredRuns;
    $__eqTotalDraws  = $__ciTotalDrawDates;
    $__eqFamilyCount = count((array)$__ciFamilies);

    // Confidence level: low / moderate / high
    if ($__eqTotalDraws >= 8 && $__eqTotalRuns >= 10) {
        $__eqConfidence     = 'high';
        $__eqConfidenceText = 'Evidence spans ' . $__eqTotalDraws . ' completed draws with ' . $__eqTotalRuns . ' scored runs. Pattern-level conclusions carry strong support and reflect repeatable signals.';
    } elseif ($__eqTotalDraws >= 3 && $__eqTotalRuns >= 5) {
        $__eqConfidence     = 'moderate';
        $__eqConfidenceText = 'Evidence spans ' . $__eqTotalDraws . ' completed draws. Patterns are forming, but additional history will strengthen the conclusions before acting on them with high confidence.';
    } else {
        $__eqConfidence     = 'low';
        $__eqConfidenceText = 'Completed history is still limited ('
                              . $__eqTotalDraws . ' draw' . ($__eqTotalDraws !== 1 ? 's' : '')
                              . ', ' . $__eqTotalRuns . ' run' . ($__eqTotalRuns !== 1 ? 's' : '')
                              . '). A settings-level conclusion is forming, but not yet strong enough to act on with confidence.';
    }

    // Pattern Drift - compare top vs bottom families for meaningful divergence
    $__pdDrifts = array();

    // Closure: human-readable source label (safe for HTML output)
    $__pdSrcLabel = function($s) {
        if ($s === 'skai_prediction') { return 'SKAI'; }
        if ($s === 'skip_hit')        { return 'Skip &amp; Hit'; }
        if ($s === 'mcmc_prediction') { return 'MCMC'; }
        if ($s === 'ai_prediction')   { return 'Neural Network'; }
        return htmlspecialchars(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', (string)$s)), ENT_QUOTES);
    };

    // Closure: bucket a SKAI window size float into a readable label
    $__pdWinBucket = function($ws) {
        return ($ws <= 20) ? 'shorter' : (($ws <= 50) ? 'medium' : 'longer');
    };

    if ($__hasDistinctTopAndBottom) {
        $__pdTopSrc = (string)($__ciInsightA['source'] ?? '');
        $__pdBotSrc = (string)($__ciInsightC['source'] ?? '');
        $__pdTopEs  = $__ciInsightA['example_settings'];
        $__pdBotEs  = $__ciInsightC['example_settings'];

        if ($__pdTopSrc === 'skai_prediction' && $__pdBotSrc === 'skai_prediction') {
            // Best Window comparison
            $__pdTopBw = (!empty($__pdTopEs['best_window']) && (string)$__pdTopEs['best_window'] !== '0');
            $__pdBotBw = (!empty($__pdBotEs['best_window']) && (string)$__pdBotEs['best_window'] !== '0');
            if ($__pdTopBw !== $__pdBotBw) {
                $__pdDrifts[] = 'Best Window ' . ($__pdTopBw ? 'enabled' : 'disabled') . ' correlates with stronger consistency. Configurations with Best Window ' . ($__pdTopBw ? 'disabled' : 'enabled') . ' have shown weaker repeat early-rank placement.';
            }
            // Window size comparison
            $__pdTopWs = (float)($__pdTopEs['skai_window_size'] ?? 0);
            $__pdBotWs = (float)($__pdBotEs['skai_window_size'] ?? 0);
            if ($__pdTopWs > 0 && $__pdBotWs > 0) {
                $__pdTwsb = $__pdWinBucket($__pdTopWs);
                $__pdBwsb = $__pdWinBucket($__pdBotWs);
                if ($__pdTwsb !== $__pdBwsb) {
                    $__pdDrifts[] = ucfirst($__pdTwsb) . '-window configurations have produced more stable repeat performance than ' . $__pdBwsb . '-window runs across completed draws.';
                }
            }
            // Diversity penalty comparison
            $__pdTopDp = (float)($__pdTopEs['diversity_penalty'] ?? 0);
            $__pdBotDp = (float)($__pdBotEs['diversity_penalty'] ?? 0);
            if ($__pdTopDp > 0 && $__pdBotDp > 0 && abs($__pdTopDp - $__pdBotDp) > 0.1) {
                $__pdDpDir = ($__pdTopDp < $__pdBotDp) ? 'Lower' : 'Higher';
                $__pdDrifts[] = $__pdDpDir . ' diversity penalty settings have been associated with more consistent early-rank placement across completed draws.';
            }
            // Auto-tune comparison
            $__pdTopAt = (!empty($__pdTopEs['auto_tune']) && (string)$__pdTopEs['auto_tune'] !== '0');
            $__pdBotAt = (!empty($__pdBotEs['auto_tune']) && (string)$__pdBotEs['auto_tune'] !== '0');
            if ($__pdTopAt !== $__pdBotAt) {
                $__pdDrifts[] = 'Auto-tune ' . ($__pdTopAt ? 'on' : 'off') . ' has been associated with more consistent performance in comparable runs.';
            }
        } elseif ($__pdTopSrc === 'skip_hit' && $__pdBotSrc === 'skip_hit') {
            // Draw depth comparison
            $__pdTopDa = (int)($__pdTopEs['draws_analyzed'] ?? 0);
            $__pdBotDa = (int)($__pdBotEs['draws_analyzed'] ?? 0);
            if ($__pdTopDa > 0 && $__pdBotDa > 0 && $__pdTopDa !== $__pdBotDa) {
                $__pdDaDir = ($__pdTopDa > $__pdBotDa) ? 'Deeper' : 'Shallower';
                $__pdDrifts[] = $__pdDaDir . ' draw depth (' . $__pdTopDa . ' vs ' . $__pdBotDa . ' draws analyzed) has correlated with stronger repeatability in completed draw scoring.';
            }
            // Weighting comparison
            $__pdTopSw = (float)($__pdTopEs['skip_weight'] ?? 1.0);
            $__pdBotSw = (float)($__pdBotEs['skip_weight'] ?? 1.0);
            $__pdTopHw = (float)($__pdTopEs['hist_weight'] ?? 1.0);
            $__pdBotHw = (float)($__pdBotEs['hist_weight'] ?? 1.0);
            if (abs($__pdTopSw - $__pdBotSw) > 0.15 || abs($__pdTopHw - $__pdBotHw) > 0.15) {
                $__pdDrifts[] = 'Weighting balance shifts (skip vs. history) appear associated with performance differences across completed draws. Balanced configurations have shown more stability.';
            }
        } elseif ($__pdTopSrc !== $__pdBotSrc) {
            $__pdDrifts[] = $__pdSrcLabel($__pdTopSrc) . ' configurations have shown more consistent early-rank placement than '
                          . $__pdSrcLabel($__pdBotSrc) . ' runs across completed draws.';
        }
    }

    if (empty($__pdDrifts)) {
        if ($__ciHasEnoughData) {
            $__pdDrifts[] = 'Configurations are producing similar results at the current sample size. More completed draws are needed to identify a clear performance separation between settings families.';
        } else {
            $__pdDrifts[] = 'Insufficient completed draw history to identify meaningful pattern drift. Continue saving predictions across draw cycles to unlock this analysis.';
        }
    }
    ?>

    <!-- =====================================================
         STABILITY COACH MODULE  (Layer 3)
         Post-draw only. Depends on CI variables above.
    ===================================================== -->
    <div class="skai-sc-module">
      <div class="skai-sc-header">
        <div class="skai-sc-eyebrow">Stability guide</div>
        <div class="skai-sc-title">What to keep the same and what to test next</div>
        <div class="skai-sc-sub">This section translates configuration evidence into disciplined guidance - what to anchor, what to adjust, and where to apply caution.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skai-sc-body">
        <div class="skai-sc-grid">

          <div class="skai-sc-card">
            <div class="skai-sc-card-header skai-sc-card-header--keep">
              <div class="skai-sc-card-eyebrow">Keep the same</div>
              <div class="skai-sc-card-title">What to leave unchanged while testing</div>
            </div>
            <div class="skai-sc-card-body">
              <div class="skai-sc-advice"><?php echo $__scKeepStable; ?></div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="skai-sc-card">
            <div class="skai-sc-card-header skai-sc-card-header--test">
              <div class="skai-sc-card-eyebrow">Test next</div>
              <div class="skai-sc-card-title">One setting to adjust next</div>
            </div>
            <div class="skai-sc-card-body">
              <div class="skai-sc-advice"><?php echo $__scTestNext; ?></div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="skai-sc-card">
            <div class="skai-sc-card-header skai-sc-card-header--pause">
              <div class="skai-sc-card-eyebrow">Reduce or pause</div>
              <div class="skai-sc-card-title">What to lower in priority right now</div>
            </div>
            <div class="skai-sc-card-body">
              <div class="skai-sc-advice"><?php echo $__scReducePause; ?></div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="skai-sc-card">
            <div class="skai-sc-card-header skai-sc-card-header--note">
              <div class="skai-sc-card-eyebrow">Testing note</div>
              <div class="skai-sc-card-title">How to keep testing clear and consistent</div>
            </div>
            <div class="skai-sc-card-body">
              <div class="skai-sc-advice"><?php echo $__scDisciplineNote; ?></div>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div><!-- end sc-grid -->
      </div><!-- end sc-body -->
    </div><!-- end skai-sc-module -->

    <!-- =====================================================
         EVIDENCE QUALITY + PATTERN DRIFT MODULE  (Layer 4)
         Post-draw only. Always shown with appropriate content.
    ===================================================== -->
    <div class="skai-eq-module">
      <div class="skai-eq-header">
        <div class="skai-eq-eyebrow">Evidence quality and pattern drift</div>
        <div class="skai-eq-title">How strong this learning is</div>
        <div class="skai-eq-sub">This section explains how trustworthy the current configuration conclusions are and what changed between stronger and weaker runs.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skai-eq-body">
        <div class="skai-eq-row">

          <div class="skai-eq-panel">
            <div class="skai-eq-panel-title">Evidence quality</div>
            <div class="skai-eq-badge-row">
              <span class="skai-eq-badge skai-eq-badge--<?php echo htmlspecialchars($__eqConfidence, ENT_QUOTES); ?>"><?php echo ucfirst($__eqConfidence); ?> confidence</span>
            </div>
            <div class="skai-eq-stat-row">
              <div class="skai-eq-stat">
                <span class="skai-eq-stat-val"><?php echo (int)$__eqTotalRuns; ?></span>
                <span class="skai-eq-stat-lbl">Scored results</span>
              </div>
              <div class="skai-eq-stat">
                <span class="skai-eq-stat-val"><?php echo (int)$__eqTotalDraws; ?></span>
                <span class="skai-eq-stat-lbl">Completed draws</span>
              </div>
              <div class="skai-eq-stat">
                <span class="skai-eq-stat-val"><?php echo (int)$__eqFamilyCount; ?></span>
                <span class="skai-eq-stat-lbl">Config families</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="skai-eq-text"><?php echo $__eqConfidenceText; ?></div>
          </div>

          <div class="skai-eq-panel">
            <div class="skai-eq-panel-title">Pattern Drift</div>
            <ul class="skai-pd-list">
              <?php foreach ($__pdDrifts as $__pdEntry): ?>
              <li class="skai-pd-item">
                <span class="skai-pd-dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>
                <span><?php echo $__pdEntry; ?></span>
              </li>
              <?php endforeach; ?>
            </ul>
          </div>

        </div><!-- end eq-row -->
      </div><!-- end eq-body -->
    </div><!-- end skai-eq-module -->

    <?php endif; ?>

  </div><!-- end sdi-panel overview -->

  <!-- PERFORMANCE TAB -->
  <div class="sdi-panel" data-sdi-panel="performance" role="tabpanel" style="display:none;">
  <div style="padding:1rem 1rem 0.5rem; border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0; margin-bottom:0.75rem;">
    <h3 style="font-size:1rem; font-weight:800; color:#1e293b; margin:0 0 0.3rem;">Past results</h3>
    <p style="font-size:0.875rem; color:#475569; margin:0; line-height:1.5;">See how each method did in past draws. Use this area to find which methods have been more steady and useful for this lottery.</p>
  </div>

<div class="card decision-strip" data-decision-strip style="display:none;">
  <div class="decision-strip-header">
    <div class="decision-strip-main-title">
      <span class="label">What to know before this draw</span>
