    + '#mle-print-overlay span{display:inline !important;}'
    + '#mle-print-overlay *{visibility:visible !important;}'
    + '}'
    // Hidden on screen until print triggers the @media print rules above.
    + '#mle-print-overlay{'
    + 'display:none;'
    + 'font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;'
    + 'font-size:10pt;'
    + 'color:#1f2937;'
    + 'line-height:1.5;'
    + '}';
}

/**
 * Format a NodeList of number elements as a dash-separated string with
 * inline-styled color spans (hits = bold green, misses = gray, drawn = navy).
 * Single-digit numbers are zero-padded for clean visual alignment.
 * @param {NodeList} nodes   - e.g. querySelectorAll('.match-pill:not(.extra)')
 * @param {boolean}  isExtra - true for bonus/powerball ball (uses red palette)
 */
function _mleFormatNums(nodes, isExtra) {
  var parts = [];
  Array.prototype.forEach.call(nodes, function (n) {
    var val = (n.textContent || '').trim();
    if (!val) { return; }
    // Zero-pad single digits for clean column alignment (e.g. "07" not "7")
    if (/^\d$/.test(val)) { val = '0' + val; }
    var inlineStyle;
    if (n.classList.contains('drawn-pill')) {
      inlineStyle = 'font-weight:bold;color:' + (isExtra ? '#991b1b' : '#0A1A33') + ';';
    } else if (n.classList.contains('match-pill')) {
      inlineStyle = 'font-weight:bold;color:' + (isExtra ? '#dc2626' : '#16a34a') + ';';
    } else {
      inlineStyle = 'color:#6b7280;';
    }
    parts.push(_LT+'span style="' + inlineStyle + '"'+_GT + _mleEsc(val) + _LT+'/span'+_GT);
  });
  // Em-dash separator keeps each number visually distinct
  return parts.join(_LT+'span style="color:#d1d5db;padding:0 5px;font-weight:normal;"'+_GT+' - '+_LT+'/span'+_GT);
}

/**
 * Extract data from a .prediction-card DOM node and return professional
 * print HTML using stacked full-width sections + 100% inline styles.
 * Each labeled section occupies its own row (label header + content below),
 * so no side-by-side column squishing occurs.
 * @param {Element} card       - the .prediction-card DOM element
 * @param {number}  cardIndex  - 1-based index for "Prediction #N of M" label
 * @param {number}  totalCards - total card count for the label
 */
function _mleBuildCardHtml(card, cardIndex, totalCards) {

  // -- Method badge --
  var badgeEl = card.querySelector('.source-badge');
  var method  = badgeEl ? badgeEl.textContent.trim() : 'Prediction';

  // -- Run label: walk direct TEXT_NODE children to skip nested .local-time ISO string --
  var runLabel = '';
  var tsLabelEl = card.querySelector('.timestamp-label');
  if (tsLabelEl) {
    var labelParts = [];
    Array.prototype.forEach.call(tsLabelEl.childNodes, function (node) {
      if (node.nodeType === 3) { labelParts.push(node.nodeValue); }
    });
    runLabel = labelParts.join('').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').replace(/\s*[--]\s*$/, '').trim();
  }

  // -- Saved-at timestamp: prefer data-timestamp attribute (ISO) for accuracy --
  var savedAt = '';
  var savedAtContainer = card.querySelector('.timestamp-container');
  if (savedAtContainer) {
    var iso = savedAtContainer.getAttribute('data-timestamp') || '';
    if (iso) {
      try {
        var d = new Date(iso);
        savedAt = isNaN(d.getTime()) ? iso : d.toLocaleString();
      } catch (e) { savedAt = iso; }
    } else {
      var savedAtEl = savedAtContainer.querySelector('.local-time');
      savedAt = savedAtEl ? savedAtEl.textContent.trim() : '';
    }
  }

  // -- Settings rows --
  var settingRowEls = card.querySelectorAll('.settings-panel .setting-row');
  var settingItems  = [];
  Array.prototype.forEach.call(settingRowEls, function (row) {
    var strong = row.querySelector('strong');
    var lbl    = strong ? strong.textContent.replace(':', '').trim() : '';
    var val    = '';
    Array.prototype.forEach.call(row.childNodes, function (node) {
      if (node === strong) { return; }
      val += (node.nodeType === 3 ? node.nodeValue : node.textContent);
    });
    val = val.trim();
    if (lbl && val) { settingItems.push({ lbl: lbl, val: val }); }
  });

  // -- Hit counts --
  var mainHits  = card.querySelectorAll('.match-pill:not(.extra)').length;
  var extraHits = card.querySelectorAll('.match-pill.extra').length;

  // -- Number sets --
  var drawnMain  = card.querySelectorAll('.drawn-pill:not(.extra)');
  var drawnExtra = card.querySelectorAll('.drawn-pill.extra');
  var predMain   = card.querySelectorAll('.match-pill:not(.extra),.no-match:not(.extra)');
  var predExtra  = card.querySelectorAll('.match-pill.extra,.no-match.extra');

  var hasDrawn   = drawnMain.length > 0 || drawnExtra.length > 0;
  // isUpcoming: empty card with no prediction numbers at all (placeholder)
  var isUpcoming = !hasDrawn && predMain.length === 0 && predExtra.length === 0;
  // isPending: has predicted numbers but the draw hasn't happened yet
  var isPending  = !hasDrawn && (predMain.length > 0 || predExtra.length > 0);

  // -- Build matched-number list for the Match Result section --
  var matchedNums = [];
  Array.prototype.forEach.call(predMain, function (n) {
    if (n.classList.contains('match-pill')) {
      var v = (n.textContent || '').trim();
      if (/^\d$/.test(v)) { v = '0' + v; }
      matchedNums.push(v);
    }
  });
  var matchedExtras = [];
  Array.prototype.forEach.call(predExtra, function (n) {
    if (n.classList.contains('match-pill')) {
      var v = (n.textContent || '').trim();
      if (/^\d$/.test(v)) { v = '0' + v; }
      matchedExtras.push(v);
    }
  });

  // -- Status badge --
  var badgeHtml = '';
  if (isUpcoming) {
    badgeHtml = _LT+'span style="background:#e0f2fe;color:#0369a1;border-radius:3px;padding:3px 10px;'
              + 'font-size:8pt;font-weight:bold;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;"'+_GT
              + 'UPCOMING DRAW'+_LT+'/span'+_GT;
  } else if (isPending) {
    badgeHtml = _LT+'span style="background:#fef9c3;color:#854d0e;border-radius:3px;padding:3px 10px;'
              + 'font-size:8pt;font-weight:bold;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;"'+_GT
              + 'PENDING DRAW'+_LT+'/span'+_GT;
  } else if (hasDrawn) {
    var hLabel = mainHits + (mainHits === 1 ? ' HIT' : ' HITS');
    if (extraHits > 0) { hLabel += ' + ' + extraHits + ' BONUS'; }
    var hBg = mainHits >= 3 ? '#dcfce7' : (mainHits >= 1 ? '#fef9c3' : '#f3f4f6');
    var hFg = mainHits >= 3 ? '#14532d' : (mainHits >= 1 ? '#854d0e' : '#6b7280');
    badgeHtml = _LT+'span style="background:' + hBg + ';color:' + hFg + ';border-radius:3px;padding:3px 10px;'
              + 'font-size:8pt;font-weight:bold;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;"'+_GT
              + _mleEsc(hLabel) + _LT+'/span'+_GT;
  }

  // -- Prediction counter label --
  var counterLabel = (totalCards > 1)
    ? 'PREDICTION #' + cardIndex + ' OF ' + totalCards
    : 'PREDICTION';

  // -- Meta line (run label + saved date) --
  var metaLine = runLabel || '';
  if (savedAt) { metaLine += (metaLine ? '  -  Saved: ' : 'Saved: ') + savedAt; }

  // -- Helper: build a section label row (full-width shaded header) --
  function secLabel(text, bg, fg) {
    return _LT+'tr'+_GT+_LT+'td style="padding:7px 16px;background:' + (bg || '#e8edf5')
      + ';border-top:1.5px solid #c7d2e6;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;'
      + 'font-size:7pt;font-weight:bold;color:' + (fg || '#0A1A33')
      + ';text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;"'+_GT + text + _LT+'/td'+_GT+_LT+'/tr'+_GT;
  }

  // -- Helper: build a section content row (full-width white content area) --
  function secContent(innerHtml, bg) {
    return _LT+'tr'+_GT+_LT+'td style="padding:12px 16px 14px;background:' + (bg || '#ffffff')
      + ';border-bottom:1px solid #e5e9f0;"'+_GT + innerHtml + _LT+'/td'+_GT+_LT+'/tr'+_GT;
  }

  // -- Helper: render a NodeList as a large bold number line with dash separators --
  //    extraNodes is optional (bonus ball, rendered smaller + labeled)
  function numLine(mainNodes, extraNodes) {
    var mainStr = _mleFormatNums(mainNodes, false);
    var html    = _LT+'div style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;font-size:16pt;'
                + 'font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:3px;line-height:1.5;color:#1f2937;"'+_GT
                + (mainStr || _LT+'span style="font-style:normal;font-size:9pt;color:#9ca3af;"'+_GT+'N/A'+_LT+'/span'+_GT)
                + _LT+'/div'+_GT;
    if (extraNodes && extraNodes.length) {
      var extraStr = _mleFormatNums(extraNodes, true);
      if (extraStr) {
        html += _LT+'div style="margin-top:8px;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;'
              + 'font-size:9pt;color:#6b7280;letter-spacing:0;"'+_GT
              + _LT+'span style="font-weight:bold;color:#991b1b;text-transform:uppercase;'
              + 'letter-spacing:0.06em;font-size:7pt;"'+_GT+'Bonus Ball: '+_LT+'/span'+_GT
              + _LT+'span style="font-size:14pt;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px;"'+_GT
              + extraStr + _LT+'/span'+_GT
              + _LT+'/div'+_GT;
      }
    }
    return html;
  }

// -- Assemble card HTML --
var S_TBL = 'style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0"';

// FIX: Build with array join to prevent any possibility of newline-in-string-literal (ES5-safe).
var __h = [];

// Card wrapper
__h.push(_LT+'div style="margin-bottom:28px;page-break-inside:avoid;border:1.5px solid #c7d2e6;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;"'+_GT);

// -- Card header: dark navy bar --
__h.push(_LT+'table ' + S_TBL + _GT);
__h.push(_LT+'tr'+_GT);

// Left header cell
__h.push(_LT+'td style="background:#0A1A33;padding:12px 16px;vertical-align:middle;"'+_GT);

// Left label
__h.push(_LT+'span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;font-size:7pt;font-weight:bold;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;"'+_GT);
__h.push(_mleEsc(counterLabel));
__h.push(_LT+'/span'+_GT);

// Method title
__h.push(_LT+'span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;font-size:13pt;font-weight:bold;color:#ffffff;margin-left:12px;"'+_GT);
__h.push(_mleEsc(method.toUpperCase()));
__h.push(_LT+'/span'+_GT);

__h.push(_LT+'/td'+_GT);

// Right badge cell
__h.push(_LT+'td style="background:#0A1A33;padding:12px 16px;vertical-align:middle;text-align:right;white-space:nowrap;"'+_GT);
__h.push(badgeHtml);
__h.push(_LT+'/td'+_GT);

__h.push(_LT+'/tr'+_GT);

// Optional meta row (KEEP INSIDE SAME TABLE)
if (metaLine) {
  __h.push(_LT+'tr'+_GT);
  __h.push(_LT+'td colspan="2" style="background:#0f2340;padding:5px 16px;"'+_GT);
  __h.push(_LT+'span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;font-size:8pt;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);"'+_GT);
  __h.push(_mleEsc(metaLine));
  __h.push(_LT+'/span'+_GT);
  __h.push(_LT+'/td'+_GT);
  __h.push(_LT+'/tr'+_GT);
}

__h.push(_LT+'/table'+_GT);

// Commit assembled header HTML to string
var html = __h.join('');
  // -- Section rows --
  html += _LT+'table ' + S_TBL + _GT;

  // 1. YOUR PREDICTED NUMBERS
  if (predMain.length > 0 || predExtra.length > 0) {
    html += secLabel('Your Predicted Numbers');
    html += secContent(numLine(predMain, predExtra));
  }

  // 2. OFFICIAL DRAWN NUMBERS (always shown so users understand the draw status)
  html += secLabel('Official Drawn numbers');
  if (hasDrawn) {
    html += secContent(numLine(drawnMain, drawnExtra));
  } else {
     // FIX: Avoid any chance of a literal newline being injected into a quoted string
    // by keeping message text in short, safe literals and escaping the em dash.
    var _mleDrawMsg = isPending
      ? ('Draw results not yet available - check back after the draw date.')
      : ('Upcoming draw.');

    var drawStatus =
      _LT+'span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;font-size:9pt;font-style:italic;color:#9ca3af;"'+_GT
      + _mleDrawMsg
      + _LT+'/span'+_GT;
    html += secContent(drawStatus);
  }

  // 3. MATCH RESULT (only shown when there are actual drawn numbers to compare)
  if (hasDrawn) {
    html += secLabel('Match Result', '#f0fdf4', '#166534');
    var matchLines = '';

    // Primary summary line
    var matchCount = mainHits + ' of ' + predMain.length + ' main number'
                   + (predMain.length !== 1 ? 's' : '') + ' matched';
    matchLines += _LT+'div style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;font-size:10.5pt;'
                + 'font-weight:bold;color:#15803d;"'+_GT + matchCount + _LT+'/div'+_GT;

    // Matching numbers line
    if (matchedNums.length > 0) {
      matchLines += _LT+'div style="margin-top:5px;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;'
                  + 'font-size:9pt;color:#374151;"'+_GT
                  + _LT+'span style="font-weight:bold;color:#0A1A33;"'+_GT+'Matching Numbers: '+_LT+'/span'+_GT
                  + matchedNums.join('  -  ')
                  + _LT+'/div'+_GT;
    } else {
      matchLines += _LT+'div style="margin-top:5px;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;'
                  + 'font-size:9pt;color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;"'+_GT+'No main numbers matched.'+_LT+'/div'+_GT;
    }

    // Bonus ball line
    if (predExtra.length > 0) {
      var bonusLine = extraHits + ' of ' + predExtra.length + ' bonus ball'
                    + (predExtra.length !== 1 ? 's' : '') + ' matched';
      if (matchedExtras.length > 0) {
        bonusLine += ' - ' + matchedExtras.join(', ');
      }
      matchLines += _LT+'div style="margin-top:5px;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;'
                  + 'font-size:9pt;color:#374151;"'+_GT
                  + _LT+'span style="font-weight:bold;color:#0A1A33;"'+_GT+'Bonus Ball: '+_LT+'/span'+_GT
                  + bonusLine
                  + _LT+'/div'+_GT;
    }

    html += secContent(matchLines, '#f0fdf4');
  }

  // 4. SETTINGS USED (2-column mini-table; falls back to saved-date-only)
  if (settingItems.length > 0 || savedAt) {
    html += secLabel('Settings Used to Generate This Prediction');
    var settingsHtml = '';

    if (settingItems.length > 0) {
      // 2-column table: key: value pairs with room to breathe
      settingsHtml += _LT+'table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0"'+_GT;
      var PER_ROW = 2;
      Array.prototype.forEach.call(settingItems, function (item, i) {
        if (i % PER_ROW === 0) { settingsHtml += _LT+'tr'+_GT; }
        settingsHtml += _LT+'td style="padding:4px 16px 4px 0;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;'
                      + 'font-size:9pt;color:#374151;vertical-align:top;width:50%;"'+_GT
                      + _LT+'span style="font-weight:bold;color:#0A1A33;"'+_GT + _mleEsc(item.lbl) + ': '+_LT+'/span'+_GT
                      + _mleEsc(item.val) + _LT+'/td'+_GT;
        if ((i + 1) % PER_ROW === 0) { settingsHtml += _LT+'/tr'+_GT; }
      });
      if (settingItems.length % PER_ROW !== 0) {
        settingsHtml += _LT+'td'+_GT+_LT+'/td'+_GT+_LT+'/tr'+_GT;
      }
      settingsHtml += _LT+'/table'+_GT;
    }

    if (savedAt) {
      settingsHtml += _LT+'div style="margin-top:' + (settingItems.length > 0 ? '7' : '0')
                    + 'px;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;font-size:8.5pt;color:#6b7280;"'+_GT
                    + _LT+'span style="font-weight:bold;color:#374151;"'+_GT+'Saved: '+_LT+'/span'+_GT
                    + _mleEsc(savedAt) + _LT+'/div'+_GT;
    }

    html += secContent(settingsHtml);
  }

  html += _LT+'/table'+_GT;  // end section rows
  html += _LT+'/div'+_GT;    // end card wrapper
  return html;
}

// What to focus on now collapse helpers
function skaiCiSetCollapsed(sectionId, collapsed) {
  var sec = document.getElementById(sectionId);
  if (!sec) { return; }
  var body = document.getElementById(sectionId + '-body');
  var header = sec.querySelector('.prc-header');
  var btn = sec.querySelector('.prc-toggle-btn');
  if (body) { body.style.display = collapsed ? 'none' : ''; }
  if (header) { header.setAttribute('aria-expanded', collapsed ? 'false' : 'true'); }
  if (btn) {
    btn.innerHTML = collapsed ? 'Expand' : 'Collapse';
    btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', collapsed ? 'false' : 'true');
  }
  try { localStorage.setItem('mle_ci_collapsed_' + sectionId, collapsed ? 'true' : 'false'); } catch (e) {}
}
function mleCiHeaderKeydown(event, sectionId) {
  event = event || window.event;
  if (!event) { return true; }
  var key = event.key || event.keyCode;
  if (key === 'Enter' || key === ' ' || key === 13 || key === 32) {
    if (event.preventDefault) { event.preventDefault(); } else { event.returnValue = false; }
    skaiCiToggle(sectionId);
    return false;
  }
  return true;
}

function skaiCiToggle(sectionId) {
  var sec = document.getElementById(sectionId);
  if (!sec) { return; }
  var body = document.getElementById(sectionId + '-body');
  var isOpen = !body || body.style.display !== 'none';
  skaiCiSetCollapsed(sectionId, isOpen);
  skaiCiRefreshToggleAll();
}
function skaiCiRefreshToggleAll() {
  var sections = document.querySelectorAll('.mle-ci-section');
  var anyOpen = false;
  for (var i = 0; i < sections.length; i++) {
    var body = document.getElementById(sections[i].id + '-body');
    if (body && body.style.display !== 'none') { anyOpen = true; break; }
  }
  var allBtn = document.getElementById('mle-ci-toggle-all');
  if (allBtn) {
    allBtn.innerHTML = anyOpen ? 'Collapse all' : 'Expand all';
    allBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', anyOpen ? 'true' : 'false');
  }
}
function skaiCiToggleAll() {
  var sections = document.querySelectorAll('.mle-ci-section');
  var shouldCollapse = false;
  for (var i = 0; i < sections.length; i++) {
    var body = document.getElementById(sections[i].id + '-body');
    if (body && body.style.display !== 'none') { shouldCollapse = true; break; }
  }
  for (var j = 0; j < sections.length; j++) {
    skaiCiSetCollapsed(sections[j].id, shouldCollapse);
  }
  skaiCiRefreshToggleAll();
}
(function () {
  var sections = document.querySelectorAll('.mle-ci-section');
  for (var i = 0; i < sections.length; i++) {
    var sec = sections[i];
    var collapsed = false;
    try { collapsed = localStorage.getItem('mle_ci_collapsed_' + sec.id) === 'true'; } catch (e) {}
    skaiCiSetCollapsed(sec.id, collapsed);
  }
  skaiCiRefreshToggleAll();
})();

if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
  window.skaiCiToggle = skaiCiToggle;
  window.skaiCiToggleAll = skaiCiToggleAll;
  window.mleCiHeaderKeydown = mleCiHeaderKeydown;
  window.skaiPrcToggle = skaiPrcToggle;
  window.mleHistoricalHeaderKeydown = mleHistoricalHeaderKeydown;
  window.mlePrintHistoricalAll = mlePrintHistoricalAll;
  window.mlePrintHistoricalLottery = mlePrintHistoricalLottery;
  window.skaiLotteryToggle = skaiLotteryToggle;
  window.skaiLotteryToggleAll = skaiLotteryToggleAll;
  window.mleOuterLotteryToggle = mleOuterLotteryToggle;
  window.mlePrintCard = mlePrintCard;
  window.mlePrintGroup = mlePrintGroup;
}

document.addEventListener('click', function(evt) {
  var target = evt.target || evt.srcElement;
  var node = target;

  while (node && node.nodeType === 1) {
    if (node.getAttribute && node.getAttribute('data-ci-toggle')) {
      skaiCiToggle(node.getAttribute('data-ci-toggle'));
      return;
    }
    if (node.getAttribute && node.getAttribute('data-ci-toggle-btn') === '1') {
      if (evt.stopPropagation) { evt.stopPropagation(); } else { evt.cancelBubble = true; }
      skaiCiToggle(node.getAttribute('data-ci-id'));
      return;
    }
    if (node.id === 'mle-ci-toggle-all') {
      skaiCiToggleAll();
      return;
    }
    if (node.id === 'mle-print-historical-all') {
      mlePrintHistoricalAll();
      return;
    }
    if (node.getAttribute && node.getAttribute('data-prc-toggle')) {
      skaiPrcToggle(node.getAttribute('data-prc-toggle'));
      return;
    }
    if (node.getAttribute && node.getAttribute('data-prc-toggle-btn') === '1') {
      if (evt.stopPropagation) { evt.stopPropagation(); } else { evt.cancelBubble = true; }
      skaiPrcToggle(node.getAttribute('data-prc-id'));
      return;
    }
    if (node.getAttribute && node.getAttribute('data-prc-print-lottery') === '1') {
      if (evt.stopPropagation) { evt.stopPropagation(); } else { evt.cancelBubble = true; }
      mlePrintHistoricalLottery(node);
      return;
    }
    if (node.id === 'mle-go-to-favorites-btn') {
      if (typeof scrollToFavorites === 'function') { scrollToFavorites(); }
      return;
    }
    node = node.parentNode;
  }
});

document.addEventListener('keydown', function(evt) {
  evt = evt || window.event;
  var target = evt.target || evt.srcElement;
  if (!target || !target.getAttribute) { return; }

  if (target.getAttribute('data-ci-toggle')) {
    mleCiHeaderKeydown(evt, target.getAttribute('data-ci-toggle'));
    return;
  }
  if (target.getAttribute('data-prc-toggle')) {
    mleHistoricalHeaderKeydown(evt, target.getAttribute('data-prc-toggle'));
    return;
  }
});


document.addEventListener('click', function(evt) {
  var target = evt.target || evt.srcElement;
  var node = target;

  while (node && node.nodeType === 1) {
    if (node.getAttribute && node.getAttribute('data-prc-clear-btn') === '1') {
      skaiPrcClearCheckboxes(node.getAttribute('data-prc-section-id'));
      return;
    }
    if (node.getAttribute && node.getAttribute('data-prc-select-upcoming-btn') === '1') {
      skaiPrcSelectUpcoming(node.getAttribute('data-prc-section-id'));
      return;
    }
    if (node.getAttribute && node.getAttribute('data-lottery-collapse-all-btn') === '1') {
      skaiLotteryCollapseAll(true);
      return;
    }
    if (node.getAttribute && node.getAttribute('data-lottery-expand-all-btn') === '1') {
      skaiLotteryCollapseAll(false);
      return;
    }
    if (node.getAttribute && node.getAttribute('data-lottery-toggle-all-btn') === '1') {
      skaiLotteryToggleAll(node);
      return;
    }
    if (node.getAttribute && node.getAttribute('data-lottery-toggle-btn') === '1') {
      skaiLotteryToggle(node);
      return;
    }
    // Outer lottery-group toggle (new two-level grouping)
    if (node.getAttribute && node.getAttribute('data-outer-lottery-toggle-btn') !== null) {
      var outerEl = node.closest ? node.closest('.mle-lottery-outer') : (function() {
        var el = node;
        while (el && !(el.classList && el.classList.contains('mle-lottery-outer'))) { el = el.parentElement; }
        return el;
      }());
      if (outerEl) { mleOuterLotteryToggle(outerEl); }
      if (evt.stopPropagation) { evt.stopPropagation(); } else { evt.cancelBubble = true; }
      return;
    }
    // Click on the outer header itself (anywhere except the inner button)
    if (node.getAttribute && node.getAttribute('data-outer-lottery-toggle') !== null) {
      var outerEl2 = node.closest ? node.closest('.mle-lottery-outer') : (function() {
        var el = node;
        while (el && !(el.classList && el.classList.contains('mle-lottery-outer'))) { el = el.parentElement; }
        return el;
      }());
      if (outerEl2) { mleOuterLotteryToggle(outerEl2); }
      return;
    }
    if (node.getAttribute && node.getAttribute('data-print-group-btn') === '1') {
      mlePrintGroup(node);
      return;
    }
    if (node.getAttribute && node.getAttribute('data-print-card-btn') === '1') {
      mlePrintCard(node);
      return;
    }
    node = node.parentNode;
  }
});

// Robust jump navigation: smooth-scroll, open collapsed target ancestors, and keep focus accessible.
document.addEventListener('click', function(evt) {
  var link = evt.target && evt.target.closest ? evt.target.closest('.mle-quick-nav a[href^="#"], .mle-section-jump a[href^="#"], .mle-lottery-control-strip a[href^="#"], .mle-strategic-nav a[href^="#"]') : null;
  if (!link) { return; }
  var href = link.getAttribute('href') || '';
  if (href.length < 2) { return; }
  var targetId = decodeURIComponent(href.substring(1));
  var target = targetId === 'top' ? document.getElementById('top') || document.body : document.getElementById(targetId);
  if (!target) { return; }
  if (evt.preventDefault) { evt.preventDefault(); } else { evt.returnValue = false; }

  // If jumping into a collapsed outer lottery or draw card, open the containing layer first.
  var outer = target.classList && target.classList.contains('mle-lottery-outer') ? target : (target.closest ? target.closest('.mle-lottery-outer') : null);
  if (outer && outer.classList.contains('body-collapsed')) { mleOuterLotteryToggle(outer); }
  var group = target.classList && target.classList.contains('lottery-group') ? target : (target.closest ? target.closest('.lottery-group') : null);
  if (group && group.classList.contains('collapsed')) {
    var tbtn = group.querySelector('.lottery-collapse-toggle');
    if (tbtn) { skaiLotteryToggle(tbtn); }
    else { group.classList.remove('collapsed'); }
  }

  try { target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); }
  catch (e) { try { target.scrollIntoView(true); } catch (ignore) {} }
  if (target !== document.body) {
    if (!target.hasAttribute('tabindex')) { target.setAttribute('tabindex', '-1'); }
    try { target.focus({ preventScroll: true }); } catch (focusErr) { try { target.focus(); } catch (ignore2) {} }
  }
});

document.addEventListener('change', function(evt) {
  var target = evt.target || evt.srcElement;
  if (!target || !target.getAttribute) { return; }
  if (target.getAttribute('data-auto-submit-select') === '1' && target.form && typeof target.form.submit === 'function') {
    target.form.submit();
  }
});

document.addEventListener('submit', function(evt) {
  evt = evt || window.event;
  var form = evt.target || evt.srcElement;
  if (!form || !form.getAttribute) { return; }

  if (form.getAttribute('data-prc-delete-form') === '1') {
    if (!skaiPrcConfirmDelete(form, form.getAttribute('data-prc-section-id'))) {
      if (evt.preventDefault) { evt.preventDefault(); } else { evt.returnValue = false; }
    }
    return;
  }

  var msg = form.getAttribute('data-confirm-submit');
  if (msg) {
    if (!window.confirm(msg)) {
      if (evt.preventDefault) { evt.preventDefault(); } else { evt.returnValue = false; }
    }
  }
});

/**
 * mleToggleNoteEditor - show or hide the inline note editor for a saved settings card.
 * @param {number}  settingId - DB id of the saved settings row
 * @param {boolean} show      - true = open editor, false = close editor
 */
function mleToggleNoteEditor(settingId, show) {
  var editor  = document.getElementById('mle-note-editor-'  + settingId);
  var display = document.getElementById('mle-note-display-' + settingId);
  if (!editor) { return; }
  editor.style.display  = show ? 'block' : 'none';
  if (display) { display.style.display = show ? 'none' : (display.textContent.trim() ? 'block' : 'none'); }
  if (show) {
    var ta = editor.querySelector('textarea');
    if (ta) { ta.focus(); }
  }
}

/**
 * mleSaveNote - submit the note form via fetch so the page does not reload.
 * Falls back to normal form submit if fetch is unavailable.
 * @param {Event}  evt       - form submit event
 * @param {number} settingId - DB id of the saved settings row
 */
function mleSaveNote(evt, settingId) {
  evt.preventDefault();
  var form = evt.target;
  if (typeof fetch === 'undefined') { form.submit(); return false; }
  var data = new FormData(form);
  fetch(window.location.href, { method: 'POST', body: data, credentials: 'same-origin' })
    .then(function(r) { return r.ok ? r.text() : Promise.reject(r.status); })
    .then(function() {
      var ta      = form.querySelector('textarea[name="user_notes"]');
      var noteVal = ta ? ta.value.trim() : '';
      var display = document.getElementById('mle-note-display-' + settingId);
      if (display) {
        display.innerHTML = noteVal
          ? '<strong style="color:#334155;">Note:</strong> ' + noteVal.replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/\n/g,'<br>')
          : '';
        display.style.display = noteVal ? 'block' : 'none';
      }
      // Update "Add Note / Edit Note" toggle buttons using data-note-toggle attribute
      var btns = document.querySelectorAll('[data-note-toggle="' + settingId + '"]');
      for (var i = 0; i < btns.length; i++) {
        btns[i].innerHTML = (noteVal ? 'Edit Note' : 'Add Note');
      }
      mleToggleNoteEditor(settingId, false);
    })
    .catch(function(err) {
      // Inform the user before falling back to a full-page submit
      var statusMsg = err ? ' (status ' + err + ')' : '';
      if (window.console) { console.warn('[MLE] Note save via fetch failed' + statusMsg + '; retrying via form submit.'); }
      form.submit();
    });
  return false;
}

/**
 * mleApplyRecallSettings - "Use these settings" button handler.
 * Stores the saved settings in sessionStorage under 'mle_recall_settings' so that the
 * SKAI page can read and apply them on load, then navigates to the lottery's SKAI page.
 * Falls back to the in-page CustomEvent approach (mylottoRecallSettings) if the user is
 * already on the SKAI page or no destination URL is stored for this lottery.
 * @param {HTMLElement} btn       - the button element that was clicked
 * @param {number}      settingId - DB id of the saved settings row
 * @param {number}      lotteryId - Lottery this template belongs to
 */
function mleApplyRecallSettings(btn, settingId, lotteryId) {
  var raw = btn ? btn.getAttribute('data-mle-params') : null;
  var params;
  try { params = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null; } catch (e) { params = null; }
  if (!params) { return; }

  var destUrl  = (btn ? btn.getAttribute('data-mle-lottery-url') : null) || '';
  var gameId   = (btn ? btn.getAttribute('data-mle-game-id')     : null) || '';
  var source   = (btn ? btn.getAttribute('data-mle-source')       : null) || '';

  // Build the recall payload to hand off to the SKAI page
  var payload = {
    settingId : settingId,
    lotteryId : lotteryId,
    gameId    : gameId,
    source    : source,
    params    : params
  };

  // If there is a known destination URL for this lottery, navigate there.
  // The SKAI page will read the sessionStorage payload and auto-apply the settings.
  if (destUrl && destUrl !== '' && destUrl !== '#') {
    try {
      sessionStorage.setItem('mle_recall_settings', JSON.stringify(payload));
    } catch (ssErr) {
      if (window.console) { console.warn('[MLE] sessionStorage unavailable:', ssErr); }
    }
    // Navigate; append a flag so the SKAI page knows to look for recall data
    var sep = (destUrl.indexOf('?') === -1) ? '?' : '&';
    window.location.href = destUrl + sep + 'mle_recall=1';
    return;
  }

  // No destination URL - fall back to in-page fill (works if SKAI is on the same page)
  if (typeof mylottoRecallSettings === 'function') {
    mylottoRecallSettings(settingId, lotteryId, params);
  }
}

/**
 * mylottoRecallSettings - populate the active prediction form with a saved settings template.
 * Dispatches a custom event 'mylotto:recall-settings' with the params payload so that any
 * page-level handler (Sky, AI, SKAI, etc.) can apply the values to its own form fields.
 * Falls back to a console notice if no handler is registered.
 *
 * @param {number} settingId    - DB id of the saved settings template
 * @param {number} lotteryId    - Lottery this template belongs to
 * @param {Object} params       - Key/value map of the saved settings params
 */
function mylottoRecallSettings(settingId, lotteryId, params) {
  if (typeof params !== 'object' || params === null) { return; }
  var detail = { settingId: settingId, lotteryId: lotteryId, params: params };
  var evt = null;
  try {
    evt = new CustomEvent('mylotto:recall-settings', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true, detail: detail });
  } catch (e) {
    // IE11 fallback
    evt = document.createEvent('CustomEvent');
    evt.initCustomEvent('mylotto:recall-settings', true, true, detail);
  }
  var handled = document.dispatchEvent(evt);
  // dispatchEvent() returns false only if a handler called evt.preventDefault() to signal it took
  // exclusive ownership. When handled === true (no handler cancelled), do a best-effort form fill
  // by matching input/select elements by name attribute.
  if (handled) {
    var filled = 0;
    for (var k in params) {
      if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(params, k)) { continue; }
      var els = document.querySelectorAll('[name="' + k + '"], [data-setting-key="' + k + '"]');
      for (var i = 0; i < els.length; i++) {
        var el = els[i];
        if (el.tagName === 'SELECT') {
          for (var j = 0; j < el.options.length; j++) {
            if (String(el.options[j].value) === String(params[k])) { el.selectedIndex = j; filled++; break; }
          }
        } else if (el.type === 'checkbox') {
          el.checked = (String(params[k]) === '1' || String(params[k]).toLowerCase() === 'true');
          filled++;
        } else if (el.type !== 'hidden' && el.type !== 'submit' && el.type !== 'button') {
          el.value = params[k];
          filled++;
        }
      }
    }
    if (filled > 0) {
      // Trigger change events so reactive UI updates
      var allInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input,select,textarea');
      for (var i2 = 0; i2 < allInputs.length; i2++) {
        try { allInputs[i2].dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); } catch(e2) {}
      }
    }
  }
}

// ============================================================
// ADVISORY BOARD - ES5 JavaScript
// ============================================================
(function() {
  'use strict';

  function mleAdvisoryShowProof(settingLabel, strongValue, weakValue) {
    var msg = 'Settings Advisor Proof\n\n'
      + 'Setting: ' + settingLabel + '\n\n'
      + 'Strong runs used: ' + strongValue + '\n'
      + 'Weak runs used: '   + weakValue   + '\n\n'
      + 'This pattern appeared consistently across multiple completed draws.\n'
      + 'Changing only one setting helps LottoExpert learn what actually helped.';
    alert(msg);
  }

  window.mleAdvisoryShowProof = mleAdvisoryShowProof;

  function mleAdvisoryUpdateStatus(runId, status) {
    if (!runId) { return; }
    var formEl = document.createElement('form');
    formEl.method = 'POST';
    formEl.action = window.location.href;
    var fields = { mle_action: 'update_advice_status', run_id: String(runId), status: String(status) };
    for (var k in fields) {
      if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(fields, k)) {
        var inp = document.createElement('input');
        inp.type  = 'hidden';
        inp.name  = k;
        inp.value = fields[k];
        formEl.appendChild(inp);
      }
    }
    var csrfInput = document.querySelector('input[name^="csrf.token"]') || document.querySelector('input[name$="_token"]');
    if (csrfInput) {
      var csrfCopy = document.createElement('input');
      csrfCopy.type  = 'hidden';
      csrfCopy.name  = csrfInput.name;
      csrfCopy.value = csrfInput.value;
      formEl.appendChild(csrfCopy);
    }
    document.body.appendChild(formEl);
    formEl.submit();
  }

  window.mleAdvisoryUpdateStatus = mleAdvisoryUpdateStatus;

}());
</script>
<?php endif; // End disabled legacy standalone page sections. ?>

<?php
// MLE v18: Original favorite lotteries and favorite wheeling systems restored.
// These are global utility sections; all lottery-specific decision content remains inside command cards.
?>
<!-- ==================================================
     Favorite Lotteries Section
     ================================================== -->
<div id="favorite-lotteries" class="favorite-lotteries-grid">

<details open class="card favorites-wrapper">
  <summary class="card-header favorite-lotteries-header">
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; width:100%; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;">
        <span class="title">Your favorite lotteries</span>
        <span class="section-badge"><?php echo count((array)$favoriteLotteries); ?></span>
      </div>
      <a href="/select-favorite-lotteries" class="btn-primary">+ Edit</a>
    </div>
  </summary>

  <p class="mle-section-explainer" style="margin:0.75rem 1rem 0;">Track your selected lotteries in one place. Use this section to confirm each lottery context and quickly open official results.</p>

  <div class="mle-section-jump" aria-label="Favorite Lotteries quick navigation" style="margin:0.75rem 1rem 0;">
    <span class="mle-section-jump__label">Jump to</span>
    <div class="mle-section-jump__links">
      <a href="#info-card" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Overview</a>
      <a href="#mle-historical-validation-wrap" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Draw Results</a>
      <a href="#my-lotteries" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">My Lotteries</a>
      <a href="#numbers-to-play" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Numbers to Play</a>
      <a href="#favorite-lotteries" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Favorite Lotteries</a>

  <div id="favorites-list">
 
    <?php if (!empty($favoriteLotteries)): ?>
      <div class="favorites-grid">
        <?php foreach ($favoriteLotteries as $lotto): ?>
          <?php
            // Latest completed draw + next scheduled draw are loaded separately.
            $drawingInfo  = getLatestDrawing($lotto['game_id'], $db);
            $nextDrawInfo = getNextScheduledDrawing($lotto['game_id'], $db);

            // Sanitize the URL for "View Results"
            $url = htmlspecialchars(trim($lotto['lottery_urls']), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');

            // Default placeholders
            $lastDraw      = 'N/A';
            $lastDrawHeld  = 'N/A';
            $nextDraw      = 'N/A';
            $nextDrawHeld  = 'N/A';
            $drawnStr      = 'N/A';

            if (!empty($drawingInfo)) {
                $lastDraw = !empty($drawingInfo['draw_date'])
                    ? date('M j, Y', strtotime($drawingInfo['draw_date']))
                    : 'N/A';
                $lastDrawHeld = mylottoexpertFormatDrawHeldLabel($drawingInfo);

                $drawParts = mylottoexpertExtractDrawNumbersFromRow($lotto['game_id'], $drawingInfo);
                $drawnAll  = array_merge(
                    isset($drawParts['main']) && is_array($drawParts['main']) ? $drawParts['main'] : array(),
                    isset($drawParts['extra']) && is_array($drawParts['extra']) ? $drawParts['extra'] : array()
                );

                $drawnStr = !empty($drawnAll)
                    ? implode(', ', array_map('strval', $drawnAll))
                    : 'N/A';
            }

            if (!empty($nextDrawInfo['draw_date'])) {
                $nextDraw = date('M j, Y', strtotime($nextDrawInfo['draw_date']));
                $nextDrawHeld = mylottoexpertFormatDrawHeldLabel($nextDrawInfo);
            } elseif (!empty($drawingInfo['next_draw_date'])) {
                $nextDraw = date('M j, Y', strtotime($drawingInfo['next_draw_date']));
                $nextDrawHeld = mylottoexpertFormatDrawHeldLabel($drawingInfo);
            }

            // Determine an optional "type badge" (e.g., "Powerball")
            $typeBadge = '';
            $nameLower = mb_strtolower($lotto['lottery_name'], 'UTF-8');
            $lottoDisplayMeta = mylottoexpertResolveDisplayLocationMeta(
                (string)($lotto['state_name'] ?? ''),
                (string)($lotto['country_name'] ?? ''),
                (string)($lotto['lottery_name'] ?? ''),
                (string)($lotto['game_id'] ?? '')
            );
            $lottoDisplayTitle = mylottoexpertFormatLotteryLocationLine(
                (string)$lottoDisplayMeta['state'],
                (string)$lottoDisplayMeta['country'],
                (string)$lottoDisplayMeta['lottery'],
                (string)($lotto['game_id'] ?? '')
            );
            $lottoDisplayLocation = mylottoexpertFormatLotteryLocationLine(
                (string)$lottoDisplayMeta['state'],
                (string)$lottoDisplayMeta['country'],
                '',
                (string)($lotto['game_id'] ?? ''),
                ', '
            );
            if (strpos($nameLower, 'pick 3') !== false) {
                $typeBadge = 'Pick 3';
            } elseif (strpos($nameLower, 'pick 4') !== false) {
                $typeBadge = 'Pick 4';
            } elseif (strpos($nameLower, 'powerball') !== false) {
                $typeBadge = 'Powerball';
            } elseif (strpos($nameLower, 'mega') !== false) {
                $typeBadge = 'Mega Millions';
            }
          ?>

<div class="card favorite-card">
  <div class="card-header">
    <?php
      $favLogo = ['path'=>'','exists'=>false,'alt'=>''];
      if (!empty($lotto['lottery_name'])) {
          $favLogo = buildLotteryLogoPath((string)$lotto['state_name'], (string)$lotto['lottery_name']);
      }
    ?>

    <div class="lotto-title-wrap">
      <?php if (!empty($favLogo['path'])): ?>
        <?php
          $parts = preg_split('/\s+/', (string)$lotto['lottery_name']);
          $ini   = '';
          foreach ($parts as $p) { if ($p !== '') { $ini .= mb_strtoupper(mb_substr($p,0,1)); if (mb_strlen($ini) >= 2) break; } }
          $iniFallback = htmlspecialchars($ini ?: 'LE', ENT_QUOTES);
        ?>
        <img class="lotto-logo" src="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($favLogo['path'], ENT_QUOTES); ?>"
              alt="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($favLogo['alt'], ENT_QUOTES); ?>" loading="lazy" width="120" height="38"
              onerror="this.style.display='none';var s=this.nextElementSibling;if(s){s.style.display='';}">
        <span class="lotto-logo fallback" aria-label="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($favLogo['alt'].' (placeholder)', ENT_QUOTES); ?>" style="display:none">
          <?php echo $iniFallback; ?>
        </span>
      <?php endif; ?>

      <span class="title">
        <?php if ($lottoDisplayTitle !== ''): ?>
          <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$lottoDisplayTitle, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?><br>
        <?php endif; ?>
        Last completed draw: <?php echo $lastDraw; ?>
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

            <div class="lottery-details">
              Location: <?php echo htmlspecialchars($lottoDisplayLocation !== '' ? $lottoDisplayLocation : 'Not specified', ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
            </div>

            <div class="draw-info">
              Last Draw: <strong><?php echo $lastDraw; ?></strong><br>
              Held: <strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars($lastDrawHeld, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong><br>
              Next Draw: <strong><?php echo $nextDraw; ?></strong><br>
              Draw Time: <strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars($nextDrawHeld, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong><br>
              Numbers: <strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars($drawnStr, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong>
            </div>

             <div style="margin-top:.75rem; display:flex; justify-content:flex-end;">
               <?php if ($url !== ''): ?>
                 <a href="<?php echo $url; ?>" target="_blank" class="btn-primary">View Results</a>
               <?php endif; ?>
             </div>

          </div>

        <?php endforeach; ?>
      </div>
    <?php else: ?>
      <p class="text-muted">No favorite lotteries found.</p>
    <?php endif; ?>
  </div>
</details>
</div>

.mle-pending-recommendations__not-ready{padding:13px;border-radius:15px;border:1px dashed rgba(148,163,184,.44);background:rgba(255,255,255,.72);color:#334155;}
.mle-pending-recommendations__not-ready strong{display:block;color:#0f172a;margin-bottom:4px;}
.mle-pending-recommendations__not-ready p{margin:0 0 10px;color:#475569;line-height:1.45;}
.mle-pending-recommendations__foot{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-top:12px;color:#475569;font-size:12px;line-height:1.4;}
.mle-pending-recommendations__count{margin-top:9px;color:#64748b;font-size:12px;line-height:1.4;}
@media(max-width:900px){.mle-pending-recommendations__head,.mle-pending-recommendations__foot{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start}.mle-pending-recommendations__meta{align-items:flex-start}.mle-pending-recommendations__grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}

</style>
<script>
(function(){
  function hasClass(el, name){
    return !!(el && typeof el.className === 'string' && (' ' + el.className + ' ').indexOf(' ' + name + ' ') > -1);
  }
  function closestButton(el){
    while(el && el !== document){
      if(el.tagName && String(el.tagName).toUpperCase() === 'BUTTON'){
        return el;
      }
      el = el.parentNode;
    }
    return null;
  }
  function closestCard(el){
    while(el && el !== document){
      if(hasClass(el, 'mle-advisory-card')){
        return el;
      }
      el = el.parentNode;
    }
    return null;
  }
  function setShortcutActive(card, targetId){
    if(!card || !card.querySelectorAll){ return; }
    var shortcuts = card.querySelectorAll('.mle-section-shortcut-btn');
    var i;
    for(i = 0; i < shortcuts.length; i++){
      shortcuts[i].className = String(shortcuts[i].className || '').replace(/\bis-active\b/g, '').replace(/\s{2,}/g, ' ').replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
      shortcuts[i].removeAttribute('aria-current');
      var panelId = shortcuts[i].getAttribute('data-target-panel');
      var sectionId = shortcuts[i].getAttribute('data-target-section');
      if(targetId && (targetId === panelId || targetId === sectionId)){
        shortcuts[i].className += ' is-active';
        shortcuts[i].setAttribute('aria-current', 'true');
      }
    }
  }
  function collapseOtherPrimarySections(card, keepId){
    if(!card || !card.querySelectorAll){ return; }
    var sections = card.querySelectorAll('[data-mle-primary-section-body="1"]');
    var i;
    for(i = 0; i < sections.length; i++){
      var section = sections[i];
      var sid = section.getAttribute('id') || '';
      if(!sid || sid === keepId){ continue; }
      section.style.display = 'none';
      section.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      var toggles = card.querySelectorAll('[aria-controls="' + sid + '"]');
      var t;
      for(t = 0; t < toggles.length; t++){
        toggles[t].setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        setText(toggles[t], false);
      }
    }
  }
  function setText(btn, open){
    var node = null;
    var spans = btn.getElementsByTagName ? btn.getElementsByTagName('span') : [];
    node = spans && spans.length ? spans[0] : btn;
    var txt = node.innerHTML || node.textContent || '';
    txt = String(txt).replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
    if(txt === 'Expand' || txt === 'Collapse'){
      node.innerHTML = open ? 'Collapse' : 'Expand';
      return;
    }
    if(txt.indexOf('Show ') === 0){
      node.innerHTML = (open ? 'Hide ' : 'Show ') + txt.substring(5);
      return;
    }
    if(txt.indexOf('Hide ') === 0){
      node.innerHTML = (open ? 'Hide ' : 'Show ') + txt.substring(5);
      return;
    }
    if(txt.indexOf('View ') === 0){
      node.innerHTML = (open ? 'Hide ' : 'View ') + txt.substring(5);
      return;
    }
  }
  function messageNear(btn, text){
    var host = btn.parentNode || btn;
    var msg = document.createElement('div');
    msg.className = 'mle-command-local-message';
    msg.appendChild(document.createTextNode(text));
    host.appendChild(msg);
  }
  function openTarget(id, sourceBtn){
    var el = id ? document.getElementById(id) : null;
    if(!el){ return false; }
    var card = closestCard(sourceBtn || el);
    if(card && el.getAttribute && el.getAttribute('data-mle-primary-section-body') === '1'){
      collapseOtherPrimarySections(card, id);
    }
    el.style.display = 'block';
    el.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
    var buttons = document.querySelectorAll ? document.querySelectorAll('[aria-controls="' + id + '"]') : [];
    var i;
    for(i = 0; i < buttons.length; i++){
      buttons[i].setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
      setText(buttons[i], true);
    }
    if(card){
      setShortcutActive(card, id);
    }
    try {
      if(el.scrollIntoView){ el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'start'}); }
    } catch(e) {}
    return true;
  }
  function toggleTarget(btn){
    var id = btn.getAttribute('aria-controls');
    var el = id ? document.getElementById(id) : null;
    if(!el){
      messageNear(btn, 'This section could not be opened because its target was not found.');
      return;
    }
    var currentHidden = el.getAttribute('aria-hidden');
    var currentlyClosed = (currentHidden === 'true' || el.style.display === 'none' || el.offsetParent === null);
    var open = currentlyClosed;
    el.style.display = open ? 'block' : 'none';
    el.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
    btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', open ? 'true' : 'false');
    setText(btn, open);
    var card = closestCard(btn);
    if(card && open && el.getAttribute && el.getAttribute('data-mle-primary-section-body') === '1'){
      collapseOtherPrimarySections(card, id);
      setShortcutActive(card, id);
    } else if(card && open){
      setShortcutActive(card, id);
    } else if(card && !open){
      setShortcutActive(card, '');
    }
  }
  function commandClick(ev){
    var btn = closestButton(ev.target || ev.srcElement);
    if(!btn){ return; }
    if(hasClass(btn, 'mle-lottery-toggle') || hasClass(btn, 'mle-section-toggle')){
      if(ev.preventDefault){ ev.preventDefault(); }
      if(ev.stopPropagation){ ev.stopPropagation(); }
      toggleTarget(btn);
      return false;
    }
    if(hasClass(btn, 'mle-section-shortcut-btn')){
      if(ev.preventDefault){ ev.preventDefault(); }
      if(ev.stopPropagation){ ev.stopPropagation(); }
      var panelId = btn.getAttribute('data-target-panel');
      var sectionId = btn.getAttribute('data-target-section');
      if(panelId){
        if(!openTarget(panelId, btn)){
          messageNear(btn, 'This section shortcut could not open because its target was not found.');
        } else {
          var sec = sectionId ? document.getElementById(sectionId) : null;
          try {
            if(sec && sec.scrollIntoView){ sec.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'start'}); }
          } catch(e) {}
        }
        return false;
      }
      var target = sectionId ? document.getElementById(sectionId) : null;
      if(!target){
        messageNear(btn, 'This section shortcut could not open because its target was not found.');
        return false;
      }
      setShortcutActive(closestCard(btn), sectionId);
      try {
        if(target.scrollIntoView){ target.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'start'}); }
      } catch(e) {}
      return false;
    }
    if(hasClass(btn, 'mle-review-runs-btn')){
      if(ev.preventDefault){ ev.preventDefault(); }
      if(ev.stopPropagation){ ev.stopPropagation(); }
      if(!openTarget(btn.getAttribute('data-target-panel'), btn)){
        messageNear(btn, 'This section could not be opened because its target was not found.');
      }
      return false;
    }
    if(hasClass(btn, 'mle-leave-as-is-btn')){
      if(ev.preventDefault){ ev.preventDefault(); }
      if(ev.stopPropagation){ ev.stopPropagation(); }
      messageNear(btn, 'No changes applied. Your saved history was left as is.');
      return false;
    }
    if(btn.getAttribute('data-adv-print-card')){
      if(ev.preventDefault){ ev.preventDefault(); }
      if(ev.stopPropagation){ ev.stopPropagation(); }
      mleAdvisoryCardPrint(btn);
      return false;
    }
  }
  if(document.addEventListener){
    document.addEventListener('click', commandClick, true);
  } else if(document.attachEvent){
    document.attachEvent('onclick', commandClick);
  }
}());
</script>
<!-- /MLE COMMAND CARD FINAL INTERACTION REPAIR -->

<script>
/* Advisory-card print (ES5, no external dependencies) */
function mleAdvisoryCardPrint(btn) {
  var LT = '\u003c', GT = '\u003e';
  function esc(s) {
    return String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'\u0026amp;').replace(/\u003c/g,'\u0026lt;').replace(/\u003e/g,'\u0026gt;').replace(/"/g,'\u0026quot;');
  }
  // walk up to find .mle-advisory-card
  var node = btn;
  while(node && node !== document){
    if(node.className && String(node.className).indexOf('mle-advisory-card') !== -1){ break; }
    node = node.parentNode;
  }
  if(!node || node === document){ return; }

  // clone, then make ALL section bodies visible for print
  var clone = node.cloneNode(true);

  // show the main body
  var body = clone.querySelector('.mle-advisory-card__body');
  if(body){ body.style.display='block'; body.removeAttribute('aria-hidden'); }

  // show every section-body / mle-section-body
  var sbs = clone.querySelectorAll('.mle-section-body,[aria-hidden]');
  for(var s=0;s<sbs.length;s++){
    sbs[s].style.display='block';
    sbs[s].style.visibility='visible';
    sbs[s].style.height='auto';
    sbs[s].style.maxHeight='none';
    sbs[s].removeAttribute('aria-hidden');
  }

  // remove interactive controls
  var rm = clone.querySelectorAll(
    '.mle-lottery-toggle,.mle-section-toggle,.mle-section-shortcuts,.mle-section-shortcut-btn,button,input[type="checkbox"],.mle-adv-print-btn,.mle-adv-results-link'
  );
  for(var r=rm.length-1;r>=0;r--){
    if(rm[r].parentNode){ rm[r].parentNode.removeChild(rm[r]); }
  }

  var lotteryTitle = '';
  var h3 = clone.querySelector('.mle-advisory-card__lottery-name');
  if(h3){ lotteryTitle = (h3.textContent || h3.innerText || '').replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g,''); }

  var bodyHtml = clone.innerHTML;

  // build print document
  var p = [];
  p.push(LT+'!DOCTYPE html'+GT);
  p.push(LT+'html lang="en"'+GT+LT+'head'+GT);
  p.push(LT+'meta charset="UTF-8"'+GT);
  p.push(LT+'meta name="color-scheme" content="light only"'+GT);
  p.push(LT+'title'+GT+esc(lotteryTitle||'Lottery Advisory Card')+LT+'/title'+GT);
  p.push(LT+'style'+GT);
  p.push('html,body{background:#fff !important;color:#111 !important;margin:0;padding:0;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;line-height:1.45;}');
  p.push('.mle-print-toolbar{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:9999;padding:10px 16px;background:#0A1A33;color:#fff;border-bottom:1px solid #d1d5db;}');
  p.push('.mle-print-toolbar-title{display:inline-block;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;vertical-align:middle;}');
  p.push('.mle-print-toolbar-actions{float:right;}');
  p.push('.mle-print-toolbar-btn{display:inline-block;margin-left:8px;padding:7px 12px;border:0;border-radius:6px;background:#1C66FF;color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;}');
  p.push('.mle-print-toolbar-btn-secondary{background:#4b5563;}');
  p.push('.mle-print-doc{padding:20px;}');
  p.push('h3,h4,h5{margin:0 0 8px;color:#0A1A33;}');
  p.push('.mle-advisory-card__logo-fallback{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;background:#0A1A33;color:#fff;font-size:.8rem;font-weight:900;}');
  p.push('.mle-advisory-card__lottery-ident{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px;}');
  p.push('.mle-advisory-card__lottery-name{font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:900;color:#0A1A33;margin:0;}');
  p.push('.mle-adv-run-stats{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin:8px 0;}');
  p.push('.mle-adv-stat-chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;border:1px solid #cbd5e1;border-radius:999px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;color:#334155;background:#f8fafc;}');
  p.push('.mle-adv-stat-chip--scored{background:#f0fdf9;border-color:#6ee7b7;}.mle-adv-stat-chip--pending{background:#fffbf0;border-color:#fcd34d;}.mle-adv-stat-chip--fresh-runs{background:#fff7ed;border-color:#fb923c;}.mle-adv-stat-chip--best-hits{background:#eff6ff;border-color:#93c5fd;}');
  p.push('.mle-adv-stat-value{font-weight:900;color:#0A1A33;font-size:.95rem;}.mle-adv-stat-label{font-size:.66rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:#64748b;}');
  p.push('.mle-proof-badge{display:inline-block;padding:3px 9px;border:1px solid #cbd5e1;border-radius:999px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:900;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;}');
  p.push('.mle-proof-badge--strong-pattern{background:#ffedd5;color:#9a3412;border-color:#fb923c;}');
  p.push('.mle-proof-badge--trusted-recipe{background:#dcfce7;color:#166534;border-color:#86efac;}');
  p.push('.mle-proof-badge--good-test,.mle-proof-badge--close-race{background:#fef3c7;color:#92400e;border-color:#fcd34d;}');
  p.push('.mle-proof-badge--early-clue{background:#dbeafe;color:#1d4ed8;border-color:#93c5fd;}');
  p.push('.mle-proof-badge--too-early,.mle-proof-badge--no-clear-winner{background:#f1f5f9;color:#334155;border-color:#cbd5e1;}');
  p.push('.mle-advisory-card__collapsed{padding:14px;background:#f8fafc;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:12px 12px 0 0;}');
  p.push('.mle-advisory-card__body{padding:14px;background:#fff;}');
  p.push('.mle-section-shortcuts{display:none !important;}');
  p.push('.mle-lottery-command-hero{background:#0A1A33;color:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:14px;margin:0 0 12px;}');
  p.push('.mle-lottery-command-hero *{color:#fff !important;}');
  p.push('.mle-optimization-focus,.mle-visual-comparison,.mle-next-settings-run,.mle-adv-pred-summary,.mle-lottery-roof-section,.mle-batch-cleanup,.mle-precision-lock{border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin:0 0 12px;background:#fff;}');
  p.push('.mle-optimization-focus__grid,.mle-next-settings-run__details,.mle-adv-pred-summary__grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:8px;}');
  p.push('.mle-optimization-focus__grid div,.mle-next-settings-run__details div,.mle-adv-pred-summary__grid div{border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;padding:8px;background:#f8fafc;}');
  p.push('.mle-visual-row{border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;padding:8px;margin:4px 0;background:#f8fafc;}');
  p.push('.mle-ball{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:999px;background:#edf2ff;border:1px solid #dbe4ff;color:#0A1A33;font-weight:800;font-size:11px;}');
  p.push('.mle-ball--match{background:#20C997;color:#fff;border-color:#20C997;}');
  p.push('.mle-card-roof-map{display:none;}');
  p.push('.mle-mini-card{border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;background:#f8fafc;}');
  p.push('@media print{html,body{background:#fff !important;}body{margin:0 !important;}.mle-print-toolbar{display:none !important;}}');
  p.push(LT+'/style'+GT+LT+'/head'+GT+LT+'body'+GT);
  p.push(LT+'div class="mle-print-toolbar"'+GT);
  p.push(LT+'span class="mle-print-toolbar-title"'+GT+esc(lotteryTitle||'Lottery Advisory Card')+LT+'/span'+GT);
  p.push(LT+'span class="mle-print-toolbar-actions"'+GT);
  p.push(LT+'button type="button" class="mle-print-toolbar-btn" onclick="window.focus();window.print();"'+GT+'Print'+LT+'/button'+GT);
  p.push(LT+'button type="button" class="mle-print-toolbar-btn mle-print-toolbar-btn-secondary" onclick="window.close();"'+GT+'Close'+LT+'/button'+GT);
  p.push(LT+'/span'+GT+LT+'div style="clear:both"'+GT+LT+'/div'+GT+LT+'/div'+GT);
  p.push(LT+'div class="mle-print-doc"'+GT+bodyHtml+LT+'/div'+GT);
  p.push(LT+'script'+GT);
  p.push('(function(){var pr=false;function go(){if(pr){return;}pr=true;window.focus();window.setTimeout(function(){try{window.print();}catch(e){}},250);}');
  p.push('if(document.readyState==="complete"){window.setTimeout(go,250);}else if(window.addEventListener){window.addEventListener("load",function(){window.setTimeout(go,250);});}');
  p.push('if(window.addEventListener){window.addEventListener("afterprint",function(){window.close();});}');
  p.push('window.setTimeout(function(){try{window.close();}catch(e){}},120000);');
  p.push('})();');
  p.push(LT+'/script'+GT+LT+'/body'+GT+LT+'/html'+GT);

  var html = p.join('');
  var win = null;
  try { win = window.open('','_blank','width=1100,height=800,menubar=no,toolbar=yes,location=no,status=no,scrollbars=yes,resizable=yes'); } catch(e){}
  if(!win){ return; }
  try { win.document.open(); win.document.write(html); win.document.close(); win.focus(); } catch(e){ try{win.close();}catch(e2){} }
}
</script>

.mle-pending-recommendations__head p{margin:0;max-width:760px;color:#334155;font-size:13px;line-height:1.45;}
.mle-pending-recommendations__meta{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;align-items:flex-end;min-width:190px;color:#475569;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;}
.mle-pending-recommendations__confidence{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;border-radius:999px;padding:6px 10px;background:rgba(37,99,235,.12);border:1px solid rgba(96,165,250,.35);color:#1e3a8a;}
.mle-pending-recommendations--limited .mle-pending-recommendations__confidence{background:rgba(217,119,6,.12);border-color:rgba(251,191,36,.38);color:#92400e;}
.mle-pending-recommendations--strong .mle-pending-recommendations__confidence{background:rgba(22,163,74,.12);border-color:rgba(74,222,128,.36);color:#166534;}
.mle-pending-recommendations--not_ready .mle-pending-recommendations__confidence{background:rgba(100,116,139,.12);border-color:rgba(148,163,184,.34);color:#334155;}
.mle-pending-recommendations__grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:12px;}
.mle-pending-recommendation-card{padding:13px;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,.28);background:rgba(255,255,255,.86);box-shadow:0 10px 24px rgba(15,23,42,.06);}
.mle-pending-recommendation-card__top{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:10px;}
.mle-pending-recommendation-card__rank{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(37,99,235,.14);color:#1e3a8a;border:1px solid rgba(96,165,250,.38);font-weight:900;font-size:12px;flex:0 0 auto;}
.mle-pending-recommendation-card__title{display:block;color:#1d4ed8;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;font-weight:900;font-size:10.5px;margin-bottom:2px;}
.mle-pending-recommendation-card strong{display:block;color:#0f172a;font-size:13px;line-height:1.25;}
.mle-pending-recommendation-card small{display:block;color:#64748b;font-size:11.5px;line-height:1.35;margin-top:2px;}
.mle-pending-recommendation-card__numbers{margin:8px 0;}
.mle-pending-recommendation-card__score{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;border-radius:12px;padding:8px 10px;background:rgba(15,23,42,.04);border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,.22);margin:8px 0;}
.mle-pending-recommendation-card__score span{font-size:11px;color:#64748b;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;font-weight:900;}
.mle-pending-recommendation-card__score strong{font-size:13px;color:#0f172a;}
.mle-pending-recommendation-card p{margin:8px 0 0;color:#475569;font-size:12px;line-height:1.4;}
.mle-pending-recommendations__not-ready{padding:13px;border-radius:15px;border:1px dashed rgba(148,163,184,.44);background:rgba(255,255,255,.72);color:#334155;}
.mle-pending-recommendations__not-ready strong{display:block;color:#0f172a;margin-bottom:4px;}
.mle-pending-recommendations__not-ready p{margin:0 0 10px;color:#475569;line-height:1.45;}
.mle-pending-recommendations__foot{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-top:12px;color:#475569;font-size:12px;line-height:1.4;}
.mle-pending-recommendations__count{margin-top:9px;color:#64748b;font-size:12px;line-height:1.4;}
@media(max-width:900px){.mle-pending-recommendations__head,.mle-pending-recommendations__foot{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start}.mle-pending-recommendations__meta{align-items:flex-start}.mle-pending-recommendations__grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}

</style>
<script>
(function(){
  'use strict';
  var STORE_KEY = 'mle_keep_position_after_update_v2';

  function qsa(sel, root){ return Array.prototype.slice.call((root || document).querySelectorAll(sel)); }
  function closest(el, sel){
    if (!el) { return null; }
    if (el.closest) { return el.closest(sel); }
    while (el && el.nodeType === 1) {
      if (matches(el, sel)) { return el; }
      el = el.parentNode;
    }
    return null;
  }
  function matches(el, sel){
    var fn = el.matches || el.msMatchesSelector || el.webkitMatchesSelector;
    return !!(fn && fn.call(el, sel));
  }
  function byId(id){ return id ? document.getElementById(id) : null; }
  function setExpandedButton(btn, open){
    if (!btn) { return; }
    btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', open ? 'true' : 'false');
    var node = btn.querySelector ? (btn.querySelector('span') || btn) : btn;
    var txt = (node.textContent || '').replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
    if (txt === 'Expand' || txt === 'Collapse') { node.textContent = open ? 'Collapse' : 'Expand'; return; }
    if (txt.indexOf('Show ') === 0) { node.textContent = (open ? 'Hide ' : 'Show ') + txt.substring(5); return; }
    if (txt.indexOf('Hide ') === 0) { node.textContent = (open ? 'Hide ' : 'Show ') + txt.substring(5); return; }
    if (txt.indexOf('View ') === 0) { node.textContent = (open ? 'Hide ' : 'View ') + txt.substring(5); return; }
  }
  function openSectionById(id){
    var el = byId(id);
    if (!el) { return false; }
    el.style.display = 'block';
    el.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
    qsa('[aria-controls="' + cssEscape(id) + '"]').forEach(function(btn){ setExpandedButton(btn, true); });
    return true;
  }
  function closeSectionById(id){
    var el = byId(id);
    if (!el) { return false; }
    el.style.display = 'none';
    el.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
    qsa('[aria-controls="' + cssEscape(id) + '"]').forEach(function(btn){ setExpandedButton(btn, false); });
    return true;
  }
  function cssEscape(v){
    if (window.CSS && CSS.escape) { return CSS.escape(String(v)); }
    return String(v).replace(/([ #;?%&,.+*~\':"!^$[\]()=>|\/])/g, '\\$1');
  }
  function openOuter(outer){
    if (!outer) { return; }
    outer.classList.remove('body-collapsed');
    outer.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
    var lid = outer.getAttribute('data-outer-lottery-id') || '';
    var head = outer.querySelector('[data-outer-lottery-toggle]');
    var btn = outer.querySelector('.mle-lottery-outer-toggle,[data-outer-lottery-toggle-btn]');
    if (head) { head.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true'); }
    if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Collapse'; btn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Collapse lottery section'); }
    if (lid) { try { localStorage.setItem('mle_outer_collapsed_' + lid, 'false'); } catch(e) {} }
  }
  function closeOuter(outer){
    if (!outer) { return; }
    outer.classList.add('body-collapsed');
    outer.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
    var lid = outer.getAttribute('data-outer-lottery-id') || '';
    var head = outer.querySelector('[data-outer-lottery-toggle]');
    var btn = outer.querySelector('.mle-lottery-outer-toggle,[data-outer-lottery-toggle-btn]');
    if (head) { head.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false'); }
    if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Expand'; btn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Expand lottery section'); }
    if (lid) { try { localStorage.setItem('mle_outer_collapsed_' + lid, 'true'); } catch(e) {} }
  }
  function openLotteryGroup(group){
    if (!group) { return; }
    group.classList.remove('collapsed');
    var lotteryId = group.getAttribute('data-lottery-id') || '';
    var base = lotteryId ? lotteryId.split('-')[0] : '';
    var btn = group.querySelector('.lottery-collapse-toggle,[data-lottery-toggle-btn]');
    if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Collapse'; btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true'); btn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Collapse lottery section'); }
    if (base) { try { localStorage.setItem('lottery_collapsed_' + base, 'false'); } catch(e) {} }
  }
  function closeLotteryGroup(group){
    if (!group) { return; }
    group.classList.add('collapsed');
    var lotteryId = group.getAttribute('data-lottery-id') || '';
    var base = lotteryId ? lotteryId.split('-')[0] : '';
    var btn = group.querySelector('.lottery-collapse-toggle,[data-lottery-toggle-btn]');
    if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Expand'; btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false'); btn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Expand lottery section'); }
    if (base) { try { localStorage.setItem('lottery_collapsed_' + base, 'true'); } catch(e) {} }
  }
  function openAdvisoryCard(card){
    if (!card) { return; }
    var body = card.querySelector('.mle-advisory-card__body');
    if (body && body.id) { openSectionById(body.id); }
    else if (body) { body.style.display = 'block'; body.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); }
    var btn = card.querySelector('.mle-lottery-toggle');
    if (btn) { setExpandedButton(btn, true); }
  }
  function openAncestors(el){
    if (!el) { return; }
    openOuter(closest(el, '.mle-lottery-outer'));
    openLotteryGroup(closest(el, '.lottery-group'));
    openAdvisoryCard(closest(el, '.mle-advisory-card'));
    var parentHidden = closest(el.parentNode, '.mle-section-body[aria-hidden="true"], .mle-advisory-card__body[aria-hidden="true"]');
    if (parentHidden && parentHidden.id) { openSectionById(parentHidden.id); }
  }
  function flash(el){
    if (!el || !el.classList) { return; }
    el.classList.remove('mle-shortcut-flash');
    setTimeout(function(){ el.classList.add('mle-shortcut-flash'); }, 10);
    setTimeout(function(){ el.classList.remove('mle-shortcut-flash'); }, 1400);
  }
  function scrollToTarget(el){
    if (!el) { return; }
    openAncestors(el);
    setTimeout(function(){
      try { el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'start'}); }
      catch(e) { try { el.scrollIntoView(true); } catch(ignore) {} }
      if (!el.hasAttribute('tabindex')) { el.setAttribute('tabindex','-1'); }
      try { el.focus({preventScroll:true}); } catch(fe) { try { el.focus(); } catch(ignore2) {} }
      flash(el);
    }, 80);
  }
  function setCardShortcutActive(btn, targetId){
    var card = closest(btn, '.mle-advisory-card');
    if (!card) { return; }
    qsa('.mle-section-shortcut-btn', card).forEach(function(b){
      b.classList.remove('is-active');
      b.removeAttribute('aria-current');
    });
    btn.classList.add('is-active');
    btn.setAttribute('aria-current','true');
  }
  function handleShortcut(btn, evt){
    var panelId = btn.getAttribute('data-target-panel') || '';
    var sectionId = btn.getAttribute('data-target-section') || '';
    var target = byId(panelId) || byId(sectionId);
    if (!target && sectionId) { target = byId(sectionId); }
    if (!target) { return false; }
    if (panelId) { openSectionById(panelId); }
    if (sectionId) {
      var sectionEl = byId(sectionId);
      if (sectionEl) { target = sectionEl; }
    }
    setCardShortcutActive(btn, target.id || panelId || sectionId);
    scrollToTarget(target);
    if (evt) {
      if (evt.preventDefault) { evt.preventDefault(); }
      if (evt.stopPropagation) { evt.stopPropagation(); }
      if (evt.stopImmediatePropagation) { evt.stopImmediatePropagation(); }
    }
    return true;
  }

  // Final shortcut wiring. This catches every shortcut button, including nested ones.
  document.addEventListener('click', function(evt){
    var btn = closest(evt.target, '.mle-section-shortcut-btn');
    if (!btn) { return; }
    if (handleShortcut(btn, evt)) { return false; }
  }, true);

  // Accessible keyboard behavior for shortcut buttons and outer lottery headers.
  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(evt){
    var key = evt.key || evt.keyCode;
    var isActivate = (key === 'Enter' || key === ' ' || key === 13 || key === 32);
    if (!isActivate) { return; }
    var shortcut = closest(evt.target, '.mle-section-shortcut-btn');
    if (shortcut && handleShortcut(shortcut, evt)) { return false; }
    var outerHead = closest(evt.target, '[data-outer-lottery-toggle]');
    if (outerHead) {
      var outer = closest(outerHead, '.mle-lottery-outer');
      if (outer) {
        if (outer.classList.contains('body-collapsed')) { openOuter(outer); } else { closeOuter(outer); }
        evt.preventDefault();
      }
    }
  }, true);

  // Override/repair global collapse-all functions.
  window.skaiLotteryCollapseAll = function(shouldCollapse){
    shouldCollapse = !!shouldCollapse;
    qsa('.mle-lottery-outer').forEach(function(outer){ shouldCollapse ? closeOuter(outer) : openOuter(outer); });
    qsa('.lottery-group').forEach(function(group){ shouldCollapse ? closeLotteryGroup(group) : openLotteryGroup(group); });
    qsa('[data-lottery-toggle-all-btn="1"]').forEach(function(btn){
      btn.textContent = shouldCollapse ? 'Expand All' : 'Collapse All';
      btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', shouldCollapse ? 'false' : 'true');
    });
    return false;
  };
  window.mleVisibleCollapseAll = window.skaiLotteryCollapseAll;

  // Add a dependable Collapse All / Expand All strip before My Lotteries if older controls are hidden by layout/cache.
  function injectCollapseTools(){
    if (document.getElementById('mle-interaction-repair-tools')) { return; }
    var anchor = document.getElementById('my-lotteries');
    if (!anchor || !anchor.parentNode) { return; }
    var wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.id = 'mle-interaction-repair-tools';
    wrap.className = 'mle-interaction-repair-tools';
    wrap.innerHTML = '<strong>Lottery tabs:</strong><button type="button" data-mle-repair-collapse-all="1">Collapse All</button><button type="button" data-mle-repair-expand-all="1">Expand All</button>';
    anchor.parentNode.insertBefore(wrap, anchor.nextSibling);
  }
  document.addEventListener('click', function(evt){
    var collapse = closest(evt.target, '[data-mle-repair-collapse-all="1"]');
    var expand = closest(evt.target, '[data-mle-repair-expand-all="1"]');
    if (!collapse && !expand) { return; }
    evt.preventDefault();
    window.skaiLotteryCollapseAll(!!collapse);
  }, true);

  // Preserve position after POST updates inside lottery cards.
  function currentContext(el){
    var outer = closest(el, '.mle-lottery-outer');
    var card = closest(el, '.mle-advisory-card');
    var group = closest(el, '.lottery-group');
    var target = card || outer || group || el;
    return {
      y: window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop || document.body.scrollTop || 0,
      targetId: target && target.id ? target.id : '',
      outerId: outer && outer.id ? outer.id : '',
      groupId: group && group.id ? group.id : '',
      cardBodyId: card && card.querySelector && card.querySelector('.mle-advisory-card__body[id]') ? card.querySelector('.mle-advisory-card__body[id]').id : '',
      t: (new Date()).getTime()
    };
  }
  function rememberPosition(el){
    try { sessionStorage.setItem(STORE_KEY, JSON.stringify(currentContext(el || document.body))); } catch(e) {}
  }
  document.addEventListener('submit', function(evt){
    var form = evt.target;
    if (!form || !closest(form, '.mle-lottery-outer, .mle-advisory-card, .lottery-group, #my-lotteries')) { return; }
    rememberPosition(form);
  }, true);
  document.addEventListener('click', function(evt){
    var action = closest(evt.target, 'button[type="submit"], input[type="submit"], a[data-skai-reset-learning], a[href="#"]');
    if (!action || !closest(action, '.mle-lottery-outer, .mle-advisory-card, .lottery-group, #my-lotteries')) { return; }
    rememberPosition(action);
  }, true);
  function restorePosition(){
    var raw = null;
    try { raw = sessionStorage.getItem(STORE_KEY); } catch(e) {}
    if (!raw) { return; }
    var data = null;
    try { data = JSON.parse(raw); } catch(e2) { data = null; }
    try { sessionStorage.removeItem(STORE_KEY); } catch(e3) {}
    if (!data || !data.t || ((new Date()).getTime() - data.t) > 10 * 60 * 1000) { return; }
    var target = byId(data.targetId) || byId(data.cardBodyId) || byId(data.outerId) || byId(data.groupId);
    if (target) { openAncestors(target); }
    setTimeout(function(){
      if (target) { scrollToTarget(target); }
      else if (typeof data.y === 'number') { try { window.scrollTo(0, data.y); } catch(e) {} }
    }, 250);
  }
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){ injectCollapseTools(); restorePosition(); });
  } else {
    injectCollapseTools();
    restorePosition();
  }
}());
</script>

   wired header shortcuts, and clear action-needed states without loud styling. */

.mle-elite-cockpit .mle-roof-jump--numbers{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#16a34a,#15803d);}
.mle-elite-cockpit .mle-roof-jump--settings{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#4f46e5,#4338ca);}
.mle-elite-cockpit .mle-roof-jump--wheels{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#be123c,#9f1239);}
.mle-elite-cockpit .mle-lottery-toggle{
  flex:0 0 auto;
}
@media (max-width: 760px){
  .mle-elite-cockpit .mle-advisory-card__collapsed{align-items:flex-start;}
  .mle-elite-cockpit .mle-card-roof-map .mle-roof-jump{font-size:.68rem;padding:7px 9px;}
}

</style>
<!-- [[MLE_SHORTCUT_COLLAPSE_SCROLL_REPAIR_V3_VERIFIED]]
     Verified against the actual page markup in this file.
     Fixes:
     - Universal Collapse Everything / Expand Everything controls.
     - All lottery outer tabs and draw cards collapsed by default on normal page load.
     - Top-of-page copy of the lottery jump panel.
     - Lottery jump links and section shortcut buttons open the required collapsed ancestors, then scroll.
     - Does not depend on older partial shortcut handlers. -->
<style>
.mle-universal-lottery-tools{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;align-items:center;margin:12px 0;padding:12px;border:1px solid rgba(127,141,170,.24);border-radius:14px;background:#f8fafc;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(10,26,51,.05);}
