<script>
(function(){
  'use strict';

  var RESTORE_KEY = 'mle_keep_position_after_update_v2';
  var DEFAULT_COLLAPSE_KEY = 'mle_default_lottery_collapse_v3_applied';

  function qsa(selector, root) {
    return Array.prototype.slice.call((root || document).querySelectorAll(selector));
  }

  function matches(el, selector) {
    if (!el || el.nodeType !== 1) { return false; }
    var fn = el.matches || el.msMatchesSelector || el.webkitMatchesSelector;
    return !!(fn && fn.call(el, selector));
  }

  function closest(el, selector) {
    while (el && el.nodeType === 1) {
      if (matches(el, selector)) { return el; }
      el = el.parentElement;
    }
    return null;
  }

  function getId(id) {
    return id ? document.getElementById(id) : null;
  }

  function cssEscape(value) {
    if (window.CSS && CSS.escape) { return CSS.escape(String(value)); }
    return String(value).replace(/([ #;?%&,.+*~\':"!^$[\]()=>|\/])/g, '\\$1');
  }

  function setBtnText(btn, open) {
    if (!btn) { return; }
    btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', open ? 'true' : 'false');
    var current = (btn.textContent || '').replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
    if (current === 'Expand' || current === 'Collapse') { btn.textContent = open ? 'Collapse' : 'Expand'; }
    else if (current.indexOf('Show ') === 0) { btn.textContent = (open ? 'Hide ' : 'Show ') + current.substring(5); }
    else if (current.indexOf('Hide ') === 0) { btn.textContent = (open ? 'Hide ' : 'Show ') + current.substring(5); }
  }

  function setOuterCollapsed(outer, collapsed) {
    if (!outer) { return; }
    if (collapsed) { outer.classList.add('body-collapsed'); }
    else { outer.classList.remove('body-collapsed'); }
    outer.setAttribute('aria-expanded', collapsed ? 'false' : 'true');
    var head = outer.querySelector('[data-outer-lottery-toggle]');
    var btn = outer.querySelector('.mle-lottery-outer-toggle,[data-outer-lottery-toggle-btn]');
    if (head) { head.setAttribute('aria-expanded', collapsed ? 'false' : 'true'); }
    if (btn) {
      btn.textContent = collapsed ? 'Expand' : 'Collapse';
      btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', collapsed ? 'false' : 'true');
      btn.setAttribute('aria-label', (collapsed ? 'Expand' : 'Collapse') + ' lottery section');
    }
    var lid = outer.getAttribute('data-outer-lottery-id') || '';
    if (lid) { try { localStorage.setItem('mle_outer_collapsed_' + lid, collapsed ? 'true' : 'false'); } catch(e) {} }
  }

  function setGroupCollapsed(group, collapsed) {
    if (!group) { return; }
    if (collapsed) { group.classList.add('collapsed'); }
    else { group.classList.remove('collapsed'); }
    group.setAttribute('aria-expanded', collapsed ? 'false' : 'true');
    var btn = group.querySelector('.lottery-collapse-toggle,[data-lottery-toggle-btn]');
    if (btn) {
      btn.textContent = collapsed ? 'Expand' : 'Collapse';
      btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', collapsed ? 'false' : 'true');
      btn.setAttribute('aria-label', (collapsed ? 'Expand' : 'Collapse') + ' lottery draw section');
    }
    var lotteryId = group.getAttribute('data-lottery-id') || '';
    var base = lotteryId ? lotteryId.split('-')[0] : '';
    if (base) { try { localStorage.setItem('lottery_collapsed_' + base, collapsed ? 'true' : 'false'); } catch(e) {} }
  }

  function setPanelOpen(panel, open) {
    if (!panel) { return; }
    panel.style.display = open ? 'block' : 'none';
    panel.setAttribute('aria-hidden', open ? 'false' : 'true');
    if (panel.id) {
      qsa('[aria-controls="' + cssEscape(panel.id) + '"]').forEach(function(btn){ setBtnText(btn, open); });
    }
  }

  function openAncestors(target) {
    if (!target) { return; }
    var outer = matches(target, '.mle-lottery-outer') ? target : closest(target, '.mle-lottery-outer');
    var group = matches(target, '.lottery-group') ? target : closest(target, '.lottery-group');
    var card = matches(target, '.mle-advisory-card') ? target : closest(target, '.mle-advisory-card');
    if (outer) { setOuterCollapsed(outer, false); }
    if (group) { setGroupCollapsed(group, false); }
    if (card) {
      var body = card.querySelector('.mle-advisory-card__body');
      if (body) { setPanelOpen(body, true); }
      var toggle = card.querySelector('.mle-lottery-toggle');
      if (toggle) { setBtnText(toggle, true); }
    }
    var hiddenParent = closest(target.parentElement, '.mle-section-body[aria-hidden="true"], .mle-advisory-card__body[aria-hidden="true"]');
    if (hiddenParent) { setPanelOpen(hiddenParent, true); }
  }

  function flash(target) {
    if (!target || !target.classList) { return; }
    target.classList.remove('mle-jump-target-flash');
    setTimeout(function(){ target.classList.add('mle-jump-target-flash'); }, 10);
    setTimeout(function(){ target.classList.remove('mle-jump-target-flash'); }, 1400);
  }

  function scrollToTarget(target) {
    if (!target) { return; }
    openAncestors(target);
    setTimeout(function(){
      try { target.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'start'}); }
      catch(e) { try { target.scrollIntoView(true); } catch(ignore) {} }
      if (target !== document.body && !target.hasAttribute('tabindex')) { target.setAttribute('tabindex','-1'); }
      try { if (target !== document.body) { target.focus({preventScroll:true}); } } catch(e2) { try { target.focus(); } catch(ignore2) {} }
      flash(target);
    }, 120);
  }

  function universalCollapse(collapsed) {
    collapsed = !!collapsed;
    qsa('.mle-lottery-outer').forEach(function(outer){ setOuterCollapsed(outer, collapsed); });
    qsa('.lottery-group').forEach(function(group){ setGroupCollapsed(group, collapsed); });
    qsa('.mle-lottery-outer .mle-advisory-card__body, .mle-lottery-outer .mle-section-body').forEach(function(panel){ setPanelOpen(panel, !collapsed); });
    qsa('[data-lottery-toggle-all-btn="1"], [data-lottery-collapse-all-btn="1"], [data-lottery-expand-all-btn="1"]').forEach(function(btn){
      btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', collapsed ? 'false' : 'true');
    });
    return false;
  }

  window.skaiLotteryCollapseAll = universalCollapse;
  window.mleVisibleCollapseAll = universalCollapse;

  window.mleStrategicJump = function(link) {
    var href = link && link.getAttribute ? (link.getAttribute('href') || '') : '';
    if (!href || href.charAt(0) !== '#') { return true; }
    var id = '';
    try { id = decodeURIComponent(href.substring(1)); } catch(e) { id = href.substring(1); }
    var target = (id === 'top') ? (getId('top') || document.body) : getId(id);
    if (!target) { return false; }
    scrollToTarget(target);
    return false;
  };

  function normalizeText(text) {
    return String(text || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, ' ').replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
  }

  function findShortcutFallback(btn) {
    var card = closest(btn, '.mle-advisory-card') || document;
    var label = normalizeText(btn.textContent || btn.innerText || '');
    var classMap = {
      'optimization focus': '.mle-optimization-focus',
      'precision focus': '.mle-precision-lock',
      'precision focus batches': '.mle-skai-batch-test',
      'strong evidence runs': '.mle-strong-evidence',
      'settings that repeat': '.mle-settings-repeat',
      'current locked settings': '.mle-current-lock',
      'recommended next settings run': '.mle-next-settings-run',
      'visual run comparison': '.mle-visual-comparison',
      'saved predictions': '.mle-adv-runs-panel, .mle-saved-predictions, [id*="saved-pred"]',
      'saved numbers to play': '.mle-play-panel, [id*="play"]',
      'saved settings': '.mle-settings-panel, [id*="settings"]',
      'advanced details': '.mle-advanced-panel, [id*="advanced"]',
      'run selection for better advice': '.mle-evidence-panel, [id*="evidence"]'
    };
    if (classMap[label]) {
      var found = card.querySelector(classMap[label]);
      if (found) { return found; }
    }
    var headings = qsa('h2,h3,h4,h5,legend,.mle-section-title,.mle-card-title', card);
    for (var i = 0; i < headings.length; i++) {
      if (normalizeText(headings[i].textContent || headings[i].innerText || '').indexOf(label) !== -1) {
        return headings[i];
      }
    }
    return null;
  }

  function shortcutTarget(btn) {
    var panelId = btn.getAttribute('data-target-panel') || '';
    var sectionId = btn.getAttribute('data-target-section') || '';
    var target = null;
    if (sectionId) { target = getId(sectionId); }
    if (!target && panelId) { target = getId(panelId); }
    if (!target) { target = findShortcutFallback(btn); }
    if (panelId && getId(panelId)) { setPanelOpen(getId(panelId), true); }
    return target;
  }

  function markShortcut(btn) {
    var card = closest(btn, '.mle-advisory-card');
    if (!card) { return; }
    qsa('.mle-section-shortcut-btn', card).forEach(function(other){ other.classList.remove('is-active'); other.removeAttribute('aria-current'); });
    btn.classList.add('is-active');
    btn.setAttribute('aria-current', 'true');
  }

  document.addEventListener('click', function(evt){
    var btn = closest(evt.target, '.mle-section-shortcut-btn');
    if (!btn) { return; }
    if (matches(btn, 'a') && btn.getAttribute('href') && btn.getAttribute('href').charAt(0) !== '#') { return; }
    var target = shortcutTarget(btn);
    if (!target) { return; }
    evt.preventDefault();
    evt.stopPropagation();
    if (evt.stopImmediatePropagation) { evt.stopImmediatePropagation(); }
    markShortcut(btn);
    scrollToTarget(target);
    return false;
  }, true);

  document.addEventListener('click', function(evt){
    var toggleOuter = closest(evt.target, '[data-outer-lottery-toggle], [data-outer-lottery-toggle-btn]');
    if (toggleOuter) {
      var outer = closest(toggleOuter, '.mle-lottery-outer');
      if (outer) {
        evt.preventDefault();
        evt.stopPropagation();
        if (evt.stopImmediatePropagation) { evt.stopImmediatePropagation(); }
        setOuterCollapsed(outer, !outer.classList.contains('body-collapsed'));
        return false;
      }
    }
    var collapseAll = closest(evt.target, '[data-mle-universal-collapse="1"], [data-lottery-collapse-all-btn="1"]');
    var expandAll = closest(evt.target, '[data-mle-universal-expand="1"], [data-lottery-expand-all-btn="1"]');
    if (collapseAll || expandAll) {
      evt.preventDefault();
      evt.stopPropagation();
      if (evt.stopImmediatePropagation) { evt.stopImmediatePropagation(); }
      universalCollapse(!!collapseAll);
      return false;
    }
    var hashLink = closest(evt.target, '.mle-section-jump a[href^="#"], .mle-strategic-nav a[href^="#"], .mle-lottery-control-strip a[href^="#"]');
    if (hashLink) {
      evt.preventDefault();
      evt.stopPropagation();
      if (evt.stopImmediatePropagation) { evt.stopImmediatePropagation(); }
      window.mleStrategicJump(hashLink);
      return false;
    }
  }, true);

  function makeTools(id) {
    var div = document.createElement('div');
    div.id = id;
    div.className = 'mle-universal-lottery-tools';
    div.innerHTML = '<strong>Lottery tabs:</strong><button type="button" data-mle-universal-collapse="1">Collapse Everything</button><button type="button" data-mle-universal-expand="1">Expand Everything</button>';
    return div;
  }

  function injectToolsAndTopJump() {
    if (!document.getElementById('mle-universal-lottery-tools-top')) {
      var top = getId('top');
      var topParent = top && top.parentNode ? top.parentNode : null;
      if (topParent) { topParent.insertBefore(makeTools('mle-universal-lottery-tools-top'), top.nextSibling); }
    }
    if (!document.getElementById('mle-universal-lottery-tools-lotteries')) {
      var myLotteries = getId('my-lotteries');
      if (myLotteries && myLotteries.parentNode) { myLotteries.parentNode.insertBefore(makeTools('mle-universal-lottery-tools-lotteries'), myLotteries.nextSibling); }
    }
    if (!document.getElementById('mle-top-lottery-jump-copy')) {
      var original = document.querySelector('.mle-lottery-jump-panel');
      var topTools = getId('mle-universal-lottery-tools-top');
      if (original && topTools && topTools.parentNode) {
        var clone = original.cloneNode(true);
        clone.id = 'mle-top-lottery-jump-copy';
        clone.classList.add('mle-top-lottery-jump-copy');
        clone.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Top jump to a lottery');
        topTools.parentNode.insertBefore(clone, topTools.nextSibling);
      }
    }
  }

  function hasPendingRestore() {
    try { return !!sessionStorage.getItem(RESTORE_KEY); } catch(e) { return false; }
  }

  function applyCollapsedDefault() {
    if (hasPendingRestore()) { return; }
    if (window.location.hash && window.location.hash.length > 1) { return; }
    universalCollapse(true);
    try { sessionStorage.setItem(DEFAULT_COLLAPSE_KEY, '1'); } catch(e) {}
  }

  function boot() {
    injectToolsAndTopJump();
    applyCollapsedDefault();
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') { document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', boot); }
  else { boot(); }
})();
</script>
<!-- /[[MLE_SHORTCUT_COLLAPSE_SCROLL_REPAIR_V3_VERIFIED]] -->

<script>
/* [[MLE_HEADER_SHORTCUT_WIRING_V4]]
   Wires the collapsed-card roof buttons and fixes header shortcut targets even when
   previous click handlers are present. This intentionally runs last. */
(function(){
  'use strict';
  function qsa(sel, root){return Array.prototype.slice.call((root || document).querySelectorAll(sel));}
  function closest(el, sel){while(el && el.nodeType === 1){if(el.matches && el.matches(sel)){return el;} el = el.parentElement;} return null;}
  function idSafe(id){try{return document.getElementById(id);}catch(e){return null;}}
  function setBtn(btn, open){if(!btn){return;} btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', open ? 'true' : 'false'); var s=btn.querySelector('span'); if(s){s.textContent=open?'Collapse':'Expand';} else {btn.textContent=open?'Collapse':'Expand';}}
  function openCard(card){
    if(!card){return;}
    var body = card.querySelector('.mle-advisory-card__body');
    if(body){body.style.display='block';body.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');}
    setBtn(card.querySelector('.mle-lottery-toggle'), true);
    var outer = closest(card, '.mle-lottery-outer');
    if(outer){outer.classList.remove('body-collapsed');outer.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true');setBtn(outer.querySelector('.mle-lottery-outer-toggle,[data-outer-lottery-toggle-btn]'), true);}
    var group = closest(card, '.lottery-group');
    if(group){group.classList.remove('collapsed');group.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true');setBtn(group.querySelector('.lottery-collapse-toggle,[data-lottery-toggle-btn]'), true);}
  }
  function openPanelById(id){
    var panel = idSafe(id);
    if(!panel){return null;}
    panel.style.display='block';
    panel.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');
    qsa('[aria-controls="' + id.replace(/(["\\])/g,'\\$1') + '"]').forEach(function(btn){setBtn(btn, true);});
    return panel;
  }
  function flash(el){if(!el||!el.classList){return;} el.classList.remove('mle-jump-target-flash'); setTimeout(function(){el.classList.add('mle-jump-target-flash');},10); setTimeout(function(){el.classList.remove('mle-jump-target-flash');},1600);}
  function scrollTo(el){
    if(!el){return;}
    setTimeout(function(){
      try{el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'start'});}catch(e){try{el.scrollIntoView(true);}catch(ignore){}}
      if(!el.hasAttribute('tabindex')){el.setAttribute('tabindex','-1');}
      try{el.focus({preventScroll:true});}catch(e2){}
      flash(el);
    },80);
  }
  function targetFor(btn){
    var sid = btn.getAttribute('data-target-section') || '';
    var pid = btn.getAttribute('data-target-panel') || '';
    var card = closest(btn, '.mle-advisory-card');
    if(card){openCard(card);}
    if(pid){openPanelById(pid);}
    var target = sid ? idSafe(sid) : null;
    if(!target && pid){target = idSafe(pid);}
    return target;
  }
  document.addEventListener('click', function(e){
    var btn = closest(e.target, '.mle-card-roof-map .mle-section-shortcut-btn, .mle-section-shortcuts .mle-section-shortcut-btn');
    if(!btn){return;}
    if(btn.tagName === 'A' && btn.getAttribute('href') && btn.getAttribute('href').charAt(0) !== '#'){return;}
    var target = targetFor(btn);
    if(!target){return;}
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    if(e.stopImmediatePropagation){e.stopImmediatePropagation();}
    var card = closest(btn, '.mle-advisory-card');
    if(card){qsa('.mle-section-shortcut-btn', card).forEach(function(x){x.classList.remove('is-active');x.removeAttribute('aria-current');});}
    btn.classList.add('is-active');
    btn.setAttribute('aria-current','true');
    scrollTo(target);
    return false;
  }, true);
})();
</script>

<script>
/* [[MLE_SHORTCUT_COLLAPSE_WIRING_V5]] */
(function(){
  'use strict';
  var RESTORE_KEY = 'mle_restore_anchor_v2';
  function qs(sel, root){return (root || document).querySelector(sel);}
  function qsa(sel, root){return Array.prototype.slice.call((root || document).querySelectorAll(sel));}
  function closest(el, sel){while(el && el.nodeType === 1){if(el.matches && el.matches(sel)){return el;} el = el.parentElement;} return null;}
  function byId(id){if(!id){return null;} try{return document.getElementById(id);}catch(e){return null;}}
  function cleanText(v){return String(v || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,' ').replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g,'');}
  function setButton(btn, open){
    if(!btn){return;}
    btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', open ? 'true' : 'false');
    var span = btn.querySelector('span');
    if(span){span.textContent = open ? 'Collapse' : 'Expand';}
    else if(/expand|collapse/i.test(btn.textContent || '')){btn.textContent = open ? 'Collapse' : 'Expand';}
  }
  function showPanel(panel){
    if(!panel){return;}
    panel.style.display = 'block';
    panel.hidden = false;
    panel.removeAttribute('hidden');
    panel.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');
    if(panel.id){qsa('[aria-controls="' + panel.id.replace(/(["\\])/g,'\\$1') + '"]').forEach(function(btn){setButton(btn, true);});}
  }
  function hidePanel(panel){
    if(!panel){return;}
    panel.style.display = 'none';
    panel.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');
    if(panel.id){qsa('[aria-controls="' + panel.id.replace(/(["\\])/g,'\\$1') + '"]').forEach(function(btn){setButton(btn, false);});}
  }
  function openOuter(outer){
    if(!outer){return;}
    outer.classList.remove('body-collapsed');
    outer.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true');
    var body = qs('.mle-lottery-outer-body', outer);
    if(body){body.style.display = ''; body.hidden = false; body.removeAttribute('hidden'); body.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');}
    setButton(qs('.mle-lottery-outer-toggle,[data-outer-lottery-toggle-btn]', outer), true);
  }
  function closeOuter(outer){
    if(!outer){return;}
    outer.classList.add('body-collapsed');
    outer.setAttribute('aria-expanded','false');
    var body = qs('.mle-lottery-outer-body', outer);
    if(body){body.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');}
    setButton(qs('.mle-lottery-outer-toggle,[data-outer-lottery-toggle-btn]', outer), false);
  }
  function openGroup(group){
    if(!group){return;}
    group.classList.remove('collapsed');
    group.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true');
    var content = qs('.lottery-collapsible-content', group);
    if(content){content.style.display=''; content.hidden=false; content.removeAttribute('hidden'); content.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');}
    setButton(qs('.lottery-collapse-toggle,[data-lottery-toggle-btn]', group), true);
  }
  function closeGroup(group){
    if(!group){return;}
    group.classList.add('collapsed');
    group.setAttribute('aria-expanded','false');
    var content = qs('.lottery-collapsible-content', group);
    if(content){content.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');}
    setButton(qs('.lottery-collapse-toggle,[data-lottery-toggle-btn]', group), false);
  }
  function openCard(card){
    if(!card){return;}
    openOuter(closest(card, '.mle-lottery-outer'));
    openGroup(closest(card, '.lottery-group'));
    showPanel(qs('.mle-advisory-card__body', card));
    setButton(qs('.mle-lottery-toggle', card), true);
  }
  function closeCard(card){
    if(!card){return;}
    hidePanel(qs('.mle-advisory-card__body', card));
    setButton(qs('.mle-lottery-toggle', card), false);
  }
  function openAncestors(el){
    if(!el){return;}
    openOuter(closest(el, '.mle-lottery-outer'));
    openGroup(closest(el, '.lottery-group'));
    openCard(closest(el, '.mle-advisory-card'));
    var p = el.parentElement;
    while(p && p !== document.body){
      if(p.matches && (p.matches('.mle-section-body') || p.matches('.mle-advisory-card__body'))){showPanel(p);}
      p = p.parentElement;
    }
  }
  function flash(el){
    if(!el || !el.classList){return;}
    el.classList.remove('mle-jump-target-flash');
    setTimeout(function(){el.classList.add('mle-jump-target-flash');},20);
    setTimeout(function(){el.classList.remove('mle-jump-target-flash');},1800);
  }
  function scrollTo(el){
    if(!el){return;}
    openAncestors(el);
    setTimeout(function(){
      try{el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'start'});}catch(e){try{el.scrollIntoView(true);}catch(ignore){}}
      if(el !== document.body && !el.hasAttribute('tabindex')){el.setAttribute('tabindex','-1');}
      try{if(el !== document.body){el.focus({preventScroll:true});}}catch(e2){}
      flash(el);
    },160);
  }
  function findFallback(btn){
    var card = closest(btn, '.mle-advisory-card') || document;
    var label = cleanText(btn.textContent || btn.innerText || '');
    var map = {
      'decision':'.mle-optimization-focus','optimization focus':'.mle-optimization-focus',
      'narrowing method':'.mle-precision-lock','precision focus':'.mle-precision-lock',
      'next settings run':'.mle-next-settings-run','recommended next settings run':'.mle-next-settings-run',
      'visual proof':'.mle-visual-comparison','visual run comparison':'.mle-visual-comparison',
      'saved runs':'[id*="-runs"], .mle-adv-runs-panel','saved predictions':'[id*="-runs"], .mle-adv-runs-panel',
      'saved numbers':'[id*="numbers-to-play"], [id*="play"]','saved numbers to play':'[id*="numbers-to-play"], [id*="play"]',
      'saved settings':'[id*="saved-settings"], [id*="settings"]',
      'wheels':'#favorite-wheeling-systems','advanced details':'[id*="advanced"], .mle-advanced-panel',
      'run selection for better advice':'[id*="evidence-panel"], .mle-evidence-panel'
    };
    if(map[label]){var found = card.querySelector(map[label]) || document.querySelector(map[label]); if(found){return found;}}
    var heads = qsa('h2,h3,h4,h5,legend,.mle-section-title,.mle-section-headline,.mle-card-title', card);
    for(var i=0;i<heads.length;i++){if(cleanText(heads[i].textContent || '').indexOf(label) !== -1){return heads[i];}}
    return null;
  }
  function targetForShortcut(btn){
    var bodyId = btn.getAttribute('data-target-card') || '';
    var panelId = btn.getAttribute('data-target-panel') || '';
    var sectionId = btn.getAttribute('data-target-section') || '';
    if(bodyId){showPanel(byId(bodyId));}
    if(panelId){showPanel(byId(panelId));}
    var target = byId(sectionId) || byId(panelId) || findFallback(btn);
    return target;
  }
  function activateShortcut(btn){
    var card = closest(btn, '.mle-advisory-card');
    if(card){qsa('.mle-section-shortcut-btn', card).forEach(function(x){x.classList.remove('is-active');x.removeAttribute('aria-current');});}
    btn.classList.add('is-active');
    btn.setAttribute('aria-current','true');
  }
  function jumpHashLink(link){
    var href = link && link.getAttribute ? (link.getAttribute('href') || '') : '';
    if(!href || href.charAt(0) !== '#'){return true;}
    var id = '';
    try{id = decodeURIComponent(href.substring(1));}catch(e){id = href.substring(1);}
    var target = (id === 'top') ? (byId('top') || document.body) : byId(id);
    if(!target){return false;}
    scrollTo(target);
    return false;
  }
  window.mleStrategicJump = jumpHashLink;
  function universalCollapse(collapse){
    collapse = !!collapse;
    qsa('.mle-lottery-outer').forEach(function(outer){collapse ? closeOuter(outer) : openOuter(outer);});
    qsa('.lottery-group').forEach(function(group){collapse ? closeGroup(group) : openGroup(group);});
    qsa('.mle-advisory-card').forEach(function(card){collapse ? closeCard(card) : openCard(card);});
    qsa('.mle-section-body').forEach(function(panel){collapse ? hidePanel(panel) : showPanel(panel);});
    return false;
  }
  window.skaiLotteryCollapseAll = universalCollapse;
  window.mleVisibleCollapseAll = universalCollapse;
  function makeTools(id){
    var div = document.createElement('div');
    div.id = id;
    div.className = 'mle-universal-lottery-tools';
    div.innerHTML = '<strong>Lottery view:</strong><button type="button" data-mle-universal-collapse="1">Collapse Everything</button><button type="button" data-mle-universal-expand="1">Expand Everything</button><span>Use this to keep every lottery closed until you choose one.</span>';
    return div;
  }
  function injectTools(){
    if(!byId('mle-universal-lottery-tools-top-v5')){
      var board = byId('advisory-board') || byId('my-lotteries') || document.body.firstElementChild;
      if(board && board.parentNode){board.parentNode.insertBefore(makeTools('mle-universal-lottery-tools-top-v5'), board);}
    }
    if(!byId('mle-universal-lottery-tools-lotteries-v5')){
      var lots = byId('my-lotteries');
      if(lots && lots.parentNode){lots.parentNode.insertBefore(makeTools('mle-universal-lottery-tools-lotteries-v5'), lots.nextSibling);}
    }
    if(!byId('mle-top-lottery-jump-copy-v5')){
      var original = qs('.mle-lottery-jump-panel');
      var tools = byId('mle-universal-lottery-tools-top-v5');
      if(original && tools && tools.parentNode){
        var clone = original.cloneNode(true);
        clone.id = 'mle-top-lottery-jump-copy-v5';
        clone.classList.add('mle-top-lottery-jump-copy');
        tools.parentNode.insertBefore(clone, tools.nextSibling);
      }
    }
  }
  document.addEventListener('click', function(e){
    var shortcut = closest(e.target, '.mle-card-roof-map .mle-section-shortcut-btn, .mle-section-shortcuts .mle-section-shortcut-btn');
    if(shortcut){
      if(shortcut.tagName === 'A' && shortcut.getAttribute('href') && shortcut.getAttribute('href').charAt(0) !== '#'){return;}
      var t = targetForShortcut(shortcut);
      if(t){
        e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if(e.stopImmediatePropagation){e.stopImmediatePropagation();}
        activateShortcut(shortcut); scrollTo(t); return false;
      }
    }
    var collapseBtn = closest(e.target, '[data-mle-universal-collapse="1"], [data-lottery-collapse-all-btn="1"]');
    var expandBtn = closest(e.target, '[data-mle-universal-expand="1"], [data-lottery-expand-all-btn="1"]');
    if(collapseBtn || expandBtn){
      e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if(e.stopImmediatePropagation){e.stopImmediatePropagation();}
      universalCollapse(!!collapseBtn); return false;
    }
    var hash = closest(e.target, '.mle-section-jump a[href^="#"], .mle-strategic-nav a[href^="#"], .mle-lottery-control-strip a[href^="#"], .mle-lottery-jump-panel a[href^="#"]');
    if(hash){
      e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if(e.stopImmediatePropagation){e.stopImmediatePropagation();}
      jumpHashLink(hash); return false;
    }
  }, true);
  function bindButtons(){
    qsa('.mle-card-roof-map .mle-section-shortcut-btn, .mle-section-shortcuts .mle-section-shortcut-btn').forEach(function(btn){
      btn.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){
        if(e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' '){
          var t = targetForShortcut(btn);
          if(t){e.preventDefault(); activateShortcut(btn); scrollTo(t);}
        }
      });
    });
  }
  function hasRestore(){try{return !!sessionStorage.getItem(RESTORE_KEY);}catch(e){return false;}}
  function defaultCollapsed(){
    if(hasRestore()){return;}
    if(window.location.hash && window.location.hash.length > 1){return;}
    universalCollapse(true);
  }
  function boot(){injectTools(); bindButtons(); defaultCollapsed();}
  if(document.readyState === 'loading'){document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', boot);}else{boot();}
})();
/* /[[MLE_SHORTCUT_COLLAPSE_WIRING_V5]] */
</script>
<!-- /[[MLE_SCAN_WINDOW_SHORTCUTS_V5]] -->

<script>
(function(){
  'use strict';
  function byId(id){return document.getElementById(id);}
  function qs(sel, root){return (root || document).querySelector(sel);}
  function buildLegend(){
    var div = document.createElement('div');
    div.id = 'mle-status-legend-v8';
    div.className = 'mle-status-legend-v8';
    div.setAttribute('aria-label','Status color legend');
    div.innerHTML = ''+
      '<span class="mle-status-legend-v8__title">Status colors</span>'+
      '<span class="mle-status-legend-v8__item mle-status-legend-v8__item--blue"><span class="mle-status-legend-v8__dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>Blue: guidance / next step</span>'+
      '<span class="mle-status-legend-v8__item mle-status-legend-v8__item--green"><span class="mle-status-legend-v8__dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>Green: healthy / validated</span>'+
      '<span class="mle-status-legend-v8__item mle-status-legend-v8__item--amber"><span class="mle-status-legend-v8__dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>Amber: review / attention</span>'+
      '<span class="mle-status-legend-v8__item mle-status-legend-v8__item--red"><span class="mle-status-legend-v8__dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>Red: action needed</span>'+
      '<span class="mle-status-legend-v8__item mle-status-legend-v8__item--slate"><span class="mle-status-legend-v8__dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>Slate: learning / neutral</span>';
    return div;
  }
  function injectLegend(){
    if(byId('mle-status-legend-v8')){return;}
    var lotteries = byId('my-lotteries') || qs('.mle-lottery-outer') || qs('.lottery-group') || qs('.mle-advisory-card');
    if(!lotteries || !lotteries.parentNode){return;}
    lotteries.parentNode.insertBefore(buildLegend(), lotteries);
  }
  if(document.readyState === 'loading'){
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', injectLegend);
  }else{
    injectLegend();
  }
})();
</script>

<script>
(function(){
  'use strict';
  var HELP_TEXT = {
    'Optimization Focus':'Jump to the main recommendation and decision section for this lottery.',
    'Precision Focus':'Jump to the narrowing method, range, and Precision Progress explanation.',
    'Precision Focus Batches':'Jump to batches created by MyLottoExpert for controlled SKAI testing.',
    'Strong Evidence Runs':'Jump to saved runs that are currently supporting the recommendation.',
    'Settings That Repeat':'Jump to repeated settings and clusters LottoExpert is watching.',
    'Current Locked Settings':'Jump to settings currently being treated as stable control settings.',
    'Recommended Next Settings Run':'Jump to the next recommended controlled settings test.',
    'Visual Run Comparison':'Jump to charts and comparisons showing how runs performed.',
    'Saved Predictions':'Jump to saved prediction runs, including pending and scored runs.',
    'Saved Numbers to Play':'Jump to saved number sets for playing or review.',
    'Saved Settings':'Jump to saved SKAI settings and reusable templates.',
    'Advanced Details':'Jump to deeper diagnostics and supporting evidence.',
    'Run Selection for Better Advice':'Jump to the area where runs can be included or excluded from advice.',
    'Decision':'Jump to the main recommendation for this lottery.',
    'Narrowing method':'Jump to how LottoExpert is narrowing this lottery.',
    'Next settings run':'Jump to the next settings test or Precision Focus batch section.',
    'Visual proof':'Jump to visual evidence and run comparisons.',
    'Saved runs':'Jump to saved prediction runs.',
    'Saved numbers':'Jump to saved numbers to play or review.',
    'Wheels':'Jump to favorite wheeling systems.'
  };
  function closest(el, sel){while(el && el.nodeType===1){if(el.matches && el.matches(sel)){return el;}el=el.parentNode;}return null;}
  function textOf(el){return (el.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();}
  function ensureShortcutTitles(){
    var btns = document.querySelectorAll('.mle-section-shortcut-btn');
    for(var i=0;i<btns.length;i++){
      var label = textOf(btns[i]);
      if(HELP_TEXT[label] && !btns[i].getAttribute('title')){btns[i].setAttribute('title', HELP_TEXT[label]);}
      if(HELP_TEXT[label] && !btns[i].getAttribute('aria-label')){btns[i].setAttribute('aria-label', label + '. ' + HELP_TEXT[label]);}
    }
  }
  var pop = null;
  function removePop(){if(pop && pop.parentNode){pop.parentNode.removeChild(pop);}pop=null;}
  function showPop(el){
    var msg = el.getAttribute('data-help') || el.getAttribute('title') || '';
    if(!msg){return;}
    removePop();
    pop = document.createElement('div');
    pop.className='mle-help-popover-v17';
    pop.setAttribute('role','tooltip');
    pop.textContent=msg;
    document.body.appendChild(pop);
    var r = el.getBoundingClientRect();
    var top = Math.max(8, r.top - pop.offsetHeight - 10);
    var left = Math.min(window.innerWidth - pop.offsetWidth - 8, Math.max(8, r.left + (r.width/2) - (pop.offsetWidth/2)));
    if(top < 8){top = Math.min(window.innerHeight - pop.offsetHeight - 8, r.bottom + 10);}
    pop.style.top = top + 'px';
    pop.style.left = left + 'px';
  }
  function confirmMessage(kind){
    if(kind === 'precision-create'){
      return 'Create Precision Focus 9-Run Batch?\n\nLottoExpert will create 9 controlled SKAI runs for this lottery. Run 1 is the control/current strongest settings. Runs 2 through 9 test one setting around the current narrowing range.\n\nAfter creation, you will be sent to the correct SKAI lottery page. This is a structured test, not a guarantee.';
    }
    if(kind === 'precision-open'){
      return 'Open Precision Focus Batch in SKAI?\n\nSKAI will load the 9 MyLottoExpert-selected runs for this lottery so you can run and save them. Do not create another batch for this lottery until these runs are generated and later scored.';
    }
    if(kind === 'regular-skai'){
      return 'Open SKAI for regular runs?\n\nThis lottery needs more regular scored evidence before stronger Precision Focus narrowing. Run a normal SKAI prediction or normal 9-combo batch, save the runs, then score them after the draw.';
    }
    return '';
  }
  document.addEventListener('mouseover', function(e){var h=closest(e.target,'.mle-help-tip'); if(h){showPop(h);}});
  document.addEventListener('mouseout', function(e){var h=closest(e.target,'.mle-help-tip'); if(h){removePop();}});
  document.addEventListener('focusin', function(e){var h=closest(e.target,'.mle-help-tip'); if(h){showPop(h);}});
  document.addEventListener('focusout', function(e){var h=closest(e.target,'.mle-help-tip'); if(h){removePop();}});
  document.addEventListener('click', function(e){
    var h=closest(e.target,'.mle-help-tip');
    if(h){e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if(pop){removePop();}else{showPop(h);} return;}
    if(pop){removePop();}
    var target = closest(e.target, '[data-mle-confirm]');
    if(target && target.tagName !== 'FORM'){
      var msg = confirmMessage(target.getAttribute('data-mle-confirm'));
      if(msg && !window.confirm(msg)){e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation();}
    }
  }, true);
  document.addEventListener('submit', function(e){
    var f = e.target;
    if(!f || !f.getAttribute){return;}
    var kind = f.getAttribute('data-mle-confirm');
    var msg = confirmMessage(kind);
    if(msg && !window.confirm(msg)){e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation();}
  }, true);
  if(document.readyState === 'loading'){
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', ensureShortcutTitles);
  }else{
    ensureShortcutTitles();
  }
})();
</script>

  justify-content:center !important;
  width:18px !important;
  height:18px !important;

  user-select:none !important;

}

<script>
(function(){
  'use strict';
  var currentTip = null;
  var currentAnchor = null;
  var hideTimer = null;

  function closest(el, sel){
    while(el && el.nodeType === 1){
      if(el.matches && el.matches(sel)){return el;}
      el = el.parentNode;
    }
    return null;
  }
  function removeOldPopovers(){
    var old = document.querySelectorAll('.mle-help-popover-v17,#mle-help-popover-v22');
    for(var i=0;i<old.length;i++){
      if(old[i].parentNode){old[i].parentNode.removeChild(old[i]);}
    }
    var active = document.querySelectorAll('.mle-help-tip[aria-expanded="true"]');
    for(var j=0;j<active.length;j++){active[j].setAttribute('aria-expanded','false');}
    currentTip = null;
    currentAnchor = null;
  }
  function getHelpText(el){
    return (el.getAttribute('data-help') || el.getAttribute('aria-label') || el.getAttribute('title') || '').replace(/^.* help$/i,'').trim();
  }
  function positionTip(anchor, tip){
    var r = anchor.getBoundingClientRect();
    var vw = window.innerWidth || document.documentElement.clientWidth;
    var vh = window.innerHeight || document.documentElement.clientHeight;
    var top = r.top - tip.offsetHeight - 12;
    var placement = 'top';
    if(top < 10){
      top = r.bottom + 12;
      placement = 'bottom';
    }
    var left = r.left + (r.width / 2) - (tip.offsetWidth / 2);
    left = Math.max(10, Math.min(vw - tip.offsetWidth - 10, left));
    if(top + tip.offsetHeight > vh - 10){top = Math.max(10, vh - tip.offsetHeight - 10);}
    tip.style.left = left + 'px';
    tip.style.top = top + 'px';
    tip.setAttribute('data-placement', placement);
    var arrowLeft = Math.max(16, Math.min(tip.offsetWidth - 24, (r.left + r.width/2) - left));
    tip.style.setProperty('--mle-tip-arrow-left', arrowLeft + 'px');
  }
  function showTip(anchor){
    if(!anchor){return;}
    var msg = getHelpText(anchor);
    if(!msg){return;}
    if(currentAnchor === anchor && currentTip){return;}
    removeOldPopovers();
    var tip = document.createElement('div');
    tip.id = 'mle-help-popover-v22';
    tip.setAttribute('role','tooltip');
    tip.textContent = msg;
    document.body.appendChild(tip);
    anchor.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true');
    currentTip = tip;
    currentAnchor = anchor;
    positionTip(anchor, tip);
  }
  function scheduleHide(){
    clearTimeout(hideTimer);
    hideTimer = setTimeout(function(){removeOldPopovers();}, 120);
  }
  function cancelHide(){clearTimeout(hideTimer);}
  function prepareHelpIcons(){
    var tips = document.querySelectorAll('.mle-help-tip');
    for(var i=0;i<tips.length;i++){
      tips[i].setAttribute('role','button');
      tips[i].setAttribute('tabindex','0');
      tips[i].setAttribute('aria-expanded','false');
      var msg = tips[i].getAttribute('data-help');
      if(msg){tips[i].setAttribute('title', msg);}
    }
  }

  document.addEventListener('mouseover', function(e){
    var h = closest(e.target, '.mle-help-tip');
    if(h){cancelHide(); showTip(h);}
  }, true);
  document.addEventListener('mouseout', function(e){
    var h = closest(e.target, '.mle-help-tip');
    if(h){scheduleHide();}
  }, true);
  document.addEventListener('focusin', function(e){
    var h = closest(e.target, '.mle-help-tip');
    if(h){showTip(h);}
  }, true);
  document.addEventListener('focusout', function(e){
    var h = closest(e.target, '.mle-help-tip');
    if(h){scheduleHide();}
  }, true);
  document.addEventListener('click', function(e){
    var h = closest(e.target, '.mle-help-tip');
    if(h){
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      if(currentAnchor === h && currentTip){removeOldPopovers();}
      else{showTip(h);}
      return false;
    }
    if(!closest(e.target, '#mle-help-popover-v22')){removeOldPopovers();}
  }, true);
  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){
    var h = closest(e.target, '.mle-help-tip');
    if(h && (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ')){
      e.preventDefault();
      if(currentAnchor === h && currentTip){removeOldPopovers();}else{showTip(h);}
    }
    if(e.key === 'Escape'){removeOldPopovers();}
  }, true);
  window.addEventListener('scroll', function(){if(currentAnchor && currentTip){positionTip(currentAnchor, currentTip);}}, true);
  window.addEventListener('resize', function(){if(currentAnchor && currentTip){positionTip(currentAnchor, currentTip);}});
  if(document.readyState === 'loading'){
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', prepareHelpIcons);
  }else{
    prepareHelpIcons();
  }
})();
</script>
<!-- /[[MLE_V22_ELITE_CARD_HIERARCHY_AND_TOOLTIP_FIX]] -->


<script>
(function(){
  if (window.__mleActionJumpV30Bound) { return; }
  window.__mleActionJumpV30Bound = true;
  document.addEventListener('click', function(evt){
    var el = evt.target && evt.target.closest ? evt.target.closest('.mle-action-jump') : null;
    if (!el) { return; }
    if (typeof window.mleActionJump === 'function') {
      var ok = window.mleActionJump(el);
      if (ok === false) { evt.preventDefault(); }
    }
  }, true);
})();
</script>

<script>
(function(){
  if (window.__mleCompactExpandedV31Bound) { return; }
  window.__mleCompactExpandedV31Bound = true;
  function closest(el, sel){return el && el.closest ? el.closest(sel) : null;}
  function text(sel, root){var el=root.querySelector(sel); return el ? (el.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim() : '';}
  function makeGroup(kind, title, subtitle, status, open){
    var d=document.createElement('details');
    d.className='mle-compact-group mle-compact-group--'+kind;
    if(open){d.setAttribute('open','open');}
    var s=document.createElement('summary');
    s.className='mle-compact-group__summary';
    s.innerHTML='<span class="mle-compact-group__title"><strong></strong><span></span></span><span class="mle-compact-group__status"></span>';
    s.querySelector('strong').textContent=title;
    s.querySelector('.mle-compact-group__title span').textContent=subtitle;
    s.querySelector('.mle-compact-group__status').textContent=status || (open ? 'Open' : 'Closed');
    var b=document.createElement('div');
    b.className='mle-compact-group__body';
    d.appendChild(s); d.appendChild(b);
    return {wrap:d, body:b};
  }
  function appendIf(parent, node){if(node && node.parentNode !== parent){parent.appendChild(node);}}
  function buildProgressSnapshot(card, body){
    var stage=text('.mle-proof-badge', card) || 'Learning';
    var direction=text('.mle-adv-meta-item--method strong', card) || text('.mle-scan-pill--direction strong', card) || 'Still learning';
    var track=text('.mle-adv-meta-item--track strong', card) || 'Learning track';
    var counts=text('.mle-precision-progress-v14__counts', body) || text('.mle-adv-run-stats', card) || '';
    var drawCycles=''; var scored=''; var pending='';
    var m=counts.match(/(\d+)\s*draw cycle/i); if(m){drawCycles=m[1]+' draw cycle'+(m[1]==='1'?'':'s');}
    m=counts.match(/(\d+)\s*scored run/i); if(m){scored=m[1]+' scored run'+(m[1]==='1'?'':'s');}
    m=counts.match(/(\d+)\s*pending/i); if(m){pending=m[1]+' pending';}
    if(!drawCycles){drawCycles='See progress details';}
    if(!scored){scored=text('.mle-adv-stat-chip--scored .mle-adv-stat-value', card)+' scored';}
    if(!pending){pending=text('.mle-adv-stat-chip--pending .mle-adv-stat-value', card)+' '+text('.mle-adv-stat-chip--pending .mle-adv-stat-label', card);}
    var div=document.createElement('div');
    div.className='mle-progress-snapshot-v31';
    var items=[
      ['Evidence Stage', stage, 'Current maturity level for this lottery.'],
      ['Draw Cycles', drawCycles, 'Primary gate for stronger narrowing.'],
      ['Scored Runs', scored, 'Saved runs already compared to official results.'],
      ['Learning Track', track || direction, 'Current method track being evaluated.']
    ];
    for(var i=0;i<items.length;i++){
      var it=document.createElement('div'); it.className='mle-progress-snapshot-v31__item';
      it.innerHTML='<span></span><strong></strong><small></small>';
      it.querySelector('span').textContent=items[i][0];
      it.querySelector('strong').textContent=items[i][1];
      it.querySelector('small').textContent=items[i][2];
      div.appendChild(it);
    }
    return div;
  }
  function compactCard(card){
    if(!card || card.classList.contains('mle-compact-v31')){return;}
    var body=card.querySelector('.mle-advisory-card__body');
    if(!body){return;}
    card.classList.add('mle-compact-v31');
    var action=makeGroup('action','Action & Recommendations','The immediate next step, advice, and pending-run recommendations.', 'Start here', true);
    var progress=makeGroup('progress','Progress Snapshot','Evidence stage, draw-cycle progress, scored runs, and active learning track.', 'Open', true);
    var evidence=makeGroup('evidence','Evidence Details','Strong runs, repeating settings, current locked settings, and visual proof.', 'Closed', false);
    var workspace=makeGroup('workspace','Saved Workspace','Saved predictions, numbers to play, saved settings, and wheel-related workspace items.', 'Closed', false);
    var advanced=makeGroup('advanced','Advanced / How It Works','Full explanations, method details, random-edge math, and deeper controls.', 'Closed', false);
    body.insertBefore(advanced.wrap, body.firstChild);
    body.insertBefore(workspace.wrap, advanced.wrap);
    body.insertBefore(evidence.wrap, workspace.wrap);
    body.insertBefore(progress.wrap, evidence.wrap);
    body.insertBefore(action.wrap, progress.wrap);

    appendIf(action.body, body.querySelector('.mle-card-next-guide'));
    appendIf(action.body, body.querySelector('.mle-context-advice'));
    appendIf(action.body, body.querySelector('.mle-pending-recommendations'));
    progress.body.appendChild(buildProgressSnapshot(card, body));

    appendIf(evidence.body, body.querySelector('[id$="-strong-evidence"]'));
    appendIf(evidence.body, body.querySelector('[id$="-settings-repeat"]'));
    appendIf(evidence.body, body.querySelector('[id$="-current-lock"]'));
    appendIf(evidence.body, body.querySelector('.mle-visual-comparison'));
    appendIf(evidence.body, body.querySelector('.mle-batch-cleanup'));

    appendIf(workspace.body, body.querySelector('.mle-adv-pred-summary'));
    var roofSections=body.querySelectorAll('.mle-lottery-roof-section');
    for(var i=0;i<roofSections.length;i++){appendIf(workspace.body, roofSections[i]);}

    appendIf(advanced.body, body.querySelector('.mle-lottery-command-hero'));
    appendIf(advanced.body, body.querySelector('.mle-section-shortcuts'));
    appendIf(advanced.body, body.querySelector('.mle-optimization-focus'));
    appendIf(advanced.body, body.querySelector('.mle-method-learning-track'));
    appendIf(advanced.body, body.querySelector('.mle-precision-lock'));
    appendIf(advanced.body, body.querySelector('.mle-advanced-only'));
    var leftover=body.querySelectorAll(':scope > section, :scope > nav, :scope > div.mle-section-body');
    for(var j=0;j<leftover.length;j++){
      if(!closest(leftover[j], '.mle-compact-group')){appendIf(advanced.body, leftover[j]);}
    }
  }
  function compactAll(){
    var cards=document.querySelectorAll('.mle-advisory-card');
    for(var i=0;i<cards.length;i++){compactCard(cards[i]);}
  }
  if(document.readyState==='loading'){document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', compactAll);} else {compactAll();}
  document.addEventListener('click', function(evt){
    var btn=evt.target && evt.target.closest ? evt.target.closest('.mle-section-shortcut-btn,.mle-action-jump') : null;
    if(!btn){return;}
    setTimeout(function(){
      var targetId=btn.getAttribute('data-target-section') || btn.getAttribute('data-target-panel');
      if(!targetId){return;}
      targetId=String(targetId).replace(/^#/, '');
      var target=document.getElementById(targetId);
      if(!target){return;}
      var details=target.closest ? target.closest('details.mle-compact-group') : null;
      if(details){details.open=true;}
    }, 20);
  }, true);
  window.mleCompactExpandedV31Refresh = compactAll;
})();
</script>
<!-- /[[MLE_V31_COMPACT_EXPANDED_LOTTERY_LAYOUT]] -->

<!-- [[MLE_V32_RECOMMENDATION_LOOP_VIEW_MODES_AND_RUN_DECISION]] -->
<style>
/* V32: recommendation-and-learning-loop view modes plus unified run decision panel. */
.mle-view-mode-bar-v32{margin:18px 0 20px;border:1px solid rgba(96,165,250,.26);border-radius:20px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#071a36 0%,#0a2a5a 52%,#123f7a 100%);box-shadow:0 18px 42px rgba(7,26,54,.20);padding:16px;color:#fff;}
.mle-view-mode-bar-v32__top{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.mle-view-mode-bar-v32__eyebrow{font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;font-weight:900;color:#bfdbfe;margin-bottom:4px;}
.mle-view-mode-bar-v32__title{font-size:1.06rem;font-weight:950;letter-spacing:-.01em;margin:0;color:#fff;}
.mle-view-mode-bar-v32__copy{font-size:.88rem;line-height:1.45;color:#dbeafe;margin:4px 0 0;max-width:780px;}
.mle-view-mode-bar-v32__controls{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.mle-view-mode-btn-v32{appearance:none;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22);border-radius:999px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.10);color:#eaf3ff;font-weight:900;font-size:.8rem;padding:8px 11px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s ease,border-color .15s ease,transform .15s ease;}
.mle-view-mode-btn-v32:hover,.mle-view-mode-btn-v32:focus{background:rgba(255,255,255,.16);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.34);outline:none;}
.mle-view-mode-btn-v32[aria-pressed="true"]{background:#fff;color:#0a2a5a;border-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.18);}
.mle-loop-v32-panel,.mle-run-choice-v32,.mle-print-summary-v32{border:1px solid rgba(127,141,170,.20);border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff 0%,#f8fbff 100%);box-shadow:0 10px 26px rgba(10,26,51,.05);padding:14px;margin:12px 0;}
.mle-loop-v32-panel__head,.mle-run-choice-v32__head{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.mle-loop-v32-panel__eyebrow,.mle-run-choice-v32__eyebrow{display:block;font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.11em;font-weight:950;color:#1d4ed8;margin-bottom:2px;}
.mle-loop-v32-panel h4,.mle-run-choice-v32 h4{margin:0;color:#0A1A33;font-size:1rem;letter-spacing:-.01em;}
.mle-loop-v32-panel p,.mle-run-choice-v32 p{color:#475569;line-height:1.45;margin:.35rem 0 0;font-size:.9rem;}
.mle-loop-v32-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:10px;}
.mle-loop-v32-mini{border:1px solid rgba(127,141,170,.16);border-radius:14px;background:#fff;padding:11px;}
.mle-loop-v32-mini span{display:block;font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;font-weight:900;color:#64748b;margin-bottom:4px;}
.mle-loop-v32-mini strong{display:block;color:#0A1A33;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.3;}
.mle-loop-v32-mini small{display:block;color:#64748b;line-height:1.35;margin-top:5px;}
.mle-run-choice-v32__options{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr .9fr;gap:12px;margin-top:12px;}
.mle-run-choice-v32__option{border:1px solid rgba(127,141,170,.20);border-radius:16px;background:#fff;padding:14px;position:relative;min-height:180px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;}
.mle-run-choice-v32__option--recommended{border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.32);background:linear-gradient(180deg,#eff6ff 0%,#fff 100%);box-shadow:0 14px 30px rgba(37,99,235,.08);}
.mle-run-choice-v32__badge{align-self:flex-start;border-radius:999px;padding:5px 9px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:950;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;}
.mle-run-choice-v32__option--recommended .mle-run-choice-v32__badge{background:rgba(37,99,235,.14);color:#1d4ed8;border:1px solid rgba(37,99,235,.26);}
.mle-run-choice-v32__option--single .mle-run-choice-v32__badge{background:rgba(100,116,139,.10);color:#475569;border:1px solid rgba(100,116,139,.20);}
.mle-run-choice-v32__option strong{display:block;color:#0A1A33;font-size:1rem;}
.mle-run-choice-v32__option p{font-size:.88rem;margin:0;color:#475569;}
.mle-run-choice-v32__actions{margin-top:auto;display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.mle-run-choice-v32__button{appearance:none;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;border-radius:999px;padding:10px 13px;border:1px solid rgba(37,99,235,.28);background:#1d4ed8;color:#fff;font-weight:950;font-size:.84rem;text-decoration:none;cursor:pointer;line-height:1.1;}
.mle-run-choice-v32__button:hover,.mle-run-choice-v32__button:focus{background:#1e40af;color:#fff;text-decoration:none;outline:none;}
.mle-run-choice-v32__button--secondary{background:#fff;color:#0f172a;border-color:rgba(127,141,170,.28);}
.mle-run-choice-v32__button--secondary:hover,.mle-run-choice-v32__button--secondary:focus{background:#f8fafc;color:#0f172a;}
.mle-print-summary-v32{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f8fbff 0%,#fff 100%);}
.mle-print-summary-v32 strong{color:#0A1A33;display:block;margin-bottom:2px;}
.mle-print-summary-v32 span{color:#64748b;font-size:.88rem;line-height:1.35;}
.mle-recommendation-result-v32{border:1px solid rgba(22,163,74,.20);background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(22,163,74,.07) 0%,#fff 100%);}
.mle-narrowing-summary-v32{border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.22);}
.mle-compact-v31 .mle-compact-group--action>.mle-compact-group__summary .mle-compact-group__title strong{font-size:1.04rem;}
html.mle-view-quick .mle-compact-group--evidence,html.mle-view-quick .mle-compact-group--workspace,html.mle-view-quick .mle-compact-group--advanced{display:none!important;}
html.mle-view-quick .mle-compact-group--progress .mle-precision-progress-v14,html.mle-view-quick .mle-compact-group--progress .mle-card-list-grid{display:none!important;}
html.mle-view-strategy .mle-compact-group--evidence:not([open]) .mle-compact-group__body,html.mle-view-strategy .mle-compact-group--workspace:not([open]) .mle-compact-group__body,html.mle-view-strategy .mle-compact-group--advanced:not([open]) .mle-compact-group__body{display:none;}
html.mle-view-full .mle-compact-group--action,html.mle-view-full .mle-compact-group--progress,html.mle-view-full .mle-compact-group--evidence,html.mle-view-full .mle-compact-group--workspace,html.mle-view-full .mle-compact-group--advanced{display:block;}
@media(max-width:760px){.mle-view-mode-bar-v32{padding:14px}.mle-run-choice-v32__options,.mle-loop-v32-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.mle-view-mode-bar-v32__controls{width:100%}.mle-view-mode-btn-v32{flex:1 1 auto}.mle-print-summary-v32{align-items:flex-start;flex-direction:column}}
@media print{.mle-view-mode-bar-v32,.mle-lottery-toggle,.mle-run-choice-v32__actions,.mle-print-summary-v32 button,.mle-advisory-btn,.mle-compact-group--evidence,.mle-compact-group--workspace,.mle-compact-group--advanced{display:none!important}.mle-advisory-card{break-inside:avoid}.mle-advisory-card__body{display:block!important;aria-hidden:false}.mle-loop-v32-panel,.mle-run-choice-v32,.mle-print-summary-v32{box-shadow:none!important;border-color:#888!important}}
</style>
<script>
(function(){
  if(window.__mleV32RecommendationLoopBound){return;}
  window.__mleV32RecommendationLoopBound=true;
  function qs(sel,root){return (root||document).querySelector(sel);} 
  function qsa(sel,root){return Array.prototype.slice.call((root||document).querySelectorAll(sel));}
  function closest(el,sel){return el&&el.closest?el.closest(sel):null;}
  function clean(s){return String(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();}
  function text(sel,root){var el=qs(sel,root);return el?clean(el.textContent):'';}
  function getLotteryName(card){return text('.mle-advisory-card__lottery-name',card)||'This lottery';}
  function getSkaiUrl(card){var a=qs('a[data-mle-confirm="regular-skai"]',card)||qs('a[href*="skai-lottery-prediction"]',card);return a?a.getAttribute('href'):'#';}
  function getPending(card){var v=text('.mle-adv-stat-chip--pending .mle-adv-stat-value',card);var n=parseInt(v,10);return isNaN(n)?0:n;}
  function getScored(card){var v=text('.mle-adv-stat-chip--scored .mle-adv-stat-value',card);var n=parseInt(v,10);return isNaN(n)?0:n;}
  function getStage(card){return text('.mle-proof-badge',card)||'Learning Stage';}
  function getTrack(card){return text('.mle-adv-meta-item--track strong',card)||text('.mle-adv-meta-item--method strong',card)||'Learning Track';}
  function getNext(card){return text('.mle-adv-meta-item[class*="next"] strong',card)||text('.mle-scan-pill--action strong',card)||'Follow the next recommended step.';}
  function findExistingBatchForm(card){return qs('.mle-next-settings-run__form',card)||qs('.mle-skai-batch-test__form',card)||qs('form[data-mle-confirm="precision-create"]',card);}
  function findRecommendedSection(card){return qs('.mle-pending-recommendations',card)||qs('.mle-next-settings-run',card)||qs('.mle-card-next-guide',card);}
  function findVisualResult(card){
    var rows=qsa('.mle-visual-row',card); var firstPending=null;
    for(var i=0;i<rows.length;i++){
      var rt=clean(rows[i].textContent).toLowerCase();
      if(rt.indexOf('upcoming')>=0 && !firstPending){firstPending=rows[i];}
      if(rt.indexOf('actual draw')>=0 && rt.indexOf('upcoming')<0){return rows[i];}
    }
    return firstPending;
  }
  function makePanel(cls, eyebrow, title, body){
    var div=document.createElement('section'); div.className='mle-loop-v32-panel '+(cls||'');
    div.innerHTML='<div class="mle-loop-v32-panel__head"><div><span class="mle-loop-v32-panel__eyebrow"></span><h4></h4><p></p></div></div>';
    qs('.mle-loop-v32-panel__eyebrow',div).textContent=eyebrow;
    qs('h4',div).textContent=title;
    qs('p',div).textContent=body;
    return div;
  }
  function buildPreviousResult(card){
    if(qs('.mle-recommendation-result-v32',card)){return;}
    var pending=getPending(card), scored=getScored(card), row=findVisualResult(card);
    var title='Previous Recommendation Result';
    var body='No responsible recommendation result is available yet. Keep saving and scoring runs so LottoExpert can close the recommendation loop.';
    if(pending>0){body=pending+' pending run'+(pending===1?' is':'s are')+' waiting for the next official draw result. After the draw posts, score them so LottoExpert can measure what happened.';}
    else if(row){
      var rowText=clean(row.textContent);
      body=rowText ? rowText.substring(0,260) : 'A scored run is available. Open Evidence Details to review the full comparison.';
    } else if(scored>0){body='Scored evidence exists for this lottery. Open Evidence Details to review which prior runs performed best and what LottoExpert learned.';}
    var panel=makePanel('mle-recommendation-result-v32','Recommendation loop',title,body);
    var grid=document.createElement('div'); grid.className='mle-loop-v32-grid';
    var a=document.createElement('div'); a.className='mle-loop-v32-mini'; a.innerHTML='<span>Status</span><strong></strong><small></small>';
    qs('strong',a).textContent=pending>0?'Pending result':(scored>0?'Scored evidence available':'Still building');
    qs('small',a).textContent=pending>0?'Wait for the draw, then score the saved runs.':'Use scored results to guide the next test.';
    var b=document.createElement('div'); b.className='mle-loop-v32-mini'; b.innerHTML='<span>Next learning step</span><strong></strong><small></small>';
    qs('strong',b).textContent=pending>0?'Score after draw':'Review evidence';
    qs('small',b).textContent='LottoExpert improves the next recommendation after completed draw scoring.';
    grid.appendChild(a); grid.appendChild(b); panel.appendChild(grid);
    var action=qs('.mle-compact-group--action .mle-compact-group__body',card);
    var after=qs('.mle-pending-recommendations',action)||qs('.mle-context-advice',action)||qs('.mle-card-next-guide',action);
    if(action){ if(after&&after.nextSibling){action.insertBefore(panel,after.nextSibling);} else {action.appendChild(panel);} }
  }
  function buildNarrowingSummary(card){
    if(qs('.mle-narrowing-summary-v32',card)){return;}
    var stage=getStage(card), track=getTrack(card), next=getNext(card), scored=getScored(card), pending=getPending(card);
    var body='LottoExpert is comparing this lottery across completed draw cycles. Current track: '+track+'. Current next step: '+next;
    if(pending>0){body='This lottery is in progress. '+pending+' pending run'+(pending===1?' is':'s are')+' waiting for the next official result before narrowing can move forward.';}
    var panel=makePanel('mle-narrowing-summary-v32','Narrowing summary','How this lottery is narrowing',body);
    var grid=document.createElement('div'); grid.className='mle-loop-v32-grid';
    [['Evidence stage',stage,'Stronger stages require more completed draw cycles.'],['Learning track',track,'This is the method family LottoExpert is watching.'],['Scored runs',String(scored),'These are runs already compared to actual results.'],['Pending runs',String(pending),'Pending runs must wait for the official draw result.']].forEach(function(item){
      var x=document.createElement('div'); x.className='mle-loop-v32-mini'; x.innerHTML='<span></span><strong></strong><small></small>'; qs('span',x).textContent=item[0]; qs('strong',x).textContent=item[1]; qs('small',x).textContent=item[2]; grid.appendChild(x);
    });
    panel.appendChild(grid);
    var action=qs('.mle-compact-group--action .mle-compact-group__body',card);
    if(action){action.appendChild(panel);}
  }
  function buildRunDecision(card){
    if(qs('.mle-run-choice-v32',card)){return;}
    var pending=getPending(card), skaiUrl=getSkaiUrl(card), batchForm=findExistingBatchForm(card), name=getLotteryName(card);
    var recommendedTitle='Recommended: 9-Run Batch';
    var recommendedBody='Best for learning and narrowing. It creates 9 controlled runs so LottoExpert can compare settings after the draw.';
    if(pending>0){recommendedTitle='Current status: batch or runs in progress'; recommendedBody=pending+' pending run'+(pending===1?' is':'s are')+' already waiting for the next official draw result. Do not create another batch until these are scored.';}
    var panel=document.createElement('section'); panel.className='mle-run-choice-v32';
    panel.innerHTML='<div class="mle-run-choice-v32__head"><div><span class="mle-run-choice-v32__eyebrow">Choose your next run</span><h4>Recommended path versus quick single run</h4><p>LottoExpert recommends the 9-run batch when you are building evidence. A single run is faster, but it gives less comparison data.</p></div></div><div class="mle-run-choice-v32__options"><div class="mle-run-choice-v32__option mle-run-choice-v32__option--recommended"><span class="mle-run-choice-v32__badge">Recommended</span><strong></strong><p></p><div class="mle-run-choice-v32__actions"></div></div><div class="mle-run-choice-v32__option mle-run-choice-v32__option--single"><span class="mle-run-choice-v32__badge">Optional</span><strong>Single Prediction</strong><p>Use this only when you want one quick prediction. It does not give LottoExpert the same comparison power as a 9-run batch.</p><div class="mle-run-choice-v32__actions"><a class="mle-run-choice-v32__button mle-run-choice-v32__button--secondary" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Open Single Run Page</a></div></div></div>';
    qs('.mle-run-choice-v32__option--recommended strong',panel).textContent=recommendedTitle;
    qs('.mle-run-choice-v32__option--recommended p',panel).textContent=recommendedBody;
    var recActions=qs('.mle-run-choice-v32__option--recommended .mle-run-choice-v32__actions',panel);
    var recBtn=document.createElement('button'); recBtn.type='button'; recBtn.className='mle-run-choice-v32__button';
    if(pending>0){recBtn.textContent='Review Pending Runs'; recBtn.setAttribute('data-mle-v32-review','1');}
    else if(batchForm){recBtn.textContent='Run Recommended 9-Batch'; recBtn.setAttribute('data-mle-v32-submit-batch','1');}
    else{recBtn.textContent='Open SKAI for Regular 9-Batch'; recBtn.setAttribute('data-mle-v32-open-skai','1');}
    recActions.appendChild(recBtn);
    var single=qs('.mle-run-choice-v32__option--single a',panel); single.setAttribute('href',skaiUrl); single.setAttribute('data-mle-v32-single','1'); single.setAttribute('aria-label','Open single prediction for '+name);
    var action=qs('.mle-compact-group--action .mle-compact-group__body',card);
    if(action){
      var after=qs('.mle-card-next-guide',action); if(after&&after.nextSibling){action.insertBefore(panel,after.nextSibling);} else {action.insertBefore(panel,action.firstChild);}
    }
  }
  function buildPrintBox(card){
    if(qs('.mle-print-summary-v32',card)){return;}
    var box=document.createElement('div'); box.className='mle-print-summary-v32';
    box.innerHTML='<div><strong>Print recommendation summary</strong><span>Print this lottery current action, recommendation status, narrowing summary, and progress snapshot.</span></div><button type="button" class="mle-run-choice-v32__button mle-run-choice-v32__button--secondary">Print Summary</button>';
    qs('button',box).addEventListener('click',function(){printCard(card);});
    var action=qs('.mle-compact-group--action .mle-compact-group__body',card); if(action){action.appendChild(box);}
  }
  function printCard(card){
    var name=getLotteryName(card), stage=getStage(card), track=getTrack(card), next=getNext(card), pending=getPending(card), scored=getScored(card);
    var rec=clean((qs('.mle-pending-recommendations',card)||{}).textContent||'No pending recommendation section is currently available.');
    var html='<!doctype html><html><head><title>LottoExpert Recommendation Summary</title><style>body{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#0A1A33;padding:28px;line-height:1.45}h1{font-size:22px}section{border:1px solid #ccd5e1;border-radius:12px;padding:14px;margin:12px 0}.muted{color:#475569}.balls{font-size:18px;font-weight:bold}</style></head><body>'+
      '<h1>LottoExpert Recommendation Summary</h1><p class="muted">Structured strategy tracking only. Lottery drawings are random and no result is guaranteed.</p>'+
      '<section><h2>'+escapeHtml(name)+'</h2><p><strong>Evidence stage:</strong> '+escapeHtml(stage)+'</p><p><strong>Learning track:</strong> '+escapeHtml(track)+'</p><p><strong>Next step:</strong> '+escapeHtml(next)+'</p><p><strong>Scored runs:</strong> '+scored+' | <strong>Pending runs:</strong> '+pending+'</p></section>'+
      '<section><h2>Current / Pending Recommendation</h2><p>'+escapeHtml(rec).substring(0,1200)+'</p></section>'+
      '<section><h2>What to do next</h2><p>'+escapeHtml(next)+'</p></section></body></html>';
    var w=window.open('','_blank','noopener,noreferrer,width=900,height=700'); if(!w){window.print();return;} w.document.open(); w.document.write(html); w.document.close(); setTimeout(function(){try{w.focus();w.print();}catch(e){}},300);
  }
  function escapeHtml(s){return String(s||'').replace(/[&<>"']/g,function(c){return {'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'}[c];});}
  function enhanceCard(card){buildRunDecision(card);buildPreviousResult(card);buildNarrowingSummary(card);buildPrintBox(card);}
  function setMode(mode,store){
    mode=(mode==='quick'||mode==='full')?mode:'strategy';
    document.documentElement.classList.remove('mle-view-quick','mle-view-strategy','mle-view-full');
    document.documentElement.classList.add('mle-view-'+mode);
    qsa('.mle-view-mode-btn-v32').forEach(function(b){b.setAttribute('aria-pressed',b.getAttribute('data-mle-view-mode')===mode?'true':'false');});
    if(store){try{localStorage.setItem('mle.viewMode.v32',mode);}catch(e){}}
    qsa('.mle-compact-group').forEach(function(d){
      if(mode==='full'){d.open=true;}
      else if(mode==='quick'){d.open=d.classList.contains('mle-compact-group--action')||d.classList.contains('mle-compact-group--progress');}
      else {d.open=d.classList.contains('mle-compact-group--action')||d.classList.contains('mle-compact-group--progress');}
    });
  }
  function installModeBar(){
    if(qs('.mle-view-mode-bar-v32')){return;}
    var bar=document.createElement('div');bar.className='mle-view-mode-bar-v32';bar.setAttribute('role','region');bar.setAttribute('aria-label','MyLottoExpert view mode');
    bar.innerHTML='<div class="mle-view-mode-bar-v32__top"><div><div class="mle-view-mode-bar-v32__eyebrow">Workspace view</div><h3 class="mle-view-mode-bar-v32__title">Choose how much detail you want to see</h3><p class="mle-view-mode-bar-v32__copy">Strategy View is the recommended default. Quick View shows only the essentials. Full Evidence opens the supporting proof, saved workspace, and advanced details.</p></div><div class="mle-view-mode-bar-v32__controls"><button type="button" class="mle-view-mode-btn-v32" data-mle-view-mode="quick">Quick View</button><button type="button" class="mle-view-mode-btn-v32" data-mle-view-mode="strategy">Strategy View</button><button type="button" class="mle-view-mode-btn-v32" data-mle-view-mode="full">Full Evidence</button></div></div>';
    var anchor=qs('.mle-today-briefing')||qs('.mle-user-manual')||qs('.mle-elite-cockpit');
    if(anchor&&anchor.parentNode){anchor.parentNode.insertBefore(bar,anchor.nextSibling);} else {document.body.insertBefore(bar,document.body.firstChild);}
    bar.addEventListener('click',function(e){var b=closest(e.target,'.mle-view-mode-btn-v32'); if(b){setMode(b.getAttribute('data-mle-view-mode'),true);}});
  }
  function applyEnhancements(){
    installModeBar();
    qsa('.mle-advisory-card').forEach(enhanceCard);
    var saved=''; try{saved=localStorage.getItem('mle.viewMode.v32')||'';}catch(e){}
    var defaultMode=saved || (window.matchMedia&&window.matchMedia('(max-width: 760px)').matches?'quick':'strategy');
    setMode(defaultMode,false);
  }
  document.addEventListener('click',function(e){
    var btn=closest(e.target,'[data-mle-v32-submit-batch]');
    if(btn){e.preventDefault();var card=closest(btn,'.mle-advisory-card');var form=findExistingBatchForm(card);if(form){var submit=qs('button[type="submit"]',form);if(submit){submit.click();}else{form.submit();}}return;}
    btn=closest(e.target,'[data-mle-v32-open-skai]');
    if(btn){e.preventDefault();var c=closest(btn,'.mle-advisory-card');var url=getSkaiUrl(c);if(url&&url!=='#'){window.open(url,'_blank','noopener,noreferrer');}return;}
    btn=closest(e.target,'[data-mle-v32-review]');
    if(btn){e.preventDefault();var cc=closest(btn,'.mle-advisory-card');var target=qs('.mle-pending-recommendations',cc)||qs('.mle-visual-comparison',cc)||cc;var d=closest(target,'details.mle-compact-group');if(d){d.open=true;}target.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'});target.classList.add('mle-flash-target');setTimeout(function(){target.classList.remove('mle-flash-target');},1600);return;}
    var single=closest(e.target,'[data-mle-v32-single]');
    if(single){
      var card2=closest(single,'.mle-advisory-card');
      if(findExistingBatchForm(card2)&&getPending(card2)<=0){
        var ok=window.confirm('Run Single Prediction Instead?\n\nLottoExpert currently recommends a 9-run batch because it gives better comparison data for future narrowing. A single run is faster, but it gives less evidence.\n\nContinue with single run?');
        if(!ok){e.preventDefault();}
      }
    }
  },true);
  if(document.readyState==='loading'){document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){setTimeout(applyEnhancements,80);});} else {setTimeout(applyEnhancements,80);}
  window.mleV32ApplyRecommendationLoop=applyEnhancements;
})();
</script>
<!-- /[[MLE_V32_RECOMMENDATION_LOOP_VIEW_MODES_AND_RUN_DECISION]] -->

<!-- [[MLE_V33_COMMAND_CENTER_REPAIR]] -->
<style>
/* V33 repair: make the recommendation loop visible, compact, and actionable. */
html.mle-v33-active .mle-run-choice-v32,
