</style>
<script>
(function(){
  if(window.__mleV33CommandCenterRepair){return;}
  window.__mleV33CommandCenterRepair=true;
  function qs(sel,root){return (root||document).querySelector(sel);} 
  function qsa(sel,root){return Array.prototype.slice.call((root||document).querySelectorAll(sel));}
  function closest(el,sel){return el&&el.closest?el.closest(sel):null;}
  function clean(s){return String(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();}
  function numFromText(s){var m=String(s||'').match(/(\d+)/);return m?parseInt(m[1],10):0;}
  function text(sel,root){var el=qs(sel,root);return el?clean(el.textContent):'';}
  function getLotteryName(card){return text('.mle-advisory-card__lottery-name',card)||text('.mle-lottery-outer-title',card)||'This lottery';}
  function getPending(card){return numFromText(text('.mle-adv-stat-chip--pending .mle-adv-stat-value',card));}
  function getScored(card){return numFromText(text('.mle-adv-stat-chip--scored .mle-adv-stat-value',card));}
  function getRuns(card){return numFromText(text('.mle-adv-stat-chip--total .mle-adv-stat-value',card));}
  function getStage(card){return text('.mle-proof-badge',card)||'Learning Stage';}
  function getTrack(card){return text('.mle-adv-meta-item--track strong',card)||text('.mle-adv-meta-item--method strong',card)||'Learning Track';}
  function getDirection(card){return text('.mle-adv-meta-item--method strong',card)||text('.mle-scan-pill--direction strong',card)||'Learning';}
  function getNext(card){return text('.mle-adv-meta-item[class*="next"] strong',card)||text('.mle-scan-pill--action strong',card)||text('.mle-card-next-guide strong',card)||'Follow the recommended next step.';}
  function getSkaiUrl(card){var a=qs('a[data-mle-confirm="regular-skai"]',card)||qs('a[href*="skai-lottery-prediction"]',card)||qs('a[href*="artificial-intelligence"]',card);return a?a.getAttribute('href'):'#';}
  function findBatchForm(card){return qs('.mle-next-settings-run__form',card)||qs('.mle-skai-batch-test__form',card)||qs('form[data-mle-confirm="precision-create"]',card)||qs('form[action*="mle_create_skai_batch"]',card);}
  function getDrawCycles(card){
    var p=qs('.mle-precision-progress-v14',card); var s=p?clean(p.textContent):'';
    var m=s.match(/(\d+)\s+completed draw cycle/i); if(m){return parseInt(m[1],10)||0;}
    m=clean(card.textContent).match(/Current evidence:\s*(\d+)\s+completed draw cycle/i); if(m){return parseInt(m[1],10)||0;}
    return 0;
  }
  function buildStage(draws,scored){
    var defs=[
      {key:'learning',short:'Learning',label:'Learning Stage',draws:0,runs:0},
      {key:'early',short:'Early',label:'Early Direction',draws:3,runs:18},
      {key:'batch',short:'Batch',label:'Exploratory Batch',draws:5,runs:45},
      {key:'narrow',short:'Narrow',label:'Narrowing Signal',draws:6,runs:45},
      {key:'valid',short:'Validated',label:'Validated Focus',draws:12,runs:75},
      {key:'precision',short:'Precision',label:'Precision Focus',draws:20,runs:120}
    ];
    var idx=0;
    for(var i=0;i<defs.length;i++){if(draws>=defs[i].draws && scored>=defs[i].runs){idx=i;}}
    return {defs:defs,index:idx,current:defs[idx],next:defs[Math.min(idx+1,defs.length-1)]};
  }
  function makeButton(txt,cls,attrs){var b=document.createElement('button');b.type='button';b.className=cls||'mle-v33-btn';b.textContent=txt; if(attrs){Object.keys(attrs).forEach(function(k){b.setAttribute(k,attrs[k]);});} return b;}
  function makeLink(txt,href,cls,attrs){var a=document.createElement('a');a.className=cls||'mle-v33-btn';a.textContent=txt;a.href=href||'#';a.target='_blank';a.rel='noopener noreferrer'; if(attrs){Object.keys(attrs).forEach(function(k){a.setAttribute(k,attrs[k]);});} return a;}
  function pendingRecommendationText(card){
    var rec=qs('.mle-pending-recommendations',card);
    if(!rec){return '';}
    var title=text('.mle-pending-recommendations__head strong',rec)||'Pending recommendations available';
    var summary=text('.mle-pending-recommendations__head p',rec)||'';
    var top=text('.mle-pending-recommendation-card strong',rec)||'';
    return clean(title+(top?' • '+top:'')+(summary?' — '+summary:''));
  }
  function lastResultText(card){
    var pending=getPending(card), scored=getScored(card);
    if(pending>0){return pending+' pending runs are waiting for the next official draw result. Results are not available yet.';}
    var rows=qsa('.mle-visual-row,.mle-run-result-row,.mle-saved-run-row',card);
    for(var i=0;i<rows.length;i++){var t=clean(rows[i].textContent); if(t && /actual draw|matched|hits|scored/i.test(t) && !/upcoming|pending/i.test(t)){return t.substring(0,220);}}
    if(scored>0){return scored+' scored runs are available. Open Evidence Details to review what happened in the latest scored draw.';}
    return 'No prior recommendation result is ready yet. Save runs, wait for the draw, then score them to close the learning loop.';
  }
  function insertModeBar(){
    if(qs('.mle-v33-modebar')){return;}
    var bar=document.createElement('section');bar.className='mle-v33-modebar';bar.setAttribute('aria-label','MyLottoExpert display mode');
    bar.innerHTML='<div class="mle-v33-modebar__wrap"><div><div class="mle-v33-modebar__eyebrow">Workspace mode</div><h3>Choose how much detail you want to see</h3><p>Strategy View is the recommended default. Quick View keeps only the decision loop. Full Evidence opens the supporting proof.</p></div><div class="mle-v33-modebar__controls"><button type="button" class="mle-v33-modebar__btn" data-mle-v33-mode="quick">Quick View</button><button type="button" class="mle-v33-modebar__btn" data-mle-v33-mode="strategy">Strategy View</button><button type="button" class="mle-v33-modebar__btn" data-mle-v33-mode="full">Full Evidence</button></div></div>';
    var anchor=qs('.mle-today-briefing')||qs('.mle-elite-cockpit')||qs('.mle-user-manual')||qs('.mle-lottery-jump-panel')||qs('.mle-lottery-outer');
    if(anchor&&anchor.parentNode){anchor.parentNode.insertBefore(bar,anchor.nextSibling);}else{document.body.insertBefore(bar,document.body.firstChild);}
    bar.addEventListener('click',function(e){var b=closest(e.target,'.mle-v33-modebar__btn');if(b){setMode(b.getAttribute('data-mle-v33-mode'),true);}});
  }
  function buildCommand(card){
    if(qs('.mle-v33-command',card)){return;}
    var body=qs('.mle-advisory-card__body',card); if(!body){return;}
    var name=getLotteryName(card), pending=getPending(card), scored=getScored(card), runs=getRuns(card), draws=getDrawCycles(card), stage=getStage(card), track=getTrack(card), direction=getDirection(card), next=getNext(card), skaiUrl=getSkaiUrl(card), batchForm=findBatchForm(card), stageInfo=buildStage(draws,scored), recTxt=pendingRecommendationText(card), resultTxt=lastResultText(card);
    var actionTitle, actionBody, recTitle='Recommended: 9-Run Batch', recBody='Best for learning and narrowing. It creates 9 controlled runs so LottoExpert can compare settings after the draw.';
    if(pending>0){actionTitle='Wait for the draw result'; actionBody=pending+' pending run'+(pending===1?' is':'s are')+' already in progress. After the official result posts, score them before creating another batch.'; recTitle='Batch in progress'; recBody='Do not create another 9-run batch yet. Review these pending runs after the draw posts.';}
    else if(batchForm){actionTitle='Run the recommended 9-batch'; actionBody='A controlled MyLottoExpert focus 9-run batch is available. Use it instead of a single run when you want LottoExpert to learn from comparisons.'; recTitle='MyLottoExpert Focus 9-Run Batch'; recBody='Recommended when LottoExpert has prepared a narrowing or history-horizon test. Run 1 is the control; runs 2-9 test the selected range.';}
    else{actionTitle='Build evidence with regular runs'; actionBody='This lottery is still building evidence. Open SKAI and run the regular 9-run batch so MyLottoExpert can learn from future scored draws.'; recTitle='Regular SKAI 9-Run Batch'; recBody='Recommended when no MyLottoExpert focus batch is ready yet. Run the normal SKAI 9-batch to build comparison evidence for future narrowing.';}
    var command=document.createElement('section');command.className='mle-v33-command';command.setAttribute('aria-label','At-a-glance recommendation loop for '+name);
    command.innerHTML='<div class="mle-v33-command__head"><div><span class="mle-v33-command__eyebrow">At a glance</span><h4></h4><p></p></div><button type="button" class="mle-v33-command__print">Print 9 Batch Predictions</button></div><div class="mle-v33-command__body"><div class="mle-v33-grid"><article class="mle-v33-card mle-v33-card--result"><span class="mle-v33-card__label">What happened</span><h5></h5><p></p></article><article class="mle-v33-card mle-v33-card--progress"><span class="mle-v33-card__label">Where you are</span><h5></h5><p></p></article><article class="mle-v33-card mle-v33-card--action"><span class="mle-v33-card__label">What to do next</span><h5></h5><p></p></article></div></div>';
    qs('.mle-v33-command__head h4',command).textContent=name+' recommendation loop';
    qs('.mle-v33-command__head p',command).textContent='Current recommendation, previous result, narrowing progress, and next action are summarized here so you do not have to hunt through the full evidence.';
    qs('.mle-v33-card--result h5',command).textContent=recTxt? 'Current recommendation is available' : (pending>0?'Recommendation is pending':'Previous result / learning status');
    qs('.mle-v33-card--result p',command).textContent=recTxt || resultTxt;
    qs('.mle-v33-card--progress h5',command).textContent=stageInfo.current.label;
    qs('.mle-v33-card--progress p',command).textContent=draws+' / 20 completed draw cycles • '+scored+' scored runs • '+track+' • Direction: '+direction;
    qs('.mle-v33-card--action h5',command).textContent=actionTitle;
    qs('.mle-v33-card--action p',command).textContent=actionBody;
    var run=document.createElement('section');run.className='mle-v33-run';
    run.innerHTML='<div class="mle-v33-run__top"><div><h5>Choose your next run</h5><p>The 9-run batch is the recommended learning path. A single prediction is available, but it gives less comparison evidence.</p></div></div><div class="mle-v33-run__options"><article class="mle-v33-run__option mle-v33-run__option--rec"><span class="mle-v33-run__badge">Recommended</span><strong></strong><p></p><div class="mle-v33-actions mle-v33-actions--rec"></div></article><article class="mle-v33-run__option"><span class="mle-v33-run__badge">Optional</span><strong>Single Prediction</strong><p>Use this only when you want one quick prediction. It does not create the same learning evidence as a 9-run batch.</p><div class="mle-v33-actions mle-v33-actions--single"></div></article></div>';
    qs('.mle-v33-run__option--rec strong',run).textContent=recTitle;
    qs('.mle-v33-run__option--rec p',run).textContent=recBody;
    var recActions=qs('.mle-v33-actions--rec',run);
    if(pending>0){recActions.appendChild(makeButton('Review Pending Runs','mle-v33-btn',{'data-mle-v33-review':'1'}));}
    else if(batchForm){recActions.appendChild(makeButton('Create Focus 9-Batch and Open SKAI','mle-v33-btn',{'data-mle-v33-submit-batch':'1'}));}
    else{recActions.appendChild(makeLink('Open SKAI to Run Regular 9-Batch',''+skaiUrl,'mle-v33-btn',{'data-mle-v33-open-engine':'1'}));}
    qs('.mle-v33-actions--single',run).appendChild(makeLink('Open SKAI Single Prediction',skaiUrl,'mle-v33-btn mle-v33-btn--secondary',{'data-mle-v33-single':'1'}));
    var progress=document.createElement('section');progress.className='mle-v33-progress';
    progress.innerHTML='<div class="mle-v33-progress__head"><div><h5>How this lottery is narrowing</h5><p>LottoExpert strengthens narrowing only when completed draw cycles and scored runs build up over time.</p></div><div class="mle-v33-progress__meta"></div></div><div class="mle-v33-segments"></div><div class="mle-v33-inline-note"></div>';
    qs('.mle-v33-progress__meta',progress).textContent='Current: '+stageInfo.current.label;
    var segWrap=qs('.mle-v33-segments',progress);
    stageInfo.defs.forEach(function(def,i){var seg=document.createElement('div');seg.className='mle-v33-segment '+(i<stageInfo.index?'mle-v33-segment--complete':(i===stageInfo.index?'mle-v33-segment--current':(i===stageInfo.index+1?'mle-v33-segment--next':'')));seg.innerHTML='<span></span><strong></strong>';qs('span',seg).textContent=i<stageInfo.index?'Reached':(i===stageInfo.index?'Current':(i===stageInfo.index+1?'Next':'Future'));qs('strong',seg).textContent=def.short;segWrap.appendChild(seg);});
    var needDraw=Math.max(0,stageInfo.next.draws-draws), needRuns=Math.max(0,stageInfo.next.runs-scored);
    qs('.mle-v33-inline-note',progress).textContent=(stageInfo.index>=stageInfo.defs.length-1)?'Precision Focus reached. Continue validating after future completed draws.':'Next milestone: '+stageInfo.next.label+' needs '+stageInfo.next.draws+' draw cycles and '+stageInfo.next.runs+' scored runs. Remaining: '+needDraw+' draw cycles and '+needRuns+' scored runs.';
    qs('.mle-v33-command__body',command).appendChild(run);
    qs('.mle-v33-command__body',command).appendChild(progress);
    qs('.mle-v33-command__print',command).addEventListener('click',function(){printPendingBatchOnly(card);});
    body.insertBefore(command,body.firstChild);
  }
  function printPendingBatchOnly(card){
    var name=getLotteryName(card);
    var rows=qsa('.mle-pending-prediction-row',card);
    if(!rows.length){
      var dropdown=qs('.mle-pending-predictions-dropdown',card);
      if(dropdown){rows=qsa('.mle-pending-prediction-row',dropdown);}
    }
    if(!rows.length){
      alert('No pending batch predictions were found to print for this lottery. Open or create a 9-run batch first, then print again.');
      return;
    }
    var title=name+' - 9 Batch Predictions';
    var date='';
    var firstSmall=qs('.mle-pending-prediction-row small',card);
    if(firstSmall){
      var m=String(firstSmall.textContent||'').match(/Target draw:\s*([^•]+)/i);
      if(m){date=m[1].replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g,'');}
    }
    var html='<!doctype html><html><head><title>'+esc(title)+'</title><meta charset="utf-8"><style>'+
      'body{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#0A1A33;background:#fff;padding:24px;line-height:1.35}'+
      'h1{font-size:22px;margin:0 0 4px;color:#0A1A33}'+
      '.sub{color:#475569;font-size:13px;margin:0 0 16px}'+
      '.note{font-size:12px;color:#475569;border-top:1px solid #d8e0ee;margin-top:18px;padding-top:10px}'+
      '.run{break-inside:avoid;border:1px solid #cbd5e1;border-radius:12px;padding:12px;margin:0 0 10px;background:#fff}'+
      '.runhead{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:8px}'+
      '.rank{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:#dbeafe;color:#1e3a8a;font-weight:800;margin-right:8px}'+
      '.label{font-weight:800;font-size:14px;color:#0A1A33}.meta{font-size:12px;color:#64748b;margin-top:2px}.score{font-size:12px;font-weight:800;color:#0A1A33;white-space:nowrap}'+
      '.numbers{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-top:8px}.ball{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid #b7c6df;background:#f8fbff;color:#0A1A33;font-weight:800;font-size:12px}'+
      '.reason{font-size:12px;color:#475569;margin-top:8px}'+
      '@media print{body{padding:12px}.run{page-break-inside:avoid}}'+
      '</style></head><body>';
    html+='<h1>'+esc(title)+'</h1>';
    html+='<p class="sub">'+(date?'Target draw: '+esc(date)+' • ':'')+'Printed from MyLottoExpert. These are the saved predictions in this pending 9-run batch only.</p>';
    rows.slice(0, 9).forEach(function(row,idx){
      var label=txt('.mle-pending-prediction-row__head strong',row)||('Run '+(idx+1));
      var meta=txt('.mle-pending-prediction-row__head small',row)||'';
      var score=txt('.mle-pending-prediction-row__score',row)||'';
      var reason=txt('p',row)||'';
      var nums=[];
      qsa('.mle-ball,.mle-number-ball,.mle-pick-ball',row).forEach(function(b){var v=clean(b.textContent); if(v){nums.push(v);}});
      if(!nums.length){
        var nt=txt('.mle-pending-prediction-row__numbers',row);
        nums=(nt.match(/\b\d{1,2}\b/g)||[]).slice(0,30);
      }
      html+='<section class="run"><div class="runhead"><div><span class="rank">'+(idx+1)+'</span><span class="label">'+esc(label)+'</span><div class="meta">'+esc(meta)+'</div></div><div class="score">'+esc(score)+'</div></div>';
      html+='<div class="numbers">'+nums.map(function(n){return '<span class="ball">'+esc(n)+'</span>';}).join('')+'</div>';
      if(reason){html+='<div class="reason">'+esc(reason)+'</div>';}
      html+='</section>';
    });
    html+='<p class="note">Lottery drawings are random. These saved predictions are for strategy tracking and review only; they are not a guarantee of any result.</p>';
    html+='</body></html>';
    var w=window.open('','_blank','noopener,noreferrer,width=900,height=700');
    if(!w){alert('Popup printing was blocked. Please allow popups for LottoExpert, then click Print again.');return;}
    w.document.open(); w.document.write(html); w.document.close();
    setTimeout(function(){try{w.focus();w.print();}catch(e){}},300);
  }
  window.mlePrintPendingBatchOnly=printPendingBatchOnly;
  function esc(s){return String(s||'').replace(/[&<>"']/g,function(c){return {'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'}[c];});}
  function setMode(mode,store){
    mode=(mode==='quick'||mode==='full')?mode:'strategy';
    document.documentElement.classList.add('mle-v33-active');
    document.documentElement.classList.remove('mle-v33-quick','mle-v33-strategy','mle-v33-full','mle-view-quick','mle-view-strategy','mle-view-full');
    document.documentElement.classList.add('mle-v33-'+mode);
    qsa('.mle-v33-modebar__btn').forEach(function(b){b.setAttribute('aria-pressed',b.getAttribute('data-mle-v33-mode')===mode?'true':'false');});
    if(store){try{localStorage.setItem('mle.viewMode.v33',mode);}catch(e){}}
    qsa('details.mle-compact-group').forEach(function(d){
      if(mode==='full'){d.open=true;}
      else{d.open=d.classList.contains('mle-compact-group--action')||d.classList.contains('mle-compact-group--progress');}
    });
  }
  function apply(){
    document.documentElement.classList.add('mle-v33-active');
    insertModeBar();
    qsa('.mle-advisory-card').forEach(buildCommand);
    var saved='';try{saved=localStorage.getItem('mle.viewMode.v33')||'';}catch(e){}
    var mode=saved||(window.matchMedia&&window.matchMedia('(max-width: 760px)').matches?'quick':'strategy');
    setMode(mode,false);
  }
  document.addEventListener('click',function(e){
    var b=closest(e.target,'[data-mle-v33-submit-batch]');
    if(b){e.preventDefault();var card=closest(b,'.mle-advisory-card');var form=findBatchForm(card);if(form){var submit=qs('button[type="submit"],input[type="submit"]',form);if(submit){submit.click();}else{form.submit();}}return;}
    b=closest(e.target,'[data-mle-v33-review]');
    if(b){e.preventDefault();var c=closest(b,'.mle-advisory-card');var t=qs('.mle-pending-recommendations',c)||qs('.mle-visual-comparison',c)||qs('.mle-compact-group--workspace',c)||c;var d=closest(t,'details.mle-compact-group');if(d){d.open=true;}t.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'});t.classList.add('mle-flash-target');setTimeout(function(){t.classList.remove('mle-flash-target');},1600);return;}
    var single=closest(e.target,'[data-mle-v33-single]');
    if(single){var cc=closest(single,'.mle-advisory-card');if(findBatchForm(cc)&&getPending(cc)<=0){var ok=window.confirm('Run Single Prediction Instead?\n\nLottoExpert currently recommends a 9-run batch because it gives better comparison data for future narrowing. A single run is faster, but it gives less evidence.\n\nContinue with single run?');if(!ok){e.preventDefault();}}}
  },true);
  if(document.readyState==='loading'){document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){setTimeout(apply,120);});}else{setTimeout(apply,120);}
  window.mleV33ApplyCommandCenter=apply;
})();
</script>

<script>
(function(){
  if(window.__mleV34PriorityCommandCenter){return;}
  window.__mleV34PriorityCommandCenter=true;
  function qs(s,r){return (r||document).querySelector(s);} 
  function qsa(s,r){return Array.prototype.slice.call((r||document).querySelectorAll(s));}
  function closest(el,s){return el&&el.closest?el.closest(s):null;}
  function txt(el){return (el?String(el.textContent||''):'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();}
  function getCardName(card){return txt(qs('.mle-advisory-card__lottery-name',card))||'This lottery';}
  function getPending(card){var el=qs('.mle-adv-stat-chip--pending .mle-adv-stat-value',card);var n=parseInt(txt(el),10);return isNaN(n)?0:n;}
  function getScored(card){var el=qs('.mle-adv-stat-chip--scored .mle-adv-stat-value',card);var n=parseInt(txt(el),10);return isNaN(n)?0:n;}
  function getStage(card){return txt(qs('.mle-proof-badge',card))||'Learning Stage';}
  function getDrawCycles(card){var el=qs('.mle-precision-progress-v14__counts span',card);var m=txt(el).match(/(\d+)/);return m?parseInt(m[1],10):0;}
  function getNextText(card){var n=txt(qs('.mle-card-next-guide h4,.mle-card-next-guide strong',card));return n||txt(qs('.mle-adv-meta-item--next strong,.mle-scan-pill--action strong',card))||'Follow the recommended next step.';}
  function makeModeBar(){
    if(qs('.mle-v34-modebar')){return;}
    var bar=document.createElement('section');bar.className='mle-v34-modebar';bar.setAttribute('aria-label','MyLottoExpert view mode controls');
    bar.innerHTML='<div><div class="mle-v34-modebar__kicker">Workspace View</div><h3>Choose how much detail you want to see</h3><p>Strategy View shows the recommendation loop first. Quick View is for a fast answer. Full Evidence opens the supporting proof and saved workspace.</p></div><div class="mle-v34-modebar__buttons"><button type="button" data-mle-v34-mode="quick">Quick View</button><button type="button" data-mle-v34-mode="strategy">Strategy View</button><button type="button" data-mle-v34-mode="full">Full Evidence</button></div>';
    var anchor=qs('.mle-beta-notice')||qs('.mle-status-legend')||qs('.mle-advisory-card');
    if(anchor&&anchor.parentNode){anchor.parentNode.insertBefore(bar, anchor.nextSibling);} else {document.body.insertBefore(bar, document.body.firstChild);} 
    bar.addEventListener('click',function(e){var b=closest(e.target,'button[data-mle-v34-mode]');if(b){setMode(b.getAttribute('data-mle-v34-mode'),true);}});
  }
  function makePreviousResult(card){
    if(qs('.mle-v34-previous-result',card)){return qs('.mle-v34-previous-result',card);} 
    var pending=getPending(card), scored=getScored(card), draws=getDrawCycles(card);
    var sec=document.createElement('section');sec.className='mle-v34-previous-result';sec.setAttribute('aria-label','Previous recommendation result for '+getCardName(card));
    var status=pending>0?'Pending':'Learning';
    var title=pending>0?'Current recommendations are waiting for the draw':'Previous recommendation result';
    var body=pending>0?(pending+' pending runs have been recommended or saved for this draw. After the official result posts, score these runs so LottoExpert can show what matched and update the next recommendation.'):'When a previous recommendation has been scored, this area summarizes what happened and what LottoExpert learned. Keep saving and scoring runs to build this loop.';
    var small='Current evidence: '+draws+' completed draw cycle'+(draws===1?'':'s')+' • '+scored+' scored run'+(scored===1?'':'s')+'.';
    sec.innerHTML='<div class="mle-v34-previous-result__head"><div><span class="mle-v34-previous-result__eyebrow">Previous recommendation result</span><h4></h4></div><span class="mle-v34-previous-result__badge"></span></div><p></p><small></small>';
    qs('h4',sec).textContent=title;qs('p',sec).textContent=body;qs('small',sec).textContent=small;qs('.mle-v34-previous-result__badge',sec).textContent=status;
    return sec;
  }
  function ensureLabel(stack){
    if(qs('.mle-v34-section-label',stack)){return;}
    var label=document.createElement('div');label.className='mle-v34-section-label';
    label.innerHTML='<span class="mle-v34-section-label__k">Priority view</span><h4>What happened, where you are, and what to do next</h4><p>This area keeps the important recommendation loop at the top. The deeper proof, saved workspace, and advanced explanations remain available below when you want them.</p>';
    stack.appendChild(label);
  }
  function moveIf(parent,node){if(node&&parent&&node.parentNode!==parent){parent.appendChild(node);}}
  function buildCard(card){
    var body=qs('.mle-advisory-card__body',card); if(!body){return;}
    var stack=qs('.mle-v34-priority-stack',body);
    if(!stack){stack=document.createElement('div');stack.className='mle-v34-priority-stack';body.insertBefore(stack,body.firstChild);} 
    ensureLabel(stack);
    moveIf(stack,qs('.mle-card-next-guide',body));
    moveIf(stack,qs('.mle-context-advice',body));
    moveIf(stack,qs('.mle-pending-recommendations',body));
    moveIf(stack,makePreviousResult(card));
    moveIf(stack,qs('.mle-precision-lock',body));
    moveIf(stack,qs('.mle-skai-batch-test',body));
    qsa('details.mle-compact-group--evidence,details.mle-compact-group--workspace,details.mle-compact-group--advanced',body).forEach(function(d){d.open=false;});
  }
  function setMode(mode,store){
    mode=(mode==='quick'||mode==='full')?mode:'strategy';
    var html=document.documentElement;
    html.classList.remove('mle-v34-mode-quick','mle-v34-mode-strategy','mle-v34-mode-full');
    html.classList.add('mle-v34-mode-'+mode);
    qsa('.mle-v34-modebar button[data-mle-v34-mode]').forEach(function(b){b.setAttribute('aria-pressed',b.getAttribute('data-mle-v34-mode')===mode?'true':'false');});
    qsa('details.mle-compact-group').forEach(function(d){
      if(mode==='full'){d.open=true;}
      else if(d.classList.contains('mle-compact-group--evidence')||d.classList.contains('mle-compact-group--workspace')||d.classList.contains('mle-compact-group--advanced')){d.open=false;}
    });
    if(store){try{localStorage.setItem('mle.viewMode.v34',mode);}catch(e){}}
  }
  function expandCard(card){
    var body=qs('.mle-advisory-card__body',card);var tog=qs('.mle-lottery-toggle',card);
    if(body){body.style.display='block';body.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');}
    if(tog){tog.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true');var s=qs('span',tog);if(s){s.textContent='Collapse';}}
  }
  function targetForAction(source){
    var card=closest(source,'.mle-advisory-card'); if(!card){return null;}
    var t=null;
    if(source.matches&&source.matches('[data-mle-v33-review],[data-mle-v34-review],.mle-action-jump')){t=qs('.mle-pending-recommendations',card)||qs('.mle-visual-comparison',card);}
    if(!t && closest(source,'.mle-skai-batch-test,.mle-next-settings-run')){t=qs('.mle-skai-batch-test',card)||qs('.mle-next-settings-run',card);}
    if(!t && closest(source,'.mle-card-next-guide,.mle-context-advice')){t=closest(source,'.mle-card-next-guide,.mle-context-advice');}
    if(!t){t=closest(source,'section,details,.mle-mini-card,.mle-card-list-grid')||card;}
    return {card:card,target:t};
  }
  function storeReturnPoint(source){
    var info=targetForAction(source); if(!info){return;}
    var id=info.target.id || info.card.id || '';
    if(!id){id='mle-return-'+Date.now();info.target.id=id;}
    try{sessionStorage.setItem('mle.returnPoint.v34',JSON.stringify({id:id,cardId:info.card.id||'',y:window.pageYOffset||document.documentElement.scrollTop||0,t:Date.now()}));}catch(e){}
  }
  function restoreReturnPoint(){
    var raw='';try{raw=sessionStorage.getItem('mle.returnPoint.v34')||'';}catch(e){} if(!raw){return;}
    var data=null;try{data=JSON.parse(raw);}catch(e){data=null;} if(!data||!data.t||Date.now()-data.t>20*60*1000){return;}
    try{sessionStorage.removeItem('mle.returnPoint.v34');}catch(e){}
    setTimeout(function(){
      var target=(data.id&&document.getElementById(data.id))||null;var card=(data.cardId&&document.getElementById(data.cardId))||(target?closest(target,'.mle-advisory-card'):null);
      if(card){expandCard(card);buildCard(card);} 
      if(target){var details=closest(target,'details');if(details){details.open=true;}try{target.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'});}catch(e){target.scrollIntoView(true);}target.classList.add('mle-v34-flash');setTimeout(function(){target.classList.remove('mle-v34-flash');},2000);} else if(typeof data.y==='number'){try{window.scrollTo(0,data.y);}catch(e){}}
    },360);
  }
  function bindReturnCapture(){
    document.addEventListener('submit',function(e){var f=e.target;if(f&&closest(f,'.mle-advisory-card')){storeReturnPoint(f);}},true);
    document.addEventListener('click',function(e){var el=closest(e.target,'button,input[type="submit"],a');if(el&&closest(el,'.mle-advisory-card')){storeReturnPoint(el);}},true);
  }
  function apply(){
    makeModeBar();
    qsa('.mle-advisory-card').forEach(buildCard);
    var saved='';try{saved=localStorage.getItem('mle.viewMode.v34')||'';}catch(e){}
    var mode=saved||(window.matchMedia&&window.matchMedia('(max-width:760px)').matches?'quick':'strategy');
    setMode(mode,false);
    restoreReturnPoint();
  }
  bindReturnCapture();
  if(document.readyState==='loading'){document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){setTimeout(apply,260);});}else{setTimeout(apply,260);} 
  window.mleV34PriorityCommandCenterApply=apply;
})();
</script>

<script>
(function(){
  'use strict';
  function closest(el, sel){while(el && el.nodeType===1){if(el.matches && el.matches(sel)){return el;}el=el.parentElement;}return null;}
  function byId(id){id=String(id||'').replace(/^#/,'');return id?document.getElementById(id):null;}
  function openLotteryCardFrom(el){
    var card = closest(el, '.mle-advisory-card');
    if(!card){return null;}
    var body = card.querySelector('.mle-advisory-card__body, .mle-lottery-card-body, .mle-card-body');
    var toggle = card.querySelector('.mle-lottery-toggle, [aria-controls]');
    if(body){
      body.style.display='block';
      body.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');
      if(toggle){toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true');}
    }
    return card;
  }
  function revealTarget(btn){
    var targetId = btn.getAttribute('data-open-details') || btn.getAttribute('data-target-panel') || btn.getAttribute('data-target-section') || '';
    var target = byId(targetId);
    if(!target){return false;}
    openLotteryCardFrom(btn);
    if(target.tagName && target.tagName.toLowerCase()==='details'){
      target.open = true;
    }
    var parentDetails = target.closest ? target.closest('details') : null;
    while(parentDetails){parentDetails.open=true;parentDetails=parentDetails.parentElement ? parentDetails.parentElement.closest('details') : null;}
    if(target.style && (target.style.display==='none' || target.getAttribute('aria-hidden')==='true')){
      target.style.display='block';
      target.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');
    }
    setTimeout(function(){
      try{target.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'start'});}catch(_){target.scrollIntoView(true);}
      target.classList.add('mle-action-target-flash');
      setTimeout(function(){target.classList.remove('mle-action-target-flash');}, 1500);
    }, 60);
    return true;
  }
  document.addEventListener('click', function(evt){
    var btn = closest(evt.target, '.mle-section-shortcut-btn[data-open-details], .mle-section-shortcut-btn[data-target-panel], .mle-print-pending-btn');
    if(!btn){return;}
    if(btn.classList.contains('mle-print-pending-btn') || btn.getAttribute('data-mle-print-pending')==='1'){
      evt.preventDefault();
      if(evt.stopPropagation){evt.stopPropagation();}
      if(evt.stopImmediatePropagation){evt.stopImmediatePropagation();}
      var cardForPrint = closest(btn, '.mle-advisory-card');
      if(window.mlePrintPendingBatchOnly && cardForPrint){
        window.mlePrintPendingBatchOnly(cardForPrint);
        return;
      }
      var source = closest(btn, '.mle-pending-predictions-dropdown');
      if(source){source.open = true;}
      return;
    }
    if(btn.getAttribute('data-open-details')){
      evt.preventDefault();
      revealTarget(btn);
    }
  }, true);
})();
</script>

<script>
(function(){
  if(window.__mleV37RunChoicesAndMethodFix){return;}
  window.__mleV37RunChoicesAndMethodFix=true;
  function qs(s,r){return (r||document).querySelector(s);} function qsa(s,r){return Array.prototype.slice.call((r||document).querySelectorAll(s));}
  function closest(el,s){return el&&el.closest?el.closest(s):null;} function clean(s){return String(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();}
  function txt(s,r){var e=qs(s,r);return e?clean(e.textContent):'';} function n(s){var m=String(s||'').match(/(\d+)/);return m?parseInt(m[1],10):0;}
  function pending(card){return n(txt('.mle-adv-stat-chip--pending .mle-adv-stat-value',card)||txt('.mle-scan-pill--pending strong',card));}
  function skaiUrl(card){var a=qs('a[data-mle-confirm="regular-skai"]',card)||qs('a[href*="skai-lottery-prediction"]',card)||qs('a[href*="/artificial-intelligence/skai"]',card)||qs('a[href*="artificial-intelligence"]',card);return a?a.getAttribute('href'):'#';}
  function batchForm(card){
    var forms=qsa('form',card);
    for(var i=0;i<forms.length;i++){
      var v=(qs('input[name="mle_action"]',forms[i])||{}).value||'';
      if(/create_skai_batch|create.*batch|skai_batch/i.test(v)){return forms[i];}
      if(forms[i].className&&/skai-batch|batch-test|next-settings/i.test(String(forms[i].className))){return forms[i];}
    }
    return null;
  }
  function hasReadyBatch(card){return !!(batchForm(card)||qs('.mle-open-skai-precision-batch',card)||/Ready to Run/i.test(txt('.mle-skai-batch-test',card)));}
  function fixTrackLabels(card){
    var direction=txt('.mle-adv-meta-item--method strong',card)||txt('.mle-scan-pill--direction strong',card)||'';
    var trackEl=qs('.mle-adv-meta-item--track strong',card);
    var titleTrack=qs('.mle-method-learning-track [class*="learning"] strong',card);
    if(/skai/i.test(direction)){
      if(trackEl && /neural|ai track|classic/i.test(trackEl.textContent)){trackEl.textContent='SKAI Track';}
      qsa('.mle-method-learning-track span,.mle-method-learning-track strong',card).forEach(function(el){
        if(/Neural AI Track|Classic AI Track|AI Track/i.test(el.textContent)){el.textContent=el.textContent.replace(/Neural AI Track|Classic AI Track|AI Track/ig,'SKAI Precision Track');}
      });
      var warn=qs('.mle-v37-track-warning',card);
      if(!warn && trackEl){
        warn=document.createElement('div');warn.className='mle-v37-track-warning';warn.textContent='SKAI detected as the leading evidence direction. This card is using the SKAI Precision Track, not the Neural AI track.';
        trackEl.closest('.mle-adv-meta-item').appendChild(warn);
      }
    }
  }
  function makeA(txt,href,cls){var a=document.createElement('a');a.href=href||'#';a.className=cls||'mle-v37-btn';a.textContent=txt;a.target='_blank';a.rel='noopener noreferrer';return a;}
  function makeB(txt,cls){var b=document.createElement('button');b.type='button';b.className=cls||'mle-v37-btn';b.textContent=txt;return b;}
  function submitBatch(card){var f=batchForm(card);if(!f){return false;} var btn=qs('button[type="submit"],input[type="submit"]',f); if(btn){btn.click();}else{f.submit();} return true;}
  function reviewPending(card){var t=qs('.mle-pending-recommendations',card)||qs('.mle-pending-predictions-dropdown-v36',card)||qs('.mle-visual-comparison',card)||card; var d=closest(t,'details'); if(d){d.open=true;} t.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'}); t.classList.add('mle-flash-target'); setTimeout(function(){t.classList.remove('mle-flash-target');},1800);}
  function buildRunPanel(card){
    if(qs('.mle-v37-run-panel',card)){return;}
    var anchor=qs('.mle-v33-command',card)||qs('.mle-v34-priority-stack',card)||qs('.mle-card-next-guide',card)||qs('.mle-advisory-card__body',card); if(!anchor){return;}
    var p=pending(card), url=skaiUrl(card), ready=hasReadyBatch(card);
    var panel=document.createElement('section');panel.className='mle-v37-run-panel';panel.setAttribute('aria-label','Choose your next run');
    var recTitle,recBody,recBadge='Recommended learning path',recBtnText, recMode='recommended';
    if(p>0){recTitle='Batch already in progress'; recBody=p+' pending run'+(p===1?' is':'s are')+' already waiting for the next official draw result. Do not start another batch until these are scored.'; recBtnText='Review Pending Runs'; recMode='pending';}
    else if(ready){recTitle='MyLottoExpert 9-Run Focus Batch'; recBody='Use this when LottoExpert has prepared a predetermined narrowing or history-horizon batch. Run 1 is the control; runs 2-9 test the recommended range.'; recBtnText='Create Focus 9-Batch and Open SKAI';}
    else{recTitle='Regular SKAI 9-Run Batch'; recBody='Use this to build evidence when no predetermined focus batch is ready. It gives LottoExpert more comparison data than a single prediction.'; recBtnText='Open SKAI to Run Regular 9-Batch';}
    panel.innerHTML='<div class="mle-v37-run-panel__head"><div><span class="mle-v37-run-panel__eyebrow">Choose your next run</span><h4>Recommended batch path and optional single prediction</h4><p>The 9-run batch is the recommended learning path. A single prediction is available, but it gives less comparison evidence.</p></div></div><div class="mle-v37-run-options"><article class="mle-v37-run-option mle-v37-run-option--recommended"><span class="mle-v37-run-badge"></span><strong></strong><p></p><div class="mle-v37-run-actions"></div><div class="mle-v37-run-note"></div></article><article class="mle-v37-run-option"><span class="mle-v37-run-badge">Optional quick path</span><strong>Single SKAI Prediction</strong><p>Use this only when you want one quick prediction. It does not create the same learning evidence as a 9-run batch.</p><div class="mle-v37-run-actions"></div><div class="mle-v37-run-note">If LottoExpert recommends a batch, the single run is secondary because it cannot compare 9 settings against the same draw.</div></article></div>';
    if(recMode==='pending'){qs('.mle-v37-run-option--recommended',panel).classList.add('mle-v37-run-option--pending');}
    qs('.mle-v37-run-option--recommended .mle-v37-run-badge',panel).textContent=recBadge;
    qs('.mle-v37-run-option--recommended strong',panel).textContent=recTitle;
    qs('.mle-v37-run-option--recommended p',panel).textContent=recBody;
    qs('.mle-v37-run-option--recommended .mle-v37-run-note',panel).textContent=ready && p<=0 ? 'This is the predetermined MyLottoExpert focus batch. It is different from the regular SKAI 9-combo batch.' : (p>0 ? 'Current action is already complete. Wait for the draw, then score the pending runs.' : 'Regular SKAI 9-run batch is the right evidence-building path before a focus batch is ready.');
    var recActions=qs('.mle-v37-run-option--recommended .mle-v37-run-actions',panel);
    if(p>0){var rb=makeB('Review Pending Runs','mle-v37-btn mle-v37-btn--primary');rb.addEventListener('click',function(){reviewPending(card);});recActions.appendChild(rb);} 
    else if(ready){var fb=makeB(recBtnText,'mle-v37-btn mle-v37-btn--primary');fb.addEventListener('click',function(){ if(!submitBatch(card)){var ob=qs('.mle-open-skai-precision-batch',card); if(ob){ob.click();}} });recActions.appendChild(fb); var reg=makeA('Open SKAI Regular 9-Batch Instead',url,'mle-v37-btn mle-v37-btn--secondary');recActions.appendChild(reg);} 
    else {recActions.appendChild(makeA(recBtnText,url,'mle-v37-btn mle-v37-btn--primary'));}
    var singleActions=qs('.mle-v37-run-option:not(.mle-v37-run-option--recommended) .mle-v37-run-actions',panel); var single=makeA('Open SKAI Single Prediction',url,'mle-v37-btn mle-v37-btn--secondary'); single.setAttribute('data-mle-v37-single','1'); singleActions.appendChild(single);
    if(anchor.classList&&anchor.classList.contains('mle-v33-command')){anchor.parentNode.insertBefore(panel,anchor.nextSibling);}else{anchor.parentNode.insertBefore(panel,anchor);}
  }
  document.addEventListener('click',function(e){var s=closest(e.target,'[data-mle-v37-single]'); if(s){var card=closest(s,'.mle-advisory-card'); if(card && pending(card)<=0 && hasReadyBatch(card)){var ok=window.confirm('Run Single Prediction Instead?\n\nLottoExpert has a 9-run batch path available. The batch gives better comparison evidence for learning and narrowing. A single run is faster, but it gives less evidence.\n\nContinue with single prediction?'); if(!ok){e.preventDefault();}}}},true);
  function apply(){qsa('.mle-advisory-card').forEach(function(card){fixTrackLabels(card);buildRunPanel(card);});}
  if(document.readyState==='loading'){document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){setTimeout(apply,200);setTimeout(apply,900);});}else{setTimeout(apply,200);setTimeout(apply,900);} 
  window.mleV37ApplyRunChoices=apply;
})();
</script>
<!-- /[[MLE_V37_RUN_CHOICES_AND_METHOD_TRACK_FIX]] -->

<!-- [[MLE_V38_NUMBER_BALL_RENDER_FIX]] -->
<style>
/* V38: make recommendation/summary number sets look like lottery balls instead of raw text. */
.mle-v38-ball-preview{margin-top:8px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;align-items:flex-start;}
.mle-v38-ball-preview__label{display:block;font-size:.68rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;font-weight:950;color:#64748b;margin-bottom:2px;}
.mle-v38-ball-preview .mle-ball-list,.mle-v38-ball-inline{display:inline-flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px;vertical-align:middle;margin:2px 0;}
.mle-v38-ball-inline .mle-ball{margin-right:0;}
.mle-v38-summary-text{display:block;margin-bottom:4px;}
.mle-v33-card--result .mle-ball,.mle-v34-previous-result .mle-ball{width:24px;height:24px;font-size:11px;}
.mle-settings-repeat .mle-v38-ball-inline,.mle-current-lock .mle-v38-ball-inline{margin-left:4px;}
</style>
<script>
(function(){
  if(window.__mleV38NumberBallRenderFix){return;}
  window.__mleV38NumberBallRenderFix=true;
  function qs(sel,root){return (root||document).querySelector(sel);} 
  function qsa(sel,root){return Array.prototype.slice.call((root||document).querySelectorAll(sel));}
  function closest(el,sel){return el&&el.closest?el.closest(sel):null;}
  function clean(s){return String(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();}
  function esc(s){return String(s||'').replace(/[&<>"']/g,function(c){return {'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'}[c];});}
  function cloneBallHtml(root){
    if(!root){return '';}
    var set=qs('.mle-ball-set',root);
    if(set){return set.outerHTML;}
    var list=qs('.mle-ball-list',root);
    if(list){return list.outerHTML;}
    return '';
  }
  function ballsFromTokens(tokens){
    if(!tokens||tokens.length<3){return '';}
    var html='<span class="mle-v38-ball-inline mle-ball-list" aria-label="Lottery numbers">';
    for(var i=0;i<tokens.length;i++){
      html+='<span class="mle-ball">'+esc(tokens[i])+'</span>';
    }
    html+='</span>';
    return html;
  }
  function extractDelimitedNumbers(s){
    s=String(s||'');
    if(/%|score|lift|cycle|cycles|runs|draws|date|target|window|range|from|to|thru|through|between/i.test(s)){return [];}
    var tokens=s.match(/\b\d{1,2}\b/g)||[];
    if(tokens.length<3||tokens.length>30){return [];}
    return tokens;
  }
  function replaceSimpleNumberList(el){
    if(!el||el.getAttribute('data-mle-v38-ballified')==='1'){return;}
    if(qs('.mle-ball,.mle-ball-list,.mle-v38-ball-inline',el)){return;}
    var html=el.innerHTML;
    var txt=clean(el.textContent);
    var m=txt.match(/^(.*?)(numbers?|saved numbers?|recommended numbers?|predictions?)\s*[:\-]?\s*((?:\b\d{1,2}\b[\s,;|\-]*){3,30})(.*)$/i);
    if(!m){return;}
    var nums=(m[3].match(/\b\d{1,2}\b/g)||[]);
    if(nums.length<3){return;}
    el.innerHTML='<span class="mle-v38-summary-text">'+esc(clean((m[1]||'')+(m[2]||'Numbers')+':'))+'</span>'+ballsFromTokens(nums)+(m[4]?'<span class="mle-v38-summary-text"> '+esc(clean(m[4]))+'</span>':'');
    el.setAttribute('data-mle-v38-ballified','1');
  }
  function improveAtAGlance(card){
    var command=qs('.mle-v33-command',card);
    if(!command){return;}
    var resultCard=qs('.mle-v33-card--result',command);
    if(!resultCard){return;}
    var p=qs('p',resultCard);
    if(!p||resultCard.getAttribute('data-mle-v38-result-enhanced')==='1'){return;}

    var rec=qs('.mle-pending-recommendation-card',card);
    if(rec){
      var title=clean(qs('.mle-pending-recommendation-card__title',rec)?qs('.mle-pending-recommendation-card__title',rec).textContent:'Top recommendation')||'Top recommendation';
      var strong=clean(qs('strong',rec)?qs('strong',rec).textContent:'');
      var score=clean(qs('.mle-pending-recommendation-card__score strong',rec)?qs('.mle-pending-recommendation-card__score strong',rec).textContent:'');
      var ballHtml=cloneBallHtml(qs('.mle-pending-recommendation-card__numbers',rec)||rec);
      var note=clean(qs('.mle-pending-recommendation-card p',rec)?qs('.mle-pending-recommendation-card p',rec).textContent:'');
      var out='<span class="mle-v38-summary-text"><strong>'+esc(title)+'</strong>'+(strong?' — '+esc(strong):'')+(score?' • Evidence '+esc(score):'')+'</span>';
      if(ballHtml){out+='<div class="mle-v38-ball-preview"><span class="mle-v38-ball-preview__label">Saved numbers</span>'+ballHtml+'</div>';}
      if(note){out+='<span class="mle-v38-summary-text">'+esc(note.substring(0,180))+'</span>';}
      p.innerHTML=out;
      resultCard.setAttribute('data-mle-v38-result-enhanced','1');
      return;
    }

    var rows=qsa('.mle-visual-row,.mle-run-result-row,.mle-saved-run-row',card);
    for(var i=0;i<rows.length;i++){
      var rt=clean(rows[i].textContent);
      if(rt && /actual draw|matched|hits|scored/i.test(rt) && !/upcoming|pending/i.test(rt)){
        var lists=qsa('.mle-ball-set,.mle-ball-list',rows[i]).slice(0,2);
        if(lists.length){
          var html='<span class="mle-v38-summary-text">Previous scored result is available. Review the saved numbers and actual result below.</span>';
          for(var j=0;j<lists.length;j++){
            html+='<div class="mle-v38-ball-preview"><span class="mle-v38-ball-preview__label">'+(j===0?'Saved numbers':'Actual / comparison')+'</span>'+lists[j].outerHTML+'</div>';
          }
          p.innerHTML=html;
          resultCard.setAttribute('data-mle-v38-result-enhanced','1');
          return;
        }
      }
    }
    replaceSimpleNumberList(p);
  }
  function improvePreviousResultPanels(card){
    qsa('.mle-v34-previous-result p,.mle-recommendation-result-v32 p,.mle-loop-v32-panel p',card).forEach(replaceSimpleNumberList);
  }
  function improveSettingsNumberLists(card){
    qsa('.mle-settings-repeat p,.mle-current-lock p,.mle-strong-evidence__item p,.mle-mini-card p',card).forEach(function(el){
      if(qs('.mle-ball,.mle-ball-list,.mle-v38-ball-inline',el)){return;}
      var txt=clean(el.textContent);
      var tokens=extractDelimitedNumbers(txt);
      if(tokens.length<3){return;}
      var strong=qs('strong',el);
      if(strong){
        var label=strong.outerHTML;
        el.innerHTML=label+' '+ballsFromTokens(tokens);
        el.setAttribute('data-mle-v38-ballified','1');
      }else{
        el.innerHTML=ballsFromTokens(tokens);
        el.setAttribute('data-mle-v38-ballified','1');
      }
    });
  }
  function apply(){
    qsa('.mle-advisory-card').forEach(function(card){
      improveAtAGlance(card);
      improvePreviousResultPanels(card);
      improveSettingsNumberLists(card);
    });
    qsa('.mle-pending-prediction-row__numbers,.mle-pending-recommendation-card__numbers,.mle-visual-row').forEach(function(el){
      if(qs('.mle-ball,.mle-ball-list',el)){return;}
      replaceSimpleNumberList(el);
    });
  }
  if(document.readyState==='loading'){
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){setTimeout(apply,250);setTimeout(apply,1000);});
  }else{
    setTimeout(apply,250);setTimeout(apply,1000);
  }
  document.addEventListener('click',function(e){
    if(closest(e.target,'.mle-lottery-toggle,.mle-section-toggle,summary,.mle-section-shortcut-btn,.mle-v33-modebar__btn')){setTimeout(apply,250);}
  },true);
  window.mleV38ApplyNumberBallRender=apply;
})();
</script>
<!-- /[[MLE_V38_NUMBER_BALL_RENDER_FIX]] -->

<!-- [[MLE_V39_PRINT_BATCH_AND_RUN_CLARITY]] -->
<style>
.mle-v33-command__print::before{content:'🖨';margin-right:6px;}
.mle-v33-run__option--rec strong,.mle-v37-run-option--recommended strong{font-size:1.02rem!important;}
.mle-v33-run__option--rec .mle-v33-run__badge,.mle-v37-run-option--recommended .mle-v37-run-badge{background:#dbeafe!important;color:#1d4ed8!important;border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.30)!important;}
</style>
